### [290] [Specific Domain Ontology Construction Using Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20691)
*Vivian Magri Alcaldi Soares,Renata Wassermann*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 利用LLM（GPT-3.5/GPT-4）作为领域专家自动构建概念层级，为“蓝亚马逊”（巴西海域）生成本体。专家评估显示输出概念整体连贯但均需人工 refinement 才能完全满足领域需求。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 手工构建本体费时费力，许多特定领域缺乏参考本体，因此希望利用LLM强大的自然语言理解能力来辅助本体开发。

Method: 让GPT-3.5和GPT-4扮演领域专家，针对初始概念自动构建概念层级（本体），并在巴西海域（蓝亚马逊）领域生成了20个本体，随后由人类专家评估。

Result: 模型能够构建整体连贯的领域概念化，但没有任何一个输出能完全令人满意，均需要进一步精炼才能作为该领域的表示。

Conclusion: LLM可作为辅助工具加速本体构建，但自动生成的结果仍需人工 refinement，无法一步到位达到参考本体标准。

Abstract: Ontologies are useful structures to organize and maintain information that can be understood both by humans and systems. However, since their manual crafting is a laborious task, many specific domains lack reference ontologies. The outstanding ability for understanding natural language demonstrated by the Large Language Models (LLMs) has motivated their application to aid on a variety of fields, including on ontology development. This work presents the experimentation with a technique that uses LLMs in the role of domain experts to build conceptual hierarchies for a given initial concept. Twenty ontologies automatically constructed for the domain of the Brazilian maritime territory (a.k.a the Blue Amazon) using GPT-3.5 and GPT-4 were then evaluated by human experts. The models were able to construct overall coherent conceptualizations of the domain, but none of the outputs was completely satisfactory as a representation of the context without refinement.

</details>


### [291] [MindAlign: Decoding Inner Speech from fMRI Signals via Multimodal Embedding Alignment under Limited Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20696)
*Muxuan Liu,Ichiro Kobayashi,Satoshi Nishida*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出MindAlign，一个解耦的两阶段脑到语言框架，通过神经-语义对齐将fMRI信号映射到共享语义空间，再结合视觉上下文提示冻结的多模态语言模型生成文本，无需微调语言模型，且在无声图像描述任务中优于基线，并能跨被试泛化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有脑到文本解码方法依赖任务特定的解码器微调，限制了可扩展性且难以适应新被试。非侵入式脑信号解码内心言语面临缺乏显性语言输出、训练数据有限、被试间差异大等挑战。

Method: MindAlign采用解耦的两阶段框架：第一阶段学习被试特定的神经-语义对齐，将fMRI活动映射到共享多模态语义空间，提取内部生成句子的潜在语义草图；第二阶段将该草图与视觉上下文结合，提示冻结的多模态语言模型进行自由文本生成。

Result: 在无声图像描述任务的fMRI数据上，MindAlign一致优于fMRI-only和随机基线。学习到的语义到语言投影可跨被试泛化，与被试特定的神经对齐配对后能实现有效解码。

Conclusion: 神经信号调制了超越图像驱动先验的语义内容，支持一种可扩展且模块化的脑到文本解码方向。

Abstract: Decoding inner speech from non-invasive brain signals remains a fundamental challenge due to the absence of overt linguistic output, limited training data, and large inter-subject variability. Existing brain-to-text approaches often rely on task-specific decoder fine-tuning, which restricts scalability and complicates adaptation to new participants. We propose MindAlign, a decoupled two-stage brain-to-language framework that enables open-ended text generation from fMRI signals without modifying the underlying language model. The first stage learns a subject-specific neural-semantic alignment that maps fMRI activity into a shared multimodal semantic space, extracting a latent semantic sketch of the internally generated sentence. The second stage integrates this sketch with visual context to prompt a frozen multimodal language model for free-form generation. Experiments on fMRI data collected during silent image description demonstrate that the proposed approach consistently outperforms fMRI-only and random baselines. We further show that the learned semantic-to-language projection can generalize across subjects, enabling effective decoding when paired with subject-specific neural alignment. These results indicate that neural signals modulate semantic content beyond image-driven priors, supporting a scalable and modular direction for brain-to-text decoding.

</details>


### [292] [VeriBound: PAC-Bayesian Generalization Bounds for Process Reward Models Trained with Formal Verification Tools](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20740)
*Amirul Rahman,Mohammed Sabih Alsharari*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: VeriBound提出了首个关于形式化验证工具训练的PRM的PAC-Bayesian泛化理论框架，建立了四个核心理论结果：泛化误差界、样本复杂度、收敛率和Best-of-K性能退化界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: FOVER等方法观察到用形式化验证工具(Z3, Isabelle)自动标注的PRM能从符号任务泛化到多样化推理基准，但缺乏理论解释，没有关于泛化误差、样本复杂度、收敛率或Best-of-K性能的理论界。

Method: 提出VeriBound理论框架，利用PAC-Bayesian分析建立四个理论结果：(i) 泛化误差界，关联形式化验证标注数据的经验误差与未见推理任务的期望误差；(ii) 样本复杂度界 O(d log(d/δ) / ε²)；(iii) 线性收敛率分析；(iv) 步骤级验证误差到Best-of-K性能退化的传播界。

Result: 建立了形式化验证标签训练的PRM的PAC-Bayesian泛化界；推导了样本复杂度O(d log(d/δ)/ε²)；证明了L-光滑和有界方差条件下的线性收敛率；给出了步骤级验证误差与Best-of-K性能退化的关系界。

Conclusion: 为形式化验证监督的PRM训练提供了首个完整的理论保障，填补了该领域缺乏理论解释的空白。

Abstract: Process Reward Models (PRMs) provide step-level verification for Large Language Model (LLM) reasoning, yet their training data acquisition remains a bottleneck: human annotation is costly and Monte Carlo roll-out estimates are noisy. A recent approach, FOVER, trains PRMs on step-level error labels automatically annotated by formal verification tools such as Z3 and Isabelle, and empirically observes cross-task generalization from symbolic tasks to diverse reasoning benchmarks. However, this generalization phenomenon lacks any theoretical explanation, and no formal bounds exist on the generalization error, sample complexity, convergence rate, or downstream Best-of-K performance of such PRMs. We propose VeriBound, a theoretical framework that provides PAC-Bayesian generalization bounds for PRMs trained with formal verification tools. We establish four main results: (i) a PAC-Bayesian generalization bound that relates the empirical verification error on formal-verification-annotated training data to the expected error on unseen reasoning tasks, with the bound depending on the formal verification accuracy and the divergence between training and test task distributions; (ii) a sample complexity result showing that $O(d \log(d/δ) / ε^2)$ formal-verification-annotated examples suffice to achieve generalization error $ε$ with probability $1-δ$, where $d$ is the complexity of the PRM hypothesis class; (iii) a convergence analysis proving that PRM training with formal verification labels converges at a linear rate under $L$-smoothness and bounded variance conditions; and (iv) an error propagation bound that relates step-level verification error to Best-of-K performance degradation.

</details>


### [293] [From Sentiment to Actionable Insights: A Data-Driven Public Sentiment Analysis of Advanced Air Mobility](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20751)
*Esrat Farhana Dulia,Amina Dhaher,Raiful Hasan,Syed Arbab Mohd Shihab*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究分析了Reddit和Quora上30.6万条文本，使用AI情感分析模型评估公众对先进空中交通（AAM）的态度。通过比较7种模型，发现ModernBERT表现最佳，并识别出20个主题和6大公众关切集群，为提升公众接受度提供策略建议。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AAM的成功部署不仅依赖技术进步，更取决于公众接受度，而公众接受度会影响政府支持、监管、噪声标准等关键因素。因此，理解公众对AAM的情绪对于识别社会障碍和制定采纳策略至关重要。

Method: 收集Reddit和Quora上的306,009条人工生成文本，评估7种情感分析模型（基于词典、机器学习、深度学习、Transformer等），选出表现最佳的ModernBERT对全数据集进行标注，随后使用LDA主题模型在每个情感类别内发现潜在主题，并进行跨情感主题分析。

Result: 识别出20个不同主题，并追溯其2008-2025年的演变。跨情感主题分析揭示6大公众关切集群：劳动力与技能发展（25.29%）、监管与合规（24.64%）、无人机技术性能（20.99%）、军事/地缘政治/国防（14.58%）、安全与运营风险（8.51%）、噪声与干扰（5.98%）。

Conclusion: 基于研究发现提出可操作的策略以解决公众关切，从而提升公众接受度并支持AAM的部署。

Abstract: Advanced Air Mobility (AAM) is an emerging low-altitude air transportation system whose successful deployment depends not only on technological advancement but also on public acceptance. This acceptance will drive government support, regulations, noise standards, and willingness to fly, and in turn the overall commercial viability of AAM. Understanding public sentiment toward AAM is therefore essential for identifying its societal barriers and informing its adoption strategies. This study analyzes 306,009 human-generated texts collected from Reddit and Quora to examine public discourse on AAM using AI-based models. Because multiple sentiment analysis models exist, identifying the most accurate model is critical for reliable AAM sentiment prediction and trustworthy public opinion analysis. Accordingly, seven models spanning lexicon-based, machine learning, deep learning, and transformer-based approaches are evaluated for AAM-specific sentiment classification. ModernBERT achieves the best classification performance and is used to label the full dataset. Using the resulting sentiment labels, Latent Dirichlet Allocation (LDA) is applied within each sentiment class to uncover latent topics in public opinion. The analysis identifies 20 distinct topics and traces their temporal evolution from 2008 to 2025. A cross-sentiment topic analysis further reveals six major clusters of public concern: workforce and skill development (25.29% of the dataset), regulation and compliance (24.64%), technical performance of drones (20.99%), military, geopolitics, and defense (14.58%), safety and operational risks (8.51%), and noise and disturbance (5.98%). Based on these findings, this study provides actionable strategies to address these concerns, thereby, improving public acceptance and support AAM deployment.

</details>


### [294] [FirstPass: Grounding AI Scientific Judgment in Multi-Round Editorial Outcomes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20769)
*Prabhjot Singh,Somnath Luitel,Manmeet Singh,Josh Durkee*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出FirstPass，一个基于Nature Communications多轮同行评审对话数据集微调的模型，解决了现有AI审稿系统在领域局限、忽略迭代对话、评估标准不当三方面的问题。通过响应掩码损失函数、LoRA微调Qwen2.5-7B，在编辑决策预测上达到80.5%准确率，生成评审意见平均1187词，显著优于基线模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI同行评审系统存在三个核心缺陷：(1) 仅在计算机科学和机器学习领域训练，缺乏跨领域泛化能力；(2) 忽视科学验证中的多轮迭代对话过程；(3) 评估标准停留在风格模仿而非真正的编辑判断。这些局限使得现有系统无法在真实的跨学科科学评审中发挥作用。

Method: (1) 构建FirstPass数据集：从Nature Communications收集3,668个完整的多轮同行评审对话，涵盖生物学、化学、神经科学、物理学和地球科学五个领域，利用2022年11月实施的透明同行评审政策确保数据完整性；(2) 对Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct进行LoRA微调，设计三个任务：评审生成、评审者更新、修订周期预测；(3) 提出响应掩码损失函数（response-only loss masking）作为模型训练的必要条件。

Result: (1) 编辑决策预测：准确率80.5%，F1-macro 78.2%，超过Gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview零样本10.4个百分点，所有结果均具有统计显著性；(2) 评审生成：平均1187词，接近人类参考的2155词，ROUGE-L达0.154；(3) 跨领域表现一致，在五个学科上均有效；(4) 无响应掩码损失时准确率仅62.0%，低于多数基线。

Conclusion: FirstPass通过引入多领域多轮对话数据集和响应掩码损失函数，有效解决了现有AI审稿系统的三大缺陷，能够作为提交前的科学合作者，模拟专家评审并预测修订结果。这为AI辅助同行评审提供了更可靠、更具跨学科泛化能力的解决方案。

Abstract: AI systems for peer review fail on three fronts: they train on Computer Science and Machine Learning venues alone, ignore the iterative dialogue that validates science, and evaluate on stylistic mimicry rather than real editorial judgment. We introduce FirstPass, a dataset and fine-tuned model that addresses all three. Curating 3,668 complete multi-round peer-review dialogues from Nature Communications across five scientific domains (biology, chemistry, neuroscience, physics, and earth science), we exploit mandatory transparent peer review (instituted November 2022) and verify 100% content integrity by automated audit. We fine-tune Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct via Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) on three tasks: review generation, reviewer updating, and revision-cycle prediction. Our key finding is that response-only loss masking is a prerequisite, not an optimization: without it, accuracy is 62.0%, below the majority baseline; with it, FirstPass achieves 80.5% accuracy and F1-macro 78.2% on predicting editorial outcomes (Standard vs. Extended revision cycles), outperforming Gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview zero-shot by 10.4 percentage points and all baselines with statistical significance (McNemar p < 0.001). On generation, FirstPass produces reviews averaging 1,187 words, substantially closer to human references (2,155 words) than any baseline, achieving ROUGE-L 0.154 with significant gains over Qwen and DeepSeek zero-shot (p < 0.001). Deployed in the pre-submission loop as an anticipatory scientific co-author, FirstPass simulates expert critique and predicts revision cycle outcomes before submission, giving authors the judgment a trusted colleague would provide, with consistent cross-domain performance across five disciplines.

</details>


### [295] [Beyond 'One Language, One Script': Quantifying Orthographic Bias in Multilingual VLMs with PuMVR](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20770)
*Prabhjot Singh,Bhushan Pawar,Madhu Reddiboina*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文揭示了当前视觉-语言模型（VLM）存在一个重大缺陷：假设一种语言对应一种书写系统，忽略了多文字语言（如旁遮普语）用户。作者提出PuMVR基准，通过375个跨三种文字的文化任务测试了10个先进VLM，发现显著的"文字差距"——模型在不同文字上表现差异巨大，准确率差达16%，文字一致性率（SCR）低至24.8%。视觉输入能提升绝对性能但无法缩小相对偏差，推理模式在文字间缺乏迁移性。提议将SCR作为核心评估指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前VLM被宣传具有多语言能力，但实际存在错误假设：一种语言对应单一书写系统。这忽略了数十亿使用多文字语言（如旁遮普语、塞尔维亚语等）的用户，模型的性能可能因文字偏见而严重分裂。作者旨在量化和揭示这种文字依赖偏差。

Method: 构建PuMVR基准，包含375个文化相关的图像推理任务，覆盖旁遮普语的三种活跃文字（Gurmukhi、Shahmukhi、Roman）。评估10个先进VLM，对比模型在不同文字下解决相同视觉谜题的表现，计算文字一致性率（SCR）和准确率差异。

Result: 发现显著的"文字差距"：模型在不同文字间准确率差高达16%，SCR最低仅24.8%。视觉输入虽能提升绝对性能，但无法缩小相对偏差。推理模式缺乏跨文字迁移性，Chain-of-Thought路径会因文字不同而产生差异。

Conclusion: 提出SCR作为文字无关评估的核心指标，挑战当前多语言评估范式，为构建公平AI提供框架。呼吁关注多文字语言用户的模型公平性问题。

Abstract: Current Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are celebrated for their multilingual capabilities, yet they operate under a flawed assumption: that one language corresponds to a single writing system. This overlooks billions of users of multi-script languages like Punjabi, Serbian, Hindi-Urdu, Kurdish, among many others, for whom a model's capability may be fractured by orthographic bias. We introduce PuMVR (Punjabi Multimodal Visual Reasoning), the first benchmark designed to quantify script-dependent bias through 375 culturally grounded image-reasoning tasks across Punjabi's three active scripts (Gurmukhi, Shahmukhi, Roman). Evaluating 10 state-of-the-art VLMs, we expose a substantial Script Gap: models frequently solve visual puzzles in one script while failing identical tasks in another, with accuracy deltas reaching 16% and Script Consistency Rates (SCR) as low as 24.8%. Crucially, visual input boosts absolute performance but does not close this gap, the relative bias persists. Our analysis suggests reasoning patterns show limited cross-script transferability, and Chain-of-Thought pathways diverge based on script alone. We propose SCR as a core metric for script-agnostic evaluation, challenging current multilingual assessment paradigms and providing a framework for equitable AI.

</details>


### [296] [SciLens: Multi-modal Scientific Claim Verification with Agentic Entailment and Grounding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20873)
*Yueming Wang,Tianshi Zheng,Jiaxin Bai,Yangqiu Song,Ginny Wong,Simon See*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: SciLens是一个面向多模态科学声明验证的结构化原子蕴含框架，通过将声明分解为中心原子和背景原子，将其分别关联到表格/图表中的证据线索，并基于原子级别的蕴含规则进行验证，在SciClaimEval开发集上达到79.2% macro-F1和63.1%对准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前科学声明验证依赖VLMs直接给出二元判断，但科学声明常包含数值、比较、范围限定和解释性上下文，且证据存储在表格和图表中具有不同的结构特征，现有方法无法有效处理这种复杂性。

Method: 提出SciLens框架：(1) 将声明分解为中心经验原子和背景原子；(2) 将中心原子接地到模态特定的证据线索（表格：行、列、单元格、算术关系、作用域；图表：面板、坐标轴、图例、视觉编码、类别、趋势、排名）；(3) 基于原子级蕴含规则预测最终标签——仅当所有中心经验原子都被当前证据蕴含时才判定为支持。

Result: 在SciClaimEval开发集上，SciLens达到79.2% macro-F1和63.1% pair准确率。

Conclusion: 结构化的智能体验证方法能够提升科学声明验证的证据敏感性和可解释性。

Abstract: Scientific discovery increasingly relies on automated systems that generate hypotheses, inspect multimodal evidence, and validate claims at scale. Yet scientific claim verification is not well served by asking a vision-language model for a direct binary judgment: claims often combine numerical results, comparisons, scope qualifiers, and explanatory context, while evidence is encoded in tables and figures with distinct grounding structures. We present SciLens, an evidence-conditioned atomic entailment framework for multimodal scientific claim verification. SciLens decomposes each claim into central empirical atoms and background atoms, grounds the central atoms to modality-specific evidence witnesses, and predicts the final label with an atom-level entailment rule. For tables, atoms are grounded to rows, columns, cells, arithmetic relations, and table scope; for figures, they are grounded through panels, axes, legends, visual encodings, categories, trends, ranks, and qualifier checks. This yields a unified validation procedure in which a claim is supported only if every central empirical atom is entailed by the current evidence. On the SciClaimEval development set, SciLens achieves 79.2% macro-F1 and 63.1% pair accuracy, showing that structured agentic validation improves both evidence sensitivity and interpretability.

</details>


### [297] [Topic-to-Timestamp Alignment by Constrained Evidence Selection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20890)
*Zeynep Yılbırt,Marina Litvak,Michael Färber*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 针对会议记录难以按讨论主题而非时间点搜索的问题，本文提出将时间戳预测重构为约束时序候选选择任务：检索带时间戳的转录块后让模型选择最佳候选而非生成时间码。在420个查询上，Recall@5从31.9%提升至50.0%，MAE从837.0秒降至761.0秒，可解析输出从373增至419个。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 用户记得会议讨论的主题但记不清具体发生时间，现有搜索方式难以支持这种"主题到时间戳"的检索需求。

Method: 将时间戳预测重构为"约束时序候选选择"任务：先用RAG检索带时间戳的转录片段，再让语言模型从候选中选择最能匹配查询主题的时间戳，而非直接生成时间码。

Result: 在420个来自200份市政会议记录的查询上，Recall@5从31.9%提升至50.0%，MAE从837.0秒降至761.0秒（Mistral-7B-Instruct），可解析输出从373/420提升至419/420。

Conclusion: 长文本中的时间定位不仅依赖于语言模型的选择，更取决于检索质量和输出设计。

Abstract: Meeting archives are difficult to search when users remember what was discussed but not when. We study topic-to-timestamp alignment: given a natural-language topic and a timestamped meeting transcript, the goal is to return the time at which the topic is discussed. A standard RAG setup can retrieve relevant transcript excerpts, but still asks the language model to generate a timestamp, which can produce unsupported or invalid timecodes. We therefore recast timestamp prediction as constrained temporal candidate selection: the system retrieves timestamped transcript chunks, and the model selects the candidate that best grounds the topic instead of generating a timecode. On 420 topic-timestamp queries from 200 municipal meeting transcripts, this increases Recall@5 from 31.9% to 50.0%, reduces MAE from 837.0 seconds to 761.0 seconds with Mistral-7B-Instruct, and increases the number of parseable outputs from 373 to 419 of 420 queries. The results suggest that temporal grounding in long transcripts depends strongly on retrieval quality and output design, not only on the choice of the language model.

</details>


### [298] [PeerCheck: Enhancing LLM-Generated Academic Reviews Towards Human-Level Quality](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20897)
*Zeyuan Chen,Ziqing Yang,Yihan Ma,Michael Backes,Yang Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该论文提出PeerCheck框架，通过分析LLM与人类审稿差异，并采用提示工程（如CoT）和RAG技术提升LLM生成的学术评审质量，同时发现CoT有效而RAG存在"悖论"现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统同行评审过程难以应对日益增长的学术投稿量，存在质量和公平性问题，而LLM辅助评审正成为趋势，因此需要系统性地提升LLM生成评审的质量。

Method: 首先分析多种LLM生成审稿与人类审稿在术语侧重点上的差异（RQ1）；然后采用提示工程（如Chain-of-Thought）和检索增强生成（RAG）等方法提升LLM审稿质量（RQ2）。

Result: LLM与人类审稿关注不同术语（LLM重理论，人类重方法与实验）；CoT显著提升审稿质量；RAG存在"悖论"——对不同LLM效果不一，甚至可能降低质量。

Conclusion: 全面分析展示了LLM生成学术评审的可能性和局限性，为实现更有效、更符合人类标准的评审系统做出了贡献。

Abstract: As academic submissions grow, the traditional peer review process struggles to keep up, raising concerns about quality and fairness. A trend of using large language models (LLMs) for assistance has emerged. In this work, we take a critical step toward improving the quality of LLM-generated reviews. We propose the PeerCheck framework, which investigates LLM-human review differences (RQ1) and explores methods to improve LLM-generated review quality (RQ2). We first analyzed the human-written reviews with reviews generated by various LLMs and found that LLMs and humans focus on different terms, e.g., LLMs prioritize theory while humans emphasize methodology and experiments. We further adopt prompt engineering, such as Chain-of-Thought (CoT), and utilize retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) to enhance the LLM-generated reviews towards human-level quality. We find CoT significantly improves the quality of LLM reviews, while we discover an unexpected "RAG paradox," i.e., experiments with RAG produce different results for various LLMs and, in some cases, even reduce review quality. Our comprehensive analysis of LLM-generated academic reviews illustrates both possibilities and limitations, contributing to a more effective, human-aligned review system. Our dataset is available on https://github.com/TrustAIRLab/PeerCheck.

</details>


### [299] [Storyline Trees: Hierarchical Representations for Long-Form Narratives](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20900)
*Litu Ou,Mirella Lapata*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出通过构建故事线树（storyline trees）来组织长篇叙事，这是一种从全局主题、主要情节线到细粒度事件的层次化表示方法。通过章节分割为场景、自顶向下和自底向上的推理流程来构建树结构，并利用该表示实现自适应检索问答，在三个长上下文叙事QA基准上优于强基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长篇叙事文本缺乏结构化文档中的显式导航线索（如标题、目录），导致长上下文模型难以理解其中隐含的事件、人物和情节线结构。现有方法在处理此类复杂叙事时效果不佳，需要一种能捕捉叙事层次结构的表示方法。

Method: 首先将章节分割为连续的叙事片段（场景），作为树构建的基本单元。然后通过互补的自顶向下和自底向上流程进行推理：自顶向下推导、细化、聚类和总结多个抽象层次的故事线，最终构建故事线树。在问答任务中，利用故事线树实现自适应检索，允许模型迭代检查高层叙事结构并按需检索场景级证据。

Result: 在三个长上下文叙事QA基准上，自适应检索方法优于强基线方法，包括后训练的长上下文模型和基于分块的智能体方法。消融实验表明：场景作为基本单元比章节或通用分割更有效，且在匹配检索预算的条件下性能优势依然存在。

Conclusion: 故事线树是一种有效的长篇叙事层次化表示方法，能够隐式结构转化为显式层次结构，从而显著提升长上下文模型在叙事理解任务上的表现，尤其是问答任务。

Abstract: Long-form narratives are challenging for long-context models because their structure is implicit: events, characters, and plotlines interact across hundreds of pages without the explicit cues that guide navigation in structured documents. We address this by constructing storyline trees, hierarchical representations that organize narratives from global themes and major plotlines to fine-grained events. We first segment chapters into contiguous narrative segments, or scenes, and use them as the basic units for tree construction. We then infer storyline trees through complementary top-down and bottom-up procedures that derive, refine, cluster, and summarize storylines at multiple levels of abstraction. We showcase the utility of this representation for question answering: storyline trees enable adaptive retrieval, allowing models to iteratively inspect high-level narrative structure and retrieve scene-level evidence on demand. Experiments on three long-context narrative QA benchmarks show that adaptive retrieval outperforms strong baselines, including post-trained long-context models and agentic chunk-based methods. Ablations confirm that scenes are more effective basic units than chapters or generic segmentation, and that gains persist under matched retrieval budgets

</details>


### [300] [Latent Personal Memory: Represent personal memory as dynamic soft prompts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20911)
*Debrup Das,Avinash Amballa,Yashas Malur Saidutta,Vijay Srinivasan,Vivek Kulkarni,Srinivas Chappidi*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: LPM是一个将用户历史行为编码为紧凑潜在记忆矩阵的个性化框架，通过交叉注意力生成软提示给冻结的LLM，在多个基准上超越LoRA和Prompt Tuning，同时大幅降低KV-cache使用量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法（如LoRA、Prompt Tuning）在个性化LLM时效率低、扩展性差，且难以与冻结的基座模型兼容，需要一种轻量、可扩展且保留预训练知识的方法来编码长期用户行为模式。

Method: 将用户历史表示为N个潜在槽位（latent slots）组成的紧凑矩阵，通过共享的交叉注意力投影网络将其映射为输入条件化的软提示（soft prompts），再拼接到冻结LLM的输入前。

Result: 在PersonaMem v1上，LPM准确率比LoRA高8.8%、比Prompt Tuning高54.4%；KV-cache使用减少64倍以上。在LoCoMo上，以120倍更少可训练参数达到LoRA的精度。在128K上下文长度下超越全上下文方法。

Conclusion: LPM是一种高效、可扩展的个性化框架，在精度、参数效率和内存使用上均优于现有方法，且上下文越长优势越明显，适合长上下文个性化场景。

Abstract: Personalizing large language models (LLMs) requires encoding long-term, user-specific behavioral patterns in a way that is computationally efficient, scalable, and compatible with a frozen base model. We present Latent Personal Memory (LPM), a scalable framework that represents user-specific history as a compact, persistent matrix of N latent slots, that are interpretable. A shared cross-attention projection network maps these slots into dynamic, input-conditioned soft prompts that are prepended to the input of a frozen LLM. We evaluate LPM on PersonaMem v1 and LoCOMO benchmarks across Qwen3-1.7B, 4B, and 8B backbones. Results demonstrate that LPM outperforms LoRA and Prompt Tuning by up to 8.8% and 54.4% in overall accuracy respectively on PersonaMem v1, while reducing KV-cache usage by over 64x. On LoCoMo, LPM matches LoRA accuracy with 120x fewer trainable parameters. We also show that the efficiency of LPM grows with context length and outperforms full-context at 128K context length.

</details>


### [301] [Peeking Inside LLMs: Leveraging Internal Artifacts of LLMs for Enhancing Reliability in Legal Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20929)
*Sudipta Santra,Debtanu Datta,Saptarshi Ghosh*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文探索利用LLM内部特征（internal artifacts）来检测法律领域分类任务中模型输出的正确性，在保释决策预测和法规违规预测两个任务上验证了该方法的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 法律领域对可靠性要求极高，而LLM在生成时容易出现幻觉或错误输出，目前缺乏有效的检测手段来判断LLM输出是否正确。

Method: 从LLM内部提取中间层特征（internal artifacts），基于这些特征训练下游二分类器，用于判断LLM输出的正确性。

Result: 在两个法律分类任务（保释决策预测和法规违规预测）上，实验表明LLM内部特征能够作为可靠的指标来检测错误预测。

Conclusion: LLM的内部特征可以有效用于检测其输出正确性，有助于提升法律领域LLM分类系统的可靠性。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly being adopted in the legal domain. However, despite their strong performance, LLMs are prone to generating incorrect or hallucinated outputs, raising serious concerns about their reliability in high-stakes domains such as law. Detecting the correctness of responses of LLM-based systems is therefore a critical challenge. In this work, we explore the potential of leveraging internal artifacts of LLM to detect the correctness of their predictions in legal-domain classification tasks. We develop approaches that utilize features derived from these internal artifacts to build downstream classifiers capable of identifying incorrect LLM outputs. We evaluate our approach on two representative legal classification tasks: bail decision prediction and statute violation prediction. Our experimental results demonstrate that LLMs' internal artifacts are reliable indicators for detecting incorrect predictions in legal classification tasks, and can be applied to enhance the reliability of LLM-based classification systems.

</details>


### [302] [Comparing Transformers and Hybrid Models at the Token Level](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20936)
*Yanhong Li,William Merrill*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文通过分析Olmo 3和Olmo Hybrid模型，发现混合架构（注意力+循环层）的优势主要来源于对语义状态追踪的改进（如代词记忆、实体追踪），而纯Transformer在n-gram复制和语法括号匹配任务上表现更好。增益并非均匀分布，开放类实义词提升最大，封闭类功能词提升较小。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管混合语言模型（注意力+循环层）在理论和实践上均表现出优势，但尚不清楚哪些数据或能力驱动了这些增益，以及这些增益在多大程度上反映了混合模型的理论优势。

Method: 使用Olmo 3和Olmo Hybrid的开放权重，在同一前缀下比较匹配的Transformer和混合模型在同一目标token上的损失。通过自然标签、复制特征、分隔符结构和受控合成探针对结果进行分层分析。

Result: 混合模型在大多数标签族上损失更低，但增益不均匀：开放类实义词增益最大，封闭类功能词增益较小；在散文、代码和标记语言中，对开放分隔符的增益大于对应闭合分隔符；对重复n-gram增益几乎消失。合成探针显示混合模型在代词记忆和实体追踪任务上占优，Transformer在括号匹配任务上占优。

Conclusion: 混合模型的循环层改进了利用文档语义状态的预测能力，而注意力机制有助于通过n-gram复制或语法括号匹配可预测的token。token级分解可以增强预训练诊断能力。

Abstract: Hybrid language models that mix attention and recurrent layers have shown promise: theoretically, recurrent layers ameliorate the limitations of pure transformers on state tracking, and empirically, hybrids can outperform pure transformers in loss and downstream evaluations \citep{waleffe2024empirical,merrill2026olmohybrid}. Yet it remains unclear which data or capabilities drive these gains, and to what degree they reflect the theoretical advantages motivating hybrid models. We address this question using the open weights from Olmo 3 \citep{olmo2025olmo3} and Olmo Hybrid \citep{merrill2026olmohybrid}: we compare the loss of a matched transformer and hybrid at the same target tokens under the same prefixes, stratifying the results by natural token tags, copy features, delimiter structure, and controlled synthetic probes. The hybrid has lower loss on most tag families, but the gains are not uniform: they are largest for open-class content words and smaller for many closed-class function words. Across prose, code, and markup, the hybrid's loss advantage is larger on opening delimiters than on the corresponding closing delimiters, and nearly vanishes on repeated $n$-grams. Synthetic probes show the same split: the hybrid is favored on pronoun-memory and entity-tracking tasks, whereas the transformer is favored on bracket-matching tasks that require choosing closing delimiters. These patterns suggest that the recurrent layers in hybrids improve predictions that leverage the semantic state of a document, whereas attention helps on tokens predictable by $n$-gram copying or syntactic bracket matching. We conclude with proof-of-concept filtered evaluations showing how token-level decompositions can sharpen pretraining diagnostics for hybrid architectures.

</details>


### [303] [Scaling Diverse Language Generation for 3D Visual Grounding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20946)
*Austin T. Wang,Dongchen Yang,Angel X. Chang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出ViGiL3D++方法，通过场景图约束采样与LLM生成结合，生成多样化3D视觉定位查询，提升模型泛化能力并揭示VLM局限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3DVG模型因缺乏多样化描述而难以泛化到简单语言模式之外，且现有方法在约束类型和语言多样性上不足，字幕方法无法精确对比物体。

Method: 提出ViGiL3D++，一种可扩展的场景无关方法，通过结合场景图中的约束采样与LLM的语言生成，生成多样化视觉定位查询。

Result: 生成的查询在多样性上优于现有规模化数据集，并在多个3DVG基准上提升了模型性能。

Conclusion: ViGiL3D++能有效提升3D视觉定位的泛化能力，同时揭示了当前VLM存在的局限性。

Abstract: Developing robust models for 3D visual grounding (3DVG), the localization of entities in a 3D scene described in natural language, is important for enabling agents to correspond spatial language with objects in the physical world. However, the lack of diverse descriptions at scale prevents models from generalizing beyond simple linguistic patterns. Recent such attempts lack diversity in the constraint types and language used to ground objects. Captioning methods cannot precisely contrast objects, which is important for visual grounding. We therefore propose ViGiL3D++, a scalable, scene-agnostic method that generates diverse visual grounding queries by combining constraint sampling in scene graphs with the language generation of LLMs. We show that it has greater diversity over existing scaled datasets and improves model performance over several 3DVG benchmarks but also illuminates outstanding limitations of VLMs.

</details>


### [304] [Learning What Not to Forget: Long-Horizon Agent Memory from a Few Kilobytes of Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20954)
*Nusrat Jahan Lia,Aritra Mazumder*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: LRE是一种轻量级（几KB、仅CPU、无语言模型）的评分器，通过学习哪些历史单元是关键的并进行逐字提取，在LLM代理的长期交互中实现高效记忆淘汰。在多项实验中，LRE在准确率-成本平面上无基线能匹敌，在简单任务上甚至超过不淘汰的基线27%，同时压缩峰值上下文达52%，并可实现无注释训练（恢复95%监督效果）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长时运行的LLM系统累积的交互历史会超出上下文窗口，必须持续淘汰。然而，现有淘汰策略经常会丢弃关键细节（如登录令牌或后续调用所需的路径），导致任务失败。本文旨在解决这一记忆淘汰中的保真度问题。

Method: 提出LRE（Learned Relevance Eviction）：一个极轻量级（几KB、仅CPU运行、无需大语言模型）的评分器。它学习判断哪些历史单元是关键信息（load-bearing），并通过逐字提取的方式保留它们，而不是压缩或总结。

Result: 在匹配预算比较下，无基线在准确率-成本平面上主导LRE。在智能体任务中，LRE整体上匹配保留全部历史的准确率；在最简单任务上超过无淘汰基线27%，同时零压缩器调用、峰值上下文大小降低52%。LRE能完成其他策略循环失败的任务（减少37%调用次数），解决14个其他策略无法完成的任务。在对话记忆中，LRE以零神经网络成本超越密集和token剪枝编码器。下游评估中，以读取68%更少token达到最佳预算答案质量。无注释训练可恢复95%的监督评分器效果。

Conclusion: LLM智能体的记忆淘汰本质上是一个保真度问题（fidelity problem），需要一种可部署的主动策略（未来查询不可用、确切状态至关重要）。廉价的、学习到的相关性评分足以胜任，LRE为此提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Long-running language-model systems accumulate interaction history that outgrows the context window, so they must continually evict. When an eviction policy drops a load-bearing detail, for example an access token issued at login or a path the next call needs, the action fails. We present LRE (Learned Relevance Eviction), a few kilobytes, CPU-only, language-model-free scorer that learns which units of history are load-bearing and keeps them by verbatim extraction. Under a matched-budget comparison, in our experiment, no baseline dominates LRE on the accuracy-cost plane. On agents, LRE matches the accuracy of keeping the entire history overall. On the simplest tasks, it exceeds that no-eviction baseline by 27%, while requiring zero compressor calls and reducing peak context size by up to 52%. A controlled study trace shows LRE completes tasks where the others loop, finishing one such task in 37% fewer calls than keeping everything and solving 14 tasks where no other run policy does. On conversational memory, LRE outranks dense and token-pruning encoders at zero neural cost. In downstream evaluation, LRE gives the best budgeted answer quality on LoCoMo reading 68% fewer tokens. Its supervision can also be annotation-free: training only on the system's own behavior recovers 95% of the supervised scorer's effectiveness. We argue that, because memory eviction in LLM agents is a fidelity problem, it requires a deployable proactive policy where the future query is unavailable and exact state is decisive, and that cheap learned relevance can be sufficient.

</details>


### [305] [Phonemes to the Rescue: Multilingual Tokenization Based on International Phonetic Alphabet](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20993)
*Milan Miletić,Julie Kallini,Ekaterina Shutova*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出使用国际音标（IPA）作为多语言分词器的语言无关输入表示，相比传统文本分词器，IPA分词器在24种语言和14种文字上显著提升了分词质量，尤其对非拉丁文字效果更好，且能更有效地泛化到未见语言和文字。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多语言模型在分词阶段就存在性能差异，子词分词方法偏向高资源语言，而免分词方法在字节/字符比高的文字上会产生更长的序列。现有方法对非拉丁文字不公平。

Method: 使用国际音标（IPA）作为语言无关的输入表示，训练文本 vs. IPA 子词分词器的配对实验，覆盖24种语言和14种文字。

Result: IPA分词器一致性地提升了分词质量，尤其对非拉丁文字效果显著，且能更好地泛化到未见语言和文字。

Conclusion: IPA作为一种紧凑、跨语言字符重叠度高、字节/字符分布更均衡的表示方式，能有效缓解多语言分词中的语言偏差问题。

Abstract: Multilingual language models often exhibit performance disparities across languages that can arise as early as the tokenization stage. Widely-used subword tokenization approaches favor high-resource languages, and tokenizer-free methods still yield longer sequences for scripts with a higher bytes-per-character ratio. To address these shortcomings, we propose to use the International Phonetic Alphabet (IPA) as a language-agnostic input representation for multilingual tokenizers. IPA provides a compact symbol inventory, greater cross-lingual character overlap, and a more balanced byte-per-character distribution across languages. We train matched pairs of text vs. IPA subword tokenizers across 24 languages and 14 scripts and demonstrate that IPA tokenizers consistently improve tokenization quality, especially for non-Latin scripts, and generalize more effectively to unseen languages and scripts.

</details>


### [306] [The Metanym Game: A Self-Contained, Self-Consistent LLM Peer-Community Benchmark for Structural Intelligence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21008)
*David Nordfors*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为Metanym Game的LLM评测方法，通过类比生成与同行互评实现无泄露、自洽的基准测试。对评分矩阵做奇异值分解即可同时得到模型作为生成者和评判者的能力，事实性评分与GPQA Diamond相关系数达0.92，且发现评判能力比生成能力更稀缺。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM基准测试存在两大问题：一是固定测试集可能泄露到训练数据中，导致评测不准确；二是缺乏无金标准、无需预言机模型即可评估LLM事实准确性的方法。作者希望设计一种抗污染、自洽且稳定的评测方案。

Method: 提出Metanym Game——一种竞争性文字游戏，LLM选手需根据类比规则生成句子（类比生产），并在"同行议会"中对彼此生成的内容进行评分。对评分矩阵做奇异值分解（SVD），从单一分解中同时提取出每个模型作为生成者和评判者的能力分数。

Result: 事实性评分与GPQA Diamond的Pearson相关系数达0.92；生成能力与评判能力发生解离——最强的生成者往往是中等的评判者，而最敏锐的评判者生成能力只是中游水平。通过组建最强模型构成的"议会"进行官方评测，且议会席位可被更强的模型挑战取代。

Conclusion: Metanym Game是一个完全自包含、自洽的基准测试，随时间推移保持稳定。其核心贡献在于：首次通过谱分解解决了无金标准下的LLM事实准确性评测难题，并揭示了生成与评判能力的不对称性。

Abstract: The metanym game is a competitive word game for LLMs that measures structural intelligence against established cognitive-science constructs. No content is given in advance; the contestants create all of it -- a new kind of analogy test, analogical production falsifiable sentence by sentence, with no fixed test set to leak into training (contamination-resistant by construction). In the council-of-peers benchmark, the contestants also rate each other's creations. We introduce the first spectral solution, to our knowledge, to the wicked problem of benchmarking LLMs' factual accuracy without golden keys or oracle models: one singular value decomposition of the evaluators' ratings matrix yields their competence as both generators and judges of true statements at once. Competence on the subjective criteria comes from each judge's rating consistency as the yardstick shifts. The factual rating correlates with GPQA Diamond at Pearson r = 0.92. Scored separately, making and judging dissociate -- judging is the scarcer skill: the strongest generators are middling judges, the sharpest judge a mid-pack generator. To scale, the strongest players form a council that does the official benchmarking; its seats are contestable -- a stronger model earns one on the benchmark's own rating. The benchmark is entirely self-contained and self-consistent, a stable gauge over time.

</details>


### [307] [Event Ontology Expansion via LLM-Based Conceptualization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21048)
*Weicheng Ren,Zixuan Li,Long Bai,Xiaolong Jin,Jiafeng Guo,Xueqi Cheng*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出ConceptE框架，利用LLM从句子和事件触发词中提取概念级语义（概念名称+自然语言描述），与触发词信息联合编码，解决事件本体扩展中上下文表示混杂概念语义与表面变化的问题，在聚类和层次扩展任务上显著超越SOTA方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有事件本体扩展方法使用上下文触发器表示进行聚类，但这些表示将概念级语义与表面语境变化混杂在一起，导致聚类不稳定、层次扩展不可靠。作者旨在通过概念增强解决这一问题。

Method: ConceptE框架：1) 用LLM从句子和事件触发词中提取概念级语义（概念名+自然语言描述）；2) 将这些语义与触发词信息联合编码，构建概念增强表示，使其与本体级推理对齐。

Result: 在ACE、ERE、MAVEN数据集上，ConceptE在所有子任务上均优于SOTA方法，事件聚类BCubed-F1提升高达12.37%，层次扩展Taxo_F1提升6.48%。

Conclusion: 概念增强表示能有效支持更连贯的事件聚类、更可靠的层次扩展以及符合本体一致性的类型命名，验证了概念化增强策略在事件本体扩展中的有效性。

Abstract: Event ontology expansion aims to discover emerging event types from data and extend them to appropriate positions in the existing event ontology.. Existing methods typically cluster contextualized trigger representations and attach induced clusters to the ontology based on instance-level similarity. However, ontology expansion requires concept-level semantics that characterize event types, whereas contextualized trigger representations often conflate these semantics with surface contextual variation, leading to unstable clustering and unreliable hierarchy expansion. To address this issue, we propose ConceptE, a conceptualization-enhanced framework for event ontology expansion. ConceptE first derives concept-level semantics by prompting an LLM with the sentence and event trigger, producing a concise concept name and a natural-language description. It then jointly encodes these semantics with trigger information to build concept-enhanced representations aligned with ontology-level reasoning. This representation design supports more coherent event clustering, more reliable hierarchy expansion, and ontology-consistent type naming. Experiments on ACE, ERE, and MAVEN demonstrate that ConceptE consistently outperforms state-of-the-art approaches across all subtasks of event ontology expansion. In particular, it achieves improvements of up to 12.37\% in BCubed-F1 for event clustering and 6.48\% in Taxo\_F1 for hierarchy expansion, demonstrating the effectiveness of the proposed ConceptE method.

</details>


### [308] [Demographic Metadata as Construct-Irrelevant Noise in DistilBERT-Based Automated Essay Scoring](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21066)
*Teik Peng Ch'ng,Hui Na Chua*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究探讨了将人口统计元数据与文本简单拼接（早期融合策略）对DistilBERT-based AES模型的影响，发现该方法会显著降低预测准确率（QWK从0.727降至0.656）、增加验证损失（1.29 vs 1.25）并加剧评分偏差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人类评分常受学生人口统计特征影响，但将人口统计元数据与文本输入融合以训练AES模型的不同策略效果尚未被充分探索。

Method: 使用ASAP 2.0数据集，对比基线DistilBERT模型与将分词文本和人口统计元数据进行简单拼接（朴素多模态融合策略）的实验模型，采用10折交叉验证评估。

Result: 基线模型QWK为0.727，实验模型降至0.656；验证损失从1.25升至1.29；评分公平性从15/19降至12/19。

Conclusion: 早期融合人口统计元数据会显著降低AES模型的预测准确性和评分公平性，简单拼接并非有效的多模态融合策略。

Abstract: Automated Essay Scoring (AES) systems are increasingly used to support teachers in managing grading workloads and to provide a supplementary rater in large-scale assessments. While human grading is frequently influenced by students' demographic characteristics, the efficacy of different strategies for integrating demographic metadata with textual input used to train AES models remains underexplored. This study investigates the impact of a specific multimodal fusion strategy - naive metadata concatenation - on the predictive accuracy, training convergence, and score parity of a DistilBERT-based AES model. A comparative analysis was conducted using the ASAP 2.0 dataset to evaluate a baseline model against an experimental model trained with input that concatenates tokenised text and demographic metadata using a naive multimodal fusion strategy. Evaluated via 10-fold cross-validation, the findings reveal that the early fusion of demographic metadata and the input significantly degrades the model's overall predictive accuracy. The baseline model achieved a Quadratic Weighted Kappa (QWK) of 0.727, which dropped to 0.656 upon integrating metadata. Furthermore, the experimental model exhibited higher validation loss (1.29) compared to the baseline model (1.25). The experimental model also displayed exacerbated scoring bias, reducing score parity instances from 15 to 12 out of 19 tests.

</details>


### [309] [Quality and Agreement in Multilabel Emotion Annotation: A Case Study and Evaluation Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21069)
*Emily Öhman,Anna Koufakou*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文探讨了情感标注中标注者差异的合理利用问题，提出用软标签（投票共享标签）替代传统硬标签（多数投票），通过多种评估指标证明软标签能更好反映标注者真实不确定性，为多标签情感数据集的构建与评估提供实用指导。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统NLP流程将标注者之间的差异性视为"噪声"，采用多数投票产生"黄金"标签，忽略了情感标注本质上是主观的这一事实。本文旨在揭示标注者行为差异的结构性，并探索如何合理利用而非抹除这种差异。

Method: 以多标签情感标注为案例，提出软投票共享标签（含强度加权变体）替代硬标签；采用阈值指标（macro/micro-F1）和概率对齐指标（伯努利交叉熵SoftBCE）评估模型；引入数据驱动的分歧诊断方法。

Result: 标注者分歧是结构化的，会在模型行为中留下可测量的痕迹；硬标签在F1指标上表现最优，但软监督能更好反映标注者的经验方差和不确定性。

Conclusion: 为设计、聚合和评估多标签情感数据集提供了实践指导，尤其当多种解释同时合理时。

Abstract: Emotion annotation is inherently subjective, yet most NLP pipelines still assume "gold" labels, typically produced by majority voting, and treat annotator variation as noise. In this paper, we present a multilabel emotion annotation case study and use it to examine how annotator behavior and aggregation choices affect both agreement estimates and downstream emotion classifiers. Rather than collapsing disagreement into a single label, we represent targets as soft vote-share labels (including an intensity-weighted variant) and evaluate models using both thresholded metrics (macro-/micro-F1) and probabilistic alignment (Bernoulli cross-entropy SoftBCE), alongside data-derived disagreement diagnostics. Across annotation regimes, we show that disagreement is structured and leaves measurable traces in model behavior: hard labels may maximize F1 metrics, while soft supervision yields predictions that better reflect empirical annotator variance and uncertainty. Our results provide practical guidance for designing, aggregating, and evaluating multilabel emotion datasets when multiple interpretations are plausible.

</details>


### [310] [Dissecting Agentic RAG: A Component Ablation for Multi-Hop QA with a Local 7B Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21553)
*Sheroz Shaikh*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文通过消融实验系统分析了Agentic RAG系统中各组件（自适应检索路由、多次检索迭代、查询分解、交叉编码器重排序）在多跳问答中的贡献，发现在本地7B模型上：固定混合检索优于自适应路由、两次迭代即可捕获95%收益、简单方案与复杂方案竞争力相当。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Agentic RAG系统堆叠了迭代推理、查询分解、自适应检索等多种复杂组件，但这些组件在资源受限环境（仅用小规模本地语言模型）下的实际贡献尚不清楚。本文旨在通过控制实验厘清究竟哪些组件真正有效。

Method: 在HotpotQA的5000个问题上，以Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct为背骨，对完整Agentic RAG管线进行8种消融条件实验，包括：单次密集检索基线、固定混合检索、自适应检索路由、不同检索迭代次数（2/5次）、是否使用查询分解和交叉编码器重排序等。

Result: 完整管线EM=53.2%, F1=61.6%（基线单次密集检索EM=43.1%, F1=54.0%）。关键发现：(1)固定混合检索（RRF融合）优于自适应路由（+1.8 EM, +1.9 F1）；(2)2次检索迭代即可达到5次95%的收益；(3)查询分解和重排序虽有统计显著但仍属小幅增益。

Conclusion: 在本地模型预算固定的条件下，更简单、固定的设计反而与自适应复杂设计竞争力相当甚至更优。主要收益来自短检索循环，而非自适应路由或多次迭代。提示Agentic RAG领域应更关注"什么真正有效"而非盲目增加复杂度。

Abstract: Agentic retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems combine iterative reasoning loops, query decomposition, and adaptive retrieval to tackle multi-hop question answering. However, the contribution of each component remains poorly understood, particularly under resource-constrained settings using only local language models. Many agentic designs add adaptive retrieval routing and deeper retrieval loops on the assumption that the added complexity helps. To test whether it does, we run a controlled ablation study of a full agentic RAG pipeline evaluated on 5,000 questions from the HotpotQA distractor development set using a local 7B parameter model (Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct). Our full pipeline achieves EM=53.2% and F1=61.6%, compared to a single-pass dense-retrieval baseline of EM=43.1% and F1=54.0%. Across eight ablation conditions, we find that: (1) fixed hybrid retrieval via reciprocal rank fusion consistently outperforms rule-based adaptive routing (+1.8 EM, +1.9 F1), as the routing heuristic over-routes to BM25 by firing on named entities present in nearly all multi-hop sub-questions; (2) two retrieval iterations over the decomposed sub-questions capture 95% of the gains of five, with no meaningful benefit from deeper loops; and (3) query decomposition and cross-encoder reranking each contribute statistically significant but smaller gains (p<0.01 and p<0.001 respectively). Taken together, on a fixed local-model budget, the simpler and fixed choices turn out to be competitive with or better than their adaptive versions: most of the gain comes from running a short retrieval loop, not from adaptive routing or from many iterations. We use no proprietary APIs or large-scale compute.

</details>


### [311] [FiLM-Coordinated Dual-Branch Transformer for Global-Local Dependency Modeling in Language Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21075)
*Zhiqiang Zhou,Xu Ling,Junliang Dai*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出一种FiLM协调的双分支Transformer，用全局和局部两个分支分别建模长程依赖和局部模式，通过双向特征线性调制实现动态跨分支协调，在小规模语言建模中优于单分支基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准Transformer使用单条自注意力路径同时建模全局依赖和局部模式，导致长程结构推理与细粒度局部表征学习之间存在矛盾。

Method: 每个Transformer层包含全局分支和局部分支，设计双向FiLM模块让两个分支分别为对方生成逐通道的缩放和偏移参数，实现动态跨分支协调，而非简单的拼接或静态相加。

Result: 在TinyShakespeare和WikiText-2（1M字符子集）上，全双分支FiLM模型在相同宽度的结构基线上取得最佳结果；多随机种子实验验证了收益的稳定性；机制分析表明FiLM学习到输入依赖、层依赖和通道选择性的调制模式。

Conclusion: 双分支+双向FiLM的动态协调策略优于单分支和弱化双分支变体，但参数匹配的宽单分支基线显示参数效率仍有提升空间。

Abstract: Standard Transformers use a single self-attention pathway to model both global dependencies and local patterns, creating tension between long-range structural reasoning and fine-grained local representation learning. We propose a FiLM-coordinated dual-branch Transformer for language modeling, where each layer explicitly contains a global branch and a local branch, and feature-wise linear modulation (FiLM) is used for dynamic cross-branch coordination instead of simple concatenation or static addition. The key idea is that the two branches represent different dependency views of the same input, making channel-wise calibration more suitable than heavy token-level interaction. We therefore design a bidirectional FiLM module in which each branch generates per-channel scaling and shifting parameters to condition the other. Experiments on multiple small-scale language modeling settings show that the proposed structure consistently outperforms same-width single-branch baselines and weakened dual-branch variants under a fixed lightweight configuration. On TinyShakespeare and a 1M-character subset of WikiText-2, the full dual-branch FiLM model achieves the best results among same-width structural baselines. Multi-seed results support the stability of the gains, while mechanistic analyses show that FiLM learns input-dependent, layer-dependent, and channel-selective modulation patterns rather than static scaling. Parameter-matched widened single-branch baselines also indicate that the current design still leaves room for improvement in parameter efficiency.

</details>


### [312] [Per-Entity Bias Mapping for AI Visibility: Why Brand Mentions Require Entity-Specific Calibration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21595)
*Zoltan Varga*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出十维PEBM框架，发现AI系统中品牌存在三类偏差（弱实体不可见、强实体品牌幻觉悖论、CEE实体基础设施缺口），并通过1,400次探针实验证明头部品牌捏造引用率达52.69%，合规场景下拒答反致幻觉升级，构建了二维幻觉空间理论。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法仅用提及率或引用频次衡量AI系统中的实体可见性，无法捕捉系统性的、因实体类型而异的AI可见性误差特征。

Method: 提出PEBM十维框架，区分原始提及与验证提及；识别三类失败模式；进行大规模实证（n=100匈牙利B2B实体，1,400次探针，2,062个来源）；引入ghost cartography机制解释幻觉空间。

Result: Tier 1品牌捏造引用率52.69% vs Tier 3的37.87%（+14.82pp，p=1.67e-11）；监管框架查询捏造率升至56.77%；拒答机制在合规场景下反而加速幻觉。

Conclusion: AI中介回答系统存在系统性实体偏差，需要超越聚合指标的细粒度偏差映射方法，建议关注品牌幻觉悖论和合规场景下的幻觉升级效应。

Abstract: AI-mediated answer systems increasingly determine how brands and organizations are represented to users. Existing approaches reduce visibility to mention rate or citation frequency. This paper argues that aggregate metrics are insufficient because entities exhibit systematically different AI visibility error profiles.
  We introduce Per-Entity Bias Mapping (PEBM): a ten-dimensional framework distinguishing raw from verified mentions. Three failure modes are identified: (1) underrepresented entities suffer invisibility due to weak knowledge graph presence; (2) large entities suffer the Brand Hallucination Paradox -- model familiarity creates stronger surfaces for plausible but incorrect completions; (3) CEE entities face a structural infrastructure gap across knowledge graphs, NER, and entity linking. A fourth dimension, Parametric-Retrieval Lag Asymmetry, describes divergence between retrieval-augmented and parametric memory update cycles.
  A full-scale empirical study (n=100 Hungarian B2B entities, 1,400 probe runs, 2,062 sources) finds Tier 1 brands produce 52.69% fabricated citations versus 37.87% for Tier 3 entities (+14.82 pp; p=1.67e-11), supporting the Brand Hallucination Paradox. Regulatory-framed queries elevate fabrication to 56.77% versus 37.59% baseline (+19.2 pp). We identify rejection-induced confabulation escalation: agentic quality filters function as hallucination accelerators in compliance contexts. We introduce ghost cartography as a unifying mechanism: entities in sparse latent regions produce confident output interpolated from neighboring dense regions, yielding a two-dimensional confabulation space (fabricated presence vs. frozen representation).

</details>


### [313] [A Validation-Gated Mechanistic Account of Suicidality Detection in LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21078)
*Nafiz Ahmed,Sarah Sharif,Dingjing Shi,Mike Banad*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种验证门控框架，用于更可信地分析大语言模型在自杀检测任务中的内部机制。通过严格的条件筛选，发现Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct在隐式自杀意图检测任务上未通过门控（无法区分自杀意图与普通痛苦），因此不予分析。但在二元自杀检测任务中，模型存在一个语义化、低秩、跨模型/数据集泛化的中间层特征，该特征与自杀倾向因果相关，且编码与使用分离：小模型已具备表征但仅大模型能利用该特征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究对大语言模型在心理健康应用（如自杀检测）中依赖什么特征缺乏深入机制性理解，且直接提出的因果性主张可信度不足。本文旨在建立更严格的验证流程，提高关于模型内部特征因果性主张的可信度。

Method: 提出验证门控框架：1）概念需高于简单词法基线才能被接纳；2）每个后续性质需与匹配的控制组对比检验。具体步骤包括：门控初步排除未通过任务（隐式自杀检测）；对通过的二元自杀检测任务，通过消融实验、随机方向对比、秩分析、跨模型/跨数据集验证、匹配对照（自杀vs抑郁）以及steering干预等方法分析内部特征。

Result: 1）Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct无法通过DeepSuiMind隐式意图检测任务的门控；2）在二元自杀检测中发现了中间网络语义特征，该特征非词法基、与决策因果相关（消融降低性能而非随机方向）、低秩、跨三个模型系列和三个数据集泛化，且追踪自杀倾向而非普通痛苦；3）steering虽能提升响应但会泛化到无关问题；4）编码与使用分离：小模型已表征自杀倾向但仅大模型能利用。

Conclusion: 验证门控框架能有效提升机制性因果主张的可信度，通过产生阴性结果（任务排除）和阳性结果（特征发现）展示其价值。自杀检测中存在编码-使用分离现象。但所有证据基于英文Reddit文本，临床可推广性有限。

Abstract: Large language models are increasingly proposed for mental-health applications such as detecting suicidal content, raising the question of what they rely on. We study this mechanistically and use it to ask a narrower question: how to make a causal claim about a model's internal features more trustworthy. Our validation-gated framework, with suicidality detection as a case study, interprets a behavior only after the model is shown to perform it: a concept is admitted only once the model ranks it above a simple lexical baseline, and each subsequent property is tested against a matched control. This discipline yields negative as well as positive results. The gate rules out one task at the outset: on DeepSuiMind (Li et al. 2025), Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct cannot separate implicit suicidal intent from ordinary distress, so we do not analyze it. We turn to binary suicide detection, which it does perform. There we find a mid-network feature that appears semantic rather than keyword-based, is causally implicated in the decision (ablating it degrades the judgment; a random direction does not), is low-rank, and recurs across three model families and three suicide datasets. A register-matched control (suicide versus depression) suggests it tracks suicidality more specifically than general distress. Steering raises the model's response, but for unrelated questions too, so we treat it as necessary but not sufficient. The clearest pattern separates encoding from use: smaller models already represent suicidality, yet only larger ones appear to act on it. The positive evidence is English Reddit text, which limits the clinical reading.

</details>


### [314] [Scalable Hierarchical Attention Transformers for Multi-Turn Jailbreak Detection in Long Conversations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21082)
*Chenhui Hu,Muhammed Salih,Sudipto Guha,Subramanian Srinivasan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种高效的分层检测器，将多轮越狱攻击检测视为对话级分类问题，通过紧凑的轮次表示和轻量级对话模块进行跨轮推理，在14038条对话的基准上F1达0.9394，超越最强基线Claude Opus 4.7约0.07，同时将其假阳性率减半。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有单轮审查难以应对多轮越狱攻击（通过渐进升级、重构和角色扮演跨对话扩散不安全意图），且长上下文拼接成本高昂，需要更高效的对话级检测方案。

Method: 构建分层检测器：1）编码单个轮次形成紧凑的轮次表示；2）轻量级对话模块捕获对话动态，选择性关注细粒度证据。结合交叉注意力和自注意力机制。

Result: 在14038条对话的评估基准上，F1达0.9394，超越Claude Opus 4.7约0.07，假阳性率减半。消融实验表明各组件均有贡献，交叉注意力+自注意力相比仅自注意力降低假阳性率2.26个百分点。

Conclusion: 所提出的分层检测器在多轮越狱检测上显著优于强基线，验证了对话级分类思路和轻量级跨轮推理架构的有效性。

Abstract: Multi-turn jailbreaks can evade turn-level moderation by spreading unsafe intent across a dialogue through gradual escalation, reframing, and role manipulation. We address multi-turn jailbreak detection as a conversation-level classification problem and introduce an efficient hierarchical detector that avoids expensive long-context concatenation while retaining cross-turn reasoning. The model encodes individual turns to form compact turn representations and applies a lightweight conversation module that captures dialogue dynamics and selectively attends to fine-grained evidence when needed. On a challenging evaluation benchmark of 14,038 conversations, our approach achieves an F1 of 0.9394, outperforming Claude Opus 4.7, the strongest competing baseline, by 0.07 while halving its false-positive rate. Ablation studies confirm that each architectural component contributes meaningfully, with combining cross-attention and self-attention in the conversation module yielding a 2.26 percentage point reduction in false-positive rate over the self-attention-only variant.

</details>


### [315] [PrivacyAlign: Contextual Privacy Alignment for LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21710)
*Manveer Singh Tamber,Abhay Puri,Marc-Etienne Brunet,Perouz Taslakian,Jimmy Lin,Spandana Gella*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出PrivacyAlign数据集（1350样本，3516条标注），将人类隐私判断置于智能体对齐的核心，通过注释条件奖励建模训练小模型，使其在隐私决策上更好地对齐人类规范。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI智能体的隐私保护依赖不可靠的代理指标进行训练和评估，而隐私决策本质上是依赖社会规范和人类判断的上下文问题，因此需要将人类判断置于智能体隐私对齐的中心。

Method: 1) 构建PrivacyAlign数据集，包含1350个样本和3516条详细注释，覆盖当前LLM实际泄露隐私的场景；2) 提出注释条件化的LLM评判方法，让评判模型参考人类注释和解释；3) 提出注释条件化奖励建模，利用人类注释在强化学习中给新响应打分。

Result: 注释条件化的LLM评判比普通评判更可靠；使用注释条件化奖励训练的小型开放权重智能体在PrivacyAlign和现有隐私基准上均显著更好地对齐人类隐私规范。

Conclusion: 将人类隐私判断直接融入训练和评估流程，能够有效提升智能体在隐私决策上的对齐质量，且该方法对小型模型尤为有效。

Abstract: AI agents acting on behalf of users are constantly making decisions, and for users to trust their agents, those decisions must align with what they actually want. Privacy is an important alignment problem for agents: every message, post, or tool call an agent makes is a contextual judgment about what is appropriate to share, with whom, and under which conditions. Because such judgments depend on social expectations and norms, human judgment does not merely label privacy violations but also helps define them. While existing work relies on unreliable proxies for both training and evaluation, we place human judgment at the center of agentic privacy alignment. We introduce PrivacyAlign, a dataset of 1,350 samples with 3,516 detailed annotations from 599 unique annotators across diverse scenarios where current LLMs actually leak, and use it to ground both alignment training and automated evaluation in human privacy norms. Building on these annotations, we first show that conditioning LLM judges on human annotations and explanations for reference responses to the same prompt makes their judgments more reliable. We then introduce annotation-conditioned reward modeling, which uses these annotations to score new responses during RL, and show that small open-weight agents trained with this reward better align with human privacy norms, with strong gains on PrivacyAlign and existing privacy benchmarks for agents.

</details>


### [316] [GRAG: Generic Response-Augmented Generation Framework for Personalized Conversational Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21097)
*Junfeng Liu,Christopher T. Symons,Ranga Raju Vatsavai*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出GRAG框架，通过解耦内容基础（grounding）与个性化（personalization）两个竞争目标，利用通用大模型生成的通用回复作为语义支架，指导小模型在资源受限环境下高效微调，在多个基准数据集上ROUGE-2提升高达47%，BLEU提升36%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法将个性化与内容基础建模为单一学习问题，导致模型被迫同时处理"说什么"和"怎么说"两个目标，计算与优化挑战巨大，常出现内容基础与个性化表现此消彼长的问题。

Method: 提出GRAG（Generic Response-Augmented Generation）框架，将内容基础与个性化解耦：先用高容量通用LLM离线生成通用回复作为语义支架，再让小型专用模型仅专注于个性化注入，保持与对话上下文的紧密锚定。包含post-fusion和pre-fusion两种架构变体。

Result: 在多个覆盖不同个性化结构的基准对话数据集上，GRAG显著优于不使用辅助支架的SOTA方法，ROUGE-2提升高达47%，BLEU提升36%。

Conclusion: GRAG提供了一个在资源受限环境下构建基础感知型个性化对话系统的通用蓝图，有效解耦了内容基础与个性化两个竞争目标。

Abstract: Deploying highly capable personalized conversational agents in resource-constrained or privacy-sensitive environments remains a significant challenge. We identify a fundamental bottleneck in the existing approaches: current training paradigms treat personalization and grounding as a single monolithic learning problem. Under these paradigms, language models are forced to simultaneously address what to say (content grounding) and how to say it in a user-specific way (personalization), which introduces significant computational and optimization challenges. Consequently, contextual grounding is often sacrificed for persona adherence, or vice versa, resulting in responses that are either weakly grounded in the conversational history or insufficiently personalized. In this work, we propose the Generic Response-Augmented Generation (GRAG) framework that decouples these competing objectives by leveraging offline, generic responses from high-capacity, general-purpose LLMs as a semantic and structural scaffold to guide the fine-tuning of smaller, task-specialized models seamlessly in resource-limited environments. By decoupling the content grounding from personalization, GRAG allows the model to focus exclusively on persona injection while remaining firmly anchored to the conversational context. We instantiate the GRAG in two post- and pre-fusion-based architectural variants and evaluate them on multiple benchmark conversational datasets that cover diverse personalization structures. Our results demonstrate that GRAG significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods that do not use auxiliary scaffolding, yielding up to 47% improvements in ROUGE-2 and 36% in BLEU scores. Ultimately, GRAG offers a generalizable blueprint for building grounding-aware personalized conversational systems in resource-limited environments.

</details>


### [317] [Which Review Aspect Has a Greater Impact on the Duration of Open Peer Review in Multiple Rounds? -- Evidence from Nature Communications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21904)
*Haomin Zhou,Ruxue Han,Jiangtao Zhong,Chengzhi Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究分析了同行评审报告中的细粒度方面情感与评审时长之间的关系，发现积极情感与较短评审时长弱相关，且不同评审方面和评审轮次中相关性存在差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 同行评审是学术出版的核心，但日益增长的投稿量给审稿人和编辑带来巨大压力。本研究旨在探索评审文本情感与评审时长的关系，以支持针对性稿件修改并提高评审效率。

Method: 采用两阶段方法：首先从评审报告中提取细粒度方面，使用情感分类模型确定每个方面的情感；然后分析方面级情感与评审时长之间的相关性，并计算不同评审轮次的情感得分。

Result: 评审情感与时长呈弱但统计显著的负相关；"评估与结果"和"影响与研究价值"方面与评审时长相关性更强；不同评审轮次中方面情感与时长的关系存在显著差异。

Conclusion: 该研究将同行评审报告的文本内容与评审过程的时间特征联系起来，识别出与评审时长更相关的方面，为作者优先修改、审稿人和编辑提高效率提供依据，有助于减轻评审负担并加速学术交流。

Abstract: Purpose: Peer review is essential to scientific publishing, but increasing submission volumes have placed growing pressure on reviewers and editors. This study examines the relationship between sentiment toward specific review aspects and peer review duration. It also investigates how this relationship varies across disciplines and review rounds, with the aim of supporting targeted manuscript revision and improving review efficiency.
  Design/methodology/approach: We adopt a two-stage approach. First, fine-grained aspects are extracted from peer review reports, and a sentiment classification model is used to determine the sentiment associated with each aspect. Second, correlations between aspect-level sentiment and peer review duration are analyzed. Sentiment scores are also calculated for different review rounds to determine whether these relationships change over successive rounds.
  Findings: Review sentiment has a weak but statistically significant negative correlation with peer review duration, indicating that more positive reviews tend to be associated with shorter review periods. Aspects concerning Evaluation and Results and Impact and Research Value show relatively stronger correlations with review duration. The relationships between aspect-level sentiment and review duration also differ significantly across review rounds.
  Originality/value: This study connects the textual content of peer review reports with the temporal characteristics of the review process. By identifying review aspects that are more closely associated with review duration, it provides evidence that may help authors prioritize revisions and assist reviewers and editors in improving review efficiency. The findings contribute to reducing the burden of peer review and accelerating scholarly communication and knowledge dissemination.

</details>


### [318] [LLM-Based Multi-Reference Evaluation for Efficient and Robust Assessment of Phrase Break Annotations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21098)
*Younghan Park,Hoyeon Lee,Hawon Jeong,Jong-Hwan Kim*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出基于LLM的多参考评估方法(LMRE)，用于解决短语边界标注评估中单一参考标准不足的问题，在韩语测试集上表现优于传统方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有短语边界标注评估存在两大问题：单一参考评估假设存在唯一的"黄金标准"短语划分，忽视了同一话语可以有多种合理短语划分的实际情况；人工评估虽灵活但耗时且不可扩展。

Method: 提出LLM-based Multi-Reference Evaluation (LMRE)，利用大语言模型从少量示例中生成多个合理的短语划分方案，建模韵律短语划分的"一对多"特性，实现多参考评估。

Result: 在包含1,356条标注（覆盖5种策略）的韩语测试集上，LMRE在一致性和分数相关性两方面都比单参考评估更接近人类判断。

Conclusion: LMRE在可扩展性和多参考支持方面均有效，展示了LLM在语音领域评估中的潜力。

Abstract: Reliable evaluation of phrase break annotations is crucial, as subtle variations in prosodic boundaries directly affect the clarity and naturalness of speech. However, existing approaches exhibit major limitations: single-reference evaluation assumes a unique gold phrasing for an utterance despite multiple valid phrasings, while human judgment, though flexible, is labor-intensive and unscalable. To address these, we propose LLM-based Multi-Reference Evaluation (LMRE) for phrase break annotations that models the one-to-many nature of prosodic phrasing and generates multiple valid phrasings from minimal demonstrations. On a Korean testbed of 1,356 annotations covering five strategies, LMRE shows stronger alignment with human judgment than single-reference evaluation in both acceptance behavior and score correlation. Our findings demonstrate that LMRE effectively achieves both scalability and multi-reference support, highlighting the potential of LLMs for evaluation in the speech domain.

</details>


### [319] [A Multi-Agent Audit Framework for High-Stakes Reasoning: Evaluation and Interpretability in Clinical Mental Health Screening](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21123)
*Jingchen Ye,Yanpei Yu,Luyao Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出一种多智能体审计框架（Multi-Agent Audit Framework），通过感知智能体、知识RAG、CoT推理和审计验证四阶段协作，在临床心理健康筛查任务中降低PHQ-8抑郁预测MAE从5.35至5.02，提供可解释的诊断依据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统单模型LLM在零样本高 stakes 推理任务中容易出现幻觉和低可解释性，亟需一种透明、可验证的推理工作流。

Method: 构建多智能体管道：① Perception Agent（感知输入）② 知识检索增强生成（RAG）③ 链式思维（CoT）临床推理 ④ Audit审计验证阶段；在DAIC-WOZ数据集上用本地开源模型评估。

Result: 多智能体框架在PHQ-8抑郁严重预测中MAE从5.35降至5.02，优于单基线模型，且跨智能体验证轨迹有效缓解推理漂移。

Conclusion: 该框架提供了超越孤立模型缩放的可泛化范式，适用于可靠AI辅助决策，代码和数据已开源。

Abstract: High-stakes reasoning tasks necessitate transparent and verifiable workflows, yet conventional single-model large language models (LLMs) often struggle with hallucination and low interpretability under zero-shot paradigms. To address this general AI challenge, we propose a Multi-Agent Audit Framework that simulates a collaborative, multi-step verification process. We empirically validate this architecture in the sensitive domain of clinical mental health screening using a modular LangChain workflow. Our framework decomposes the reasoning process into a Perception Agent, Knowledge Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), Chain-of-Thought (CoT) clinical inference, and a critical Audit verification stage. We evaluated this framework on the DAIC-WOZ dataset using locally deployed open-source models. Experimental results demonstrate that our multi-agent pipeline significantly outperforms single-agent baselines, reducing the Mean Absolute Error (MAE) for PHQ-8 depression severity prediction from 5.35 to 5.02. By exposing cross-agent validation traces, the framework mitigates reasoning drift and provides highly interpretable diagnostic rationales, offering a generalizable paradigm for reliable AI-assisted decision support beyond isolated model scaling. We make data and code open access on GitHub for replicability.

</details>


### [320] [AdaMem: Learning What to Remember for Personalized Long-Horizon LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21144)
*Xingyu Chen,Rui Wang,Zhaopeng Tu,Liefeng Bo*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出AdaMem，一种根据用户角色和反馈学习"该记住什么"的自适应记忆方法，在缩减9%记忆体积的同时，将QA准确率提升最高9%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM代理长期记忆系统倾向于"记住一切"，但在实际生产中，推理成本与有限上下文预算使得这种做法不可持续——无关琐事挤占有用信息，导致记忆膨胀（memory bloat），逐步降低QA准确性。因此需要根据用户角色有选择性地写入记忆。

Method: AdaMem维护一个结构化的、角色特定的记忆策略（Memory Policy），通过轻量级的补丁式自我反思（patch-style self-reflection）结合失败回滚（failure rollback），从每周QA反馈中不断优化该策略。同时构建了AdaMem-Bench基准，模拟数周的交互与周度QA评估。

Result: 在两种提取模型和两种反馈模式下，AdaMem相比统一记忆基线Mem0，QA准确率提升最高9.0%，同时记忆体积缩减9%。

Conclusion: 什么值得记住是角色依赖的，自适应记忆选择能够有效缓解记忆膨胀问题，提升长程个性化交互中的QA准确性。

Abstract: Long-term memory systems for Large Language Model (LLM) agents typically try to \emph{remember everything}, extracting memories uniformly to retain as many facts as possible. In production, however, inference cost and finite context budgets make this untenable: beyond consolidating raw dialogue into memory, an agent must exert \emph{write control}, efficiently keeping only the information each user actually cares about. Otherwise, long-horizon personalized interactions suffer \emph{memory bloat}, where irrelevant trivia crowds out useful information and steadily erodes question-answering (QA) accuracy. We argue that what is worth remembering is role-dependent, and propose \textbf{AdaMem} (Adaptive Memory), a method that \emph{learns what to remember} for each user from feedback. AdaMem maintains a structured, role-specific Memory Policy and refines it from weekly QA feedback through a lightweight, patch-style self-reflection step with failure rollback. To study this setting, we build \textbf{AdaMem-Bench}, a benchmark that simulates weeks of interaction with week-by-week QA. Across two extraction models and two feedback modes, AdaMem improves QA accuracy by up to \textbf{+9.0\%} over the uniform Mem0 baseline while shrinking memory volume by \textbf{9\%}.

</details>


### [321] [Who Checks the Citations? Benchmarking Legal Hallucination Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21155)
*Patty Liu,Dominik Stammbach,Peter Henderson*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 研究发现，尽管AI模型不断更新，法庭罚单威慑效果有限，法律文件中AI编造引用的现象仍在增长（超过1000份文件）。论文提出法律引用幻觉的分类体系，构建了1300条错误注入的数据集，测试了5个模型。GPT-5在代理框架下表现最佳（召回率82.8%，F1 60.5%），但所有模型在细微错误类别上表现不佳，且代理验证成本高昂（平均16.9步/片段），信息访问受限进一步制约了效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前AI工具在法律文书起草中广泛使用，但频繁编造引用（幻觉）。尽管新模型被认为会减少幻觉、法庭制裁被认为能威慑使用者，实际数据显示虚假引用数量逐年增长。因此需要系统性检测方法，评估AI自动检测幻觉的可行性。

Method: 1. 提出基于真实法庭文件的**法律引用幻觉分类体系**。2. 构建包含**1300条法律文书节选**（注入人工错误）的数据集。3. 在**代理与非代理**两种设置下，对5个模型进行基准测试。4. 评估各模型的召回率、F1分数、推理步骤数等指标。

Result: GPT-5在代理框架下表现最优（召回率82.8%，F1 60.5%），但所有模型在**细微错误类别**上表现不佳。代理验证资源消耗大（GPT-5平均16.9步/片段）。限制信息访问（如缺少商业法律数据库订阅）进一步制约了检测效果。

Conclusion: 现有AI模型尚无法可靠检测法律引用幻觉，尤其对细微错误类型识别不足。代理验证成本高且受信息获取限制，形成政策层面的公平性担忧（缺乏商业数据库访问权限的AI系统和诉讼当事人均处于劣势）。论文提供的数据集、工具和政策建议为构建可审计的可靠法律引用检测工具奠定基础。

Abstract: Attorneys, judges, and pro se filers increasingly use AI to draft legal documents, yet these tools frequently fabricate citations. Despite predictions that newer models would hallucinate less or that court sanctions would deter negligent filers, we found over 1,000 filings containing fabricated citations -- with this number growing year-over-year. This study evaluates whether AI-based systems can mitigate these errors by automatically detecting hallucinations. We propose a taxonomy of legal citation hallucinations grounded in actual court filings and introduce a dataset of 1,300 brief excerpts containing injected errors. Benchmarking five models in agentic and non-agentic settings reveals that while the latest iterations perform better -- GPT-5 achieves 82.8% recall and a 60.5% F1 score in an agentic framework -- all models struggle with subtle error categories. Agentic verification remains resource-intensive, with GPT-5 averaging 16.9 steps per excerpt. Furthermore, restricted information access limits the efficacy of even the best agents. This gap creates policy concerns, as it disadvantages both AI systems and litigants who lack subscriptions to commercial legal databases. Together, our dataset, tools, and policy recommendations provide a foundation for building and auditing reliable legal citation checking tools.

</details>


### [322] [Dementia-Agents: A Multi-Modal Multi-Agent System for Dementia Staging and Phenotyping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21168)
*Yaling Shen,Maja Christensen,Yiwen Jiang,Jenna Dennison,David Darby,Amy Brodtmann,Zongyuan Ge*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出Dementia-Agents多智能体框架，通过数据代理、五个领域专家代理和协调代理的三步流程，在真实临床队列（1066名患者）上实现了比单一MLLM和已有医疗多智能体系统更好的痴呆症分期和表型诊断性能，同时保持领域可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI方法多聚焦于阿尔茨海默病的二分类或三阶段建模，忽视了痴呆症在综合征层面的多阶段、多表型、多病因的复杂性，且难以处理真实临床中多模态数据不完整、异质性的问题。

Method: Dementia-Agents框架包含三步：(1) 数据代理将结构化临床记录转化为语义忠实、保留缺失信号信息的文本表示，并路由给对应领域专家；(2) 五个微调的专家代理进行领域级预测；(3) 协调代理进行概率聚合，输出最终的分期和表型决策。

Result: 在来自两个认知神经科的真实临床队列（1066名患者）上评估，相比单一多模态大语言模型和已有医疗多智能体系统，该方法在真实世界综合征级痴呆分期和表型诊断上取得一致性改进。

Conclusion: 多智能体协作框架能够更好地对齐真实临床实践，处理不完整、异质性数据，在保持领域可解释性的同时提升痴呆症综合征级诊断性能。

Abstract: Dementia diagnosis requires integrating multi-modal clinical assessments from diverse informants and clinicians under incomplete and heterogeneous data conditions. Yet most AI-driven approaches remain Alzheimer's disease (AD)-centric, framing the problem as binary AD detection or three-stage AD progression modeling within well-curated research settings. This pathology-driven paradigm overlooks the broader, syndrome-level nature of dementia, which spans multiple stages, phenotypes, and etiologies. In this paper, we propose Dementia-Agents, a clinically aligned multi-agent framework for real-world dementia staging and phenotyping. The framework follows a three-step workflow: (1) a data agent translates structured clinical records into semantically faithful textual representations that preserve missing-data signals and routes them to domain-aligned experts; (2) five fine-tuned expert agents generate domain-level predictions; and (3) a coordinator agent performs probabilistic aggregation to produce final staging and phenotyping decisions. We develop and evaluate Dementia-Agents on a real-world clinical cohort of 1,066 patients from two cognitive neurology services. Compared with monolithic multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) and prior medical multi-agent systems, our approach achieves consistent improvements in diagnostic performance for real-world syndrome-level dementia staging and phenotyping, while preserving domain-level interpretability.

</details>


### [323] [Beyond Hooking Onto the World: Referential Profiles and the Numerical Structure of LLM Grounding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21195)
*Joo Yull Rhee*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文重新审视大语言模型的 grounding 问题，接受向量 grounding 转向，但指出现有讨论在指称的薄处理与数值实现两方面存在不足，主张 LLMs 拥有衍生的、语言中介的、基于轮廓的、数值结构的指称形式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有关于大语言模型的 grounding 讨论虽然接受了从经典符号 grounding 到向量 grounding 的转变，但在两个关键方面仍不完整：(1) 指称问题被过于简化，被当作孤立的表达式与对象之间的固定联系；(2) 向量 grounding 缺乏对数值实现的充分解释。本文旨在填补这些空白。

Method: 本文采用概念分析与理论论证的方法，结合近期向量 grounding 讨论和机械可解释性研究，系统论证指称的轮廓性特征（基于使用模式、纠错、区分、推理和延续的公共稳定化），以及 LLMs 中指称的数值实现机制（权重、激活、注意力隐状态、softmax对比、内积对齐等）。

Result: 论证表明：(1) 人类指称本身也是轮廓性的、语境敏感的、情感塑造的、规范治理的，并非简单的对象-符号映射；(2) LLMs 通过优化过程参数化人类世界导向实践的痕迹，其指称是衍生的、语言中介的、数值结构化的；(3) 机械可解释性发现（实体类特征、知识神经元、情感激活方向等）为这种有限指称论提供间接支持。

Conclusion: LLMs 并不拥有人类意义上的指称（基于感知、记忆、意向、具身性或理解），但可能拥有一种衍生的、语言中介的、基于轮廓的、数值结构化的指称形式。这种有限指称论既承认 LLMs 语言能力的非平凡性，又避免对其过度拟人化解释。

Abstract: This paper revisits the grounding problem for large language models in light of recent vector-grounding accounts. I accept the shift from classical symbol grounding to vector grounding, but argue that the current debate remains incomplete in two respects. First, reference is often treated too thinly, as if it were a fixed link between an isolated expression and an object. I argue instead that reference is profile-based, context-sensitive, discourse-level, affectively shaped, and norm-governed. Even in the human case, reference is publicly stabilized through patterns of use, correction, distinction, inference, and continuation rather than through identical private representations. Second, vector grounding requires an account of numerical realization. LLMs do not acquire reference through human perception, memory, intention, embodiment, or understanding. Rather, through optimization, they parameterize linguistic traces of human world-directed practice. In a finite vector system, referential profiles must be distributed, may be superposed, and are recovered through context-sensitive computation. Weights, activations, attention-mediated hidden states, softmax-trained contrasts, and inner-product alignments are the mathematical sites at which inherited linguistic relations become stable and causally active. Mechanistic interpretability findings, including entity-like features, knowledge neurons, and emotion-related activation directions, provide indirect support for this view. They do not show that LLMs possess human reference. They support a more limited thesis: LLMs may possess derivative, language-mediated, profile-based, and numerically structured forms of reference.

</details>


### [324] [When Context Misleads: Surprisal, Energy and Attention Entropy as Metrics of Coherence Illusions in LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21203)
*Ece Takmaz,Nitin Kumar,Li Kloostra,Jakub Dotlacil*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究荷兰语语言模型是否像人类读者一样受到连贯性错觉的影响——即不连贯的语篇因干扰词而显得连贯。实验发现：模型在关键词上的意外度与人类判断一致；注意力熵可识别对连贯性敏感的头；消融实验显示跨设置迁移效应；并引入能量指标量化语篇连贯性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 心理语言学研究表明人类读者会受连贯性错觉影响，本研究探究荷兰语语言模型是否表现出相同行为。

Method: 使用6个单语和4个多语言荷兰语模型，通过意外度、注意力熵和能量指标分析模型对连贯性错觉的反应，并进行消融实验。

Result: 模型在关键位置上的意外度与人类可接受度判断和眼动数据一致；注意力熵可识别对连贯/不连贯敏感的头；消融实验显示跨实验的迁移效应。

Conclusion: 荷兰语大语言模型中存在连贯性错觉现象，熵和能量指标能够揭示跨设置运作的机制。

Abstract: Psycholinguistics studies show that human readers fall for coherence illusions: an incoherent discourse can seem coherent simply because a distractor matches what comes next. We investigate whether Dutch language models (6 monolingual and 4 multilingual) show the same behavior on texts that link back to earlier context with words such as 'again' and 'too'. First, we find that surprisal at the critical word tracks human acceptability judgments and eye-tracking data. Models are more surprised by incoherent continuations, but a matching distractor in the prior context reduces this surprisal. Second, attention entropy at the critical position identifies heads that behave differently under coherence vs. incoherence. We find that ablating these heads shows transfer effects across experiments, suggesting a shared mechanism. Third, we introduce energy from the associative-memory literature as a metric to quantify discourse coherence. Taken together, our results show that coherence illusions arise in Dutch LLMs, with entropy and energy exposing mechanisms that operate across settings.

</details>


### [325] [OpenWER: Improving Cross-Lingual ASR Evaluation and Enabling Token-Based Accuracy Metrics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21237)
*Korbinian Kuhn,Gottfried Zimmermann*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: OpenWER是一个开源工具，通过语言特定标准化和复合词检测提升WER鲁棒性，在52种语言上实现最高25%的绝对WER下降，促进ASR评估公平性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有WER评估指标主要针对英语优化，低资源语言的评估方法不足，缺乏公平的跨语言比较基准。

Method: 实现语言特定的标准化处理和复合词检测；采用基于token的Levenshtein对齐以保留互补指标并嵌入元数据。

Result: 在52种语言上相比常见库实现最高25%的绝对WER降低。

Conclusion: OpenWER通过提高WER在不同语言间的可靠性，促进ASR研究的公平性并支持更全面的准确性评估。

Abstract: Advances in deep learning and end-to-end Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) have enabled robust multilingual models, but evaluation metrics remain limited in assessing accuracy. Efforts to improve or replace the common metric Word Error Rate (WER) often focus on English, leaving evaluations for low-resource languages under-explored and hindering fair cross-lingual comparisons. We present OpenWER, an open-source implementation that improves WER robustness through language-specific normalisation and compound word detection. A token-based Levenshtein alignment preserves complementary metrics and allows metadata embedding for granular accuracy scores. Our analysis of 52 languages shows absolute WER reductions of up to 25% compared to common libraries. OpenWER contributes to fairness in ASR research by increasing the reliability of WER across diverse languages and enabling more comprehensive accuracy evaluations.

</details>


### [326] [SCOPE: Sequential Conformal Probing for Reliable OOD Rejection in LLM Services](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21255)
*Zhuoyun Li,Boxuan Wang,Changshun Wu,Xiaowei Huang,Yi Dong*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出SCOPE框架，通过选择可读隐藏层、构建共形门控和超鞅e过程，提升LLM服务中OOD输入的检测能力，并具有理论保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有OOD检测器多依赖最终输出或最后层表示，不清楚服务边界信号在模型内部的编码位置，且缺乏对未见输入的理论保证。

Method: SCOPE框架包含三个核心组件：（1）选择可读的隐藏层；（2）用IND校准数据构建共形门控（conformal gate）；（3）使用超鞅e过程（supermartingale e-process）来认证持续的服务边界证据。

Result: 在多个LLM骨干网络和六种精心设计的边界条件下，SCOPE在门控级拒绝上优于标准最终层检测器，并揭示了不同OOD边界在隐藏空间中呈现不同的几何形态。

Conclusion: SCOPE框架有效提升了LLM服务中OOD输入的过滤能力，具有理论基础，并能揭示OOD边界的几何特性。

Abstract: Rejecting inputs outside the defined in-distribution (IND) service scope is critical for large language model (LLM) services, where unsupported requests should be filtered before full generation. Existing out-of-distribution (OOD) detectors often rely on final outputs or final-layer representations, leaving unclear where service-boundary signals are most clearly encoded inside the model; they also lack a theoretical guarantee for held-out inputs. In this paper, we introduce SCOPE (Sequential Conformal OOD Probing and Evaluation), a framework that selects a readable hidden layer, constructs a conformal gate with IND calibration, and uses a supermartingale e-process to certify persistent service-boundary evidence. Experiments across multiple LLM backbones and six carefully designed boundary conditions show that SCOPE improves gate-level rejection over standard final-layer detectors, while revealing how different OOD boundaries take different geometric forms in hidden space.

</details>


### [327] [Synthetic Audio Generation Framework for Air Traffic Control Speech Recognition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21340)
*Raphaël Bagat,Zhe Zhang,Junichi Yamagishi,Irina Illina,Emmanuel Vincent*

Main category: cs.CL
