Conclusion: TraceView通过可视化与标注手段，有效帮助开发者诊断和分析APR智能体的修复行为，提升对修复过程的理解和可调试性。

Abstract: LLM-based automated program repair (APR) agents generate patches to fix software bugs with minimal human intervention. These agents often produce long trajectories of reasoning, tool use, and feedback to produce candidate patches. Final patch outcomes show whether a repair attempt succeeded or failed, but they do not show how the agent reached that outcome, or where the process became repetitive or misaligned with the task. This makes agentic repair failures difficult to diagnose, reproduce, and prevent. To help developers address these challenges, we present TraceView, an interactive tool for labeling and visualizing repair trajectories from APR systems. TraceView organizes raw and pre-labeled agentic runs with Thought, Action, and Result components to support semantic relation labeling and diagnosis, and renders the resulting trajectory as graph views. Furthermore, TraceView provides relation filters, patch outcome summaries, metrics, and node-level evidence panels to help users inspect how reasoning, actions, and feedback connect across the various steps of an agentic repair attempt. We evaluate TraceView with five researchers through a survey-based user study. Participants reported that TraceView made trajectories easier to scan and that its overview-to-detail workflow helped them better understand repair behavior. The TraceView source code is available at https://github.com/SOAR-Lab/agent-traj-visualization. A screencast of TraceView is available at https://youtu.be/9ZCh7Ifj2AQ.

</details>


### [476] [Failure Analysis in Transition: An Industry Survey of Challenges, Priorities, and Standardization Needs in Advanced Packaging and Heterogeneous Integration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22149)
*Himanandhan Reddy Kottur,Nusra Akter Takia,Mahamudul Hassan Fuad,Istiaq Firoz Shiam,Matthew Walsh,Navid Asadizanjani*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文通过一项涵盖约100名从业者的匿名调查，揭示了半导体失效分析领域因异构集成、芯粒架构、混合键合、背面技术和埋入式封装结构而发生的变革。调查显示69%的受访者涉及异构集成/芯粒/3D产品，封装与异构集成失效分析重要性评分最高（7.92/10），混合键合是最难分析的新架构（54%），高分辨率无损成像被视为最重要的未来加速器（8.18/10），83%支持数据标准化框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 半导体行业正经历异构集成、芯粒架构、混合键合等新技术变革，这些变革对失效分析提出了全新挑战。然而，业界如何看待这一转型、当前面临哪些瓶颈、未来需要哪些工具和能力，尚缺乏系统性调查数据。因此，作者希望通过问卷调查获取从业者的第一手观点。

Method: 作者设计并分发了一份匿名在线调查，面向半导体设计、封装、系统、工具和失效分析等多个环节的组织。调查收集了约100份回复，涵盖组织背景、产品领域、失效分析优先级、关键瓶颈、样品制备挑战、新兴架构痛点、工作流加速需求及数据标准化态度等问题。

Result: 1) 异构集成/芯粒/3D产品占受访者基础的69%；2) 封装与异构集成失效分析重要性评分最高（7.92/10）；3) 混合键合是54%受访者认为最难分析的新架构；4) 高分辨率无损成像被评为最重要的未来加速器（8.18/10）；5) 83%的受访者支持正式的数据标准化框架。

Conclusion: 异构集成和芯粒架构已成为失效分析的主要挑战领域，行业对高分辨率无损成像、数据标准化、混合键合分析能力等有明确且迫切的需求。作者提供了完整的调查数据（附录A表II）以提高透明度，并为未来的基准研究提供参考。

Abstract: Failure analysis is being reshaped by heterogeneous integration, chiplet-based architectures, hybrid bonding, backside technologies, & increasingly buried package structures. To examine how practitioners view this transition, an anonymous survey was distributed across a broad set of organizations involved in semiconductor design, packaging, systems, tools, & failure analysis. The survey collected approximately one hundred responses & probed organizational background, supported product domains, future priorities in failure analysis, critical bottlenecks, sample preparation challenges, emerging architecture specific pain points, & perceived needs for workflow acceleration & data standardization. The results show that heterogeneous integration, chiplet, and three-dimensional products dominate the respondent base at 69%, while package & heterogeneous integration failure analysis received the highest importance rating at 7.92 out of 10. Hybrid bonding emerged as the most difficult new architecture to analyze at 54%, higher-resolution non-destructive imaging ranked as the most important future accelerator at 8.18 out of 10, and 83% of respondents supported formalized data standardization frameworks. The complete survey data are provided in Appendix A (Table II) to improve transparency & support future benchmarking.

</details>


### [477] [Natural Language-Focused Software Engineering via Code-Documentation Equivalence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22247)
*Aryaz Eghbali,Zhongxin Liu,Michael Pradel*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出"文档-代码等价性"概念，并开发了Documentary方法自动生成与代码等价的高质量文档。实验表明该方法能为53.4%的函数生成等价文档，使LLM在代码理解任务中准确率提升12.8-24.5%，且开发者认为其比人工文档更有用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 代码文档对软件开发维护至关重要，但现有文档常不完整、过时或不准确。大语言模型时代，文档质量更为重要，因为它为模型提供关键上下文。然而当前缺乏衡量文档是否准确描述代码的标准和方法。

Method: 提出"文档-代码等价性"概念，并设计Documentary方法：自动为给定代码片段生成等价文档。该方法基于LLM，评估时测试了函数级代码片段的文档生成能力。

Result: 1) Documentary能为53.4%的函数级代码片段生成等价文档；2) 使用等价文档时，LLM预测函数输出的准确率比人工文档和基线方法高12.8-24.5%；3) 人类开发者认为Documentary生成的文档比原始人工文档更有利于理解和编辑代码。

Conclusion: 文档-代码等价性是一个有价值的新概念，能显著提升LLM在代码理解和编辑任务中的表现，同时被人类开发者认为更具实用性。这说明自动生成等价文档对软件工程具有实际意义。

Abstract: Source code documentation is an integral part of software development and maintenance, as it helps in understanding the code and facilitates communication among developers. However, existing documentation is often incomplete, outdated, or inaccurate, which can lead to misunderstandings and errors. In the era of large language models (LLMs), which are being extensively used for software engineering tasks, the quality of documentation becomes even more critical, as documentation provides important context for the models. In this paper, we introduce the notion of documentation-to-code equivalence, a novel property that captures whether documentation accurately and completely describes the code it documents. We present a novel approach, called Documentary, to automatically generate equivalent documentation for a given code snippet. Our evaluation shows that Documentary can generate equivalent documentation for 53.4% of the evaluated function-level code snippets. To show the benefits of documentation-to-code equivalence, we describe and evaluate two software engineering tasks: code understanding and code editing. Our results show that documentation-to-code equivalence allows an LLM to predict the output of a function with 12.8--24.5% higher accuracy, when compared to human-written documentation and documentation generated by a baseline approach. Furthermore, human developers consider documentation generated by Documentary to be more useful for understanding and editing code than the original human-written documentation.

</details>


### [478] [Leveraging Large Language Models to Obscure Code Stylometry: A Comparative Study of GPT-3.5 and GPT-4](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22306)
*Saman Pordanesh,Benjamin Tan*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 研究LLM（如GPT-3.5/GPT-4）修改代码风格以规避作者身份检测的能力，发现单次与多次提示方法效果差异显著，且功能保持是主要挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索LLM能否通过修改代码风格（stylometry）来隐藏程序员身份特征，同时保持代码功能不变，以评估现有作者归因技术面对先进AI时的鲁棒性。

Method: 使用GPT-3.5和GPT-4模型，采用单次（single-shot）和多次（multi-shot）提示策略修改代码；用Random Forest分类器进行作者归因检测，评估风格混淆效果；同时进行功能完整性检查。

Result: 不同提示策略效果差异显著；结构化详细提示更有效；修改后保持功能完整性存在挑战；多次提示方法优于单次提示。

Conclusion: LLM有能力改变代码风格特征，但提示工程策略至关重要；现有归因技术面对高级AI时面临挑战，需发展更鲁棒的防御机制。

Abstract: In the rapidly evolving field of software development, code stylometry analyzing unique stylistic signatures of programmers plays a crit-ical role in authorship attribution and cybersecurity. Recent advancements in artificial intelligence, particularly Large Language Models (LLMs) like GPT-3.5 and GPT-4, have introduced new dimensions to this field, challenging traditional stylometry techniques. This study investigates the effectiveness of LLMs in altering code stylometry while preserving functionality and evaluates the impact of various prompt engineering strategies. Through comprehensive experiments, we assess how well these models can obscure stylistic signatures to avoid detection by a Random Forest classifier trained for authorship attribution. The results reveal significant differences in effectiveness between single-shot and multi-shot methods and highlight the importance of detailed, structured prompts. Additionally, functionality preservation checks demonstrate the challenges in maintaining code integrity post-modification. This research provides critical insights into the robustness of authorship attribution techniques against advanced AI capabilities, informing future cybersecurity and software engineering developments

</details>


### [479] [Reinforcement learning to improve large language model-based automated code compliance systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22402)
*Jack Wei Lun Shi,Minghao Dang,Wawan Solihin,Leong Hien Poh,Justin K. W. Yeoh*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出P4IR框架，结合监督微调(SFT)和组相对策略优化(GRPO)提升LLM在建筑规范自动合规检查(ACC)中的代码生成准确性，树编辑距离降低23.8%，词级Levenshtein距离降低38.6%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于LLM的建筑规范自动合规检查方法容易生成错误和幻觉性的计算机可处理规则，需要提升准确性和可靠性。

Method: 两阶段框架P4IR：第一阶段使用SFT向LLM注入领域知识；第二阶段使用GRPO优化生成的高层代码骨架中间表示的准确性。

Result: 相比SFT基线，树编辑距离降低23.8%，词级Levenshtein距离降低38.6%；零样本设置下在代码结构和语义上超越Claude Opus、Sonnet 4.5、GPT-5.2、Qwen-3-Max、GLM-4.7等领先LLM；GRPO阶段显著减少了假阳性。

Conclusion: SFT结合GRPO直接优化领域特定目标，为构建更准确可靠的LLM-based ACC系统提供了可行路径。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM)-based approaches for automated code compliance (ACC) of building regulations are prone to generating incorrect and hallucinated computer-processable rules. This paper introduces P4IR, a two-stage framework that uses supervised fine-tuning (SFT) to instill domain knowledge in an LLM, followed by Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to improve the accuracy of the generated intermediate representations in the form of high-level code skeletons. The framework achieved reductions of up to 23.8% and 38.6% in tree edit distance and token-level Levenshtein distance respectively, relative to the SFT baselines. Comparative analysis demonstrates that this approach in a zero-shot setting outperforms leading LLMs in both code structure and semantics, specifically Claude Opus and Sonnet 4.5, GPT-5.2, Qwen-3-Max, and GLM-4.7, evaluated via few-shot prompting. Additionally, the GRPO stage produced a small yet statistically significant reduction in false positives. By combining SFT with GRPO to optimize directly for domain-specific objectives, this approach offers a path toward more accurate and reliable LLM-based ACC systems.

</details>


### [480] [Formal-Method-Guided Vibe Coding: Closing the Verification Loop on AI-Generated Safety-Critical Software Through Model-Driven Engineering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22413)
*Ran Wei,Le Zhu,Haochi Wang,Jim Woodcock,Fang Yan,Simon Foster,Xiangyang Ji*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出Forge管道，通过模型驱动工程将"氛围编码"生成的Java代码自动转换为三种形式化验证形式（Dafny、CSP/FDR4、Isabelle/Z-Machines），利用验证失败反馈循环迭代改进代码，为安全关键系统的认证提供路径。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: "氛围编码"（基于自然语言生成代码且极少审查）对低风险消费软件可行，但无法满足DO-178C等安全关键标准，因为LLM缺乏形式化正确性保证，而现有方案依赖训练数据稀缺的验证感知语言。

Method: 提出Forge闭环管道：通过氛围编码生成Java代码→模型转换提取三种形式化模型（Dafny演绎验证、CSP/FDR4精化检查、Isabelle/Z-Machines定理证明）→每个验证失败生成结构化纠正提示→驱动下一轮代码迭代。LLM是生成器，MDE链是判别器，开发者无须接触形式化模型。

Result: 经验结果表明，该管道能为LLM生成的Java代码生成符合标准的验证证据，向认证方向迈进一步。

Conclusion: Forge通过结合LLM生成能力与MDE形式化验证，弥合了氛围编码与安全关键系统认证之间的鸿沟，为工业级应用提供了可行路径。

Abstract: Vibe coding -- accepting LLM-generated source from natural-language intent with minimal review -- is fast and may be adequate for low-criticality consumer software. But for safety-critical systems governed by DO-178C, IEC 61508, or ISO 26262, it offers no path to certification: large language models (LLMs) provide no formal correctness guarantees, and existing remedies target verification-aware languages (Dafny, Verus, Lean) that are scarce in pretraining data and absent from industrial toolchains.
  This paper closes the gap. We present Forge (Formal method Oriented Refinement loop for GEnerated code): a closed-loop pipeline that guides vibe coding through formal verification using established Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) infrastructure. Through vibe coding, we generate Java source code; our pipeline then extracts -- via model transformations -- formal artefacts in three different formalisms, each checked by a complementary verifier: deductive verification (Dafny), Communicating Sequential Processes (CSP) refinement via the Failures-Divergences Refinement checker (FDR4), and theorem proving using Z-Machines in Isabelle; every verification failure becomes a structured correction prompt that drives the next code-generation iteration. The LLM is the draft generator, the MDE chain is the discriminator, and the developer never has to read the formal models.
  Empirically, we find that the pipeline produces standards-relevant verification evidence for LLM-generated Java -- a step toward certification.

</details>


### [481] [All Green, Still Broken: Real-Flow Verification Lessons from an LLM-Integrated, Multi-Market Web Application](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22475)
*Muhammad Bilal,Ali Hassaan Mughal*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文分析了包含LLM输出、多市场国际化、浏览器前端等难测试要素的租房搜索助手项目，研究252个bug修复提交，发现约44%的缺陷通过四个"接缝"（live浏览器运行时、非默认市场、端到端流程、全系统层面）逃逸，而组件级单元测试无法捕捉这些缺陷。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代Web应用融合了大语言模型输出、多市场国际化和浏览器前端等难以测试的要素，导致自动化测试通过但用户可见缺陷仍不断流入生产环境，亟需理解这些缺陷的逃逸模式。

Method: 对项目252个bug修复提交进行系统性分类，按缺陷逃逸的"接缝"（边界）进行归类分析，提出四接缝框架用于描述组件级单元测试无法覆盖的缺陷类型。

Result: 约44%的缺陷修复属于四个接缝类别：live浏览器运行时、非默认市场、端到端流程、全系统层面；一个接缝处缺乏防护导致同一缺陷两次发布。

Conclusion: 提出了四接缝框架和缺陷分布数据，以及团队可采用的简单方法找出承载最多修复的接缝，从而改进测试策略。

Abstract: Modern web applications increasingly combine three ingredients that are hard to test: output from large language models, multi-market internationalization, and browser-driven front-ends over external data sources. We report on a production rental-search assistant whose automated suite grew to 1,553 test cases in six weeks. The suite passed continuously, yet user-facing defects continued to reach production. We studied all 252 bug-fix commits in the project and classified each by the boundary, or seam, it escaped through. About 44 percent of the fixes fall in four seams that component-level unit tests cannot observe: the live browser runtime, the non-default market, the end-to-end flow, and the whole-system level. A fix without a guard at the seam let one defect ship twice. We present the four-seam framework, the measured defect distribution, and the practices we adopted, including a simple way for a team to find the seam that carries the most fixes.

</details>


### [482] [WebCQ: Cooperative Multi-Agent Deep Reinforcement Learning for Scalable Web GUI Testing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22502)
*Yujia Fan,Sinan Wang,Zebang Fei,Yao Qin,Huaxuan Li,Yepang Liu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出WebCQ，一种基于QTRAN的多智能体强化学习方法，用于大规模Web GUI测试。相比现有MARL方法（MARG、Fastbot），WebCQ在8个大型商业网站上探索了33.3%更多状态、执行了42.2%更多独特动作，并触发更多故障，展现出更好的可扩展性和有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于MARL的GUI测试方法（如MARG、Fastbot）受限于表格型强化学习算法，难以扩展到大型商业Web应用（状态空间巨大、交互元素众多）。

Method: WebCQ采用QTRAN实现多智能体协调，并引入轻量级同步机制以支持异步Web测试。它为每个UI事件提取语义和探索特征构成动作向量，与状态向量拼接后输入策略网络，实现基于DQN的动态动作空间决策。

Result: 在8个大型商业网站上，相同时间预算和智能体数量下，WebCQ比MARG多探索33.3%状态、多执行42.2%独特动作；在6/8网站上触发更多故障；20小时实验中保持更高动作吞吐量，且随智能体数量增加性能提升更显著。

Conclusion: WebCQ克服了现有MARL-based GUI测试方法的关键局限性，为现代Web GUI测试提供了可扩展且有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL)-based techniques have shown promise for GUI testing. However, as the complexity of modern GUI software increases, existing MARL-based approaches (e.g., MARG and Fastbot) struggle to scale due to the inherent limitations of their underlying tabular reinforcement learning algorithms. This limits their applicability to large-scale commercial GUI software, especially web applications with vast state spaces and many interactive elements. To fill this gap, we propose WebCQ, a novel MARL-based approach for scalable web GUI testing. WebCQ incorporates QTRAN for multi-agent coordination and a lightweight synchronization mechanism, allowing it to work under asynchronous web testing scenarios. It extracts semantic and exploration features for each UI event to form an action vector. This vector is concatenated with the current state vector and fed into the policy network, enabling DQN-based decision making within a dynamic action space. We evaluated WebCQ on eight large-scale commercial websites. Under the same time budget and agent count, WebCQ explored 33.3% more states and executed 42.2% more unique actions than MARG, while triggering more failures on six of the eight websites under test. It also demonstrated strong scalability, maintaining higher action throughput during 20-hour experiments, and achieving greater performance improvements as the number of agents increased. These results show that WebCQovercomes key limitations of existing MARL-based approaches, providing a scalable and effective solution for enhancing modern web GUI testing.

</details>


### [483] [What Characterizes Pairwise Modular Smells?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22576)
*Chenxing Zhong,Daniel Feitosa,Paris Avgeriou,Huang Huang,Wei Song,He Zhang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出PairSmell（成对模块化异味）概念，通过19种配对特征训练机器学习模型预测两种异味形式（InSep和InCol），在11个Java项目中取得高达58.6%的ROC-AUC提升，并揭示了关键影响因素。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有软件模块化方法和设计问题识别方法在实际改进中效果有限，亟需一种更实用的架构异味识别方法。

Method: (1) 快速文献综述收集19种配对特征；(2) 基于11个开源Java项目的6,135,000+实体对构建数据集；(3) 训练机器学习模型预测InSep和InCol两种PairSmell；(4) 模型可解释性分析识别关键特征。

Result: 模型较基线最高提升58.6% ROC-AUC；InSep关键特征为传出依赖、与他人共享术语、声明字段；InCol关键特征为基于tf-idf的语义相似度、配对间共享术语、与他人共享术语、传入依赖。

Conclusion: PairSmell通过配对特征可被有效预测，关键特征的解释有助于指导实际的架构重构决策。

Abstract: Enhancing the modular structure of existing systems has attracted substantial research interest, primarily through (1) software modularization and (2) identifying design issues (e.g., smells) as refactoring opportunities; however, both approaches often prove impractical to guide effective improvement. Inspired by both aforementioned approaches, our previous study introduced a novel and practical architectural smell -- called Pairwise Modular Smell (or PairSmell) -- for identifying flawed architectural decisions that necessitate further examination.
  The objective of this study is to explain PairSmell from the perspective of pair characteristics. To this end, we first conduct a rapid review to collect and synthesize 19 pair characteristics that have been used in the literature to represent relationships between two entities. The collected characteristics are then used to train machine learning models for predicting two forms of PairSmell -- inapt separated pairs InSep and inapt collocated pairs InCol, based on a curated dataset of over 6,135,000 pairs of entities derived from 11 open-source Java projects. The trained models achieve up to a 58.6% improvement in ROC-AUC over the baselines. The interpretation of the models reveals that the most influential features for InSep are out-going dependencies, terms shared with others, and declared fields; while those for InCol include semantic similarity based on tf-idf, terms shared between the pair, terms shared with others, and in-going dependencies. We complement the work with a series of practical examples to illustrate how the influential pair characteristics impact the occurrence of PairSmell.

</details>


### [484] [On Good Authority: Release-Authority Measurement for Registry-Mediated Package Ecosystems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22593)
*Igor Santos-Grueiro*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出一种"前身感知的发布权限记录"(predecessor-aware release-authority record)，通过比较每个包版本与其前驱版本在发布者、仓库、工作流、来源证明、签名和中介证据方面的一致性，来检测公开发布路径中的不连续性。研究覆盖npm、PyPI、Maven Central、crates.io和RubyGems五个生态系统的45,812个版本，发现204个触发策略的发布路径不连续点，并评估了不同选择策略的覆盖效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的依赖图只显示代码的流动方向，但忽略了公开发布路径（即发布所使用的公开渠道）是否发生了变化。这种变化可能意味着发布权限的转移或安全风险的引入，而现有工具无法捕获此类信息。

Method: 定义"前身感知的发布权限记录"，比较每个包版本与其直接前驱版本在发布者、仓库、工作流、来源证明、签名和中介证据六个维度的一致性。对npm、PyPI、Maven Central、crates.io和RubyGems进行抽样审计，构建45,812个版本的队列。设计透明规则检测发布路径不连续性，并采用两种策略（统一语义距离规则和描述性规则）选择需审查的版本。

Result: 在43,100次前驱比较中发现204个触发策略的发布路径不连续性。统一语义距离规则选出320个版本（覆盖190/204触发点）；描述性规则选出337个版本（覆盖全部204个触发点）。盲审中，三位从业者将20/30触发点评为"立即审查"，9/30评为"监控"，1/30评为"无需审查"，所有30个对照评为"无需审查"。

Conclusion: 发布路径记录能有效提供审查线索，但存在局限性：精确恶意版本与策略触发点零重叠；同路径泄露、未变化的被攻陷CI以及公开快照中缺失的版本需要额外的证据来检测，超出了本方法的能力范围。

Abstract: Dependency graphs show where released code can flow, while leaving implicit whether the public path used to publish a release changed. We introduce a predecessor-aware release-authority record that compares each package release with its immediate predecessor across publisher, repository, workflow, provenance, signing, and mediation evidence.
  We instantiate the record over a purposefully sampled, audited April 2024--June 2026 cohort from npm, PyPI, Maven Central, crates.io, and RubyGems: 45,812 releases, 43,100 eligible predecessor comparisons, and 942 package coordinates. Go is reported separately as a VCS/proxy/checksum-log boundary adapter. Transparent rules identify 204 policy-triggering public release-path discontinuities. The exact trigger policy is the primary candidate queue. A uniform semantic-distance rule selects 320 releases and covers 190/204 triggers; a descriptive regime-specific rule selects 337 releases and covers all 204. In a blinded 60-row shared core, three practitioners rated 20/30 triggers as immediate review, 9/30 as monitoring, 1/30 as no review, and all 30 controls as no review.
  These signals are review cues over public release-path evidence. Exact malicious versions in our external alignment have zero overlap with the policy triggers. Same-path compromise, unchanged compromised CI, and versions absent from public snapshots require separate evidence beyond this release-path record.

</details>


### [485] [RigorBench: Benchmarking Engineering Process Discipline in Autonomous AI Coding Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22678)
*Meher Bhaskar Madiraju,Meher Sai Preetam Madiraju*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出RigorBench——首个衡量AI编码智能体过程纪律的基准，通过五个维度的RigorScore评估，证明结构化过程纪律不仅提升过程质量41%，还将结果正确性提高17%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准仅关注编码智能体的结果正确性（是否通过测试），忽略了过程质量。一个通过盲目试错达到正确结果的智能体并不可靠，需要衡量其规划、验证、恢复等工程纪律。

Method: 提出RigorBench基准，从五个支柱（规划忠实度、验证覆盖率、恢复效率、放弃质量、原子转换完整性）评估智能体，通过加权和计算复合RigorScore。设计30个任务覆盖五类场景，采用有/无受控实验设计对比基线助手。

Result: 结构化过程纪律使过程质量分数平均提升41%，下游结果正确性提升17%。这是首个量化证据表明编码智能体"如何编码"与"产生什么"同等重要。

Conclusion: 过程纪律显著提升AI编码智能体的可靠性和结果正确性，验证了过程质量的重要性。开源了全部基准、评分标准和轨迹分析工具。

Abstract: Agentic coding harnesses - such as Agent-Skills, Superpowers, and Agent-Rigor - are increasingly deployed to augment underlying LLMs for real-world software engineering tasks. Existing benchmarks evaluate these agents almost exclusively on outcome correctness: whether generated code passes tests or resolves issues. We argue that this outcome-only lens is insufficient: an agent that arrives at a correct solution through reckless trial-and-error, without planning, verification, or graceful recovery, is fundamentally less reliable than one that follows sound engineering discipline. We introduce RigorBench, the first benchmark designed to measure process discipline in AI coding agents. RigorBench evaluates these harnesses across five pillars: Planning Fidelity, Verification Coverage, Recovery Efficiency, Abstention Quality, and Atomic Transition Integrity. A composite RigorScore aggregates these dimensions into a single metric via a weighted sum. We curate a suite of 30 tasks spanning five categories - Plan-Then-Build, Verify-Or-Die, Doom Loop Gauntlet, Know When to Fold, and Don't Break the Build-and evaluate leading harnesses in a controlled with/without experimental design against baseline coding assistants. Our results show that structured process discipline not only improves process quality scores by an average of 41% but also raises downstream outcome correctness by 17%, providing the first quantitative evidence that how agents code matters as much as what they produce. We release the full benchmark, scoring rubrics, and trajectory analysis tools as open-source artifacts.

</details>


### [486] [Identifying Quality Indicators in Student Self-Reflections in Software Engineering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22683)
*Matthew Minish,Matthias Galster,Fabian Gilson*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本研究提出了一个包含八个指标的反思写作评估框架，并训练了基于RoBERTa的自动分类器，能够在软件工程课程中高效、准确地评估学生反思，其性能优于大语言模型，可实现即时反馈并减轻教师负担。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 软件工程课程中，学生的反思性写作需要被评估以提供反馈，但人工评估耗时且反馈笼统，亟需可扩展的自动化评估方法。

Method: 通过迭代优化现有反思框架建立八指标体系，三位标注者对反思文本进行标注并达成一致，训练多个编码器-only Transformer模型，并与解码器-only大语言模型（零样本提示）进行对比。

Result: 微调后的RoBERTa模型在准确率和速度上均显著优于解码器-only模型，在多数指标上达到人类水平的一致性，并提供两种优化版模型。

Conclusion: 微调的编码器-only模型能够有效实现反思写作的自动化评估，为软件工程教育提供及时、结构化的反馈。

Abstract: Context: Reflection is a fundamental skill in software engineering education, particularly in project-based courses where students learn through extended group work and need to develop their ability to reflect iteratively throughout their work. For students to benefit from reflection, their written reflections need to be assessed so that feedback can guide and improve their reflective practice. However, manually assessing written reflections to guide reflections is time-consuming, and often results in broad, non-specific feedback for a student to improve. Objective: This study builds on reflective writing frameworks to produce an eight-indicator scheme for assessing student reflections in software engineering. Furthermore, this study validates an automated classifier for assessing reflections against the framework, enabling scalable and structured feedback whilst reducing instructor workload. Method: We adapted existing reflection frameworks through iterative refinement to create our eight-indicator framework. Three annotators labelled student reflection texts, establishing moderate to reliable inter-rater agreement. We then trained and evaluated multiple encoder-only transformer models and compared them with decoder-only large language models using zero-shot prompting. Results: The fine-tuned RoBERTa model achieved the strongest performance, substantially outperforming decoder-only models in both accuracy and speed. The classifier demonstrated human-level agreement on most indicators whilst enabling near-instantaneous classification. We provide two model variants optimised for different assessment priorities. Conclusions: Our fine-tuned encoder-only models enable efficient automated assessment of reflective writing. The framework and automated classifier offer a means to provide timely, structured feedback on student reflections in software engineering.

</details>


### [487] [Beyond Simpson's Paradox: A Cascade of Confounders in AI Agent Pull-Request Co-Authorship](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22711)
*Haoran Yu,Xiaochong Jiang,Lifei Liu,Su Wang,Pin Qian,Yihang Chen*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文发现AI编码助手的“共同作者”署名与PR合并率之间的正相关关系是辛普森悖论——汇总统计显示带署名的PR合并率更低（53.8% vs 79.8%），但按代理分层后结论反转。进一步控制仓库和PR结构等混杂因素后，所有代理的共作者效应均消失，表明该关联是选择偏差和结构伪影，而非因果关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 揭示AI编码代理研究中汇总统计可能产生的误导性结论，强调在使用代理池数据时必须进行分层分析。

Method: 使用AIDev数据集的33,596个PR，依次进行：聚合统计、按代理身份分层、仓库内控制、提交数量控制、以及限制到多提交PR的逐步分析。

Result: 聚合层面共作者PR合并率更低（辛普森悖论）；按代理分层后Copilot和Devin呈显著正相关；控制仓库后Devin效应消失；控制提交数后Copilot效应减半；限制多提交PR后Copilot效应完全消失。

Conclusion: 跨截面共作者关联主要是选择偏差和PR结构伪影，没有证据表明共同作者署名对PR合并存在因果性益处。建议在报告代理池统计时必须进行分层分析。

Abstract: Pooled across five AI coding agents, pull requests (PRs) with a human Co-Authored-By trailer merge less often than purely-autonomous ones (53.8% vs. 79.8%) -- yet this aggregate finding is a textbook Simpson's Paradox. Stratifying 33,596 PRs from the AIDev dataset by agent identity reverses the conclusion: Copilot and Devin show large positive within-agent gaps (+41.2 and +33.5 pp, both p<0.001), while Cursor, Claude Code, and Codex show small effects whose cross-sectional 95% CIs span zero. The paradox is driven entirely by agent composition: Codex, which dominates 64.9% of the dataset, achieves high merge rates while rarely using co-authorship. But Simpson's Paradox is only the first layer of a cascade of confounders: within-repo controls eliminate Devin's gap (+33.5 to +1.6 pp, p=0.73); a commit-count control further halves Copilot's within-repo gap (+36.2 to +24.4 pp); restricted to multi-commit PRs, the Copilot within-repo effect dissolves to +4.8 pp (p=0.59). No agent retains a clear co-authorship effect once both repository selection and PR structure are controlled. Our findings caution against reporting agent-pooled statistics without stratification and demonstrate that cross-sectional co-authorship associations are largely selection and PR-structure artefacts rather than evidence of a causal benefit.

</details>


### [488] [Habituation at the Gate: Rising Approval and Declining Scrutiny in Human Review of AI Agent Code](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22721)
*Haoran Yu,Lifei Liu,Xiaochong Jiang,Yuwen Jia,Su Wang,Pin Qian,Yihang Chen*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 随着AI编码代理大规模向开源仓库提交PR，人类审查员对AI生成代码的审查严格度随时间推移逐渐降低——批准率从30.1%升至36.8%，内联评论量下降22%，但审查延迟增加3.5倍，提示审查员在增大工作负荷下产生反射性习惯化而非理性信任校准。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究人类审查员是否因AI生成代码的泛滥而逐渐降低审查标准，即审查习惯化效应是否存在。

Method: 基于AIDev数据集，对400名重复审查员的11,429条审查记录进行纵向内审查员分析，比较早期与晚期审查阶段的行为变化，并使用Wilcoxon符号秩检验、分位数分析及多种控制变量（日历时间、PR难度等）进行因果推断。

Result: 审批率从30.1%升至36.8%（p<10^{-6}）；经验分位数累计差距达+14.5个百分点；该变化由经验驱动而非时间效应；Agent PR的批准率上升而人类PR的批准率下降；PR难度无变化；审查延迟增加3.5倍，内联评论量下降22%（p=0.0014）。

Conclusion: 审查行为的转变更符合反射性习惯化（reflexive habituation）机制，而非理性的信任校准——审查员在队列中等待更久，但实际审查投入减少，导致批准率升高。

Abstract: As AI coding agents (e.g., GitHub Copilot, Devin, OpenAI Codex, Cursor) submit pull requests to open-source repositories at scale, a key question arises: do human reviewers gradually lower their scrutiny for AI-generated code over time? We conduct a longitudinal within-reviewer analysis using the AIDev dataset, studying 400 repeat reviewers who collectively submitted 11,429 reviews over a seven-month observation period. Comparing each reviewer's early and late review episodes, we observe a population-level shift in approval rate from 30.1% to 36.8% (Wilcoxon signed-rank p < 10^{-6} on paired shifts). Pooled by within-reviewer experience decile, the cumulative gap reaches +14.5 pp from first to tenth decile. This shift is experience-driven (persists after controlling for calendar time), agent-specific (human PR approval rates decline over the same period), and not explained by PR difficulty (median PR size is flat). However, review latency increases rather than decreases (+3.5x), while inline comment volume decreases (-22%, p=0.0014), suggesting reviewers spend more time in queue but less time actively inspecting code. The combination of rising approval, declining comment effort, and increasing queue time is most consistent with reflexive habituation under growing workload rather than rational trust calibration alone.

</details>


### [489] [Integrating Heterogeneous Digital Twins in Federated Ecosystems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22791)
*Christian Vergara-Marcillo,Rami Bahsoon,Nikos Tziritas,Wendy Yanez-Pazmino,Panagiotis Oikonomou,Georgios Theodoropoulos*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为Federation Node Manager的模块化集成机制，用于连接异构数字孪生体到联邦环境中，通过能力暴露、协议/模式适配以及状态与事件交换实现协调操作，并在智能交通应急场景中验证了可行性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数字孪生研究多聚焦单体系统，而跨系统边界的联邦数字孪生生态仍停留在概念阶段，缺乏实际的异构DT集成机制，导致互操作性和运行时协调成为关键挑战。

Method: 提出Federation Node Manager模块化集成机制，包括：受控能力暴露、协议与模式适配、及时的状态与事件交换，并基于服务导向架构构建联邦DT生态原型。

Result: 在智能交通领域的应急响应场景中，通过概念设计和原型实现验证了所提机制的可行性。

Conclusion: Federation Node Manager可作为服务导向联邦数字孪生生态的使能组件，为异构DT在生态系统层面的实际集成提供了一条可行路径。

Abstract: Digital Twins (DTs) are increasingly used to virtualise physical systems at different scales, enabling monitoring, simulation, and predictions to support decision-making. However, while individual DTs are effective in stand-alone settings, ecosystem-scale deployments require multiple autonomous and distributed DTs to cooperate across system boundaries despite differences in modelling approaches or software technologies, making interoperability and runtime coordination critical challenges. Although \textit{Federated Digital Twin Ecosystems} have emerged as a promising direction, existing research remains at the conceptual stage, offering high-level architectures while leaving the practical integration of heterogeneous DTs underexplored. This paper proposes the \textit{Federation Node Manager}, a modular integration mechanism that connects local DTs to a federated environment through controlled capability exposure, protocol and schema adaptation, and timely state and event exchange for coordinated operations. We present a conceptual design and a prototype implementation, and demonstrate their feasibility in the smart mobility domain for emergency response scenarios. The proposed mechanism serves as an enabling component within a broader service-oriented federated DT ecosystem.

</details>


### [490] [From Fragments to Paths: Task-Level Context Recovery for Large Industrial Codebases](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22906)
*Jiawei He,Weisong Sun,Mengyu Shi,Jie Jia,Tong Bian,Xikai Yang,Dong Sun*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: DeepDiscovery 提出了一种两阶段位置-推断框架，通过定位高置信度任务锚点并在预算约束下恢复多关系仓库结构中的任务上下文，显著提升了大规模工业代码库中的任务级文件恢复质量和下游软件工程任务性能，在 SWE-bench Verified 上达到了 78.6% 的解决率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在处理大型工业代码库时，只能检索局部片段，无法恢复任务级别的广泛上下文信息，导致复杂仓库级任务表现不佳。

Method: 采用两阶段"位置-推断"框架：首先定位高置信度的任务锚点，然后在预算约束下通过多关系仓库结构恢复更广泛的任务相关上下文。

Result: 在 27 个中型任务上达到最佳文件恢复质量；在工业场景中，文件完全召回率绝对提升 1.6-9.2 个百分点；在 SWE-bench Verified 上解决率达 78.6%，比基线提升 8.2 个百分点。

Conclusion: 更强的任务级仓库理解能力可以有效提升编码智能体在复杂软件工程任务上的性能。

Abstract: Large language models have shown strong performance on software engineering (SE) tasks, yet understanding large industrial repositories remains challenging. Existing methods often retrieve only local fragments and fail to recover the broader task-relevant context needed for complex repository-level tasks. We present DeepDiscovery, a task-level repository-understanding method for large industrial codebases. DeepDiscovery uses a two-stage \textit{Location--Inference} framework to localize high-confidence task anchors and recover broader task-relevant context over multi-relational repository structure under budget constraints. Across controlled method-level evaluation, organization-internal industrial repository-understanding scenarios, and end-to-end evaluation on SWE-bench Verified, DeepDiscovery consistently improves task-relevant file recovery and downstream SE performance. On 27 medium-scale tasks, DeepDiscovery achieves the best file recovery quality among five representative baselines without offline preprocessing. On organization-internal industrial tasks from a production-scale integrated codebase ecosystem, including 27 medium-scale tasks and 40 large-scale tasks, DeepDiscovery improves Full Recall Rate across multiple AI coding systems, with absolute gains ranging from 1.6 to 9.2 percentage points on large subprojects and from 2.5 to 7.4 percentage points on medium-scale subprojects. In a controlled end-to-end evaluation on SWE-bench Verified, a system equipped with DeepDiscovery achieves a 78.6\% Solve Rate, outperforming the corresponding baseline by 8.2 percentage points. These results suggest that stronger task-level repository understanding can improve coding-agent performance on complex SE tasks.

</details>


### [491] [EnerInfer: Energy-Aware On-Device LLM Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23001)
*Bohua Zou,Nian Liu,Binqi Sun,Matteo Mascherin,Debayan Roy,Yutao Liu,Yu Peng,Ning Jia,Haibo Chen*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出EnerInfer框架，通过联合管理NPU/DDR频率、吞吐量和热舒适度，在不牺牲服务质量的前提下，实现设备端大模型推理的能效提升最高达65%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有设备端大模型推理系统只追求解码速度，忽视了能耗和散热瓶颈。实际中存在可利用的配置松弛空间：适度降低NPU和内存频率可在不降低服务质量的前提下显著提升能效并减少发热。

Method: 提出EnerInfer框架，核心包括：(1) 解耦的、模型结构感知的吞吐量和功耗预测；(2) 排序驱动的在线反馈机制替代传统逐模型预配置；(3) 轻量级有限时域热预测，动态切换能效优化模式与热约束模式。

Result: 在手机、笔记本电脑和开发板上分别实现了最高65%、12%和24%的能效提升，且不违反服务质量要求。

Conclusion: 设备端大模型推理存在显著的能效优化空间，EnerInfer通过预测驱动+在线反馈的方式，无需逐模型预配置和大量传感器，即可实现高效、可靠的热感知推理管理。

Abstract: On-device LLM inference is increasingly attractive for privacy-preserving, reliable, and cost-effective deployment, yet its energy and thermal costs remain a critical bottleneck. Existing systems primarily optimize for decoding speed, implicitly assuming that faster execution is always preferable. We show instead that on-device LLM inference often has exploitable configuration slack: modestly lowering NPU and memory frequencies preserves quality of experience (QoE) while substantially improving energy efficiency and reducing heat.
  Realizing this opportunity in production is challenging. The most energy-efficient NPU/DDR setting varies with the model, inference engine, platform, and runtime conditions, with no stable ranking across configurations. Commercial devices further lack component-level power sensing, and shell temperature evolves with request arrivals, response lengths, and thermal history. To address these challenges, we propose EnerInfer, the first on-device LLM inference framework that jointly manages energy efficiency, throughput, and thermal comfort for LLM workloads. EnerInfer replaces per-model profiling and sensor-heavy control with disaggregated, model-structure-aware prediction and ranking-driven online feedback. It predicts throughput and power for unseen LLMs across NPU/DDR frequency settings, selects QoE-satisfying efficient configurations under runtime interference, and uses lightweight limited-horizon thermal prediction to dynamically switch between energy-optimized and thermally constrained inference. Evaluations on real-world LLMs show that EnerInfer improves energy efficiency by up to 65%, 12%, and 24% on phones, a laptop, and a development board, respectively, without QoE violation.

</details>


### [492] [The EVerest Dataset for Secure Software Engineering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23197)
*Sophie Corallo,Debora Grupp,Dominik Fuchß,Jan Keim,Frederik Reiche,Tobias Hey,Anne Koziolek*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了EVerest数据集，这是首个涵盖需求、架构和代码三种工件类型且带有细粒度安全标签的多工件资源，基于电动汽车充电站开源软件栈构建，包含84条安全需求、1,445个细粒度安全元素及架构模型、源代码等，并已发现并修复了一个真实安全漏洞。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 端到端安全验证（从需求到架构再到代码）需要横跨三种工件类型且带有细粒度安全标签的数据集，但现有数据集均不满足这一组合需求。

Method: 基于EVerest开源项目（电动汽车充电站软件栈），人工采集84条安全需求并标注安全目标，提取1,445个细粒度安全元素（组件、实体、数据、数据流、状态等），构建接受窗口、共指关系、架构追踪链接，并整合软件架构模型、源代码和自然语言文档。

Result: 创建了首个多工件安全验证数据集，在数据集构建过程中发现了一个真实安全弱点（CWE-1295），已向项目维护者披露并修复。

Conclusion: 该数据集可用于安全需求分类、命名实体识别、架构追踪链接以及设计时/代码级安全验证等研究，并已公开开放。

Abstract: End-to-end security verification, from requirements through architecture to code, requires datasets that span all three artifact types with fine-grained security labels. No existing dataset provides this combination. We present the EVerest dataset, a multi-artifact resource based on EVerest, an industry-driven open-source software stack for electric vehicle charging stations. The dataset includes 84 manually elicited security requirements annotated with security objectives, 1,445 fine-grained security elements (components, entities, data, data flows, states, etc.), acceptance windows, coreferences, and architectural trace links, as well as the EVerest software architecture model, source code, and natural language documentation. It enables research on security requirements classification, named entity recognition, architectural trace linking, and design-time or code-level security verification. During dataset creation, a real security weakness (CWE-1295) was identified, disclosed to the project maintainers, and subsequently fixed. The dataset is publicly available. A short video is available at https://youtu.be/pnn1uqpomvQ.

</details>


### [493] [Generate with CodeXHug: A Dataset to Enhance Model Cards with Code Usage Patterns](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23329)
*Stefano Palombo,Claudio Di Sipio,Juri Di Rocco,Davide Di Ruscio*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了CodeXHug数据集，通过分析HuggingFace上的预训练模型在GitHub中的实际使用情况，收集了7,325个模型和20,545个Python文件，并利用统计分析和聚类技术提取代表性代码使用模式，以帮助开发者更有效地采用预训练模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管预训练模型在软件工程社区日益流行，但它们在真实项目中的实际采用情况尚不明确，且多数模型文档缺乏解释性代码模式，增加了新用户的使用难度。因此，需要构建一个与预训练模型相关的精选代码库，以支持开发者和从业者。

Method: 首先从最新的HuggingFace转储数据中筛选出带有标签和模型卡的预训练模型，然后查询GitHub平台以找到这些模型的实际使用情况，最终得到7,325个不同模型和20,545个Python文件。随后通过统计分析和聚类技术，从相关代码片段中提取代表性的代码使用模式。

Result: 构建了CodeXHug数据集，包含7,325个HuggingFace预训练模型和20,545个Python文件，展示了这些模型在GitHub生态系统中的实际使用情况。

Conclusion: CodeXHug数据集能够支持开发者通过统计分析和聚类技术提取代表性代码使用模式，从而降低预训练模型的使用门槛，促进其在实际项目中的采用。

Abstract: Pre-trained models (PTMs) are becoming increasingly popular in the software engineering community. Their usage is facilitated by model repositories, e.g., HuggingFace, which collect, store, and maintain a wide range of PTMs. However, the actual adoption of these models in real-world projects is still an open question, i.e., many of them are used in toy projects or simply as a mirror for the HF repository. In addition, most of the available model cards and textual documents that contain critical information about their usage do not include explanatory code patterns, thus increasing the difficulty for newcomers. Thus, we see the need for a curated codebase related to PTMs to support developers and practitioners who are interested in using them in their projects.
  In this paper, we present CodeXHug, a curated dataset of HuggingFace PTMs exploited in the Github ecosystem and the related code usage patterns. Starting from the latest HF dump, we first conduct a data curation to collect PTMs with a tag and a model card. Then, the Github platform has been queried to find actual usages of the identified PTMs, resulting in 7,325 different models and 20,545 Python files.
  To demonstrate a concrete application of CodeXHug, we propose a usage scenario focused on extracting representative code usage patterns for specific PTMs through a statistical analysis and clustering techniques applied to relevant code snippets.

</details>


### [494] [Automated Semantic Fault Localization in SysML v2: A Human-in-the-Loop Framework Using Knowledge-Graph Augmented LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23395)
*Haitham Al-Shami,Rohail Malik,Riku Ala-Laurinaho,Jari Vepsäläinen,Raine Viitala*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出一个人类参与的框架，结合微调小型语言模型与领域知识图谱，自动识别和修复SysML v2模型中语法正确但违反领域规则的语义错误。在车辆系统领域验证，将语义错误修复率从不足3%提升至91%以上，补丁输出减少60%+令牌长度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: SysML v2的编译器只能检测语法和语言规范错误，无法发现语法正确但违反领域规则的语义错误。这类错误会传播到设计后期，导致昂贵的集成失败。

Method: 提出人类参与的框架，包含三部分：1) 领域知识图谱编码系统元素间的物理兼容性规则；2) 知识图谱指导合成训练数据生成，系统性地引入合理的领域违规；3) 微调小型语言模型（Qwen2.5-Coder-1.5B和DeepSeek-Coder-6.7B）输出统一差异补丁，定位故障并提出候选修复方案。

Result: 在1184个测试样本上，微调将语义错误修复率从不足3%提升至91%以上，补丁输出减少令牌长度超60%。

Conclusion: 该框架为AI辅助模型验证提供了一条实用路径，可补充现有MBSE工具，同时保留了人类工程师在设计过程中的判断力。

Abstract: SysML v2's textual syntax enables compiler-based validation of model structure and language conformance. However, semantic mistakes that preserve syntactic validity but violate domain rules cannot be detected through compilers. These errors can propagate through the design process and surface late as costly integration failures. This paper presents a human-in-the-loop framework for identifying and repairing such errors automatically. It combines a fine-tuned Small Language Model (SLM) with a domain knowledge graph encoding physical compatibility rules between system elements. The knowledge graph also guides the generation of synthetic training data by systematically introducing plausible domain violations, and augments the model at inference time to ground repair suggestions in valid engineering constraints. We demonstrate the framework using the vehicle systems domain, where the knowledge graph captures the relationships between the mechanical, electrical, fluid, and signal interfaces. Two SLMs, Qwen2.5-Coder-1.5B and DeepSeek-Coder-6.7B, are fine-tuned to output unified diff patches that localize faults and present candidate repairs for engineer review, preserving human judgment in the design process. Evaluation of 1,184 test samples shows that fine-tuning improves semantic fault repair from less than 3% to more than 91%, with patch-based output reducing token length by over 60%. The framework offers a practical path toward AI-assisted model verification that complements existing MBSE tools.

</details>


### [495] [The Prevalence and Impact of Licenses in Open Software Projects](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23445)
*Mahmoud Jahanshahi,Bogdan Vasilescu,Audris Mockus*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文分析了超过1亿个软件项目的许可证分布情况，发现大多数项目没有许可证，宽松许可证占比最大且趋势上升，但限制性许可证更易被保留。不同语言生态系统中许可证分布差异显著（如C语言偏好限制性许可证）。许可证变更对项目活动的影响因生态系统而异：C语言从限制性转为宽松后活动减少，而Python则增加。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 了解软件项目中许可证的分布现状、语言生态间的差异，以及许可证变更对项目产出（活动指标）的潜在影响。

Method: 对超过1亿个软件项目进行许可证识别与分类，分析不同语言生态系统中的许可证分布，并比较许可证变更前后一年内的项目活动变化。

Result: 大多数项目无许可证；宽松许可证占主导且比例持续增长；限制性许可证更可能被保留；C语言生态偏向限制性许可证；许可证变更的影响因语言生态而异（C语言活动减少，Python活动增加）。

Conclusion: 许可证类型分布随时间发生显著变化，许可证变更对项目活动的影响并非一致，而是取决于具体的语言生态系统。

Abstract: The terms of how publicly available source code can be used are dictated by its license. The license (or its absence), in turn, affects what code the project may reuse and how its code can be (re)used and may also affect external participation and overall activity of the project. We aim to better understand the general state of license distribution overall and within language ecosystems and to investigate if license changes are associated with a noticeable variations of project output. To accomplish that we identify licenses and license types for over 100M software projects and find that most do not contain any license, that permissive licenses represent the bulk of most licenses, and that permissive licensing is representing an increasing proportion of all licenses over time. Restrictive licenses are more likely to be retained, however. There is a great variation among language ecosystems with C-language strongly favoring restrictive licenses. The analysis of license change impact comparing activity within one year of the adoption of the initial and final licenses shows that the change from restrictive to permissive license varies with the ecosystem. C-language ecosystems show reduced activity while Python shows increased activity when comparing restrictive to permissive license transition. Our results demonstrate dramatic changes in license type prevalence over time and find that the effects of license changes may have opposite effects depending on the language ecosystem.

</details>


### [496] [An Automated Framework for Input Alphabet Construction in Stateful Protocol Implementation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23464)
*JiongHan Wang,WenChao Huang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出利用大语言模型自动生成输入字母表，结合小批量增量学习策略，解决状态机学习中手工定义字母表导致的输入探索不完整和语义缺陷遗漏问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统状态机学习依赖手工定义输入字母表，这限制了输入探索的完整性，难以捕获异常的非合规消息，容易遗漏潜在的语义缺陷。

Method: 采用大语言模型解析协议消息布局并生成候选输入符号（覆盖有效和无效消息空间），同时引入小批量增量学习策略重用已有自动机，降低字母表增长带来的开销。

Result: 在实际协议栈上的实验表明，该方法能够复现已有安全漏洞并发现新的语义缺陷；部分新发现的缺陷已得到开发者确认和修补。

Conclusion: 本文提出的自动化字母表生成方法有效消除了对手工协议专业知识的依赖，兼具实用性和有效性，能够发现真实协议实现中的潜在缺陷。

Abstract: As a prevalent analytical technique for stateful protocol implementations, state machine learning suffers from a core bottleneck stemming from handcrafted input alphabets. Manual alphabet definition inherently limits the completeness of input exploration, making it difficult to capture anomalous non-conformant messages and consequently missing latent semantic defects.
  In this paper, we target automatic input alphabet generation to break the above limitation for state machine learning. We adopt large language models to parse protocol message layouts and produce candidate input symbols following structured mutation rules, which automatically covers valid and invalid message spaces and eliminates reliance on manual protocol expertise.
  Considering the rising overhead brought by continuously growing alphabets, we introduce a mini-batch incremental learning strategy to reuse existing learned automata when incorporating new alphabet entries. Comprehensive experiments on practical protocol stacks indicate our approach can reproduce existing security vulnerabilities and identify novel semantic bugs. A subset of these newly discovered issues has been confirmed and patched by developers, proving the practicability and effectiveness of our proposed method.

</details>


### [497] [Ensuring Open Source Integrity: The Intersection of Copy-Based Reuse and License Compliance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23495)
*Mahmoud Jahanshahi,Bogdan Vasilescu,Audris Mockus*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本研究利用World of Code基础设施构建基于代码复制的开源软件重用网络，发现39.4%的项目组合存在潜在许可证不合规风险，仅2.43%的复制重用可通过依赖分析工具发现，表明现有工具在捕捉复制式重用方面存在重大局限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 源代码的版权保护使得许可证合规成为重要问题，但代码可以通过复制等隐蔽方式被重用，而不依赖包管理器，导致难以识别潜在的许可证违规行为。

Method: 使用World of Code基础设施构建基于复制的代码重用网络，量化开源生态系统中的潜在许可证不合规范围，并建立回归模型分析代码复制是否受原始项目许可证影响。

Result: 宽松许可证（如MIT、Apache）的代码跨语言重用概率更高；Copyleft许可证（如GPL）效果混合；公共领域许可证反而与更低的复制重用相关。39.4%的项目组合存在潜在不合规风险，仅2.43%的复制重用可被依赖分析工具发现。

Conclusion: 现有依赖追踪工具在捕捉复制式代码重用方面存在严重不足，开源生态系统中存在广泛的潜在许可证不合规问题，尤其是当许可证不明确或缺失时。

Abstract: As other creative work, source code is protected by copyright. The owner can license the work, e.g., to permit copy and other kinds of use, and even start legal proceeding against license violators. However, source code can be reused in subtle ways, e.g., via copying without explicit package manager dependencies, making it hard to reason about potential license noncompliance. Using the World of Code infrastructure approximating the entirety of open source software, in this paper we create a copy-based code reuse network mapping direct copying across projects, and use it to quantify the extent of potential license noncompliance across the entire open source ecosystem. In addition, we estimate regression models to understand whether code copying is affected by the origin project's license, and, if so, how it varies with other project characteristics. We find that code in repositories with permissive licenses, such as MIT and Apache, shows higher likelihood of reuse across programming languages. In contrast, copyleft licenses, like the GPL, exhibit mixed effects. Public domain licenses, despite their aim of allowing unrestricted use, are associated with lower likelihood of copy-based reuse. A widespread potential license noncompliance appears to accompany copy-based reuse, with 39.4% of project combinations at potential noncompliance risk, particularly when licenses are unclear or absent. Our findings reveal that only 2.43% of reuse detected through the copy-based network was discoverable via dependency analysis, highlighting the limitations of existing dependency-tracking tools in capturing copy-based reuse.

</details>


### [498] [Source-Free Detection and Impact Analysis of Compiler Optimization Problems in Mobile Applications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23512)
*Han Hu,Xiaoheng Xie,Bo Sun,Jian Gu,Gang Fan,Li Li*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出OptDetect框架，从二进制文件中检测编译器优化问题。研究发现Google Play中91.7%的应用包含低优化级别的原生库，修复后可减少10-63%的CPU指令，应用评分中位数提升0.14分。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 移动应用常因原生库编译优化级别过低（O0/O1而非O2/O3）导致性能问题（掉帧、过热、高功耗），但这种性能退化在无功能错误的情况下难以被察觉，影响数百万用户。

Method: 提出OptDetect框架，无需源码即可从二进制文件检测优化问题。流程包括：二进制反汇编、块级分类（chunk-level classification）和加权分数聚合（weighted score aggregation），支持单一二进制中混合优化级别的检测。

Result: 在控制数据集上准确率93.0%，真实数据集81.9%。分析21,972个原生库发现30.5%使用低优化级别，影响91.7%的应用。修复后商业应用CPU指令减少10-63%（中位数20.5%），开源应用减少15-58%（中位数32%），性能投诉中位数减少42%，评分中位数提升0.14分。

Conclusion: 低优化级别问题根源在于广泛使用的第三方库自身以低优化级别分发（49.7%的1,073个库存在此问题），需要自动化检测工具和行业级优化标准。

Abstract: Mobile apps frequently suffer from performance issues such as frame drops, overheating, and excessive power consumption. While developers optimize algorithms and debug code, a critical bottleneck often goes unnoticed: native libraries compiled with low optimization levels (O0/O1 instead of O2/O3). Because these libraries execute without functional errors, the resulting performance degradation remains hidden in production apps, affecting millions of users.
  We present \textsc{OptDetect}, a source-free framework that detects compiler optimization problems directly from app binaries without requiring source code or build metadata. \textsc{OptDetect} handles mixed optimization levels within a single binary through a pipeline of binary disassembly, chunk-level classification, and weighted score aggregation, achieving 93.0\% accuracy on controlled datasets and 81.9\% on real-world datasets. Applying \textsc{OptDetect} to 21,972 native libraries from 830 top-ranked Google Play apps, we find that 30.5\% of libraries use low optimization levels, affecting 91.7\% of apps.
  Through case studies on 12 production apps (6 commercial, 6 open-source), we demonstrate that fixing detected issues reduces CPU instructions by 10-63\% (median: 20.5\%) for commercial apps and 15-58\% (median: 32\%) for open-source apps, with performance complaints decreasing by a median of 42\% and ratings increasing by a median of 0.14 points. Further investigation reveals a previously overlooked root cause: widely-used third-party libraries are themselves distributed at low optimization levels, with 49.7\% of 1,073 libraries in a major repository exhibiting this problem. These findings highlight the need for automated detection tools and industry-wide optimization standards.

</details>


<div id='cs.MM'></div>

# cs.MM [[Back]](#toc)

### [499] [Composition: Building Community with Arts, Math, and Code (Experience Report)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23526)
*Isidore Mohr,Claire Wang*

Main category: cs.MM

TL;DR: Composition 是一个关于艺术、数学和代码的免费活动系列。本文报告了该活动的结构、艺术家选择流程、推广和社区反馈。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 分享 Composition 活动系列的组织经验，为类似跨学科社区活动提供参考。

Method: 描述了活动结构设计、艺术家选拔流程、投稿宣传与活动推广的策略。

Result: 呈现了社区对该活动的回应和反馈情况。

Conclusion: 通过经验总结，为艺术、数学与代码交叉领域的社区活动组织者提供实践建议。

Abstract: Composition (https://composition.codes) is a free event series on art, mathematics, and code. This experience report covers Composition's event structure, artist selection process, outreach efforts for submissions and event promotion, and the community response.

</details>


### [500] [UI-LIC: A Unified Framework for Evaluating Learned Image Compression Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23545)
*Nicholas J. Nolen,Luc Trudeau,Andrew C. Freeman*

Main category: cs.MM

TL;DR: 本文提出了 UI-LIC，一个开源框架，集成了六种高性能学习型图像压缩模型，提供统一训练、推理、评估和可视化分析功能，支持与传统编码器对比，旨在降低 LIC 研究门槛。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LIC 系统因软件栈异构、训练条件不同、评估方法不一致而难以公平比较和复现。

Method: 构建 UI-LIC 开源框架，集成六种 LIC 模型，设计统一控制器进行训练/推理/分析，开发 GUI 界面实现与 VVC 等传统编码器的比特率对齐和多种质量指标计算，并提供交互式热力图分析工具。

Result: 通过单一命令即可完成模型训练、对比评估与可视化分析，支持 PSNR/SSIM/VMAF/LPIPS 等多种指标，实现主观质量热力图叠加分析。

Conclusion: UI-LIC 有效降低了 LIC 的研究与复现门槛，为社区提供了标准化、可扩展的评估平台。

Abstract: The evaluation and comparison of Learned Image Compression (LIC) systems is complicated by heterogeneous software stacks, varying training conditions, and divergent evaluation methodologies. To address these challenges, we introduce UI-LIC, an open-source software framework for evaluating LIC models. We integrate six high-performance LIC models, and provide a centralized controller for performing training, inference, and analysis with shared configuration parameters. Our GUI program offers a streamlined interface to evaluate these models alongside traditional video intra-frame encoders, equalizing the compressed bitrates and calculating quality metrics such as PSNR, SSIM, VMAF, and LPIPS. Finally, we provide an interactive image analyzer with configurable quality heatmap overlays. Our framework lowers barriers to further LIC research, unlocking comparative metrics and subjective analysis with a single setup command. The open-source software is released under the MIT license and is available at github.com/BaylorMultimediaLab/UI-LIC.

</details>


<div id='cs.NE'></div>

# cs.NE [[Back]](#toc)

### [501] [Robust Auto-associative Memory via Convolutional Restricted Hopfield Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20666)
*Ci Lin,Tet Yeap,Iluju Kiringa*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文提出卷积受限霍普菲尔德网络（CRHNs），通过将卷积特征提取与吸引子记忆检索结合，并采用无梯度子空间旋转算法训练，在对抗性攻击和输入损坏下大幅降低重构误差（比现有模型低一个数量级），显著提升了关联记忆的鲁棒性和存储容量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有关联记忆模型（如现代霍普菲尔德网络MHNs、预测编码网络PCNs）在对抗性扰动和严重输入损坏下性能下降，且在存储容量、计算效率和鲁棒性之间存在难以平衡的问题。

Method: 提出卷积受限霍普菲尔德网络（CRHNs），将卷积特征提取与吸引子记忆检索整合到结构化潜在空间中，利用子空间表示和不动点动力学，通过无梯度子空间旋转算法（SRA）进行训练。

Result: 在STL数据集上，CRHNs在各类对抗攻击和输入退化下重构误差显著低于MHNs和PCNs（常降低一个数量级），在扰动强度增加时仍保持稳定检索性能，统计检验显著（p<0.01）。

Conclusion: 吸引子记忆机制在鲁棒关联记忆中具有有效性，CRHNs为构建鲁棒且可扩展的关联记忆系统提供了一个有前景的框架。

Abstract: Associative memory models play a fundamental role in pattern retrieval, but their performance often degrades under adversarial perturbations and severe input corruptions. Existing approaches, including Modern Hopfield Networks (MHNs), and Predictive Coding Networks (PCNs), exhibit limitations in balancing storage capacity, computational efficiency, and robustness. In this paper, we propose a Convolutional Restricted Hopfield Networks (CRHNs), which integrates convolutional feature extraction with attractor-based memory retrieval in a structured latent space. The proposed model leverages subspace representations and fixed-point dynamics, trained via a gradient-free Subspace Rotation Algorithm (SRA), to enhance both robustness and memory capacity.
  Extensive experiments on Self-Taught Learning (STL) dataset demonstrate that CRHNs consistently achieve significantly lower reconstruction error compared to MHNs and PCNs across a wide range of adversarial attacks and input degradations. In many cases, CRHNs reduce reconstruction error by an order of magnitude and maintains stable retrieval performance under increasing perturbation strength. Statistical analysis further confirms that these improvements are significant ($p < 0.01$). These results highlight the effectiveness of attractor-based memory mechanisms and suggest that CRHNs provide a promising framework for building robust and scalable associative memory systems.

</details>


### [502] [Genetic Algorithm Based Coordination and Optimization Model for Generation Grid Load Storage in Active Distribution Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20672)
*Jinlu Zhang,Fujian Chi,Tianhan Ling,Yulong He,Kejia Zhang,Hongxing Lv,Sheng Wang*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 提出了一种将模糊逻辑与遗传算法相结合的优化框架，用于主动配电网中发电、并网、负荷及储能设施的协调与风险评估。通过对可再生能源出力、负荷曲线和市场价格的模糊建模，结合遗传算法的进化优化与罚函数机制，在IEEE-69系统上验证了该方法能有效降低技术约束、保持投资水平，并避免不合理调度方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 主动配电网面临气象因素和用户动态需求带来的系统不确定性，现有确定性优化方案难以有效应对这些不确定性带来的风险，亟需一种能够感知不确定性并给出可行经济方案的优化方法。

Method: 采用模糊集表示可再生能源发电、负荷曲线和市场价格以捕捉不确定性；遗传算法引入模糊元素并通过惩罚因子调整系统稳定性；构造混合模型的适应度函数，通过惩罚不确定性和约束违规来优化期望运行成本。

Result: IEEE-69电力系统仿真表明，在可再生能源和储能系统大量接入的条件下，模糊遗传算法策略相比确定性优化方案有效降低了技术约束，总投资水平保持相似，且通过模糊推理避免了不合理或不可行的网络适配选择。

Conclusion: 该框架构建了一种能够感知不确定性的有效计算方案，为配电网规划中的不确定性评估提供了科学依据。

Abstract: Create an optimization framework that combines fuzzy logic and genetic algorithms for risk assessment and coordination of generation, grid connection, load, and energy storage facilities in active distribution networks. In order to capture the system uncertainties caused by weather factors and dynamic user demands, this project uses fuzzy set representation to model renewable energy generation, load curves, and market prices. In the evolutionary process, genetic algorithms introduce fuzzy elements into system management, adjusting thru penalty factors to improve stability and seeking better scheduling or power dispatch solutions. At the same time, by penalizing uncertainty and constraint violations, the fitness function of the hybrid model aims to optimize the expected operational costs; it can produce feasible and economical results under unknown parameter conditions. Under conditions with a large supply of renewable energy and installed energy storage systems, simulation results for the IEEE-69 power system indicate that the fuzzy genetic algorithm strategy effectively reduces technical constraints compared to deterministic optimization schemes. The total investment remains at a similar level. Other data indicate that thru fuzzy reasoning optimization, unreasonable choices or impossible situations are avoided during the network adaptation process. This framework-based technical approach helps to construct an effective computational scheme that is aware of uncertainty in its outputs. This will provide a scientific basis for the uncertainty assessment in distribution network planning.

</details>


### [503] [A Formal Tool for Verification of Probabilistic Spiking Neural Networks Based on Quotient Abstractions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20674)
*Nikan Zandian Jazi,Elisabetta De Maria,Christopher Leturc*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文针对脉冲神经网络(SNN)形式化验证中状态空间爆炸问题，提出了一种权重离散化商模型抽象方法，将连续突触权重映射到紧凑整数范围，并构建了统一工作平台CogSpike，实现了网络设计、仿真与PRISM形式化验证的一体化工具链，理论上每个神经元可带来约17倍状态空间缩减。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: SNN的随机事件驱动计算需要概率模型进行形式化验证，但概率模型检验面临状态空间爆炸的根本性障碍——离散时间马尔可夫链(DTMC)编码随神经元数量呈指数增长。现有通用商模型抽象虽然通过划分膜电位等价类可缓解这一问题，但朴素应用会丢失突触权重信息，限制了可验证的属性范围。

Method: 本文提出权重离散化商模型抽象方法，将连续突触权重映射到紧凑整数范围，同时保留每个突触的相对贡献。在此基础上构建CogSpike统一工作平台，集成SNN设计、仿真和基于PRISM的形式化验证。方法配备形式化正确性保证：双面保真定理将发放差异限制在阈值附近的有限灰区，渐近沉默定理保证未受刺激的神经元永久沉默。

Result: 拓扑依赖性分析表明，状态空间缩减呈指数级复合增长——在离散化参数W=3时，每个神经元约带来17倍缩减。在七个典型拓扑上的实验验证了该方法使得原本难以处理的网络验证变得可行。

Conclusion: 本文通过权重离散化商模型抽象有效缓解了SNN形式化验证中的状态空间爆炸问题，CogSpike平台提供了统一工具链，形式化保证确保了方法的可靠性，为更大规模SNN的正式验证开辟了可行路径。

Abstract: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) model biological neural dynamics more faithfully than classical artificial networks, but their stochastic, event-driven computation -- rooted in ion-channel noise and unreliable synaptic vesicle release -- demands probabilistic models for which deterministic abstractions are mathematically inadequate. Formal verification of such models via probabilistic model checking faces a fundamental barrier: the state space explosion problem, where the Discrete-Time Markov Chain (DTMC) encoding grows exponentially with the number of neurons. General-purpose quotient model abstractions [1] can in principle mitigate this growth by partitioning membrane potentials into equivalence classes, but a naïve application to SNNs discards synaptic weight information, limiting the properties that can be verified. This paper introduces a weight-discretized quotient model abstraction that maps continuous synaptic weights to a compact integer range while preserving the relative contribution of each synapse, and presents CogSpike, a unified workbench that integrates SNN design, simulation, and PRISM-based formal verification within a single isomorphic tool chain. The discretization is accompanied by formal correctness guarantees: a two-sided fidelity theorem confines any firing disagreement to a bounded gray zone around threshold, and an Asymptotic Silence theorem gives the exact limit guarantee that unforced neurons fall permanently silent. A topology-dependent scaling analysis shows that the state space reduction compounds exponentially -- approximately $17\times$ per neuron for discretization parameter $W = 3$ -- enabling verification of networks that are otherwise intractable, as confirmed empirically across seven canonical topologies.

</details>


### [504] [VQ4SNN: Vector Quantization for Memory-Efficient FPGA Spiking Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20675)
*Dimitrios Sekertzis,Giorgos Dimitrakopoulos*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 提出VQ4SNN，首次将向量量化（VQ）应用于FPGA上的流水线空间数据流SNN加速器，通过两级存储组织（紧凑指针+共享码本）减少权重存储需求，在保持推理精度的同时减少52-61%的BRAM使用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 密集SNN在FPGA上部署受限于片上存储资源（BRAM）不足，传统权重存储方式成为瓶颈。

Method: 采用向量量化（VQ）权重共享，设计两级存储结构（指针+码本），结合FPGA感知的内存映射与分析性VQ参数选择。

Result: 相比未压缩的FPGA SNN，BRAM数量减少52-61%，且不增加整体逻辑利用率。

Conclusion: VQ4SNN有效缓解了SNN加速器的存储瓶颈，是首个在FPGA流水线空间数据流SNN加速器中应用VQ的工作。

Abstract: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) offer an energy-efficient paradigm for edge AI, making them attractive for hardware acceleration. However, deploying dense SNNs on FPGAs is constrained by limited on-chip memory for synaptic weight storage. To address this bottleneck, we propose VQ4SNN, a hardware-aware architecture that reduces memory requirements through Vector Quantization (VQ)-based weight sharing. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first application of VQ to pipelined spatial-dataflow SNN accelerators on FPGAs. VQ4SNN replaces conventional weight storage with a two-level memory organization consisting of compact pointers and a shared codebook of quantized weight vectors. The proposed design integrates FPGA-aware memory mapping with analytical VQ parameter selection, enabling efficient deployment on such accelerators while preserving inference accuracy. The experimental results show a reduction of 52-61% in the total number of BRAMs compared to the state-of-the-art uncompressed FPGA SNNs without increasing overall logic utilization.

</details>


### [505] [Provably Sub-Linear Two-Timescale NeuroEvolution with Online Plasticity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20817)
*Shishen Lin,Yixin Chen*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文首次对神经进化在线学习（NEOL）框架进行遗憾分析，该框架将架构搜索（外层循环）与在线权重自适应（内层循环）解耦为双时间尺度学习。理论证明在温和条件下可实现次线性遗憾，实验表明基于NEAT的NEOL实现在四个连续控制基准上相比纯NEAT获得更高最终适应度和更低方差，并与强强化学习基线竞争。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准NEAT在离线优化中直接搜索连接权重，在高维权重空间和复杂连续控制问题上扩展性差。混合神经进化与在线学习的方法虽有潜力，但其理论特性尚未被充分探索。

Method: 提出双时间尺度NEOL框架：外层循环负责网络架构进化搜索，内层循环通过奖励调制可塑性进行在线权重自适应。理论方面给出遗憾界分析；实验方面在四个标准连续控制基准上对比NEAT、纯NEAT及强化学习基线。

Result: 理论：在温和条件下NEOL实现次线性遗憾。实验：NEOL在固定交互预算下获得更高最终适应度和更低方差；与强RL基线在多个任务上具有竞争力；Wilcoxon秩和检验和消融研究支持结果。

Conclusion: 在线可塑性可以提升双时间尺度神经进化的样本效率和鲁棒性，为神经进化与在线学习的结合提供了理论依据和实证支持。

Abstract: NeuroEvolution of Augmenting Topologies (NEAT) is a widely used neuroevolution algorithm for learning neural network architectures and weights for control tasks. However, standard offline optimisation searches for connection strengths directly, which can scale poorly in high-dimensional weight spaces and more difficult continuous control problems. Hybrid methods that combine neuroevolution with online learning can address this challenge, but their theoretical properties remain underexplored. This paper gives the first regret analysis for a general NeuroEvolutionary Online Learning (NEOL) framework, which decouples learning into two timescales: an outer loop for architecture search and an inner loop for online weight adaptation via rewardmodulated plasticity. Under mild conditions, we prove that NEOL achieves sublinear regret. Empirically, under fixed interaction budgets on four standard control benchmarks, a NEAT-based NEOL implementation achieves higher final fitness and lower variance than pure NEAT, and is competitive with strong reinforcement learning (RL) baselines on several tasks. The results are supported byWilcoxon rank-sum tests and ablation studies. Overall, the findings show that online plasticity can improve the sample efficiency and robustness of two-timescale neuroevolution. Code is available at https://github.com/boobaa2001/NeuroEvolution Online Learning NEOL.

</details>


### [506] [On the Use of Survival Selection Methods for Evolutionary Diversity Optimisation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21161)
*Adel Nikfarjam,Jakob Bossek,Aneta Neumann,Frank Neumann*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文研究进化多样性优化（EDO）中每代生成多个解的效益及实现方法，针对传统生存选择因多样性贡献相互依赖而失效的问题提出新方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有EDO方法每代只生成单个新解，逐步提升种群多样性至收敛；但生成多个解是否更有利尚不明确，且传统生存选择不适用于多样性贡献相互依赖的场景，因此需要探究高效的多解生成策略。

Method: 通过实验对比每代生成单解与多解在EDO中的表现，并设计适应多样性贡献依赖性的新型生存选择机制，解决多解生成后因解间多样性贡献冲突导致的淘汰难题。

Result: 每代生成多个解可加速种群多样性提升，但需配合专门设计的生存选择方法（而非传统选择），以避免多样性贡献的相互干扰导致性能下降。

Conclusion: 多解生成在EDO中具有优势，但需要重新设计生存选择策略以处理解间多样性贡献的依赖性，这是实现高效EDO的关键。

Abstract: Generating a diverse set of high quality solutions for an optimisation problem has been studied extensively in recent years by the evolutionary computation community. A paradigm that has received increasing attention is evolutionary diversity optimisation (EDO), where the goal is to maximise the diversity of a solution set subject to quality constraints. Since the contribution of each solution to the diversity of the population depends on other solutions and can change dramatically if several solutions in the population are modified simultaneously, most EDO approaches generate a single new solution per generation and discard the solution with the least contribution to diversity, ensuring a steady increase in population diversity over successive generations until convergence. In this study, we aim to answer two questions: (1) Is generating multiple solutions in each generation beneficial for EDO? (2) How can this be achieved efficiently, given that conventional survival selection methods do not work well in EDO due to the dependency of a solution's contribution to diversity on other solutions?

</details>


### [507] [Soliton-like Waves in a Two-Dimensional Recurrent Spiking Neural Network with Weighted Spike-Timing-Dependent Plasticity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21432)
*Ch. Meessen*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文构建了一个最小但生物合理的离散时间脉冲神经元模型，结合乘性STDP、除性归一化、稳态阈值适应和不应期。在二维递归网络中，周期性局部刺激自发产生具有耗散孤子性质的自传播波包，其方向由WSTDP学习确定，碰撞时湮灭并形成编码相对相位/频率的边界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索仅通过局部可塑性规则，能否自发产生具有皮层 traveling wave、活动区界定和空间记忆等功能的 emergent 动力学行为。

Method: 构建离散时间脉冲神经元模型（乘性STDP + 除性归一化 + 稳态阈值适应 + 不应期），组装兴奋-抑制对为二维递归网络，施加周期性局部刺激，观察网络动力学。

Result: 网络自发产生稳定的耗散孤子波包：保持稳定空间轮廓、恒定速度传播、正面碰撞湮灭。需要兴奋/抑制连接半径不对称且初始抑制突触强于兴奋。WSTDP将传播方向刻入突触权重，网络自行学习维持单向传播。双源碰撞形成的边界编码相对相位和频率。

Conclusion: 该框架为从局部可塑性规则出发研究皮层 traveling wave、活动区界定和空间记忆提供了最小计算框架。

Abstract: We construct a minimal but biologically plausible spiking neuron model operating in discrete time, combining multiplicative spike-timing-dependent plasticity (WSTDP), divisive normalization of synaptic integration, homeostatic threshold adaptation, and a one-step refractory period. We show that this normalization admits a biologically plausible dendritic implementation in which each binary junction operates using only locally available information.
  Assembling excitatory-inhibitory pairs of such neurons into a two-dimensional recurrent network and applying periodic localized stimulation, we find that the network spontaneously gives rise to stable, self-propagating wave packets with the properties of dissipative solitons: they maintain a stable spatial profile, propagate at constant speed, and annihilate upon frontal collision. Their emergence requires a geometric asymmetry between excitatory and inhibitory connection radii, and initial inhibitory synapses stronger than excitatory ones. WSTDP engraves the direction of propagation into the synaptic weight profile, so that the network learns by itself to sustain propagation in one direction while suppressing the reverse. When two sources are active simultaneously, the resulting waves annihilate upon collision, defining a semi-persistent boundary whose position encodes the relative phase and frequency of the two sources.
  These results provide a minimal computational framework for studying the emergence of cortical traveling waves, activity zone delimitation, and spatial memory from local plasticity rules alone.

</details>


### [508] [A Theory-grounded Hybrid Neural Network Integrating Complementary Estimation Mechanisms for Stable Visual Object TrackingA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22604)
*Yancheng Zhou,Hanle Zheng,Lei Deng,Yujie Wu*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种理论驱动的ANN-CANN混合框架（HTNN），通过将人工神经网络与连续吸引子神经网络在状态空间中对齐，利用二者偏差-方差互补性，在视觉目标跟踪任务中实现了比单一网络和现有混合模型更优的稳定性和准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有混合神经网络（HNNs）主要局限于神经元尺度的混合，其离散脉冲编码难以应用于连续状态估计任务。受神经科学中连续吸引子神经网络（CANNs）通过神经群体编码连续状态的启发，研究者试图探索ANN-CANN在群体尺度上的混合方法，但目前缺乏系统性的理论框架。

Method: 提出理论驱动的ANN-CANN混合框架：1）将ANN响应图与CANN动态在相同状态空间中对齐，使两个异构分支通过共享状态表示进行交互；2）利用数据驱动ANN的无偏估计（高方差）与CANN的低方差滞后估计之间的偏差-方差互补性，实现二者协同优化。

Result: 在9个视觉跟踪基准上，HTNN持续优于单一网络基线和现有混合模型；在遮挡、运动模糊、背景干扰等环境变化下，性能增益保持稳健。

Conclusion: 该工作提供了群体尺度混合神经网络的一般化基础，证明了ANN-CANN混合在连续状态估计任务中的有效性，为HNNs从神经元尺度向群体尺度发展开辟了新路径。

Abstract: Hybrid neural networks (HNNs) that integrate artificial neural networks (ANNs) with brain-inspired neural networks have achieved broad success across perception and control tasks. However, much of the current success is confined to neuron-scale hybridization, where discrete, spike-based coding fundamentally limits applicability to continuous-state estimation tasks. In neuroscience, continuous attractor neural networks (CANNs) represent continuous states through neural ensembles, pointing to a population-scale route for HNNs to address this limitation. Yet, principled methodologies for ANN-CANN integration remain largely underexplored. In this work, we propose a theory-grounded ANN-CANN hybridization framework and instantiate it as a hybrid tracking neural network (HTNN) for visual object tracking, a representative continuous-state estimation task. The framework aligns ANN response maps with CANN dynamics in the same state space, enabling the two heterogeneous branches to interact through the shared state representation. Furthermore, we uncover a functional bias-variance complementarity: data-driven ANNs provide asymptotically unbiased estimates, while CANN estimates are low-variance but temporally lagged. By operationalizing this complementarity, HTNN achieves stable and accurate tracking across nine visual tracking benchmarks, consistently outperforming single-network baselines and existing hybrid models. Notably, these performance gains are robustly maintained even under diverse environmental variations, including occlusion, motion blur, and background interference. Through this proof-of-concept study, our framework offers a generalizable foundation for advancing HNNs toward population-scale hybridization.

</details>


### [509] [Evolutionary Optimization Reveals Structural Constraints on Reservoir Architecture for Spatiotemporal Chaos](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22765)
*Nima Dehghani*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文研究了将储层计算架构置于进化选择压力下预测时空混沌（Kuramoto–Sivashinsky方程）时，其底层结构如何变化。结果表明，进化优化不仅降低了预测误差、延长了预测时域，还揭示了储层基质中可解释的结构约束：包括形成递减的规模-效率边界、保留谱包络、锁定中等模块化区间并剪枝连接成本，且准确性与效率可联合实现而非简单的权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生物系统能将过去的刺激转化为内部动态状态以支持面向未来的响应，而标准储层计算通常将递归基质视为固定随机网络。作者想探究当储层架构置于进化选择压力下进行预测时，底层结构会发生怎样的变化。

Method: 以Kuramoto–Sivashinsky方程作为时空混沌测试平台，对储层的五个超参数（规模、连接度、谱半径、输入缩放、读出正则化）进行进化优化，并对进化后的储层进行结构分析（谱包络、模块化、连接成本等）和Pareto分析。

Result: 进化降低了总体预测误差，延长了低误差预测时域；设计空间形成递减的规模-效率前沿；进化后的储层保持保守的随机块模型谱包络，同时精炼低特征值模式，将模块化锁定在中间频段并在此频段内剪枝连接成本；Pareto分析显示精英储层在成本-模块化平面上占据水平地板，表明准确性和效率是联合实现的。

Conclusion: 进化优化不仅提升了预测性能，还暴露了递归基质上可解释的结构约束：它稳定了适合任务的动力学类别，并精炼了对预测最相关的结构自由度。进化储层计算为研究预测需求如何塑造自适应动态网络提供了一个生物启发框架。

Abstract: Biological systems maintain function in fluctuating environments by transforming past stimulation into internal dynamical states that support future-oriented responses. Reservoir computing provides a computational analogue, but standard formulations often treat the recurrent substrate as a fixed random network and train only the readout. Here we ask how the substrate itself changes when reservoir architecture is placed under evolutionary selection for prediction. Using the Kuramoto--Sivashinsky equation as a testbed for spatiotemporal chaos, we evolved reservoirs over five construction hyperparameters: size, connectivity degree, spectral radius, input scaling, and readout regularization. Evolution reduced prediction error at the population level, extended the low-error forecast horizon, and organized the design space along a diminishing-return size--efficiency frontier. Structural analyses showed that evolved reservoirs remained within a conserved stochastic-block-model-like spectral envelope while refining low-eigenvalue modes, locking modularity to an intermediate band, and pruning connection cost within that band. Pareto analysis showed that elite reservoirs occupied a horizontal floor in the cost--modularity plane, indicating that accuracy and efficiency were achieved jointly rather than through a simple trade-off. These findings show that evolutionary optimization does not merely improve prediction, but exposes interpretable structural constraints on the recurrent substrate: it stabilizes a task-suitable dynamical class and refines the architectural degrees of freedom most relevant for prediction. Evolutionary reservoir computing therefore provides a bio-inspired framework for studying how predictive demands shape adaptive dynamical networks.

</details>


### [510] [Mass Conservation as an Inductive Bias for Self-Organized Criticality in NCA Reservoirs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23115)
*Tong Zhang,Etienne Guichard,Sidney Pontes-Filho,Stefano Nichele*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文研究质量守恒约束能否在进化神经细胞自动机（NCA）储备池中诱导出自组织临界性（SOC）。实验表明，质量守恒NCA相比标准NCA表现出更强的临界性，进化速度快1.27倍，且在5-bit记忆、MNIST分类和CartPole控制三项下游任务中性能相当，其中临界性最强的储备池在时序控制任务上得分最高。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索质量守恒作为归纳偏置，能否在进化NCA储备池中促进自组织临界性的涌现，从而在不牺牲下游任务表现的前提下提升计算特性。

Method: 对比质量守恒NCA和标准NCA，在多轮独立进化后评估两者的雪崩动力学临界性（拟合幂律分布），并在5-bit序列记忆、MNIST分类、CartPole-v1时序控制三个基准任务上测试下游性能。

Result: 质量守恒NCA更易达到完美幂律拟合（强临界性），进化速度快1.27倍；两类NCA在三项下游任务上表现相当；临界性最强的储备池在CartPole时序控制任务中获得最高分。

Conclusion: 质量守恒是一种简单有效的机制，可在进化NCA储备池中促进稳健的临界性，且不损害下游任务性能。

Abstract: Self-organized criticality (SOC), a dynamical regime associated with maximal information processing, offers a promising foundation for reservoir computing. Recent work has shown that neural cellular automata (NCA) can be evolved toward critical avalanche dynamics and employed as effective reservoirs for memory and classification tasks. Here, we investigate whether mass conservation -- a local redistribution rule that preserves total lattice mass -- serves as an inductive bias toward SOC in evolved NCA reservoirs. We compare mass-conserving and standard NCA across multiple independent runs and evaluate both on three downstream benchmarks: 5-bit sequential memory, MNIST digit classification, and CartPole-v1 temporal control. Mass-conserving NCA consistently exhibit stronger criticality, with more runs achieving perfect power-law fits across avalanche distributions, while also being 1.27$\times$ faster during evolution. Importantly, conservation does not impair downstream utility: both variants achieve comparable performance across all three tasks. Furthermore, the reservoir with perfect criticality achieves the highest temporal control score, suggesting a positive link between SOC quality and sequential computation. Our results demonstrate that mass conservation is a simple, effective mechanism for promoting robust criticality in evolved NCA reservoirs without sacrificing downstream performance.

</details>


<div id='cs.AI'></div>

# cs.AI [[Back]](#toc)

### [511] [On the Identifiability of User Adaptation in Co-Adaptive Neural Interfaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20569)
*Philip Waggoner*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文分析了共适应人机系统中的可辨识性问题，证明了闭环编码器估计无法唯一识别用户适应行为，而是反映了联合系统的特性，并讨论了行为适应解读的含义及识别条件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在解读共适应人机系统中的用户行为适应时存在模糊性，需要厘清闭环系统中编码器估计的实际含义。

Method: 通过理论分析框架，研究闭环人机系统中编码器估计的可辨识性，探讨其与联合系统特性的关系。

Result: 闭环编码器估计不能唯一确定用户适应行为，它反映的是人机联合系统的整体属性，而非单纯的用户适应性。

Conclusion: 对闭环人机系统中的行为适应解读需谨慎，并提出了实现有效辨识的条件。

Abstract: We analyze identifiability in co-adaptive human-machine systems. We show that closed-loop encoder estimates do not uniquely identify user adaptation, but instead reflect properties of the joint system. We discuss implications for interpreting behavioral adaptation and propose conditions for identification.

</details>


### [512] [Beyond Fixed Budgets: Characterizing the Inelasticity and Limitations of Tree-of-Thought Reasoning Strategies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20599)
*Atkia Mahila,Avinash Maurya,M. Mustafa Rafique,Bogdan Nicolae*

Main category: cs.AI
