Controlled deletion experiments from 5 to 20 percent validate the explanations, showing that removing highly influential samples systematically shifts predictions. This approach provides auditable explanations by linking decisions to perceptible reference cases.

</details>


### [584] [Hypothesis-Driven Skill Optimization for LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22330)
*Fangxin Shang,Yehui Yang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出HDSO框架，让冻结的大模型通过假设驱动的方式安全地发现、验证和积累技能，无需训练即可提升智能体性能，并能抵抗稀疏/含噪轨迹的干扰。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 外部技能可以提升LLM智能体性能，但从稀疏或含噪轨迹中提取技能存在风险：可能学到有用过程、虚假捷径或执行器无法可靠遵循的规则。需要一种安全、可审计的技能积累机制。

Method: HDSO框架包含冻结的策展人和执行器两端。策展人观察执行器轨迹，提出可证伪的假设及验证方案，实例化为候选技能包；通过配对的控制/实验执行验证，审查行为差异，仅将验证通过的候选技能存入批准仓库；执行器通过渐进式披露消费技能，当无技能适用时保留原始执行路径。

Result: 在ALFWorld上，HDSO在Qwen3-8B上提升+6.9 Avg. SR，在Qwen3.6-27B上提升+4.0点。在20%随机翻转成功/失败反馈的嘈杂设置下，Qwen3-8B仍保持+7.1点增益。跨模型迁移与异构对诊断表明验证后的仓库可跨运行复用。

Conclusion: HDSO为冻结的动作智能体提供了可审计的技能生命周期，而非无约束的记忆积累过程。跨模型策展仅在策展诊断、执行器能力和验证证据对齐时才能成功。

Abstract: External skills can improve action-oriented LLM agents without changing model weights, but persistent skill updates are risky when they are distilled from sparse or noisy trajectories. A plausible reflection may encode a useful procedure, a spurious shortcut, or a rule that the target executor cannot reliably follow. We propose Hypothesis-Driven Skill Optimization (HDSO), a train-free framework in which both the skill curator and the agent executor are frozen inference endpoints. The curator observes executor traces, proposes a falsifiable hypothesis with an explicit validation plan, instantiates the hypothesis as a candidate skill package, validates the package through paired control/treatment executions, reviews behavior differences, and consolidates only supported candidates into an approved repository. The executor consumes approved skills through progressive disclosure, preserving the executor-only path when no skill is selected. On ALFWorld, HDSO improves executor-only baselines by +6.9 Avg. SR points for Qwen3-8B and +4.0 points for Qwen3.6-27B. Under 20% randomly flipped success/failure feedback during skill discovery and validation, HDSO preserves a +7.1-point gain for Qwen3-8B. Transfer and heterogeneous-pair diagnostics further show that validated repositories can be useful beyond the run that produced them, but cross-model curation succeeds only when curator diagnosis, executor capability, and validation evidence align. HDSO provides an auditable skill lifecycle for frozen action agents rather than an unconstrained memory accumulation procedure.

</details>


### [585] [Social World Model for Lifelong Social Intelligence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21315)
*Yu Luo*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出面向语言智能体的社会世界模型（Social World Model），将社交互动分解为场景、观察、心理状态、动作和对话五个维度，构建闭环学习框架，并配套可复用的数据合成机制与终身学习基准。在ASCENT-Bench上，交互训练的Qwen2.5-7B在五项核心指标上全面超越基线，零遗忘且匹配闭源模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究仅关注社交智能的静态评估，忽视其持续积累过程；两大痛点：社交交互轨迹缺乏统一结构化表示以形成可迭代学习信号，能力提升与保持被孤立研究。

Method: 提出社会世界模型，将社交互动分解为五个维度（场景设置、观察、心理状态、动作、对话），构建闭环学习框架：智能体收集交互经验→转化为偏好信号→更新模型→重新部署持续学习；配套可复用数据合成机制和终身学习基准。

Result: 在ASCENT-Bench上，交互训练的Qwen2.5-7B在五个核心指标上全面超越基线，完成率匹配闭源Gemini 3 Flash，通过率超越之，且在三个难度级别上实现零遗忘。

Conclusion: 该方法提供了可训练、可验证、可保持的社交智能习得通路，证明小型开源模型可以通过可持续学习获得具有竞争力的社交协调能力。

Abstract: Social intelligence is a core competency for language agents, yet current research primarily focuses on static capability evaluation rather than how these skills are continuously shaped and accumulated. This gap calls for a shift toward sustainable learning paradigms. Currently, two methodological pain points exist: social interaction trajectories lack unified structured representations to form iterable learning signals, and capability improvement and retention are typically studied in isolation, hindering the assessment of continuous evolution.
  To bridge this gap, we propose the Social World Model. We decompose social interaction into five dimensions (scene setting, observation, mental state, action, and dialogue) to build a closed-loop learning framework. In this setup, agents collect interaction experiences, convert them into preference signals for model updating, and redeploy the updated policy for continued learning. Additionally, we provide a reusable data synthesis mechanism and a lifelong learning benchmark, transforming social capabilities from an "object of evaluation" into an "object of sustainable training".
  Validating our framework on the ASCENT-Bench, the interactively trained Qwen2.5-7B model outperforms its baseline across all five core metrics. Notably, it matches the closed-source Gemini 3 Flash in completion rate, exceeds it in pass rate, and achieves zero forgetting across three difficulty levels. Unlike prior works that merely report static comparisons or capability decay, this end-to-end approach provides a trainable, verifiable, and retainable pathway, demonstrating that small open-source models can sustainably acquire competitive social coordination capabilities.

</details>


### [586] [Text2DSL: LLM-Based Code Generation for Domain-Specific Languages](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22586)
*Alexander V. Kozachok,Alexander M. Nazimov,Shamil G. Magomedov*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了Text2DSL（从自然语言生成领域特定语言代码）这一新问题类别，构建了包含4,204条验证对的PolkitBench数据集，并通过在两种不同规模的MoE模型上实验证明：向提示中注入结构化上下文（BNF语法、API规范、标识符词汇表）无需微调即可显著提升DSL代码生成质量（语法有效性达98.6-99.4%，结构有效性提升9.7-35.5个百分点，CodeBLEU提升60-95%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有DSL安全策略的编写需要高度专业知识且容易出错，而现有的Text-to-SQL和通用代码生成方法无法直接迁移到DSL场景。作者希望填补这一空白，将Text2DSL定义为一个独立的问题类别，并探索如何在不进行模型微调的情况下提升LLM生成DSL代码的质量。

Method: 1) 形式化定义Text2DSL问题；2) 构建PolkitBench数据集（4,204对自然语言-Polkit规则对，通过三级AST流水线验证）；3) 在两种MoE模型（GigaChat-10B-A1.8B和Nemotron-3-Nano-30B-A3B）上进行受控提示实验，对比有无结构化上下文（BNF语法、API规范、标识符词汇表）的生成效果。

Result: 提供结构化上下文后：语法有效性达98.6-99.4%，结构有效性提升9.7-35.5个百分点，CodeBLEU评分提升60-95%。该效果在两种不同规模和来源的模型上表现一致。

Conclusion: 对于Text2DSL这类问题，向提示中注入形式化的目标语言规范（BNF语法、API规范、标识符词汇表）是无需微调即可实现高质量DSL代码生成的稳健促进因素。

Abstract: Domain-specific languages (DSLs) are widely used for managing operating system security policies, yet manually authoring rules in such languages demands high expertise and is error-prone. This paper formalises the task of automatic DSL code generation from natural language descriptions - Text2DSL - as a distinct problem class, separate from Text-to-SQL and general-purpose code generation. We introduce the PolkitBench dataset comprising 4,204 verified natural-language-to-Polkit-rule pairs, each validated through a three-level AST-based pipeline. Controlled prompt experiments on two MoE models of different scale and provenance - GigaChat-10B-A1.8B (1.8B active parameters) and Nemotron-3-Nano-30B-A3B (3B active) - demonstrate the critical role of structured context (BNF grammar, API specification, permitted identifier vocabulary) for LLM-based DSL code generation. Across both models, supplying context raises syntactic validity to 98.6-99.4%, structural validity by +9.7 to +35.5 pp, and the CodeBLEU score by +60% to +95%. The consistency of the effect across models of different scale and provenance indicates that, for the Text2DSL class of problems, injecting a formal target-language specification into the prompt context is a robust enabling factor for high-quality generation without model fine-tuning.

</details>


### [587] [Mind the Noise: Sensitivity of Transformer-based Interaction-Aware Trajectory Prediction Models to Noisy Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21344)
*Shahab Salehi,Luca Lusvarghi,Miguel Sepulcre,Javier Gozalvez*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究了基于Transformer的交互感知轨迹预测模型在真实世界噪声（感知不确定性、定位误差、V2X通信噪声）下的性能退化问题，实验表明预测精度在低噪声下下降1.3倍，在高噪声下下降3.9倍，揭示了模型对噪声的高度敏感性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有轨迹预测模型通常在高精度、离线去噪的数据集上训练和评估，而真实部署中物体状态估计存在感知不确定性、定位误差和V2X通信噪声，这种“干净训练-噪声部署”的差距被忽视，亟需量化噪声对模型性能的实际影响。

Method: 选取SOTA的Transformer-based交互感知轨迹预测模型，通过向物体状态信息（位置、速度、航向）添加不同强度的合成噪声，模拟真实感知和通信噪声环境，定量分析噪声强度与预测精度的关系。

Result: 低噪声水平下预测精度下降1.3倍，最高噪声（但现实）条件下下降3.9倍，预测准确率随噪声强度增加而快速恶化。

Conclusion: 轨迹预测模型对噪声数据高度敏感，现有基于干净数据的评估高估了模型在实际场景中的性能，亟需构建更真实的含噪训练/评估数据集，并开发相应的噪声缓解策略。

Abstract: Trajectory prediction allows autonomous vehicles to anticipate the future behavior of surrounding objects (or agents) and, accordingly, maximize the safety and efficiency of their driving. State-of-the-art Transformed-based interaction-aware trajectory prediction models, which rely on attention mechanisms to capture multi-agent interactions and maximize prediction accuracy, are commonly trained and evaluated on long-range high-quality datasets. These datasets are typically obtained by aggregating data from multiple vehicles or drones and removing any object detection or tracking noise offline. Yet, information about a surrounding object's state (its position, speed, heading) is far from being noiseless in real-world deployments. Object state estimation is affected by perception uncertainties and localization errors that can be particularly large for objects received via Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X) communications. In this paper, we analyze the impact of noisy object state information on the trajectory prediction accuracy of a state-of-the-art Transformer-based interaction-aware trajectory prediction model. Our study demonstrates that trajectory prediction accuracy can rapidly deteriorate as the noise intensity increases. Numerical results show that the prediction accuracy can reduce by a 1.3x factor under small noise levels and by as much as a 3.9x factor under the highest (yet realistic) noise conditions. These findings reveal the strong sensitivity of trajectory prediction models to noisy data, underscoring the need for more realistic training and evaluation datasets as well as noise mitigation strategies.

</details>


### [588] [AgentLens: Interpretable Safety Steering via Mechanistic Subspaces for Multi-Turn Coding Agent](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22673)
*Weidi Luo,Qiming Zhang,Yihao Quan,Mingyu Jin,Jie Cai,Chaowei Xiao,Jingcheng Niu,Zhen Xiang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出AgentLens，一种基于机械可解释性的白盒防御框架，用于多轮编码智能体的运行时安全检测与表示级干预。通过分析步骤级隐藏表示，在单层10维子空间内检测有害状态并进行干预，同时提出MAS基准数据集，实验证明其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM编码智能体在多轮交互中存在安全风险，而外部护栏的细粒度行为控制能力有限；现有的机械可解释性安全方法大多局限于单轮或越狱式QA场景，无法捕捉多轮智能体执行中的动态风险演化。

Method: 提出AgentLens框架，对编码智能体的步骤级隐藏表示进行运行时安全检测，并通过在单层10维子空间进行表示级干预来减轻不安全行为；同时构建MAS基准数据集，包含194个任务的多轮执行轨迹及详细标注。

Result: AgentLens在安全检测上表现优异，能够初步实现前瞻性风险预判，并显著减少编码智能体的有害行为。

Conclusion: 该工作为将机械可解释性应用于动态LLM智能体安全领域奠定了基础。

Abstract: Coding agents based on large language models (LLMs) demonstrate remarkable autonomous capabilities, but they also introduce significant safety and misuse risks during multi-turn interactions with external environments. Existing safety mechanisms mainly rely on external guardrails, which have a limited ability to perform fine-grained behavioral control during execution. Meanwhile, recent mechanistic interpretability methods for LLM safety are mostly confined to single-turn or jailbreak-style QA settings, limiting their ability to capture the evolving risk dynamics of multi-turn agent execution. In this paper, we investigate the safety of multi-turn coding agents from an internal perspective. We propose AgentLens (Mechanistic Subspace Intervention and Steering), a white-box defense framework that performs runtime safety detection and representation-level mitigation for coding agents. Unlike conventional agent guardrails, AgentLens detect harmful execution states from step-level hidden representations and mitigate unsafe behavior by intervening in a 10-dimensional subspace within a single layer. To support this research, we introduce the Mechanistic Agent Safety (MAS) benchmark, comprising comprehensively annotated multi-turn execution trajectories across 194 tasks using LLaMA-3.1-8B, Qwen-2.5-7B, and Gemma-2-9B. Extensive experiments show that AgentLens achieves strong safety detection performance, provides preliminary evidence for lookahead risk anticipation, and substantially reduces harmful actions of the coding agent, establishing a foundation for applying mechanistic interpretability to dynamic LLM agent safety. The code is available at: https://github.com/EddyLuo1232/AgentLens

</details>


### [589] [Calibration Is Not Control: Why LLM-Agent Oversight Needs Intervention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21399)
*Chubin Zhang,Zhenglin Wan,Xingrui Yu,Jingxuan Wu,Qi Wen,Pengfei Zhou,Wangbo Zhao,Ivor Tsang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 论文指出当前LLM智能体监督中常用的标量风险评分（如失败概率）存在“目标错误”——它只预测失败可能性，而不考虑干预是否能改善结果。作者提出“干预优势”（intervention advantage）作为监督的决策对象，并引入“前缀分支”（prefix branching）反事实协议来测量这一差异。实验表明，基于动作条件的控制（action-conditioned control）在多个基准上显著优于标量路由，而仅对风险分数进行校准无法修复目标错误。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM智能体监督框架错误地将“失败概率/不确定性”作为控制目标，忽略了相同风险分数下不同轨迹前缀的可恢复性差异。真正关键的问题是“干预是否能带来收益”，而非“失败的可能性有多大”。

Method: 1. 形式化定义了“目标误差”（target error）和“干预优势”（intervention advantage）；2. 提出“前缀分支”（prefix branching）反事实协议：从相同轨迹状态出发，执行候选动作来比较继续执行与干预的效用差异；3. 在四个基准上对比标量路由与动作条件化控制，并进行校准分解实验。

Result: 动作条件化控制在交互性强的场景（如ALFWorld）中显著降低控制遗憾（从0.506降至0.110）。当干预较弱或标量路由已保留干预相关信息时，增益缩小。校准标量分数能改善预测指标，但不改变控制遗憾。

Conclusion: LLM智能体监督应从标量风险评分转向动作条件化的价值估计（action-conditioned value estimation），即评估不同干预动作的预期效用，而非仅预测失败概率。

Abstract: Runtime oversight for LLM agents is commonly framed as scalar risk prediction: estimate failure likelihood, confidence, or uncertainty, then intervene once the score crosses a threshold. We argue that this framing targets the wrong object for control. The relevant question is not how likely the agent is to fail if it continues, but whether an available intervention would improve the outcome. Two trajectory prefixes can have the same risk estimate while requiring different actions, because one remains recoverable and the other does not. We formalize this mismatch as target error and identify intervention advantage, the expected utility gain from intervening rather than continuing, as the decision object for oversight. To measure this mismatch, we introduce prefix branching, a same-prefix counterfactual protocol that executes candidate actions from identical trajectory states. Across four benchmarks, action-conditioned control yields regime-dependent gains over scalar routing. In a calibration decomposition, recalibrating the same scalar score improves prediction metrics but leaves control regret unchanged, showing that calibration alone does not repair target error. A simple prefix-only action-conditioned controller substantially reduces regret in the strongest interactive regime, from 0.506 to 0.110 on ALFWorld. Gains shrink when interventions are weak or when scalar routing already preserves intervention-relevant information. These results suggest that LLM-agent oversight should move from calibrated risk scoring toward action-conditioned value estimation.

</details>


### [590] [GroundEval: A Deterministic Replacement for LLM-as-Judge in Stateful Agent Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22737)
*Jeffrey Flynt*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: GroundEval 是一个无需大模型法官的评估框架，通过记录和分析智能体的完整执行轨迹（搜索、获取、引用、访问权限），暴露那些最终答案得分高但实际推理路径无效的“幻觉”案例。在案例中，两个前沿LLM法官给了一个合理答案0.85+的评分，但GroundEval发现该智能体从未检索过答案所依赖的关键证据，得分仅为0.000。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于LLM作为法官的评估方法只能看到最终答案的合理性，无法检测智能体是否真正使用了正确的证据、是否在正确的时间点获取了信息、是否使用了正确的因果机制。作者想设计一个能暴露这些“合理但错误”路径的评估框架。

Method: GroundEval 使用领域配置生成问题，让智能体自由选择回答方式，然后同时评分最终答案和记录的执行轨迹。包含三个评估轨道：Silence（检查前是否核实了不存在）、Perspective（仅使用相关时间点可用的证据）、Counterfactual（使用正确的因果机制而非看似合理的机制）。通过将工具活动与智能体的轮次叙述配对，生成结构化的每个问题的可检查诊断。

Result: 案例研究中，前沿LLM法官给了一个看似合理的回答0.85+的分数，但GroundEval发现该智能体从未检索答案依赖的关键证据，得分为0.000。这些失效不是罕见的边缘情况，而是最终答案和法官评分体系固有盲区中的常见现象。

Conclusion: GroundEval 证明了“答案看起来对”和“智能体真的用了正确证据”之间存在巨大鸿沟。这种基于轨迹的、可检查的评估框架能发现传统方法系统性遗漏的失败模式，为智能体评估提供了更可靠的替代方案。

Abstract: Before letting an agent operate over real context, can you prove it used the right evidence? GroundEval turns that question into a deterministic test of what the agent searched, fetched, cited, and was permitted to access. In one case study, two frontier LLM judges scored a plausible agent response above 0.85. But the trace told a different story: the agent had never retrieved the artifact its answer depended on, yielding a GroundEval score of 0.000.
  We introduce GroundEval, a judge-free framework for evaluating agents against grounded, time-bounded, and access-controlled evidence. GroundEval uses a domain configuration to generate questions, lets the agent choose how to answer, and then scores both the final answer and the recorded trajectory that produced it. The benchmark targets three failures that LLM-as-judge evaluation struggles to detect: whether an agent checked before claiming absence, reasoned only from evidence available to the actor at the relevant time, and used the correct causal mechanism rather than a plausible one. These correspond to three tracks: Silence, Perspective, and Counterfactual. GroundEval exposes when plausible answers rest on invalid evidence paths, and produces structured per-question diagnostics that pair tool activity with the agent's turn-level narration, making each score inspectable rather than merely reported. What our case studies turned up is that this gap isn't some rare corner case. It's exactly the blind spot that final-answer and judge-based scoring were never built to catch.

</details>


### [591] [Don't Blindly Trust It: How Unreliable Feedback Breaks Tool-Using LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21409)
*Chubin Zhang,Zhenglin Wan,Xingrui Yu,Pengfei Zhou,Wangbo Zhao,Jingxuan Wu,Yaxin Zhou,Ivor Tsang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 论文通过受控对比实验发现，在不可靠反馈下，原本受益于工具的智能体可能表现比完全不使用工具的基线更差。作者在问答和事实验证任务中验证了这一价值反转现象，并指出清洁工具带来的收益可能夸大工具的实际价值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前工具增强型智能体的评估通常假设外部反馈是可靠的，忽略了当反馈不可靠时，智能体是否反而不如没有任务证据支持的情况。论文旨在揭示这一反事实问题。

Method: 采用受控的匹配循环比较方法，固定智能体循环、提示、动作空间和解码策略，仅改变返回的观察结果类型：忠实反馈、误导反馈、无反馈。在问答和事实验证任务上进行实验。

Result: 在HotpotQA上，Qwen2.5-7B在清洁检索下F1为44.8，无反馈下为22.3，但在混洗检索（误导反馈）下骤降至4.7。价值反转在更强的清洁检索和局部合理干扰物下依然存在，但在后续清洁证据可修复轨迹时减弱。

Conclusion: 清洁工具带来的增益可能夸大工具的真实价值，匹配无反馈的基线控制对于评估工具增强型智能体是必要的。

Abstract: Tool-augmented agents are typically evaluated by their gains under reliable external feedback. Yet these gains leave open a key counterfactual: when feedback is unreliable, would the agent be better off receiving no task evidence? We study this question with a controlled matched-loop comparison that fixes the agent loop, prompt, action space, and decoding, while varying only the returned observation: faithful, misleading, or absent. Across question answering and fact verification, persistent misleading feedback produces a value inversion: agents that benefit from clean tools can perform worse than the matched no-feedback fallback. On HotpotQA, Qwen2.5-7B reaches 44.8 F1 with clean retrieval and 22.3 F1 with no feedback, but drops to 4.7 F1 under shuffled retrieval. The inversion persists under stronger clean retrieval and locally plausible distractors, but weakens when later clean evidence can repair the trajectory. Early trajectory signals predict many failures, yet simple repairs remain fallback-limited: rejecting bad evidence helps only when the exposed fallback is reliable. These results show that clean-tool gains can overstate tool value, and that matched no-feedback fallback controls are necessary for evaluating tool-augmented agents.

</details>


### [592] [Managing Procedural Memory in LLM Agents: Control, Adaptation, and Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23127)
*Julia Belikova,Rauf Parchiev,Evgeny Egorov,Grigorii Davydenko,Gleb Gusev,Andrey Savchenko,Maksim Makarenko*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出AFTER基准，包含382个企业任务和22个程序性技能，用于评估LLM代理在程序性记忆中的技能迁移能力。实验表明程序性记忆能持续提升性能（3.7-6.7分），多模型轨迹生成的技能跨模型准确率达73.1%，且不同技能表现出不同的泛化特性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 程序性记忆越来越多地被用于提升LLM代理在重复性工作场景中的表现，但其生成可复用技能的能力仍缺乏系统理解，现有研究未能评估技能在任务、角色和模型间的迁移效果。

Method: 构建AFTER基准，涵盖6个专业角色、22个程序性技能、382个真实企业任务；设计四种评估设置：局部改进、跨任务迁移、跨角色迁移、跨模型泛化；通过单轮精炼和多模型轨迹记录来评估技能迁移效果。

Result: 单轮精炼提升聚合性能3.7-6.7分；多模型轨迹生成的技能跨模型测试准确率达73.1%，优于任何单模型来源；部分技能广泛泛化，另一些技能则高度特化于特定角色工作流。

Conclusion: 程序性记忆可有效提升LLM代理在工业场景中的表现，技能迁移能力因泛化程度而异，研究为在生产平台构建和部署程序性记忆系统提供了实用指导。

Abstract: Procedural memory is increasingly used to improve LLM agents on recurring workplace tasks, yet its ability to produce reusable skills remains poorly understood. We introduce AFTER, a benchmark of 382 realistic enterprise tasks spanning six professional roles and 22 procedural skills, designed to evaluate how skills transfer across tasks, roles, and model backbones. The benchmark includes controlled evaluation settings for local improvement, cross-task transfer, cross-role transfer, and cross-model generalization. Experiments show that procedural memory delivers consistent gains in industrial workflows: a single refinement round improves aggregate performance by 3.7-6.7 points, while skills evolved from diverse multi-model execution traces achieve 73.1% cross-model test accuracy, outperforming all single-model trace sources. We further find that some skills generalize broadly across tasks and models, whereas others become specialized to role-specific workflows and lose effectiveness under transfer. These results provide practical guidance for building, evaluating, and deploying procedural memory systems in production agent platforms.

</details>


### [593] [AutoRAS: Learning Robust Agentic Systems with Primitive Representations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21445)
*Yang Yue,Xuancheng Zhu,Yuyang Ma,Guoshun Nan,Zihan Dou,Jingru Shan,Congyu Guo,Ji Zhang,Hua Wang,Jingfeng Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: AutoRAS是一个自动化设计鲁棒性智能体系统的框架，通过符号原语序列优化结构连接和行为动作，在常规和对抗性设置下均表现最佳。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动多智能体工作流设计方法主要关注任务性能提升，而鲁棒性常被忽视，导致系统易受外部攻击和内部故障影响。

Method: 将系统设计形式化为生成符号原语序列，同时编码结构连接和行为动作；利用执行衍生的安全信号和基于流的序列级目标来优化该序列。

Result: 在常规和对抗性设置下均取得最佳性能，攻击下性能退化最小；展现出强迁移性、稳定的优化行为、跨原语集的稳定性以及有利的成本权衡。

Conclusion: AutoRAS有效提升了智能体系统的鲁棒性，为自动化设计安全可靠的智能体系统提供了可行方案。

Abstract: The automated design of agentic systems offers a promising pathway for scaling large language models (LLMs) beyond single-agent reasoning. While prior work has advanced task performance through handcrafted or automatically generated multi-agent workflows, robustness is often treated as an afterthought, leaving systems vulnerable to external adversaries and internal failures. We propose AutoRAS, a framework for the Automated design of Robust Agentic Systems. AutoRAS formulates system design as generating a sequence of symbolic primitives that jointly encode structural connectivity and behavioral actions, and learns to optimize this sequence using execution-derived safety signals and flow-based sequence-level objectives. Extensive experiments show that AutoRAS achieves the best performance in both vanilla and adversarial settings, with the smallest performance degradation under attacks. Further analyses demonstrate strong transferability, stable optimization behavior, stability across primitive sets, and favorable cost trade-offs. Our code is available at $\href{https://github.com/guohezuy/AutoRAS}{\text{this https URL}}$.

</details>


### [594] [Towards Transparent Mental Health Insights: An Explainable AI Model for Career-Related Depression and Anxiety Among University Students Using Structured Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21474)
*Arsham Azam,Rasikh Ali,Tayyaba Farhat,Sheeraz Akram*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本研究提出了一种结合多模态数据与联邦学习的可解释AI框架，用于在保护隐私的前提下识别大学生职业焦虑和抑郁的早期指标。模型在巴基斯坦大学生心理健康调查数据集上取得了92.08%的准确率，并通过可解释性方法识别出回避直接目光、面部表情减少和社交退缩等关键行为标记。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大学生职业焦虑和抑郁问题日益严重，影响心理健康和学业成就。现有方法缺乏隐私保护和文化适应性，且可解释性不足，难以实际部署于学生支持服务中。

Method: 采用多模态数据（结构化行为数据+面部情绪特征）通过带注意机制的中间融合神经网络进行融合；使用标签平滑提升泛化能力；通过联邦学习实现跨机构协同训练而不共享原始数据；利用Integrated Gradients和SHAP进行模型解释。

Result: 在巴基斯坦大学生心理健康调查数据集上，F1-score为89.12%，召回率86.54%，准确率92.08%，精确率91.88%。

Conclusion: 本文提出的可解释、可扩展且具有上下文敏感性的AI系统可用于心理健康预诊断，有望整合到全球学生支持服务中。

Abstract: Career anxiety and depression among university students present a growing challenge to mental health and academic achievement. This study proposes an Explainable AI (XAI) framework using multimodal data and Federated Learning (FL) to identify early indicators of career-related mental health problems in a privacy-preserving and culturally responsive manner. The framework combines structured behavioral data and facial emotion features from interview videos via an intermediate fusion neural network with attention mechanisms. Label smoothing was applied to improve model generalizability. FL was used across institutions to enable collaborative training without raw data sharing. Evaluation was conducted using the Student Mental Health Survey dataset from university students across Pakistan. Our model attained an F1-score of 89.12%, recall of 86.54%, accuracy of 92.08%, and precision of 91.88%. Using Integrated Gradients and SHAP, the model identified key behavioral markers of depression including avoidance of direct gaze, lower facial expressiveness, and social withdrawal, consistent with psychological theory. This research presents an interpretable, scalable, and context-sensitive AI system for mental health pre-diagnosis with potential integration into student support services globally.

</details>


### [595] [Balancing Performance and Diversity in GRPO Autoregressive Text-to-Image Post-Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21498)
*Yuanhao Chiang,Hongbo Duan,Chunru Yang,Jiahua Pei,Yi Liu,Xueqian Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究自回归文生图模型中GRPO风格在线强化学习的策略优化问题，发现固定参考策略散度会限制对齐效果。通过统一f-散度框架（前向KL、反向KL、JS散度）的理论分析，证明JS散度能有效平衡策略优化偏差，在LlamaGen和Janus-7B实验中取得最优或具竞争力的效果，同时保持生成多样性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前自回归文生图模型与人类偏好对齐仍具挑战。GRPO式在线强化学习虽有效，但现有方法将参考策略散度固定处理，忽视了其对策略优化的直接影响，缺乏对不同散度形式影响的理论分析。

Method: 在统一f-散度框架下系统分析前向KL、反向KL和JS散度对GRPO风格自回归T2I对齐的影响，揭示不同散度在token级更新上的差异化作用，并发现JS正则化能缓解均匀偏置同时抑制大幅偏离。

Result: 在LlamaGen和Janus-7B模型上的大量实验表明，JS散度在大多数评估指标上取得最优或极具竞争力的优化性能，且能保持良好的生成多样性。

Conclusion: JS散度作为GRPO风格自回归T2I对齐中的正则化项，在优化效果与生成多样性之间取得了有利平衡，代码已开源。

Abstract: Autoregressive text-to-image (T2I) generation has recently advanced rapidly, yet aligning generated images with human preferences remains challenging. GRPO-style online reinforcement learning provides an effective framework; however, existing methods typically treat reference-policy divergence as fixed, despite its direct impact on policy optimization. We study this overlooked factor within a unified f-divergence framework, encompassing forward KL, reverse KL, and JS divergence, for GRPO-style autoregressive T2I alignment. Our systematic theoretical analysis reveals that different divergences reshape token-level updates in distinct ways. In particular, under the sampled-token shaping form used, JS regularization achieves a favorable trade-off by mitigating uniform bias relative to the reference policy while still discouraging large deviations. Extensive experiments on LlamaGen and Janus-7B show that JS divergence achieves the strongest or highly competitive optimization performance on most evaluation metrics while maintaining favorable generation diversity. The code is available at https://github.com/tuoyou-hao/BPD-GRPO.

</details>


### [596] [AI Alignment From Social Choice Perspectives](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21550)
*Daniel Halpern,Evi Micha,Ariel D. Procaccia,Benjamin Schiffer,Itai Shapira,Shirley Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文综述了社会选择理论视角下的人类反馈对齐中的聚合问题，分析了反馈聚合层的失败模式并展示了处理分歧的设计空间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当人类对模型行为的判断存在冲突时，如何将不同意见聚合为统一的偏好目标是一个关键问题。现有方法可能隐含地处理分歧，导致不良行为。作者希望通过社会选择理论的视角揭示这一问题并探索原则性的解决方案。

Method: 采用综述的方法，从社会选择理论的角度审视人类反馈对齐中的偏好聚合问题，分析现有方法的失败模式，并勾勒更广泛的设计空间。

Result: 识别了反馈聚合层中的失败模式，揭示了在显式且原则性的方式下处理分歧的更广泛设计空间。

Conclusion: 社会选择理论为理解和改进人类反馈对齐中的偏好聚合问题提供了有价值的分析框架，有助于设计更鲁棒、更公平的对齐方法。

Abstract: Alignment from human feedback uses human judgments about model outputs to steer the behavior of language models after pretraining. When those judgments reflect conflicting views of desirable behavior, the learned objective becomes an aggregate determination of what the model should prefer. We survey recent work that has studied this aggregation problem through the lens of social choice theory. We illustrate how the social choice perspective helps identify failure modes in the feedback aggregation layer and reveals a broader design space for handling disagreement in explicit and principled ways.

</details>


### [597] [Causal Discovery in the Era of Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23608)
*Yujia Zheng,Vishal Verma,Mantej Gill,Haoyue Dai,Peter Spirtes,Kun Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出因果发现中LLM应作为辅助工具而非因果证据提供者，并基于此原则构建了causal-learn+平台。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有将LLM与因果发现结合的方法存在风险：因果关系可能被文本关联、提示伪影和幻觉机制所污染，而非真正基于数据和假设。作者希望明确LLM在因果发现中的合理角色定位。

Method: 提出"代理辅助工作流，因果结论扎根于数据、假设、算法和专家决策"的原则，并据此构建causal-learn+在线平台，协调数据分析、预处理、方法推荐、专家知识融合、形式化发现和解释等环节。

Result: 通过Big Five人格数据案例研究，展示了基于该原则的代理辅助因果发现流程，验证了平台的有效性。

Conclusion: LLM应协助因果发现流程中的辅助任务（检查数据、检索上下文、解释方法、澄清输出），而不应提供边、方向、先验或因果结论。因果主张必须保持数据驱动和方法严谨。

Abstract: Recent attempts to combine large language models (LLMs) with causal discovery ask models to infer pairwise directions, propose graph structures, or inject language-model outputs as priors and constraints. These approaches promise faster analysis, but they also obscure whether a causal evidence is supported by data and assumptions or by textual associations, prompt artifacts and hallucinated mechanisms. We argue for a different role for agents in causal discovery. Agents should inspect data, retrieve context, explain method assumptions and clarify graph outputs, but they should not supply edges, orientations, priors, constraints or causal conclusions. We propose the principle that agents assist the workflow, while causal claims remain grounded in data, explicit assumptions, formal algorithms, diagnostics and user or domain-expert decisions. We instantiate this principle in causal-learn+, an online platform that coordinates data analysis, preprocessing, method recommendation, expert-knowledge incorporation, formal discovery and interpretation around the algorithmic ecosystem of causal-learn. A case study on Big Five personality data illustrates agent-assisted pipeline of causal discovery without turning language-model unreliability into causal evidence. The platform is available at causallearn.com.

</details>


### [598] [Composing Verifiable Conceptual Models via Building Blocks: Towards Design-Time Verification of Agentic AI Workflows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21565)
*Noe Y. Flandre,Alexander C. Nwala,Philippe J. Giabbanelli*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种在系统设计阶段验证多智能体AI工作流兼容性的方法，通过12条结构规则检查可复用构建块的组合是否协调，并基于公开数据集验证了该方法能可靠检测设计缺陷。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Agentic AI系统缺乏在设计阶段验证工作流正确性的支持，相当于在建模与仿真中组合概念模型却不验证其构建块是否协调交互。

Method: 将智能体工作流建模为可复用构建块的组合，通过12条结构规则检查构建块之间的兼容性，并在软件原型中实现这些规则。

Result: 基于两个公开数据集（48个已知缺陷工作流和168个结构变体）的评估显示，即使缺陷设计被结构转换（如智能体间任务拆分）掩盖，验证器也能可靠检测到违规。

Conclusion: 未来可将该验证方法与构建块社区仓库结合，以组合安全可靠的智能体工作流。

Abstract: Agentic AI systems orchestrate multiple LLM-based agents through workflow architectures that coordinate decisions, tools, and external actions. While current platforms emphasize runtime safeguards, little support exists for verifying workflows during system design. From a Modeling \& Simulation perspective, this gap is analogous to composing conceptual models without verifying whether their building blocks interact coherently. We propose a design-time verification approach that models agentic workflows as compositions of reusable building blocks and checks their compatibility through twelve structural rules. We implemented these rules in a software prototype and evaluated them using two openly released datasets: 48 workflows with known design flaws and 168 variants that preserve workflow logic but alter graph structure. Results show that our verifier reliably detects violations even when flawed designs are obscured through structural transformations such as splitting tasks between agents. Future works could combine our verification with community repositories of building blocks to compose safe agentic workflows.

</details>


### [599] [Counsel: A Meta-Evaluation Dataset for Agentic Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21627)
*Sashank Pisupati,Henry Broomfield,Eujeong Choi,Antonia Calvi,Charlie Wang,Roman Engeler,Max Bartolo,Patrick Lewis*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文介绍了Counsel，首个针对智能体任务的过程级LLM评判元评估数据集。该数据集包含tau-bench和DA-Code两个基准上的开源LLM评判结果及人工元评估，发现更强模型和更多推理努力能提升人类一致性（最优模型位置一致性约88%，推理一致性约65%），数据集开源供社区使用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着智能体系统处理日益复杂的多步骤任务，评估其轨迹成为瓶颈——人工标注单个轨迹可能耗时数小时，导致评估难以规模化。尽管LLM-as-a-judge被广泛用于自动评估，但其评判的可靠性常常未经测量。

Method: 构建Counsel数据集，包含开源LLM评判对两个智能体基准（tau-bench和DA-Code）的过程级评判，以及人类对评判的元评估。人类标注者将评判分为"准确"、"位置正确但推理不佳"或"本不应标记"，并达到0.78的Krippendorff's alpha一致性。

Result: 更强的评判模型和更多的推理努力都能提升与人类的一致性。最强模型在错误位置判断上达到约88%的一致性，在推理质量上达到约65%的一致性。

Conclusion: Counsel数据集为校准、改进或训练智能体任务的LLM评判提供了有价值的数据，有望促进基于LLM的评估器与人类对齐的严格研究。

Abstract: As agentic systems tackle increasingly complex multi-step tasks, evaluating their trajectories presents a major bottleneck - human annotation of a single trajectory on popular agentic benchmarks can take hours, making it difficult to scale evaluations for measuring performance or curating training data. This has driven widespread reliance on automated approaches such as LLM-as-a-judge (LLMJ) to critique agents at the process and outcome-levels at scale, however, the soundness of LLMJ critiques often goes unmeasured. Here, we introduce Counsel, the first public dataset of meta-evaluations for agentic tasks. Counsel consists of process-level critiques from open-weight LLMJs on two agent benchmarks: tau-bench (customer support agents) and DA-Code (coding agents), and human meta-evaluations of these critiques. Human annotators label critiques on each flagged error as "spot on", "correct location but poor reasoning", or "should not have flagged", achieving reliable inter-annotator agreement (Krippendorff's alpha of 0.78). The resulting dataset stratifies LLMJ critiques by human alignment across both error location within a trajectory and reasoning quality, serving as valuable data to calibrate, improve, or train LLMJs for agents. Comparing open-weight judges, we find that more capable judge models and more reasoning effort both enabled improved human agreement, with the strongest judge reaching ~88% agreement on location and ~65% on reasoning. Counsel is generated using open-weight models and is permissively licensed for broad community use, which we hope will enable rigorous study and improved alignment of LLM-based evaluators for agentic systems.

</details>


### [600] [ChainWorld: Composing Long-Horizon Desktop Workloads from Atomic OSWorld Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21654)
*Vincent Siu,Manasi Sharma,Dawn Song,Daniel Yue Zhang,Chenguang Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出ChainWorld，通过组合OSWorld原子任务生成长视野桌面工作负载，发现现有计算机使用智能体在长链任务中表现差（最高完成率31%），并揭示了单轮和多轮评估中不同的失败模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有计算机使用智能体仅在原子桌面任务上评估，无法反映真实桌面工作中需要跨多个目标维持状态的现实需求。作者希望弥合这一评估差距。

Method: 提出ChainWorld框架，通过方向性兼容搜索将OSWorld原子任务组合成长视野工作链（长度2-4，共347条链），并设计单轮（所有任务一次性给出）和多轮（逐步揭示任务）两种评估协议。

Result: 四种当前计算机使用智能体的最大链完成率为31%。多轮评估提升了三个模型的完成率，但两种协议仍然具有挑战性。单轮失败集中在工件精度问题，多轮失败更多反映会话管理问题（如碎片化进度和后期任务脱离）。

Conclusion: 长视野桌面任务对当前智能体极具挑战性，单轮和多轮评估暴露不同的失败模式，说明需要更全面的评估方法来推动计算机使用智能体的发展。

Abstract: Computer use agents are evaluated almost exclusively on atomic desktop tasks, but realistic desktop work requires sustaining state across multiple objectives. We study this gap with ChainWorld, which composes atomic OSWorld tasks into long horizon desktop workloads through directional compatibility search while preserving the source evaluators. The resulting workload contains 347 chains of length two to four and compares two renderings of the same task sequence. In single turn evaluation, all tasks are presented together in one prompt. In multi turn evaluation, tasks are revealed one at a time. Across four current computer use agents, maximum chain completion is 31%. Multi turn evaluation improves completion for three models, but both protocols remain challenging. The two protocols also expose different failure profiles. Single turn failures concentrate on artifact precision, while multi turn failures more often reflect session management problems such as fragmented progress and later turn disengagement.

</details>


### [601] [Hallucination as Context Drift: Synchronization Protocols for Multi-Agent LLM Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21666)
*Carson Rodrigues*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出多智能体LLM系统中的"上下文漂移"是幻觉的重要来源，通过上下文分歧评分（CDS）量化智能体间的知识状态不一致，并提出共享状态验证协议（SSVP），在减少58% API调用的情况下有效降低幻觉率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体LLM系统常产生幻觉，但部分问题并非模型能力不足，而是智能体之间"上下文漂移"导致——即并发智能体之间知识状态的分歧或不一致。

Method: 提出上下文分歧评分（CDS）量化智能体对之间在空间、时间和任务维度的知识状态差异；提出共享状态验证协议（SSVP），让智能体周期性地交换压缩状态摘要并在高分歧条件下标记，避免联合推理。

Result: 在旅行和软件规划两个领域实验中，全广播同步导致幻觉率上升34% (污染效应)；SSVP不仅避免此问题，还实现微幅一致性降低（HR: 0.463, d=0.30），比全广播显著更低（p=0.0005, d=1.47），且节省58% API调用。污染效应在软件领域未复现。

Conclusion: 幻觉缓解应被视为分布式系统问题，上下文同步应成为多智能体LLM设计的一等原语。

Abstract: Multi-agent LLM systems routinely produce hallucinated outputs that cannot be explained by model deficiencies alone. A significant class of these failures arises not from model incapacity but from context drift: the divergence of internal knowledge states between concurrent agents. When agents enter a collaborative task with mismatched or stale representations of shared world state, their joint reasoning produces contradictions that manifest as hallucination. We define the Context Divergence Score (CDS), a lightweight scalar metric quantifying knowledge-state discrepancy between agent pairs across spatial, temporal, and task dimensions, and propose the Shared State Verification Protocol (SSVP), which lets agents periodically exchange compressed state summaries and flag high-divergence conditions before joint reasoning. We evaluate SSVP across two domains (multi-agent travel and software project planning) using Claude Haiku. In controlled experiments (n=30 per condition, travel; n=10, software) across 8 scenarios, naive full-broadcast synchronization increases hallucination rate by 34% above the no-sync baseline (HR: 0.658 vs. 0.492, p=0.0022, d=1.18), a contamination effect from propagating erroneous agent states. SSVP avoids this failure mode while showing modest, consistent reduction (HR: 0.463, d=0.30) and achieves significantly lower hallucination than full-broadcast (p=0.0005, d=1.47) using 58% fewer API calls. The contamination effect does not replicate in the software domain, where all conditions converge to low HR (<0.2), confirming it is specific to tasks where one erroneous shared belief cascades across evaluation dimensions. Our results reframe hallucination mitigation as a distributed systems problem and establish context synchronization as a first-class primitive in multi-agent LLM design.

</details>


### [602] [Entropy Objectives in Markov Decision Processes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21726)
*S. Akshay,Raghav Goyal,Aditya Neeraje,Piyush Srivastava*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究了随机系统中控制策略的合成问题，通过熵目标（entropy-based objective）来保证状态分布的集中性（concentration property）。作者证明了该问题即使放松版本也具有高计算复杂性，并提出了一种基于凸对偶（convex duality）与不变式合成（invariant synthesis）的验证与策略合成方法，最后通过实验验证了方法的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法难以直接处理基于熵的（非线性的）目标来保证随机系统中状态分布的集中性，作者希望解决这一理论空白，并提供一种在计算上可行的合成方法。

Method: 首先对问题进行形式化定义，并证明其计算复杂性（即使松弛版本也属于难解问题）。然后结合凸对偶理论与不变式合成技术，提出一种可靠且（有条件地）相对完备的验证与策略合成方法。同时探讨了记忆（memory）与随机化（randomization）在实现熵目标中的作用。

Result: 理论方面：证明了熵目标策略合成问题的计算复杂性高；方法方面：提出了基于凸对偶和不变式合成的求解框架；实验方面：在多个典型基准测试上验证了方法的可行性。

Conclusion: 基于熵的集中性目标虽然计算困难，但通过组合凸对偶与不变式合成技术可以实现有效的策略验证与合成。记忆和随机化对实现熵目标具有重要影响。

Abstract: We consider the problem of synthesizing control policies that enforce a concentration property on the state distributions of a stochastic system. We present a formalization of this problem in terms of synthesizing strategies for maintaining an entropy-based objective in Markov Decision Processes (MDPs). We first show that even relaxed versions of this problem are complexity-theoretically hard. We then present a sound and (conditionally) relatively complete method to verify and synthesize strategies for such entropy objectives. The main challenge is the non-linear nature of such objectives, and our approach addresses this by exploiting and combining ideas from convex duality and invariant synthesis. We also investigate the role of memory and randomization in ensuring entropy objectives. Finally, we implement our ideas to evaluate our approach empirically on a few illustrative benchmarks.

</details>


### [603] [Training the Orchestrator: A Supervised Approach to End-to-End PDDL Planning with LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21740)
*Rajesh Mangannavar,Zachary Coalson,Pranay Dugar,Prasad Tadepalli*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: HALO通过训练一个轻量级QLoRA策略+三条硬编码规则替代大规模语言模型编排器，在多个规划基准上以不到GPT-5-mini 1/45的成本达到相近效果，将LLM调用次数减少40%-50%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于大语言模型作为编排器的智能体框架在每一步精炼时都需要调用昂贵的API，成本高昂。本文旨在用可学习的轻量级编排器替代提示式大模型，大幅降低推理成本。

Method: 提出HALO框架：使用小型QLoRA微调策略网络+三条硬编码规则构成编排器，利用验证器已经认证的正确轨迹作为监督信号，在21个智能体动作空间上训练编排器，跨越11个PDDL领域。

Result: 在PlanBench、Natural Plan等基准上，HALO与GPT-5-mini性能持平，略低于Gemini-3-Flash（差距在3个百分点以内），但编排成本降低了一个数量级（每任务从$0.18降至$0.004，约为GPT-5-mini的1/45，Gemini-3-Flash的1/15），每个回合的LLM调用减少40%-50%。

Conclusion: 验证器提供的已认证轨迹可以直接作为强监督信号训练编排器，从小模型加规则出发就能在极低成本下逼近甚至追平大模型编排器性能，展示了从验证反馈中蒸馏规划能力的可行路径。

Abstract: Translating natural-language planning intent into verified plans is a longstanding challenge: people communicate goals in language, while classical planners require formal PDDL specifications. Recent agentic frameworks bridge this gap by orchestrating a pool of specialized repair agents inside a verifier-checked refinement loop, but the orchestrator at the centre is itself a prompted frontier LLM, paying a frontier-LLM API call at every refinement step. We present HALO (Hybrid Agent-Learned Orchestrator), which trains the orchestrator from refinement trajectories that an external verifier has certified as ending in valid plans, across 11 PDDL domains. HALO pairs a small QLoRA-tuned policy with three hardcoded rules for trivially decidable selections, and operates over an expanded 21-agent action space. Unlike approaches that prompt a frontier LLM at every step or learn an orchestrator from sparse end-of-episode rewards, our key observation is that the verifier already provides strong guidance: every accepted trajectory is a sequence of demonstrably correct (state, agent) decisions, directly usable as supervision. Across PlanBench, Natural Plan, and classical planning benchmarks, HALO matches or exceeds the GPT-5-mini prompted baseline on success rate, sits within three percentage points of the stronger Gemini-3-Flash prompted baseline, reduces orchestration cost by more than an order of magnitude (\$0.18 to \$0.004 per task against GPT-5-mini, roughly 45$\times$ cheaper; roughly 15$\times$ cheaper than Gemini-3-Flash), and cuts total LLM calls per episode by 40 to 50 percent.

</details>


### [604] [AgentCAT: Simulating Computerized Adaptive Testing via Multi-Agent Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21832)
*Weiyuan Zhou,Haiping Ma,Xiaoshan Yu,Changqian Wang,Shangshang Yang,Xingyi Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出AgentCAT，一个基于大语言模型的多智能体模拟系统，用于构建高保真动态测试环境，解决现有CAT研究受限于静态离线数据和孤立组件优化的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有CAT研究受限于静态离线数据和孤立组件优化，研究者将动态评估过程退化为静态序列预测，且只关注选题或诊断等孤立视角，忽视了CAT的整体交互过程。

Method: AgentCAT包含三个模块：(1) 具有记忆检索和思维链推理的考生智能体，基于认知画像模拟作答；(2) 选题智能体，使用从粗到细的分桶和知识图谱探索来平衡局部难度和全局覆盖；(3) 监督智能体，使用双重审核和鲁棒更新确保收敛性和有效性。

Result: 在两个真实数据集上的三个维度（宏观能力收敛、微观交互逻辑、数据稀疏鲁棒性）评估中，AgentCAT实现了有效的能力估计，其选题策略平衡了难度适应和教学连贯性，符合人类教学直觉。

Conclusion: AgentCAT通过多智能体模拟成功构建了高保真动态测试基准环境，克服了静态数据和孤立优化的局限性，为未来CAT研究提供了新的框架和方向。

Abstract: Computerized Adaptive Testing (CAT), as a key technology for personalized education, aims to accurately assess examinee proficiency by retrieving exercises dynamically matching current ability estimates. However, existing CAT research is constrained by limitations of static offline data and isolated component optimization. Restricted by partial labels in offline logs, researchers degrade the dynamic assessment process into static sequence prediction. Current research focuses on isolated perspectives, e.g., selection or diagnosis, neglecting the overall CAT interaction process. To address this, we propose AgentCAT, a Large Language Model-based multi-agent simulation system, to construct a high-fidelity benchmarking environment for dynamic testing. This framework comprises three modules: (1) The examinee agent with memory retrieval and Chain-of-Thought reasoning simulates responses based on cognitive profiles; (2) The selection agent uses coarse-to-fine bucketing and knowledge graph exploration to balance local difficulty and global coverage; (3) The supervisor uses dual-auditing and robust update to ensure convergence and validity. To validate the framework, we evaluated on two real-world datasets across three dimensions: macro-level ability convergence, micro-level interaction logic, and data sparsity resilience. Results show AgentCAT achieves effective ability estimation, and its selection strategy balances difficulty adaptation and instructional coherence, aligning with human pedagogical intuition.

</details>


### [605] [Measuring What Persists: Conditioning Mechanisms and a Geometric Framework for AI Agent Identity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21843)
*Andrew Tanner*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 论文提出用√JSD度量空间和丰富范畴论中的幅度同调来量化AI agent的身份结构，发现身份规范会创造两种行为机制（身份真空和安全盆地），但实验表明所谓的“身份漂移”更多是重复填充伪影而非真正的上下文长度漂移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法只能在AI agent身份定性退化后才能检测到漂移，缺乏早期量化检测手段。

Method: 基于√JSD度量空间和丰富范畴论中的幅度同调构建几何框架，将身份视为非测地结构，漂移视为向测地线的松弛过程。

Result: 发现两种机制结构：身份真空簇（身份规范填补行为空白）和安全盆地簇（身份规范取代训练后吸引子）。等边探针基线显示身份规范创造了55个独特响应模式（基础模型仅1个）。但漂移实验发现所谓的幅度下降实际是重复填充伪影，多样性填充下150K token内无变形。

Conclusion: 幅度同构框架的诊断潜力（各向异性收缩、结构坍塌）在理论上成立，但缺乏实证验证；核心发现是身份漂移现象可能被伪影污染，需重新审视。

Abstract: AI agents in long-context applications drift from their specified identity. Current methods detect this only after qualitative degradation is visible. We present a geometric framework for measuring identity structure using $\sqrt{\mathrm{JSD}}$ metric spaces and magnitude homology from enriched category theory, where identity is non-geodesic structure and drift is its relaxation toward the geodesic.
  Validated on a persistent AI agent, the framework's strongest empirical finding is a two-mechanism conditioning structure: cross-condition distances reveal an identity-vacuum cluster where the identity specification fills a behavioral void, and a safety-basin cluster where it displaces from post-training attractors. An equilateral probe baseline confirms that the identity specification creates measurable behavioral richness (55 unique response patterns vs. 1 for the base model) at maximum probe separation. A first-order perturbation theory for equilateral configurations predicts magnitude changes from perimeter changes alone, with shape perturbations first-order cancelled by the $S_n$ symmetry; the formula is self-consistent at the observed perturbation amplitudes.
  A drift experiment measuring magnitude decrease under context pressure was subsequently found to reflect repetitive-padding artifacts rather than genuine context-length drift; diverse padding produces no measurable deformation through 150K tokens. The magnitude homology framework's full diagnostic promise -- detecting anisotropic contraction and structural collapse via homological simplification -- is architecturally grounded in the perturbation theory and selection rules but remains empirically unconfirmed.

</details>


### [606] [ForEx: A Formal Verification Framework for Explainable Reasoning in Logical Fallacy Detection and Annotation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21867)
*Pei-Cing Huang,Chienyu Liu,Chan Hsu,Ci-Siang Chen,Pei-Ju Lee,Yihuang Kang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出ForEx框架，将LLM在逻辑谬误检测中的解释翻译为Lean4代码进行形式化验证，发现90%以上的解释可形式化推导，但与人类标注的一致性仅约20%，揭示了形式可推导性与标签一致性之间的系统性差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM逻辑谬误检测评估仅关注预测标签正确性，未检验模型的推理过程是否支持其预测结论，缺乏对推理链条的形式化验证手段。

Method: 提出ForEx框架，将LLM生成的解释翻译为Lean4代码进行形式化验证；引入LLM参数验证矩阵（LLM Argument Verification Matrix），将标签一致性与形式化验证状态分离分析。

Result: 在LOGIC-Climate数据集上，超过90%的LLM输出可翻译为能通过形式化验证的推理链，但与人类标注的一致性仅约20%。

Conclusion: 形式可推导性与标签一致性之间存在系统性差距，这是传统基于预测指标的评估无法揭示的；ForEx将LLM评估从标签正确性拓展到机器可检验的形式化推理链条分析。

Abstract: Current evaluations of Large Language Models (LLMs) on logical fallacy detection focus on predicted labels, but do not establish whether those labels are supported by the reasoning the models provide. We propose ForEx (Formal Verification for Explainable Reasoning), a framework that translates LLM-generated explanations into Lean4 and verifies whether the translated rationale is derivable under encoded premises, not the logical validity of the original natural language argument. To distinguish prediction outcomes from the formal status of the supporting reasoning, we introduce the LLM Argument Verification Matrix, which separates label consistency from formal verification status. Experiments on LOGIC-Climate show that over 90% of LLM outputs can be translated into formal reasoning chains that pass verification, while agreement with human annotations remains around 20%. These results expose a systematic gap between formal derivability and label agreement, a distinction invisible to prediction-based metrics. ForEx moves LLM evaluation beyond label correctness toward machine-checkable analysis of formalized reasoning chains.

</details>


### [607] [Learning the ARTS of Search for Automated Discovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21891)
*Gurusha Juneja,Arnav Kumar Jain,Deepak Nathani,William Yang Wang,Xin Eric Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出ARTS框架，用推理语言模型引导科学发现的搜索过程，通过检查执行日志区分假说错误与实现错误，利用测试时训练解决上下文窗口限制，在22个任务上优于现有方法，且4B小模型通过测试时训练可媲美闭源前沿模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有科学发现方法（如MCTS）将假说的价值与实验执行质量混为一谈，导致有前景但初步执行的假说被排名在平庸但执行精细的假说之下；同时搜索日志超出上下文窗口导致历史被剪枝，丢失重要信息。

Method: ARTS使用推理语言模型作为智能体，检查历史执行日志，诊断失败源于实现错误还是假说错误，据此选择下一步要构建的假说；并通过测试时训练将搜索树知识注入模型权重，缓解长上下文问题。

Result: 在MLGym和MLEBench的22个任务上，ARTS相对提升超过15.3%；Qwen3-4B模型通过测试时训练可匹配Gemini-3 Pro和GPT o3-reasoning，推理成本降低5倍；在部分可观测RL任务中，测试时训练的4B模型超越了使用o3的ARTS，重新发现了被启发式方法剪枝的人类最优循环记忆方案。

Conclusion: ARTS通过智能体推理与测试时训练有效改进了科学发现搜索的效率与效果，小模型通过知识注入可匹敌大模型，并且能发现启发式方法遗漏的关键解。

Abstract: Scientific discovery can be formulated as an iterative search process over the space of hypotheses and experiments. Contemporary methods navigate this space using heuristics such as MCTS. These algorithms conflate the merit of a hypothesis with the quality of its experimental execution. A promising hypothesis with preliminary execution is therefore ranked below a modest hypothesis whose execution is refined. Moreover, prior methods prune the search logs as the search progresses because the accumulated history outgrows the context window. We propose Agentic Reasoning for Tree Search (ARTS), where we deploy a reasoning language model to navigate this space. The model inspects prior execution logs, diagnoses whether earlier failures arose from faulty implementations or bad hypotheses, and selects the hypothesis to build on next. To mitigate challenges with context length, ARTS uses test-time training to instill the knowledge of search tree in the model weights. Across 22 tasks from MLGym and MLEBench, we show that ARTS outperforms leading algorithms, with over 15.3% relative improvement in the normalized score. With test-time training we show that a Qwen3-4B agent can match performance with closed-source frontier models like Gemini-3 Pro and GPT o3-reasoning with upto 5x lower inference cost. We further observe that on partially observable RL tasks, the test-time trained Qwen3-4B scientist surpasses ARTS with the o3 scientist by rediscovering the human-best recurrent-memory solution that heuristic methods prune away.

</details>


### [608] [REBA: A Revealed Belief Automaton Framework for Online Planning in Continuous POMDPs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21971)
*Xiangwei Chen,Lingling Fang,Andreas Holzinger,Liming Chen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出REBA框架，通过在线认证"揭示事件"生成信念自动机，无需预定义离散抽象，支持ω-正则规范的连续POMDP在线规划，在巡逻和导航任务中SOTA提升17%-47%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法要么在信念空间直接搜索（缺乏符号记忆处理长时逻辑进展），要么依赖预定义离散抽象（难以从带噪在线信念中可靠认证），无法有效从连续观测中获取可靠的符号化状态。

Method: 提出REBA框架：1) 通过信息论门动态分析连续信念空间，发现可靠锚点；2) 增量拓扑自适应机制在认证锚点上构建在线有限信念自动机；3) 结合ω-正则规范支持形式化奇偶策略综合，引导MCTS在线搜索。

Result: 在巡逻和导航场景中，REBA匹配或超越所有基线方法，主要指标提升17.0%至47.4%。

Conclusion: REBA将全局信念空间离散化的研究范式转变为在线认证揭示事件的新思路，有效解决了连续POMDP中ω-正则规范在线规划的核心挑战。

Abstract: Online planning in continuous partially observable Markov decision processes (POMDPs) using $ω$-regular specifications requires handling continuous belief dynamics within the finite symbolic memory in order to track temporal progress. Existing methods based on either direct search in belief space or predefined discrete abstractions suffer from drawbacks, e.g., lack of symbolic memory for long-horizon logical progress or difficult to certify from noisy online beliefs. As such, obtaining reliable symbolic states online from continuous observations remains a challenge. To address this issue, we introduce the Revealed Belief Automaton (REBA), an event-driven framework that advances the research from global belief-space discretization to a fundamental new way of thinking, namely online certification of revelation events. Specifically, we propose an online revelation method that, through information-theoretic gates, can dynamically analyse and establish belief abstraction from the continuous belief space by discovering reliable anchors among noisy beliefs. We then develop an incremental topology adaptation mechanism over the certified anchors to realise the online finite Belief Automaton. By combining with the $ω$-regular specification, REBA is able to support formal parity policy synthesis without a predefined discrete abstraction, which in turn can guide the Monte Carlo Tree Search process to perform online search beyond its local horizon. In addition, we design an error decomposition analysis which can assess the effectiveness and reliability of this discrete guidance for the underlying continuous POMDP. Empirical evaluations in patrolling and navigation scenarios show that REBA matches or exceeds all evaluated baselines, with primary metric gains of +17.0\% to +47.4\% over state-of-the-art approaches.

</details>


### [609] [Human vs Machine Mathematical Difficulty on Project Euler: An Experimental Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21972)
*David Holmes,Johannes Schmitt*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本研究分析了前沿AI系统在Project Euler数学问题上的表现，发现机器求解时间与人类难度呈幂律关系且指数b<1，表明机器比人类更擅长应对困难问题；同时成功概率随人类难度呈指数衰减，最强模型在最快人类基准上的50%任务长度达到约2.5-4.3小时，且SOTA每约75天翻倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 检验Timothy Gowers提出的机器求解时间与人类难度之间是否存在幂律关系，以及机器是否在困难问题上表现更差（即b>1），并探究AI系统成功概率随问题难度的变化规律。

Method: 基于MathArena基准中的3840次尝试（覆盖50个问题、26个模型配置），使用Project Euler官方人类解题时间作为难度度量。拟合幂律关系t_machine = a·t_human^b；使用指数衰减模型p_success = e^{c·t_human}并通过分箱聚合验证；采用METR方法拟合逻辑斯蒂成功曲线提取50%任务长度horizon h_{50}。

Result: 25个可拟合模型中20个的b<1（包括最强基础模型），反驳了机器在困难问题上表现更差的预测。指数衰减模型获得中等支持（中位数R²=0.92）。最强配置在最快人类基准上的h_{50}约2.5-4.3小时，SOTA h_{50}每约75天翻倍。

Conclusion: 机器在困难数学问题上的扩展性优于人类预期，AI能力仍在快速增长（h_{50}每75天翻倍），但对成功概率的建模仍需更精细的方法。

Abstract: We study how the effort and success probability of frontier AI systems scale with human difficulty on problems from Project Euler, an online platform of computational mathematics problems. Our dataset, from the MathArena benchmark, consists of 3840 attempts across 50 problems and 26 model configurations, with problem difficulty measured by the site's public human solve times. Motivated by a proposal of Timothy Gowers, we test a power-law relation $t_{\text{machine}} = a \cdot t_{\text{human}}^b$ between generated-token cost per successful answer and human time, and find $b < 1$ for 20 of the 25 models with usable fits, including the strongest base models; this operationalization therefore does not support an earlier prediction that machines scale worse than humans with difficulty. We also investigate whether success probability on the tested problems can be modeled by a simple exponential decay $p_{\text{success}} = e^{c t_{\text{human}}}$, predicting a linear relation between $\log p_{\text{success}}$ and $t_{\text{human}}$. Using a binning approach for data aggregation we find moderate empirical support (median bin-level $R^2 = 0.92$ across the 22 best-covered configurations) for this model. Following METR, we also fit logistic success curves and extract 50\% task-length horizons $h_{50}$; the strongest configurations in our 20 April 2026 snapshot reach roughly $2.5$--$4.3$ hours on our fastest-five human baseline, with a log-linear fit through the state-of-the-art frontier giving a descriptive doubling time of about $75$~days for the SOTA $h_{50}$.

</details>


### [610] [IRumAI: Reinforcement Learning for Indian Rummy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21975)
*Vignesh Mohan*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 首个基于强化学习的印度拉米纸牌游戏智能体IRumAI，采用PPO算法、牌型感知编码、废牌奖励塑造和双分支卷积架构，仅通过弱启发式对手训练即可击败最强搜索基线，速度提升7000倍以上，并能隐式建模对手隐藏手牌。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 印度拉米纸牌游戏拥有庞大玩家群体和复杂的隐藏信息动态，但现有方法依赖组合搜索，虽战术强大但推理速度慢，缺乏强化学习方面的探索。

Method: 集成PPO算法、牌型感知观测编码、废牌驱动的奖励塑造、双分支卷积架构；通过行为克隆进行热启动初始化，随后仅与弱启发式策略进行RL训练。

Result: 击败整个基线层级，包括对最强搜索对手取得53.9%胜率；每动作仅需0.33毫秒，比现有最优启发式方法快7000倍以上；消融实验验证了架构选择的有效性；线性探针揭示网络能从公开交互中隐式建模对手隐藏手牌。

Conclusion: IRumAI证明了在隐藏信息纸牌游戏中，强化学习可以完全绕过显式搜索，在极低推理延迟下达到超越搜索方法的性能，为复杂不完全信息博弈提供了新范式。

Abstract: Despite its massive player base and complex hidden-information dynamics, Indian Rummy has received no reinforcement learning attention. Existing agents rely on combinatorial search, which is tactically strong but slow at inference. We present IRumAI, the first RL agent for the domain. IRumAI integrates Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO), meld-aware observation encoding, deadwood-driven reward shaping, and a dual-branch convolutional architecture. IRumAI is RL-trained solely against weak heuristics, after a one-time behaviour-cloning warm-start on stronger demonstration data. It generalises to defeat the entire baseline hierarchy, including a 53.9% win rate against the strongest search-based opponent unseen during RL training. Bypassing explicit search, IRumAI requires just 0.33 ms per action, which is over 7,000x faster than the state-of-the-art heuristic. Ablations validate our architectural choices, and linear probing reveals that the network implicitly models the opponent's hidden hand from public interactions.

</details>


### [611] [Attractor Domain Theory: A Mathematical Framework for Cardiovascular Attractor Analysis with Wearable Photoplethysmography (PPG) Validation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22039)
*Timothy Oladunni,Farouk Ganiyu Adewumi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出吸引子域理论(ADT)，将心脏吸引子的重构信息分为几何域(G)、遍历域(S)和变分域(V)三个互不冗余的域，并证明三域在数学上的必要充分性。在176,742个PPG片段上验证了几何域的伪影拒绝能力，AUC=0.757，NPV=0.966。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 过去三十年非线性心脏动力学研究提取了各种吸引子特征（李雅普诺夫指数、递归统计量、样本熵等），但缺乏一个原理性的框架来解释哪些吸引子属性对应哪些心血管量，导致特征选择沦为搜索问题，阴性结果也无法解释。

Method: 基于Takens嵌入定理，提出吸引子域理论(ADT)，将重构吸引子的信息严格划分为三个互不冗余的域：几何域G（延迟嵌入，原生能力：伪影拒绝）、遍历域S（渐近统计不变量，原生能力：稳定性估计）、变分域V（有限时间李雅普诺夫指数场，原生能力：血流动力学推断）。并证明了域充分性定理（吸引子信息的Parseval类比）。

Result: 在176,742个PPG片段上（来自四个数据集），通过SCSI框架验证几何域，AUC=0.757 [0.686-0.828]，NPV=0.966。纠正三个系统性评估伪影后净通胀+0.179。消融实验确认C_NL是几何域的主导成分（ΔAUC=-0.413），五个成分间存在域内冗余。

Conclusion: ADT为非线性心脏动力学提供了统一的理论框架，明确了不同吸引子特征的功能分工，有助于指导特征选择和提高结果可解释性。几何域在伪影拒绝任务上表现良好，但三域各自的完整能力尚需进一步验证。

Abstract: The cardiovascular system evolves along a bounded trajectory in physiological state space that converges to a compact geometric object: the cardiac attractor. A wearable photoplethysmograph (PPG) or electrocardiograph (ECG) observes a one-dimensional projection of this attractor; by Takens' embedding theorem, delay coordinates reconstruct its full geometry. Three decades of nonlinear cardiac dynamics have extracted Lyapunov exponents, recurrence statistics, and sample entropy from reconstructed attractors, yet no principled account exists of which attractor properties capture which cardiovascular quantities, or why, leaving feature selection as a search problem and negative results uninterpretable. We introduce Attractor Domain Theory (ADT), which proves that the reconstructed attractor's information partitions into three mutually non-redundant domains: the Geometry Domain G (delay embedding; native capability: artifact rejection), the Ergodic Domain S (asymptotic statistical invariants; native capability: stability estimation), and the Variational Domain V (finite-time Lyapunov exponent field; native capability: hemodynamic inference). We prove a Domain Sufficiency Theorem (the Parseval analog for attractor information) and establish that three domains are necessary and sufficient. Geometry Domain validation via the SCSI framework across 176,742 PPG segments from four datasets yields AUC = 0.757 [0.686-0.828] and NPV = 0.966 after correcting three systematic evaluation artifacts (+0.179 net inflation). Ablation confirms C_NL as the dominant Geometry Domain component (Delta AUC = -0.413) and intra-domain redundancy across five components.

</details>


### [612] [When Does a Video-Language Model Stop Watching? Reward Strength Controls the Formation and Reversal of Visual Shortcuts in Multimodal RLVR](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22043)
*Zekun Xu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了视觉语言大模型在多模态强化学习（RLVR）中出现的"视觉捷径"现象——模型忽视视频输入而利用语言先验——通过引入接地惩罚强度λ作为控制旋钮，揭示了捷径的形成、逆转与干预窗口三个关键动力学特征：陡峭的突变 onset、滞后性的剂量-反应不对称性、以及关键干预窗口的存在。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究虽已记录多模态RLVR中视觉捷径的存在，但对其如何形成、能否被逆转、以及何时干预仍有效等问题尚未解答，亟需系统刻画该失效模式的动力学机制。

Method: 以接地惩罚强度λ为控制变量，沿训练时间轴系统刻画视觉捷径的形成-逆转动力学，在留出的分布外诊断集上进行评估。

Result: 发现了三个关键现象：(i) 捷径在狭窄的优化步数窗口内突然涌现，且跨随机种子稳健；(ii) 捷径随λ增加呈单调抑制，中等λ下先形成后逆转，呈现滞后性不对称；(iii) 惩罚在onset前施加可阻止捷径形成，但在固化后效果显著减弱。

Conclusion: 视觉捷径并非二元缺陷，而是一个可控、时间依赖且不对称的过程，对多模态RLVR中正则化的时机与强度有直接指导意义。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) is increasingly applied to large vision-language models (LVLMs), yet outcome-only optimization can drive a model to stop attending to the video and instead exploit linguistic priors -- a failure we call a visual shortcut. While the existence of such perception bypass is by now documented, how it forms, whether it can be undone, and when intervention still helps remain open. We treat the strength of a grounding penalty, lambda, as a control knob and characterize the formation-reversal dynamics of visual shortcuts along the training time axis. On a held-out, out-of-distribution diagnostic set, we find: (i) a sharp onset -- shortcut reliance emerges abruptly over a narrow window of optimization steps and is robust across random seeds; (ii) a monotone dose-response -- increasing lambda progressively suppresses the shortcut, and at an intermediate dose the trajectory first forms and then reverses the shortcut, exposing a hysteresis-like asymmetry between acquiring and removing it; and (iii) a critical intervention window -- applying the penalty before onset arrests shortcut formation, whereas the same penalty applied after consolidation is markedly less effective. Together these results recast visual-shortcut collapse not as a binary defect but as a controllable, time-dependent, and asymmetric process, with direct implications for when and how strongly to regularize multimodal RLVR.

</details>


### [613] [Can Reasoning Models Detect Changes to their Chains of Thought?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22085)
*Sathvik Napa,Utkarsh Singh,Chengyuan Xue,Miriam Wanner,William Walden*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 研究推理模型能否检测到其思维链被篡改，发现模型检测能力很弱，无法识别修改类型，且对自身和他人思维链的检测能力相近。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 编辑模型的思维链有多种应用场景（如预填充更强模型的推理、移除不安全步骤），但这些干预的成功与否取决于模型是否无法察觉被篡改，否则可能改变行为。因此需要探究推理模型能否检测到这种干预。

Method: 在多种条件下测试推理模型检测思维链篡改的能力：推理过程中和之后、预填充自身或他人思维链等情景。

Result: (i) 模型检测准确率非常低；(ii) 模型难以识别思维链被修改的方式；(iii) 模型检测自身与他人思维链修改的能力相当。

Conclusion: 推理模型对思维链篡改的检测能力很有限，这为编辑模型思维链的干预方法提供了可行性基础。

Abstract: There are many reasons one may want to edit a model's chain of thought (CoT) -- e.g., to prefill it with reasoning from a stronger model or to remove steps that may yield unsafe outputs. The success of these interventions plausibly depends on a model's inability to notice them, as the model may alter its behavior if it suspects tampering. In this work, we study whether recent reasoning models are able to detect such interventions on their CoTs under a variety of conditions: both during reasoning and after it, and when prefilled both with their own CoTs and with those of other models. Broadly, we find that (i) models exhibit only very modest detection accuracy; (ii) models struggle to identify *how* their CoT was modified; and (iii) models are about as good at detecting changes to their own CoTs as to those of other models.

</details>


### [614] [Geometry-Aware Online Scheduling for LLM Serving: From Theoretical Bound to System Practice](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22327)
*Li Kong,Qi Qi,Yinyu Ye,Zijie Zhou*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出几何感知在线调度算法（Smallest Volume First及其高效变体1-bit SVF），解决LLM推理中KV缓存动态内存调度问题，将最坏情况竞争比从48收紧至5，并在vLLM中实现即插即用集成，显著降低平均和尾部延迟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有推理系统依赖传统时间调度启发式（如SJF），未捕捉LLM推理中KV缓存的2D时空几何增长特性，导致内存调度性能瓶颈。

Method: 提出Smallest Volume First (SVF)算法及其高效变体1-bit SVF，通过几何感知在线调度解决KV缓存内存管理问题；利用新颖证明方法将竞争比从48收紧至5；作为即插即用层集成到vLLM中。

Result: 理论上：竞争比CR ≤ 48 → CR ≤ 5（已知输出长度情况）；实验中：SVF显著降低平均与尾部延迟，1-bit SVF（仅需1比特信息）实现有竞争力的吞吐量和延迟。

Conclusion: 该工作建立了理论上严谨、实证上有效的LLM内存约束调度方法，开源代码促进后续研究。

Abstract: The explosive demand for interactive Large Language Model serving has highlighted the management of the Key-Value cache's dynamic memory footprint as a critical area for performance optimization in inference engines. Modern inference systems overwhelmingly rely on time-centric scheduling heuristics, such as Shortest Job First. However, their theoretical optimality is rooted in traditional schedule modeling, failing to capture the highly dynamic, 2D spatio-temporal geometric growth specific to LLM inference mechanisms. To resolve this, we propose the geometry-aware online scheduling by introducing the Smallest Volume First (SVF) algorithm and its highly efficient variant, 1-bit SVF. Theoretically, we provide a rigorous mathematical foundation for our approach. Utilizing a novel proof methodology, we tighten the worst-case competitive ratio ($\text{CR} \le 48 \rightarrow \text{CR} \le 5$) for SVF with known output lengths. Building upon this core breakthrough, we complete a comprehensive theoretical taxonomy analyzing our algorithms across different traffic scenarios and information availability. Practically, we seamlessly integrate our approach as a plug-and-play layer in vLLM. Extensive evaluations on Llama-3.1 models demonstrate comprehensive performance gains: SVF delivers strong reductions in both average and tail latency, while 1-bit SVF, with merely a single bit information, achieves competitive throughput and latency. This work establishes a theoretically sound and empirically proven approach for resolving memory-constrained scheduling in modern LLM deployments. To facilitate future research, our code is available at https://github.com/Aurora-Kl/Geometry-Aware-Online-Scheduling.git.

</details>


### [615] [Reference-Free Assessment of Physical Consistency in World Model-based Video Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22363)
*Yun Oh,Sukmin Yun*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种无需参考的物理一致性评估方法，结合相对与绝对评估，通过DROID-SLAM和SEA-RAFT量化视频中的物理不一致性，提升VLA模型任务成功率8%以上，并实现时空定位可视化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频生成评估方法（如Elo、FVD）存在成本高或需要真实参考的问题，且物理保真度不足导致模拟环境无法准确复现VLA模型在真实场景中的任务成功率。

Method: 提出无参考的物理一致性评估指标，结合相对评估（过滤不一致视频）与绝对评估（时空定位），利用DROID-SLAM和SEA-RAFT量化物理伪影。

Result: 经相对一致性评估过滤后的视频，VLA模型任务成功率提升8%以上，有效缩小模拟到真实的差距；绝对评估实现了物理伪影的时空定位可视化。

Conclusion: 提出的无参考评估方法能有效衡量生成视频的物理一致性，减少仿真与现实差距，并具备可解释的伪影定位能力。

Abstract: We introduce reference-free measures for evaluating the physical consistency of generated videos, combining relative and absolute approaches to assess fidelity. Although tools like WorldGym or WorldEval enable robotic simulation via video generation, physical fidelity gaps often prevent these environments from accurately reproducing real-world task success rates of VLA models. Unlike existing evaluation methods, which require costly human voting (Elo) or unavailable ground-truth references (FVD), our approach utilizes DROID-SLAM and SEA-RAFT to quantify physical inconsistencies, motivated by WorldScore. Videos filtered using our relative consistency assessment show an improvement in task success rates of over 8%, effectively narrowing the simulation-to-reality gap. Furthermore, our absolute assessment enables spatio-temporal localization, providing visualization of when and where physical artifacts occur.

</details>


### [616] [MetaPS: Adaptive Programmatic Strategy Selection for Market Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22385)
*Jiaxiang Chen,Aotian Luo,Zhouyi Zheng,Weiyi Huang,Chi Zhang,Zenglin Xu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出MetaPS框架，通过市场模拟指导智能体从程序化策略库中选择合适策略，实验表明在多种规模模型上均优于固定策略、直接决策和API基线的LLM代理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 单一市场策略无法在所有市场条件下获胜，现有LLM直接生成市场动作的方法效果不佳，需要一种可执行、可解释的自适应策略选择范式。

Method: 提出MetaPS框架：在模拟或回测市场中滚动候选策略，识别策略表现优异的状态-策略对，将其转化为监督微调数据；推理时仅根据当前市场状态选择策略程序，由选定程序生成最终动作。

Result: 在0.8B到9B参数的多模型规模上，MetaPS一致优于固定策略基线、直接决策代理和基于API提示的LLM代理；紧凑微调模型在某些设置中甚至超过更强的API模型。

Conclusion: 市场模拟可以为学习自适应、可解释、可执行的策略选择提供可扩展且有针对性的监督信号。

Abstract: No single market strategy always wins: momentum, mean reversion, risk control,and event-driven rules can each succeed or fail as market conditions change.Rather than asking large language models to directly generate market actions,we study an executable decision paradigm where an agent selects from a library of programmatic strategies, each implemented as a code module mapping market observations to actions.We propose \textbf{MetaPS}, a simulation-guided framework for adaptive programmatic strategy selection. MetaPS rolls out candidate strategies in simulated or backtested markets, identifies states where particular strategies lead to better future outcomes, and converts these state--strategy pairs into supervised fine-tuning data. During inference, the simulator is no longer queried: MetaPS observes only the current market state and candidate strategy context, selects a suitable strategy program, and the selected program produces the final action. Experiments on multi-stock trading and a controlled goods-exchange sandbox show that MetaPS consistently improves across model scales from 0.8B to 9B parameters. It outperforms fixed-strategy baselines, direct decision-making agents, and prompted API-based LLM agents; in several settings, compact fine-tuned models even surpass stronger API models. These results demonstrate that market simulations can provide scalable and targeted supervision for learning adaptive, interpretable, and executable strategy selection.

</details>


### [617] [PlanBench-XL: Evaluating Long-Horizon Planning of LLM Tool-Use Agents in Large-Scale Tool Ecosystems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22388)
*Jiayu Liu,Qihan Lin,Cheng Qian,Rui Wang,Emre Can Acikgoz,Xiaocheng Yang,Jiateng Liu,Zhenhailong Wang,Xiusi Chen,Heng Ji,Dilek Hakkani-Tür*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: PlanBench-XL是一个包含327个零售任务、1665个工具的交互式基准，用于评估LLM智能体在检索受限工具环境下的规划能力。实验表明，GPT-5.4在无阻塞条件下准确率51.90%，在严重阻塞条件下骤降至11.36%，揭示了大规模工具规划面临的挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准很少评估智能体在检索受限工具可见性条件下的规划能力，无法反映真实世界中需要发现相关工具、推断隐式子目标并在长时间跨度内适应动态环境的实际需求。

Method: 构建包含327个零售任务、1665个工具的大型交互式基准，设计可选的阻塞机制模拟工具缺失、失败或干扰的真实场景，要求智能体迭代检索工具、执行调用、发现中间证据并动态适应。

Result: GPT-5.4在无阻塞环境下准确率51.90%，在严重阻塞条件下仅11.36%；智能体在缺乏明确错误信号或需要更长替代工具路径时表现尤为脆弱。

Conclusion: PlanBench-XL可作为诊断智能体规划失败的有效测试平台，强调了在大型、不完美的工具环境中进行稳健自适应规划的必要性。

Abstract: LLM agents increasingly operate in large tool ecosystems, where real-world tasks require discovering relevant tools, inferring implicit sub-goals, and adapting to dynamic environments over long horizons. However, existing benchmarks rarely evaluate planning under retrieval-limited tool visibility. To address this gap, we introduce PlanBench-XL, an interactive benchmark of 327 retail tasks over 1,665 tools that tests whether agents can iteratively retrieve usable tools, invoke them to uncover intermediate evidence for subsequent calls toward the final goal. PlanBench-XL further features an optional blocking mechanism that simulates real-world unpredictability through missing, failing, or distracting tool functions, forcing agents to detect disrupted paths and adapt at runtime. Experiments on ten leading LLMs show that massive-tool planning remains challenging: while GPT-5.4 achieves 51.90% accuracy in block-free settings, it collapses to 11.36% under the most severe blocking condition. Further analysis shows that agents are especially vulnerable when failures lack explicit error signals or when recovery requires longer alternative tool-use paths. These results establish PlanBench-XL as a testbed for diagnosing agentic planning failures and highlight the need for robust adaptive planning in long-horizon tasks with large, imperfect tool environments.

</details>


### [618] [Code Isn't Memory: A Structural Codebase Index Inside a Coding Agent](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22417)
*Ishaan Bhola,Adithyan Krishnan,Sravanth Kurmala,Mukunda NS*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 在固定编码agent框架和模型下，添加结构化代码库索引能显著提升代码定位和问题解决能力，且不会增加单次运行成本，反而降低了每次解决的成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有编码agent在实现代码检索时差异巨大，但缺乏在固定框架和模型下对结构化代码索引进行严格消融实验的量化评估，尤其不清楚它是否真的能提升性能而不增加成本。

Method: 在固定编码agent框架上，控制变量进行三组对比实验：带结构化索引的框架、不带索引的框架、以及agentic-grep基线。使用Claude Opus 4.7模型，在SWE-PolyBench Verified和SWE-bench Pro两个基准上，运行3个种子，并在每次任务沙箱中进行泄漏审计。

Result: 框架内消融：索引带来显著的定位增益和统计上可分离的解决率提升，且单次运行成本无增加，每次解决成本更低。跨框架对比：索引在解决率和定位上均不逊于agentic-grep基线，且成本无增加。

Conclusion: 结构化代码索引的部署问题不在于成本过高（实际上其$/solved低于agentic grep），而在于工作负载是否包含需要结构化排序的多文件变更场景。

Abstract: Coding agents now interleave LLMs with retrieval over the working repository, and retrieval implementations vary widely across deployed harnesses. Inside a fixed coding-agent harness on a fixed model, does adding a structural codebase index actually change cost or resolve? We ran three arms (the harness with the index, the same harness without it, and an agentic-grep comparator) on SWE-PolyBench Verified and SWE-bench Pro with Claude Opus 4.7 held fixed throughout, across three seeds, inside a leak-audited per-task sandbox. The within-harness ablation produces a large localization gain and a statistically separated resolve gain, with no cost penalty per cell and lower cost per solve. The cross-harness check shows that the index does not regress against an agentic-grep baseline on resolve or localization, again at no cost penalty. We release the per-cell exclusion ledger, the leak-audit script, the localization extractor, and the results database. The deployment question for a structural codebase index is thus not whether it is too expensive to run (across seeds, the index lands at a lower $/solved than agentic grep) but whether the workload includes multi-file changes where structural ranking pays off.

</details>


### [619] [SVGym (SciVerseGym): An Environment for Reinforcement Learning and Bayesian Optimization in Crystal Discovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22425)
*Bin Cao*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: SciVerseGym 是一个兼容 Gymnasium 的晶体发现环境，将晶体设计建模为马尔可夫决策过程，支持多种原子级编辑操作和可配置评估器，为强化学习、贝叶斯优化、进化搜索和语言代理工作流提供标准化测试平台。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有闭环晶体搜索方法分散在各自为政的管道中，涉及编辑、弛豫、评分、约束和记录等环节，缺乏统一、可复现的标准化框架。

Method: 将晶体发现建模为马尔可夫决策过程，设计 Gymnasium 兼容环境，支持局部/全局原子编辑动作（元素替换、晶格扰动、原子位移、空位创建、原子插入），配置化学空间、结构池、观测方式、奖励函数，集成机器学习势函数或 ASE 计算器进行评估。

Result: 提供了一个开放、可复现、可扩展的标准化测试平台，支持强化学习、贝叶斯优化、进化搜索和语言代理等多种闭环晶体发现工作流。

Conclusion: 通过解耦代理逻辑与材料基础设施，SciVerseGym 为闭环晶体发现提供了标准化的 Gymnasium 环境，有助于推动交互式材料发现领域的开放研究与方法对比。

Abstract: Machine-learned interatomic potentials now enable efficient atomistic evaluation for interactive materials discovery, yet closed-loop crystal search methods remain fragmented across bespoke pipelines for editing, relaxation, scoring, constraints, and bookkeeping. We introduce SciVerseGym, a Gymnasium-compatible environment for sequential crystal discovery that frames crystal design as a Markov decision process. Agents observe an atomistic structure, apply chemically meaningful edits, and receive feedback from a configurable evaluator. SciVerseGym supports local and global actions, including elemental substitution, lattice perturbation, atomic displacement, vacancy creation, and atom insertion, along with configurable chemical spaces, structure pools, atomistic and graph-based observations, custom rewards, optional relaxation, and stability or phonon-related diagnostics. Each step applies an edit, evaluates the candidate using a machine-learned interatomic potential or any ASE-compatible calculator, and returns the standard (obs, reward, terminated, truncated, info) tuple. By decoupling agent logic from materials infrastructure, SciVerseGym provides an open, reproducible, and extensible testbed for reinforcement learning, Bayesian optimization, evolutionary search, and language-agent workflows in closed-loop crystal discovery. Code is available at: https://github.com/Bin-Cao/SciVerseGym.

</details>


### [620] [Efficient Multimodal Clinical Question Answering for Pulmonary Embolism Risk Assessment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22442)
*Xiangyuan Xue,Yang Yu,Yan Gao,Junyan Wang,Bin Chen,Lingyan Ruan,Ting Dang,Hong Jia*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文构建了基于多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）的肺栓塞（PE）诊断与预后评估基准，利用包含23,248例CTPA影像和EHR数据的INSPECT数据集，在零样本和少样本提示下评估了多种紧凑型MLLMs的性能。实验表明，结合CTPA+EHR输入时Gemma4系列模型表现最佳，且诊断任务性能优于预后任务（尤其是再入院预测），显示出紧凑型多模态模型在PE早期风险检测中的潜力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 肺栓塞（PE）的临床管理需要及时诊断和可靠的风险评估，而现有的医学影像和EHR数据通常分开处理，缺乏统一的多模态评估基准。作者希望利用紧凑型多模态大语言模型同时处理CTPA影像和EHR文本数据，以提升PE诊断和预后预测的准确性和效率。

Method: 基于INSPECT数据集（19,402名患者的23,248项CTPA检查），设计了8项诊断和预后任务，将其转化为结构化临床问答问题。采用三种输入设置：CTPA-Only、EHR-Only、CTPA+EHR，在零样本和少样本提示下评估了多种紧凑型MLLMs（如Gemma4系列）的性能。

Result: Gemma4 E4B和E2B在EHR可用时表现更强，尤其是在CTPA+EHR联合输入设置下。任务层面分析显示，PE诊断任务性能高于预后任务（如再入院预测），整体表明紧凑型多模态模型在PE早期风险检测中具有较大潜力。

Conclusion: 紧凑型多模态大语言模型能够有效融合CTPA影像和EHR数据，在PE诊断和预后评估中展现出良好性能，尤其在早期风险检测方面具有应用前景。未来可进一步优化模型对预后任务的预测能力。

Abstract: Pulmonary embolism (PE) is a high risk cardiopulmonary condition whose management requires both timely diagnosis and reliable assessment of future clinical risk. Because PE care routinely combines computed tomography pulmonary angiography (CTPA), radiology interpretation, and longitudinal electronic health record (EHR) evidence, it provides a clinically meaningful setting for evaluating compact multimodal language models. In this work, we build a benchmark using efficient multimodal large language models (MLLMs) on INSPECT, a multimodal PE dataset containing 23,248 CTPA studies from 19,402 patients. We formulate eight diagnostic and prognostic tasks as structured clinical question answering problems and evaluate on typical efficient MLLMs under CTPA-Only, EHR-Only, and CTPA+EHR settings with zero-shot and few-shot prompting. Results show that Gemma4 E4B and Gemma4 E2B perform more strongly when EHR evidence is available, especially under CTPA+EHR input.
