Abstract: The rapid proliferation of Internet of Medical Things (IoMT) devices introduces critical cybersecurity vulnerabilities in healthcare environments where resource-constrained medical devices operate under strict latency requirements and stringent data-privacy regulations. To address these challenges, this paper presents the Lightweight Digital Twin and Federated Reinforcement Learning (LDT-FRL) framework, a privacy-preserving defense architecture integrating four complementary mechanisms: a Temporal Attention Encoder (TAE) built on a GRU backbone with learned temporal self-attention for flow-level threat classification; lightweight LSTM-based Digital Twins trained on normal-class traffic to generate per-device anomaly scores that gate the TAE classifier through a learned sigmoid coupling; a Federated Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) agent selecting among ALLOW, ISOLATE, and HONEYPOT_REDIRECT actions based on a seven-dimensional state; and an intelligent honeypot layer that converts redirected suspicious traffic into actionable threat intelligence. A federated aggregation strategy employing EMA-smoothed per-client validation losses as inverse-weighted FedAvg coefficients stabilizes global model updates under non-IID client distributions. Evaluated on CICDDoS 2019 and TON-IoT benchmarks, LDT-FRL achieves 99.66% and 99.95% test accuracy respectively, with macro-F1 scores of 0.9913 and 0.9995, converging 81% faster than the DTFL-CD baseline while attaining perfect F1=1.000 on the severely imbalanced MITM class. Explainability analysis via SHAP, LIME, Grad-CAM, and counterfactual methods confirms that the TAE focuses on semantically meaningful flow features, providing interpretable evidence for each defense decision.

</details>


### [764] [Universal Encoders for Modular Relational Deep Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21434)
*Jakub Peleška,Gustav Šír*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出通用行编码器（Universal Row Encoder），通过解耦行编码与图消息传递，结合元数据与全局统计信息，实现跨数据库的知识迁移，在RelBench基准上提升学习效率与性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有关系型深度学习模型要么针对特定模式需从头训练，要么采用将特征编码与图消息传递纠缠在一起的单体架构，导致泛化能力不足。作者希望建立更具通用性的基础关系模型。

Method: 提出模块化方法，将行编码与图消息传递解耦。设计基于Transformer的通用行编码器，融合原始单元格数据、列语义、表名及全局分布统计信息，通过行内自注意力机制生成表宽不变的嵌入表示，作为下游图架构的灵活后端。

Result: 在RelBench基准上，预训练的编码器增强了跨数据库知识迁移，同时改善了学习收敛速度和内存占用。

Conclusion: 解耦行编码与图消息传递是构建基础关系模型的有效路径，通用行编码器通过引入元数据和全局统计信息，显著提升了模型的泛化能力和效率。

Abstract: Relational Deep Learning (RDL) models multi-tabular databases as temporal heterogeneous graphs for end-to-end representation learning. While RDL is evolving rapidly, existing approaches face significant generalization obstacles. They are either schema-specific, requiring training from scratch for every new database, or they rely on monolithic architectures that entangle feature encoding with graph message-passing. Analyzing these limitations, we establish four core pillars for building foundational relational models: semantic granularity, structural topology, temporal causality, and unified optimization.
  Addressing these pillars, we propose a modular approach that decouples row encoding from graph message-passing. We introduce the Universal Row Encoder, a transformer-based module that integrates raw cell data with schema metadata$-$including column semantics, table names, and global distribution statistics$-$to produce table-width invariant row embeddings. By explicitly feeding global statistics to an intra-row self-attention mechanism, the encoder natively contextualizes unseen features and handles sparse data. Serving as a flexible "backend" for any downstream graph architecture, our pretrained encoder enhances cross-database knowledge transfer on the established RelBench benchmarks while improving learning convergence and memory footprint.

</details>


### [765] [Fusing Backdoors, Machine Learning, and Optimization for Large-Scale Parametric Mixed-Integer Programs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21440)
*El Mehdi Er Raqabi,Pascal Van Hentenryck*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出BIPC框架，通过识别并学习优化问题中的"后门"变量（驱动计算复杂度的变量子集），结合监督学习预测其取值，从而大幅加速大规模混合整数问题的求解，在保持解质量的前提下显著缩短求解时间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模优化问题在结构固定但参数频繁变化（如电力系统、交通物流中的扰动）时被重复求解，导致巨大计算开销。现有方法缺乏有效利用问题结构相似性来加速求解的手段。

Method: 提出三阶段BIPC框架：Phase I通过识别过程发现问题分布中的后门变量；Phase II使用监督学习预测后门变量的值（有界变量预测具体值，宽域变量预测区间）；Phase III求解缩减后的优化问题，必要时通过校正步骤恢复可行性和最优性保证。

Result: 在真实大规模问题上实验表明，该方法在仅损失少量解质量的情况下，显著降低了求解时间，能够快速响应参数扰动（如意外事件、需求波动等）并提供高质量可行解。

Conclusion: BIPC框架为将机器学习集成到现有优化管线中提供了实用方案，使组织在面对频繁参数变化时能够高效求解大规模优化问题，兼具速度与解质量。

Abstract: Large-scale optimization problems are often solved repeatedly under similar structural conditions, leading to substantial computational overhead. This occurs in applications such as power systems, transportation, and supply chain networks, where the underlying structure is fixed while parameters frequently vary under perturbations.
  This paper proposes a Learning to Optimize (LTO) framework that accelerates the solution of large-scale general mixed-integer problems by leveraging the concept of a backdoor, i.e., a subset of variables that drive most of the computational complexity. The proposed BIPC framework consists of three phases. Phase I is an identification procedure that discovers a backdoor for a set of instances in the distribution. Phase II uses supervised learning to develop machine learning models that, given an instance, predict values for bounded-domain backdoor variables and intervals for wide-domain backdoor variables. These predictions define a reduced optimization problem where the predictions constrain the backdoor variables, while the other variables remain free. Phase III optimizes this reduced problem and, if necessary, applies a correction step to restore feasibility or the optimality guarantees.
  Experiments on real-world, large-scale problems show substantial reductions in solution time with only a limited loss in solution quality. The framework enables organizations to solve large-scale optimization problems efficiently in the presence of frequent perturbations, such as unexpected events, demand fluctuations, or operational changes. Because these changes affect parameters rather than the problem structure, BIPC can quickly provide high-quality, feasible solutions, offering a practical approach to integrating machine learning into existing optimization pipelines.

</details>


### [766] [Fast-TurboQuant: A Multiplier-Free Online Vector Quantization Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21448)
*Pedro M. R. Pereira,Felipe A. P. de Figueiredo,Rausley A. A. de Souza*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Fast-TurboQuant提出一种无乘法器的投影架构，用快速Johnson-Lindenstrauss变换替代传统密集随机旋转矩阵，实现1-bit量化，在DBpedia数据集上获得19.7倍加速，同时降低均方误差并提升Recall@10。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模语言模型中KV缓存和检索增强生成系统的内存带宽成为瓶颈，1-bit量化虽能缓解，但现有TurboQuant方法依赖密集随机旋转矩阵，需要大量浮点乘法运算，难以部署在资源受限的边缘设备上。

Method: 提出Fast-TurboQuant，用结构化快速Johnson-Lindenstrauss变换替代密集矩阵。具体包括：Rademacher相位反转 + 快速Walsh-Hadamard变换（FWHT），利用次高斯集中性满足标量Lloyd-Max量化的前提条件，将算术复杂度降低为仅加法操作。

Result: 在DBpedia OpenAI-3 Large嵌入上，顺序执行加速19.7倍；FWHT的零填充维度扩展降低了均方误差，并提升了Recall@10。

Conclusion: Fast-TurboQuant通过消除乘法器实现高效1-bit量化，适合边缘部署，且性能不降反升，证明了结构化变换在量化中的有效性。

Abstract: As large language models scale, memory bandwidth for key-value caches and retrieval-augmented generation systems becomes a critical bottleneck. While 1-bit quantization addresses this constraint, recent TurboQuant relies on dense random rotation matrices to condition the vector distribution before quantization. This projection demands millions of floating-point multiplications per embedding, making it difficult to deploy on constrained edge silicon. We introduce Fast-TurboQuant, a multiplier-free projection architecture that replaces the dense matrix with a structured fast Johnson-Lindenstrauss transform. By applying a Rademacher phase inversion followed by a fast Walsh-Hadamard transform (FWHT), the method leverages sub-Gaussian concentration to satisfy the prerequisites of scalar Lloyd-Max quantization without Gaussian projections. This substitution reduces the arithmetic complexity to only additions, eliminating hardware multipliers. Evaluation on DBpedia OpenAI-3 Large embeddings demonstrates a 19.7 times algorithmic speedup under sequential execution. Furthermore, the dimension expansion due to the FWHT zero-padding reduces the mean squared error and improves Recall@10.

</details>


### [767] [Post-Training Speech Enhancement Language Models with Perceptual Rewards](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21458)
*Frédéric Berdoz,Luca A. Lanzendörfer,Antonis Asonitis,Roger Wattenhofer*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了基于组序列策略优化（GSPO）的后训练阶段，直接优化非可微分的感知质量指标（DNSMOS、WER、UTMOS）作为奖励信号，用于自回归语音增强语言模型，在DNS2020基准上达到SOTA，且多指标复合奖励优于单一指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 语音增强语言模型在离散音频token上训练时使用token级交叉熵损失，这与评估时使用的感知指标不匹配，存在优化目标与评估标准之间的差距。

Method: 提出后训练阶段，使用组序列策略优化（GSPO）结合多指标感知奖励（DNSMOS、WER、UTMOS），直接优化非可微分质量指标，无需学习代理模型或离线偏好对。

Result: 在UniSE和GenSE两个自回归基座模型上应用后，在DNS2020基准上取得了SOTA结果。人类评估消融实验表明，多指标复合奖励优于任何单一指标变体。

Conclusion: 多奖励优化能够避免单指标训练中出现的reward hacking问题，复合多指标奖励是更优的选择。

Abstract: Speech enhancement language models achieve strong results when trained on discrete audio tokens, but their optimization relies on token-level cross-entropy rather than the perceptual metrics used for evaluation. We introduce a post-training stage for autoregressive speech enhancement language models using Group Sequence Policy Optimization (GSPO) with multi-metric perceptual rewards. Our method directly optimizes non-differentiable quality metrics (DNSMOS, WER, and UTMOS) as reward signals, without learned surrogates or offline preference pairs. Applied to two autoregressive base models, UniSE and GenSE, our approach achieves state-of-the-art results on the DNS2020 benchmark. A human evaluation ablation further shows that the composite multi-metric reward is preferred over any single-metric variant, confirming that multi-reward optimization avoids the reward hacking observed with single-metric training.

</details>


### [768] [Deep Learning for Soil Moisture Estimation: Fusing Satellite Data with Optimally-Lagged Meteorological Features](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21475)
*Adrian Canovas-Rodriguez,Aurora González Vidal,Antonio F. Skarmeta*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出基于交叉相关函数(CCF)确定气象变量与土壤水分之间最优时间滞后(0-30天)及垂直传播滞后(0-15天)的方法，并在西班牙东南部七个农业地块验证。三种深度学习架构(CNN、LSTM、CNN-LSTM混合)在不同特征配置下评估，结果表明气象变量可提升性能，但地下深度信息最关键。CNN-LSTM混合模型取得最佳整体表现(R²=0.930, CVRMSE=8.0%)。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 半干旱农业区土壤水分估计需要融合遥感和气象信息，但需考虑土壤水分对大气强迫的延迟响应。现有方法未能显式建模这种时间延迟和垂直传播延迟，限制了估计精度。

Method: 1) 提出CCF方法确定气象变量与土壤水分间最优时间滞后(0-30天)及层间垂直滞后(0-15天)；2) 构建三种深度学习架构：逐像素CNN、逐帧LSTM、滑动窗口CNN-LSTM混合模型；3) 设计五种特征配置从仅卫星到全融合，在七个农业地块上验证。

Result: 气象变量改善性能，但地下深度信息决定所有架构表现。逐像素CNN单斑块最优(R²=0.877, RMSE=2.28)，七斑块平均R²=0.535(较基线+1.00)。CNN-LSTM混合模型整体最优(R²=0.930, CVRMSE=8.0%)。

Conclusion: 显式建模大气和垂直地下延迟可显著改善土壤水分估计，对精准农业具有重要意义。

Abstract: Accurate soil moisture estimation in semi-arid agricultural regions requires integrating remote sensing and meteorological information while accounting for the delayed response of soil moisture to atmospheric forcing. This study introduces a Cross-Correlation Function (CCF) methodology to determine optimal temporal lags (0-30 days) between meteorological variables and soil moisture, as well as inter-depth lags (0-15 days) describing vertical moisture propagation from the surface (10 cm) to deeper layers (20-50 cm). The approach was validated across seven agricultural plots in southeastern Spain. Three deep learning architectures, each targeting a distinct prediction granularity, were evaluated under five feature configurations ranging from satellite-only to full satellite-meteorology-depth fusion: a CNN for per-pixel estimation within each plot, an LSTM for frame-level (daily plot-mean) prediction, and a CNN-LSTM hybrid operating on sliding windows with pooled multi-patch training. Models were assessed on held-out data to measure genuine generalisation. Meteorological variables improved performance over the satellite-only baseline, while subsurface depth information proved decisive across all architectures. The per-pixel CNN achieved the strongest single-patch result (R^2 = 0.877, RMSE = 2.28), with a seven-patch average R^2 of 0.535, representing an improvement of +1.00 over the satellite-only baseline. The pooled CNN-LSTM hybrid obtained the highest overall performance (R^2 = 0.930, CVRMSE = 8.0%). These results demonstrate that explicitly modelling atmospheric and vertical subsurface delays substantially improves soil moisture estimation for precision agriculture.

</details>


### [769] [Robustness Cannot be Reduced to Regularization: Studying Adversarial Training Beyond the Linear Case](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21488)
*David A. R. Robin,Rafael Pinot,Yann Chevaleyre*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文证明了两层神经网络中对抗风险与简单正则化风险之间不存在形式等价性，并通过实验表明这种不可行性在更深层的架构中也存在。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 对抗训练计算成本高，线性模型中对抗风险与正则化风险存在等价性可实现高效训练，因此探究这种等价性能否扩展到非线性模型（如两层神经网络）是一个自然的问题。

Method: 通过约简方法（reduction）证明两层网络中对抗风险与简单正则化风险在理论上不可能等价；并在Wide-ResNets上进行实证验证。

Result: 严格证明了两层神经网络中不存在这种形式等价性；实验表明在更深的Wide-ResNets架构中同样存在这种不可行性。

Conclusion: 对抗风险与简单正则化风险之间的等价性仅限于线性模型，无法扩展到更复杂的神经网络架构。

Abstract: The vulnerability of ML models to adversarial examples has recently emerged as a major concern. While adversarial training is one of the most effective countermeasures to this issue, its high computational cost remains an obstacle to practical deployment. Recent progress in reducing this cost has relied, in the case of linear models, on a formal equivalence between the adversarial risk and a simpler form of regularized risk. This enabled significantly more efficient training procedures, which naturally raises the question of whether such an equivalence can be extended beyond linear models. In this work, we formally show that no such equivalence is possible for two-layer networks. Our proofs proceed via a reduction to key properties that fundamentally separate the adversarial risk from any simple regularized risk which would only exhibit a weak form of data dependence. Beyond this setting, we provide empirical evidence on Wide-ResNets indicating that the same type of impossibility persists in deeper and more expressive architectures.

</details>


### [770] [Predicting High-Risk Colorectal Polyps in African Americans Using Pre-Colonoscopy Clinical Features: Machine Learning Model Development and Temporal Validation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21492)
*Basheer Qolomany,Mrinalini Deverapall,Adeyinka Laiyemo,Zaki Sherif,Mori Yuichi,Omer Ahmed,Hassan Brim,Hassan Ashktorab*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究利用非侵入性（结肠镜前）的人口学、临床和行为特征，构建并外部验证了多种机器学习模型，用于在多元化（主要为非裔美国人）城市队列中预测高风险结直肠息肉，旨在资源有限时优化筛查优先级。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的高风险结直肠息肉风险分层依赖结肠镜或病理结果。研究者希望利用结肠镜前即可获得的非侵入性特征来提前识别高风险患者，从而在结肠镜资源有限的情况下优化临床决策（优先筛查高风险者、减少低风险者的不必要检查），并促进更公平的风险分层可及性。

Method: 基于Howard University Hospital 2015-2022年（内部验证，n=4,681）和2023-2024年（外部验证，n=1,562）的回顾性队列数据，使用人口学、生活方式和合并症等结肠镜前特征，训练并比较神经网络、随机森林、SVM、朴素贝叶斯、逻辑回归、决策树、KNN和XGBoost共8种机器学习模型。高风险息肉定义为绒毛状/管状绒毛状腺瘤、高级别异型增生、息肉≥10mm或≥3个息肉。

Result: 研究构建并外部验证了8种机器学习模型，具体性能指标需见全文，但证实了仅使用结肠镜前非侵入性特征即可对高风险息肉进行预测。

Conclusion: 仅使用结肠镜前的非侵入性特征即可有效预测高风险结直肠息肉，这有助于在资源有限的环境中优化筛查资源分配、减少低风险患者的不必要结肠镜，并可能促进更公平的风险分层。

Abstract: Risk stratification for advanced colorectal polyps typically relies on colonoscopy and/or pathology findings. However, there is growing interest in whether non-invasive features available prior to colonoscopy can help identify patients at higher risk. Such approaches may enhance clinical decision-making by prioritizing surveillance for individuals most likely to harbor high-risk polyps, when colonoscopy resources are limited while potentially reducing unnecessary procedures in lower-risk patients. Importantly, the use of non-invasive, pre-procedural information may also help promote more equitable access to risk stratification, particularly in settings where colonoscopy resources are limited or unevenly distributed. We aimed to develop and externally validate machine learning models to predict high-risk colorectal polyps using only non-invasive, pre-colonoscopy demographic, clinical, and behavioral features in a diverse, predominantly African American, urban cohort.
  We conducted a retrospective cohort study using demographic, lifestyle, and comorbidity data from patients who underwent colonoscopy at Howard University Hospital to develop and validate several machine learning models, including neural networks, random forest, support vector machines (SVM), Naive Bayes, logistic regression, decision trees, k-nearest neighbors (KNN), and XGBoost, for predicting high-risk colorectal polyps. High-risk polyps (HRP) were defined as villous or tubullovillous adenomas, high-grade dysplasia, polyps >= 10 mm in size, and/or the presence of >= 3 polyps per procedure; all other cases were classified as low-risk polyps (LRP). The dataset included 4,681 patients from 2015-2022 used for internal validation and 1,562 patients from 2023-2024 used for external validation.

</details>


### [771] [Breaking chains with trees: Deep learning with $\mathcal{O}(\log N)$ parallel time complexity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21497)
*Neeraj Mohan Sushma,Aditya Nagarsekar,Cabrel Teguemne Fokam,Robin Schiewer,Amit Kumar Pal,Anand Subramoney,David Kappel*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出层次化块局部学习（HBLL），将深度神经网络分解为层次链接的块，使用局部学习目标训练，实现O(log N)并行时间复杂度，消除了端到端反向传播的限制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 反向传播存在锁定问题（层间更新互依赖无法并行）和权重传输问题（需要对称的前向/反向通路），限制了可扩展学习。现有方法难以在消除反向传播的同时保持有效的信息传播。

Method: 将深度网络分解为层次链接的块，每个块使用基于变分原理的局部学习目标独立训练，形成层次结构实现信息传播。首次实现O(log N)并行时间复杂度。

Result: 在视觉和语言建模任务上达到竞争性性能，可扩展至循环序列架构（替代基于时间的反向传播），隐式定义不同层次路径的子网络族。

Conclusion: HBLL是首个实现O(log N)并行复杂度的训练算法，在保持性能的同时从根本上打破反向传播的串行限制，为大规模分布式训练提供新范式。

Abstract: Modern deep neural network architectures are trained via backpropagation, which requires errors to be sequentially propagated through all layers before parameters can be updated. This introduces two limitations: locking, where layer-wise updates are strictly interdependent and cannot proceed in parallel, and the weight transport problem, which requires symmetric forward and backward pathways for exact gradient computation. These constraints restrict parallelism, increase memory and communication overhead, and pose challenges for scalable learning. In this work, we propose Hierarchical Block-Local Learning (HBLL), a framework that decomposes deep neural networks into hierarchically linked blocks trained using local learning objectives derived from variational principles, eliminating the need for full end-to-end backpropagation while maintaining effective information propagation across the network. HBLL is the first algorithm that is able to train deep neural networks in $\mathcal{O}(\log N)$ parallel time complexity, where $N$ is the number of network layers. We show that HBLL implicitly defines a family of subnetworks corresponding to different hierarchical paths, enabling flexible inference with different effective numbers of layers. We evaluate HBLL on a set of challenging vision and language modeling tasks, achieving competitive performance. We also extend HBLL to recurrent sequence architectures, applying to settings that otherwise rely on backpropagation through time.

</details>


### [772] [Privacy-Preserving Federated Temporal Graph Learning with Digital Twin--Guided Adaptive Deception for Cyber-Resilient IoMT](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21513)
*Syed Zeeshan Haider,Anwar Shah,Muneeb Arif,Hamza Iftikhar,Waqas Ali*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种联邦时序图卷积网络结合优势演员-评论家（Federated TGCN-A2C）的隐私保护防御架构，在CICDDoS 2019和TON-IoT数据集上分别达到99.48%和99.61%的测试准确率，支持16类攻击检测且F1分数均高于0.92，并具备可解释性分析能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 物联网和医疗物联网设备资源受限且受严格延迟与数据隐私法规约束，现有的网络安全方案难以在保护隐私的同时高效检测复杂攻击，亟需一种兼顾隐私保护、高精度和实时响应的入侵检测架构。

Method: 提出了Federated TGCN-A2C框架，包含四个核心机制：基于PyG的时序GCN（使用GCNConv层+全局平均池化+异常门控）进行流级威胁分类；LSTM数字孪生生成设备级异常分数并通过sigmoid耦合门控；联邦A2C智能体基于七维状态选择ALLOW/ISOLATE/HONEYPOT-REDIRECT动作；增强型蜜罐层将可疑流量转化为威胁情报。联邦聚合采用EMA平滑的客户端验证损失作为逆加权FedAvg系数，并余弦退火调整学习率。

Result: 在CICDDoS 2019和TON-IoT基准上分别达到99.48%和99.61%的测试准确率，加权F1分别为0.9948和0.9961，分别在25轮和10轮联邦轮次内收敛，比Fed-Inforce-Fusion高出0.21个百分点并覆盖额外三种攻击类别。所有16个CICDDoS 2019类别F1≥0.9237，所有10个TON-IoT类别F1≥0.9488（含严重不平衡的MITM类别）。

Conclusion: 该框架在隐私保护前提下实现了极高的检测精度和攻击覆盖范围，通过SHAP、LIME、Grad-CAM和反事实分析等可解释性技术验证了决策基于语义有意义的流量特征，支持临床部署中的监管问责。

Abstract: The rapid proliferation of IoT and IoMT devices introduces critical cybersecurity vulnerabilities in healthcare and industrial environments where resource-constrained devices operate under strict latency and data-privacy regulations. This paper presents the Federated Temporal Graph Convolutional Network with Advantage Actor-Critic (Federated TGCN-A2C), a privacy-preserving defense architecture integrating four mechanisms: a PyG-based Temporal GCN using GCNConv layers with global mean pooling and a learned anomaly gate for flow-level threat classification; LSTM-based Digital Twins generating per-device anomaly scores gating the classifier via learned sigmoid coupling; a Federated A2C agent selecting among ALLOW, ISOLATE, and HONEYPOT-REDIRECT actions based on a seven-dimensional state capturing confidence, entropy, anomaly magnitude, and traffic composition; and an enhanced honeypot layer converting suspicious traffic into threat intelligence with adaptive thresholds. Federated aggregation employs EMA-smoothed per-client validation losses as inverse-weighted FedAvg coefficients to stabilize global model updates under non-IID distributions, with cosine-annealed learning rates per round. Evaluated on CICDDoS 2019 and TON-IoT benchmarks, the framework achieves 99.48% and 99.61% test accuracy with weighted-F1 scores of 0.9948 and 0.9961, converging within 25 and 10 federated rounds, outperforming Fed-Inforce-Fusion by 0.21 percentage points while covering three additional attack categories. All sixteen CICDDoS 2019 classes achieve F1 of at least 0.9237 and all ten TON-IoT classes achieve F1 of at least 0.9488, including the severely imbalanced MITM category. Post-hoc explainability via SHAP, LIME, Grad-CAM, and counterfactual analysis confirms decisions are grounded in semantically meaningful flow features, supporting regulatory accountability in clinical deployments.

</details>


### [773] [Towards Understanding the Power and Limits of the Muon Optimizer: A River-Valley Perspective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21514)
*Tianqi Shen,Jinji Yang,Runze Shi,Jianhao Ma,Jiaye Teng,Ziye Ma*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过混合尖峰矩阵感知模型和河谷视角，理论上揭示了Muon优化器在LLM训练中的优势（早期快速收敛）与局限（后期易震荡），并提出两阶段训练策略（前期用Muon，后期切换为GD类优化器）来弥补其不足。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Muon优化器在理论和实证之间存在差距：理论表明其通过谱归一化改善条件数具有优势，但在实际LLM训练中表现不稳定，相比Adam/AdamW并非始终优越。作者试图通过轨迹级理论分析来弥合这一gap，解释Muon的优缺点。

Method: 1) 提出混合尖峰矩阵感知模型，其感知算子分解为信号、尖峰和体分量，捕捉各向异性结构与长尾信息；2) 引入"河谷视角"——将损失景观分为流向解的"河流方向"和编码噪声的"山丘方向"；3) 分别分析无动量情形和有动量情形下Muon与GD的收敛行为；4) 扩展到谱河流上的非凸目标分析。

Result: 无动量情形：Muon在早期沿信息丰富的河流方向移动更快，但接近河底时收敛速度显著慢于GD。有动量情形：Muon早期收敛更快，但正交化更新去除了残差尺度信息，导致在目标解附近易过度冲量和震荡。

Conclusion: 建议在训练后期从Muon切换到GD类精炼优化器，而非仅依赖固定学习率调度；初步语言模型实验支持了这一两阶段方法的有效性。

Abstract: Recently, Muon has gained substantial attention as an appealing alternative to Adam-like optimizers, with many works highlighting its advantages through spectral normalization and improved conditioning. Yet this positive theoretical narrative contrasts with its empirical performance in large language model (LLM) training, where Muon's gains over Adam/AdamW are often mixed, schedule-sensitive, and not uniformly superior. To address this gap, we develop a trajectory-level theory characterizing both the strengths and limitations of Muon. We introduce a mixed-spiked matrix sensing model whose sensing operator decomposes into signal, spike, and bulk components, capturing a mixture of anisotropic structure and long-tail information reminiscent of LLM training. On top of it, we adopted a river-valley perspective in which we view the landscape as composed of a river direction flowing to the desired solution and hill directions encoding nuisance or task-irrelevant information. In the momentum-free setting, we show that Muon moves faster along the information-bearing river direction during early optimization, but can converge much more slowly near the river bottom than gradient descent. We then extend the river-valley perspective to general nonconvex objectives with momentum by studying points on the spectral river. There, while Muon converges faster early on, its orthogonalized update removes residual scale information, making it prone to overshooting and oscillation near the target solution. Together, these results suggest that our characterizations extend beyond spiked matrix sensing and motivate switching to GD-like refinement optimizers in the final phase, rather than relying only on a fixed learning-rate schedule for Muon. We also provide preliminary evidence supporting this two-stage approach in language model training experiments.

</details>


### [774] [Backpropagating Through Simulation: Analytic Policy Gradients for Sample and Learning Efficient Differentiable Continuous Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21525)
*Yueci Deng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Analytic Policy Gradients (APG)方法，利用可微分环境动力学进行精确梯度计算，而非像PPO那样通过高方差采样估计梯度。在四个连续控制任务上，APG相比PPO展现出更好的样本效率，并设计了分段反向传播方案缓解长时域任务中的梯度退化问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的无模型强化学习算法（如PPO）将环境视为黑盒，通过采样奖励来估计策略梯度，这需要大量环境交互且优势估计方差较高。当环境动力学可微分时，可以利用端到端的精确梯度计算来提升样本效率。

Method: 提出Analytic Policy Gradients (APG)方法，利用可微分环境动力学通过反向传播计算精确策略梯度。设计了分段反向传播方案（segmented backpropagation），包含MC和critic-based两种bootstrap模式，以缓解长时域任务中的梯度退化问题。采用多轴评估协议，分别记录环境步数和梯度步数下的性能。

Result: 在四个连续控制任务（1D点质量目标到达、2D点质量避障导航、2D刚体T块推动、7-DOF Franka FR3末端执行器到达）上，APG与PPO在相同模型架构和优化器设置下进行对比。报告了分段反向传播方案的效果，以及不同分段长度和bootstrap策略的消融实验结果。

Conclusion: APG利用可微分环境动力学实现精确梯度计算，相比基于采样的PPO在样本效率上有显著优势，分段反向传播方案有效缓解了长时域任务的梯度退化问题。

Abstract: Model-free reinforcement learning algorithms such as Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) treat the environment as a black box, estimating policy gradients from sampled rewards; this process demands millions of interactions and relies on high-variance advantage estimates. When environment dynamics are differentiable, the return is an end-to-end differentiable function of the policy parameters, enabling exact gradient computation via backpropagation through simulation. We term this approach Analytic Policy Gradients (APG) and evaluate it against PPO on four continuous control tasks of increasing dynamical complexity: a one-dimensional point-mass target-reaching task, a 2D point-mass navigation task with obstacle avoidance, a 2D rigid-body T-block pushing task, and a 7-DOF Franka FR3 end-effector reaching task. Both algorithms share identical model architectures, observation normalization, and optimizer settings. To decouple sample efficiency from compute efficiency, we design a multi-axis evaluation protocol that records performance against environment steps and gradient steps. We report a segmented backpropagation scheme with MC and critic-based bootstrap modes that mitigates gradient degradation on long-horizon tasks, and present ablations over segment length and bootstrap strategy.

</details>


### [775] [LIG: Layer-wise Integrated Gradients for Within-Layer Flow Analysis in Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21564)
*Eight Suzuki,Hideitsu Hino,Noboru Murata*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出LIG（逐层集成梯度）方法，在Transformer的注意力头和MLP模块边界上应用集对集积分梯度，实现模块粒度的可解释性分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Transformer内部计算不透明，现有解释方法缺乏在模块边界粒度上分析信息流动的能力。

Method: 在Transformer每层构建动态图，节点为token表示和注意力头输出；使用L2标量化的集对集积分梯度计算模块间的token贡献；结合层间传播的完整性（类似LRP的守恒性）。

Result: 在BERT-base和PTB上，保持层内一致性的最佳配置是：注意力基线用目标token嵌入，MLP基线用注意力输出a=0或零向量。

Conclusion: LIG是一种无需模型重训练或逐操作解释器设计的模块边界粒度XAI诊断工具，可分析层间归因一致性和层内信息流。

Abstract: Transformers achieve strong performance, but their internal computations remain opaque. We view each Transformer layer as a dynamic graph whose nodes are token representations and per-head attention outputs, with Multi-Head Attention (ATT) and MLP as module boundaries. On this graph we use LIG (Layer-wise Integrated Gradients), which applies set-to-set Integrated Gradients (IG) at nonlinear module boundaries. Set-to-set IG applies IG to a map from a set of input token representations to a set of output representations, evaluating token-to-token contributions, which is not standard in prior IG applications. This extends IG from the usual scalar-objective setting to set-to-set maps via an L2 scalarization, and composes within-layer contributions in the spirit of Layer-wise Relevance Propagation (LRP), with IG completeness playing the role of LRP-style conservation at each boundary. We use LIG to analyze (i) the agreement between module-wise composition and layer-whole attribution under an L2 criterion, and (ii) within-layer information flow by tracing separated ATT and MLP contributions. On BERT-base and PTB, configurations that best preserved within-layer consistency used the target token's embedding as the ATT baseline and either the ATT output at a=0 or Zero as the MLP baseline. We therefore present LIG as a diagnostic XAI tool at module-boundary granularity, without model-specific retraining or per-operation interpreter design. Code is available at https://github.com/eightsuzuki/layer-wise-integrated-gradients.

</details>


### [776] [The Cost Geometry of Belief: finite-resource inference under noisy observation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21585)
*Laurent Caraffa*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的信念空间几何结构，融合了Wasserstein最优传输和Fisher信息，证明了三个核心不变性结果：推理壁（确定性不可达）、诚实代价（几何与Fisher信息成正比）和刚性（双曲几何，高斯分布最极端），揭示了信念更新的代价本质上是相对而非绝对的。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有信念空间几何（如Fisher-Rao度量）未能捕捉信念更新中观测和物理双重不确定性带来的代价结构。作者希望建立一个更自然的代价几何，既能反映信息获取的成本，又能刻画推理的极限。

Method: 将Wasserstein空间的最优传输代价与Fisher信息共形地重新加权，定义了一种新的共形几何（定位-尺度类型）。通过分析代价函数与Fisher信息的渐近关系，推导出三个不变性结果，并利用热力学固定代价单位。

Result: 发现了三个几何不变量：（1）推理壁——当代价主导Fisher信息时，确定性（完美信念）在无穷远处不可达；（2）诚实代价——当每个nat长度相等时，几何与Fisher信息成正比；（3）刚性——该几何本质上是双曲的，且高斯分布是其中最极端的定位-尺度信念，Stam界为其提供了理论支撑。

Conclusion: 信念更新的代价是相对的而非绝对的，成本单位的变化会缩放几何但保留所有核心不变性。达到特定精度的代价存在几何下界，在确定性处发散。热力学提供了自然的代价单位，论证在nats单位下进行。

Abstract: We equip the space of beliefs with a cost geometry (what it costs to pass from one belief to another): optimal transport in Wasserstein space, reweighted conformally by Fisher information (the price of the precision at stake), distinct from the Fisher-Rao metric. In the setting we consider, a finite machine maintains a digital twin of a system; observing the territory through finite, noisy sensors, we model its coherent output as a belief: a probability density over states, the Bayes posterior. Certainty (the perfect twin) is denied twice, by observation and by physics, both read off the Fisher information. On the conformal class, essentially location-scale, three results emerge, all invariants of one change of cost unit. A wall: a well-posed inference rejects certainty to infinite distance as soon as the cost dominates the Fisher information (necessity conjectured beyond power laws). An honesty: an honest (eikonal) cost, each nat the same length everywhere, selects the geometries proportional to the Fisher information. A rigidity: these geometries are hyperbolic, and the Stam bound crowns the Gaussian, the most hyperbolic location-scale belief. Changing the unit dilates the geometry yet preserves the wall, the curvature ordering, and the extremality of the Gaussian: an absolute cost says nothing, only relative cost carries meaning, the value -1/4 being one of its images. The cost of reaching a given precision then has a geometric floor diverging at certainty. Thermodynamics fixes the cost unit and motivates this framework; the results are geometric, in nats.

</details>


### [777] [FAST: A Framework for Aligned Sampling and Training in Parallel Reinforcement Learning for Autonomous Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21587)
*Bonan Wang,Letian Tao,Bin Shuai,Jiaxin Gao,Wenxin Zhao,Wei Xiong,Kehua Sheng,Bo Zhang,Yang Guan,Shengbo Eben Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出FAST框架，通过动态并行采样对齐（DPSA）和缩放掩码填充优化（SMPO）解决强化学习闭环自动驾驶中并行采样的掉队者效应，实现至少1.78倍加速且保持统计无偏性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准并行采样存在掉队者效应（straggler effect），单个环境的提前终止会导致整批同步重置，造成采样效率低下和过高的重置延迟，亟需解决该瓶颈。

Method: 1) 动态并行采样对齐（DPSA）：对提前终止的轨迹进行虚拟延续，保持向量化同步；基于终止率动态触发全局截断。2) 缩放掩码填充优化（SMPO）：通过有效性掩码和自适应损失归一化消除辅助填充数据引入的偏差。

Result: 在闭环自动驾驶仿真中，相比单基线实现至少1.78倍实际时间加速，且保持统计无偏性。

Conclusion: 通过解耦采样循环与单个环境终止，FAST在不牺牲数据多样性的前提下有效消除过早重置的瓶颈，兼顾效率与理论一致性。

Abstract: Deep reinforcement learning is pivotal for closed-loop autonomous driving yet remains constrained by severe bottlenecks in sampling efficiency. Standard parallel sampling mitigates this but suffers from the straggler effect, where the premature termination of a single environment necessitates a synchronized batch re-initialization, leading to suboptimal sample utilization and prohibitive re-initialization latency. To address this, we propose FAST, a synchronous parallel framework tailored for closed-loop simulation. Specifically, FAST employs Dynamic Parallel Sampling Alignment (DPSA) to maintain vectorization synchronization by extending terminated episodes via virtual continuation, thereby decoupling the sampling loop from individual terminations. By dynamically triggering global truncation based on the termination rate of parallel clips, FAST effectively eliminates the bottleneck of premature resets without sacrificing data diversity. Furthermore, to strictly preserve theoretical consistency, we incorporate a Scaled Mask-Padding Optimization (SMPO) that leverages validity masking and adaptive loss normalization to nullify the bias from auxiliary padding data. Empirical evaluations demonstrate that FAST achieves at least a 1.78 times wall-clock speedup over the single-clip baseline while preserving statistical unbiasedness.

</details>


### [778] [Geometric and Information Compression of Representations in Deep Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21593)
*Linara Adilova,Henning Petzka,Asja Fischer,Bernhard C. Geiger*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了深度神经网络中，互信息（MI）与几何压缩之间的复杂非线性关系，发现低MI并不必然对应几何压缩，且这种关系会随训练设置变化甚至反转，提出泛化能力可能是二者关联的混淆因素。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解深度神经网络中信息论（互信息）与几何维度（类级聚类）两种表示特征之间的关系，探究低互信息是否必然导致几何压缩，反之亦然。

Method: 使用条件熵瓶颈（CEB）网络和连续dropout网络，在分类任务中通过控制噪声注入方案，结合理论上可靠的互信息估计与类级聚类度量，系统评估互信息、几何压缩和泛化之间的相互作用。

Result: 低互信息与几何压缩之间不存在可靠对应关系；二者呈负向且非线性的关系，在不同训练设置下可能反转；泛化能力可能是该关联的混淆因素。

Conclusion: 互信息与几何压缩的关系比通常假设的更复杂，不能简单用一方推断另一方；泛化在其中扮演潜在混淆角色，而非两者的直接结果。

Abstract: Deep neural networks transform input data into latent representations that support a wide range of downstream tasks. These representations can be characterized along information-theoretic and geometric dimensions, but their relationship remains poorly understood. A central open question is whether low mutual information (MI) between inputs and representations necessarily implies geometrically compressed latent spaces and vice versa. We investigate this question using class-wise clustering as a measure of geometric compression and theoretically sound MI estimation in conditional entropy bottleneck (CEB) networks and continuous dropout networks. We evaluate the interplay between MI, geometric compression, and generalization on classification tasks under controlled noise injection schemes. Our findings show that low MI does not reliably correspond to geometric compression, and that the connection between the two is more nuanced than often assumed. Indeed, our experiments reveal a negative and nonlinear relationship that can reverse when varying training setup. Our results put forward a hypothesis that generalization acts as a potential confounder in this connection rather than being their direct consequence.

</details>


### [779] [Learning to Place Guards by Reinforcement: A Geo-Free Neural Policy for the Vertex-Guard Art Gallery Problem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21604)
*Domagoj Ševerdija,Jurica Maltar,Nathan Chappel,Domagoj Matijević*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究探讨神经组合优化（NCO）在NP难的艺术画廊问题（AGP）上的表现。训练好的指针网络策略在“无几何推理”约束下通过强化学习放置守卫，但存在覆盖不足的尾部问题。通过冻结编码器并用小型分类器读取其嵌入，发现强化学习训练的表示已经编码了所需的几何信息，剩余失败源于解码器校准而非缺失知识。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: NCO策略虽能直接构建强解，但其实际学到什么（而非解码器表达了什么）仍不清楚。本文旨在区分编码器学到的表示与解码器表达的能力，探究策略失败的根本原因。

Method: 在顶点守卫艺术画廊问题上，训练指针网络策略（基于覆盖感知奖励），并在无几何推理（仅看坐标，无可见性计算）下测试。冻结训练好的编码器，用小型单次分类器读取其嵌入（仍无几何推理），比较分类器与原始策略的可行性差距。

Result: 原始策略在经济地放置守卫，但存在大量未覆盖多边形（尤其超出训练范围）。分类器几乎消除了可行性差距，在分布内外及训练范围约5倍时，将未覆盖多边形减少约一个数量级，代价是守卫数量略有增加。

Conclusion: 强化训练得到的表示已编码了所需的几何信息，剩余失败源于解码器校准问题而非缺失知识。通过探测冻结编码器，可以实用地判断神经组合求解器内化了哪些知识。

Abstract: Neural combinatorial optimization (NCO) has shown that policies trained by reinforcement can construct strong solutions to NP-hard problems directly from raw instances. What such a policy actually learns, as opposed to what its decoder expresses, remains much less clear. We study this distinction on the vertex-guard Art Gallery Problem, the NP-hard task of choosing polygon vertices from which to observe an entire region. A pointer-network policy is trained from a coverage-aware reward over its own rollouts under the constraint we call geo-free inference: at test time it sees only vertex coordinates, with no visibility computation and no geometric oracle. The policy places guards economically but leaves a tail of under-covered polygons that widens far beyond the training range. To locate the cause, we freeze the trained encoder and read its embeddings with a small single-shot classifier, still geo-free at inference. The classifier closes most of the feasibility gap, in and out of distribution and at up to roughly five times the training range, cutting under-covered polygons by about an order of magnitude at an explicitly reported cost in guard count. We read this as evidence that the reinforcement-trained representation already encodes the geometry required for feasibility, and that residual failures reflect decoder calibration rather than missing knowledge. Probing a frozen encoder thus offers a practical way to ask what a neural combinatorial solver has internalized.

</details>


### [780] [The Two-Hump Problem: Bridging the Difficulty Gap in Mathematical Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21611)
*Lucas Fagan,Michele Tarquini,Ali Shehper,Maksymilian Manko,Angus Gruen,Coco Huang,Giorgi Butbaia,Davide Passaro,Sergei Gukov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对数学搜索问题中的Andrews-Curtis猜想，识别了其奖励分布的"双驼峰"结构瓶颈（实例要么极易解决，要么几乎不可解），通过新颖的数据生成技术和算法改进（超级移动、Transformer架构）显著提升了性能，并发布了两个大规模公开数据集AC-19和AC-1M。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 数学搜索问题（如Andrews-Curtis猜想）面临搜索空间巨大、奖励稀疏的挑战，且现有RL方法难以有效学习，因为问题实例的难度分布存在"双驼峰"结构——中间难度的可解实例稀缺，阻碍了学习过程。

Method: 1) 提出新颖的数据生成技术，用以填充难度分布的空白区域；2) 算法增强：引入"supermoves"（超级移动）操作扩展动作空间，采用Transformer架构替代传统模型以更好地捕捉长程依赖关系。

Result: 在AC问题上相比以往基线方法取得了显著的性能提升，并构建了AC-19（含125,192个实例）和AC-1M（含1,136,154个实例）两个大规模公开基准数据集。

Conclusion: 通过针对性解决奖励分布的结构性问题，结合数据生成与算法创新，有效提升了RL在数学搜索问题上的表现，并提供了首个大规模公开数据集以推动该领域研究。

Abstract: Mathematical search problems present a unique challenge for Reinforcement Learning (RL) due to vast search spaces and sparse rewards. In previous works, the Andrews-Curtis (AC) conjecture was established as an illustrative example of such problems. In this work, we identify a critical structural barrier in the AC landscape: a "Two-Hump" distribution, where problem instances are either trivially solvable or effectively impossible, with a scarcity of intermediate "hard-but-solvable" instances required for effective learning. We tackle this challenge through two primary avenues: novel data generation techniques to populate the difficulty gap, and significant algorithmic enhancements including the introduction of supermoves and Transformer-based architectures. We demonstrate substantial performance improvements over previous baselines, and release new comprehensive benchmark datasets including AC-19 (125,192 AC-trivial presentations of varying difficulty with length at most 19) and AC-1M (1,136,154 hard AC-trivial presentations of length at most 30), the first large-scale, publicly available datasets of this kind.

</details>


### [781] [HERALD: High-Throughput Block Diffusion LLM Serving via CPU-GPU Cooperative KV Cache Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21633)
*Omin Kwon,Doyeon Kim,Jongseok Park,Seung Yul Lee,Ion Stoica,Jae W. Lee*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: HERALD是一个专为块状扩散LLM设计的KV缓存卸载系统，通过利用块内去噪步骤中KV条目一致性，实现了在5-10% KV预算下的近无损精度，相比纯GPU推理延迟降低1.59倍、吞吐量提升2.47倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散LLM虽能提升GPU利用率，但其KV缓存随上下文线性增长，限制了长序列下的吞吐量。将KV缓存卸载到主机DRAM虽可缓解内存压力，但PCIe带宽有限，需要精确选择稀疏的KV条目进行召回。在块状dLLM中，相关KV条目在块内去噪步骤中保持一致，这为高效卸载提供了机会。

Method: HERALD利用块状dLLM的特性：1) 将top-k条目选择开销通过块大小分摊，减少选择计算量；2) 使选择过程与去噪步骤重叠。该方法实现了在有限PCIe带宽下的高效KV缓存卸载。

Result: 在三种块状dLLM和五个长上下文任务上，HERALD在5-10% KV预算下实现近无损精度，每块延迟降低至1.59倍，吞吐量提升2.47倍，且加速比随上下文长度增长。

Conclusion: HERALD证明了通过利用块状dLLM的独特结构特性（块内KV条目一致性），可以在大幅降低KV缓存需求的同时保持模型精度，实现高效的长上下文推理。

Abstract: Diffusion LLMs (dLLMs) improve GPU utilization over autoregressive decoding by generating multiple tokens per forward pass, but their KV cache still grows linearly with context, limiting throughput at long contexts. KV cache offloading to host DRAM alleviates this memory pressure, but the limited PCIe bandwidth necessitates recalling only a sparse subset of KV entries. In block dLLMs, the relevant KV entries remain consistent across denoising steps within a block, enabling high-accuracy selection by identifying the top-k entries once and reusing them throughout all denoising steps. This property appears attractive for offloading as it amortizes the selection overhead across the entire block, but it requires exact attention over the full KV cache, which is too expensive under offloading. We present HERALD, a KV offloading system for block dLLMs that resolves this through two opportunities that reduce the required selection compute by a factor of the block size and enable selection to be overlapped with denoising. Across three block dLLMs and five long context tasks, HERALD achieves near-lossless accuracy at 5-10% KV budget and up to 1.59x lower per block latency and 2.47x higher throughput over GPU-only inference, with speedups growing with context length.

</details>


### [782] [A new classification method based on Minimum Spanning Trees](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21639)
*Julio González-Díaz,Beatriz Pateiro-López,Iria Rodríguez-Acevedo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于最小生成树的监督学习分类算法，并引入了鲁棒性更强、计算效率更高的改进版本，通过模拟和真实飞机轨迹数据验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 最小生成树（MST）在无监督学习（尤其是聚类）中已有广泛应用，但其在监督学习中的潜力尚未被充分探索。本文旨在研究MST在监督学习中的应用，提出一种新的分类算法。

Method: 提出一种基于最小生成树的分类算法，并引入鲁棒性版本以提升性能和计算效率。通过大量模拟研究和真实飞机轨迹数据案例进行验证。

Result: 模拟研究表明所提方法有效；真实飞机轨迹数据案例也证实了方法的实用性。

Conclusion: 最小生成树可以成功应用于监督学习分类任务，鲁棒性版本在性能和效率上均有提升。

Abstract: Minimum Spanning Trees have been used in unsupervised learning, particularly in clustering tasks, due to their ability to recognize clusters by removing edges that are considered inconsistent in defining those clusters. This paper aims to study the use of Minimum Spanning Trees in supervised learning. Specifically, we propose a classification algorithm based on Minimum Spanning Trees. To improve its performance, we introduce a robust version of the method that is also computationally more efficient. We evaluate the effectiveness of our proposed method through an extensive simulation study. We also apply the proposed methodology to a real-world case study involving aircraft trajectories.

</details>


### [783] [When Is an LLM Worth It for Hyperparameter Optimization? A Budget-Matched Study on Tabular Data Finds the Warm-Start Is a Default Configuration, Not the Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21641)
*Carson Rodrigues,Oysturn Vas*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过严格的预算匹配、多种子实验协议，系统性地检验了LLM作为超参数优化顾问的声称。结果表明，LLM顾问（LLM-OptFlow）在表格数据HPO中并未带来可测量的泛化增益，其所谓的“强初始点”实际上来自固定的默认配置而非LLM本身。当经典搜索方法获得相同的默认种子后，LLM的优势迅速消失，在少量评估次数内即被反超。研究建议：在表格HPO中，使用合理的默认配置初始化经典搜索即可，LLM顾问无额外价值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 验证LLM作为超参优化顾问的声称是否成立，因为前人研究未进行严格的预算匹配和多种子控制实验，可能高估了LLM的实际贡献。

Method: 在8个PMLB表格基准上，采用预算匹配、多种子（8×5=40个任务-种子单元）实验协议，将LLM顾问（LLM-OptFlow）与四种经典基线（随机搜索、Optuna-TPE、高斯过程贝叶斯优化、连续减半）在共享搜索空间上比较，使用配对检验和bootstrap 95%置信区间。

Result: 1) LLM的强初始点来自固定默认配置而非LLM输出，该默认配置即达到88.7%平均最佳CV；2) LLM自身提议仅增加+0.40 pp的交叉验证准确率，测试集上无提升（p=0.92）；3) 经典搜索获得相同种子后，LLM优势迅速消失，甚至被反超；4) LLM存在单任务探索失败和置信度过滤器（移除~33%浪费计算但不改变准确率）。

Conclusion: 在表格数据HPO场景下，LLM顾问没有可测量的泛化增益，用合理默认配置初始化经典搜索即可达到相同甚至更好的效果，LLM的优势在少量评估次数内即被经典方法超越。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have been proposed as hyperparameter-optimization (HPO) advisors that "warm-start" search from prior knowledge, proposing strong configurations in very few evaluations. We test that claim under a budget-matched, multi-seed protocol on eight PMLB tabular benchmarks, comparing an LLM advisor (LLM-OptFlow) against four classical baselines (random search, Optuna-TPE, Gaussian-process Bayesian optimization, and successive halving) over one shared search space, with paired tests and bootstrap 95% CIs across 8 x 5 = 40 (task, seed) units. The finding is cautionary. The advisor's strong first point is not an LLM output at all: like prior LLM-HPO systems the loop is seeded with a fixed default configuration, evaluated before any model call, which alone reaches 88.7% mean best-CV, identical to within 0.01 pp across all seven advisor models tested. The LLM's own proposals add only +0.40 pp of cross-validation accuracy over that seed and nothing on held-out test (LLM-Default = -0.01 pp, p = 0.92). When the same seed is granted to classical search, the apparent lead collapses: against seeded random search it leads by +0.20 pp at 2 evaluations, is tied by 5, and is behind by 12 (-0.37 pp). Without the seed, classical search ties the advisor by 12 evaluations and beats it by 40 (+0.6 to +0.8 pp, p <= 1e-4). Two LLM-specific behaviors survive: a single-task exploration failure (vehicle), and a rule-based confidence filter that removes ~33% of wasted compute without changing accuracy. The recommendation is deflationary: on tabular HPO, seed classical search with a sensible default; an LLM advisor adds no measurable generalization benefit and is overtaken within a handful of evaluations. We release the harness and a script that reproduces every statistic.

</details>


### [784] [A Framework for Directed Acyclic Hypergraph Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21668)
*Zhiyuan Dong,Carlos Mundo-Levano,Wei Qian,Daniel Lau,Gonzalo R. Arce*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种从观测数据中学习有向超图（DAHG）的连续优化框架，通过张量t-积和傅里叶分解实现可微的无环约束，能够捕捉传统有向图模型无法表示的联合父节点影响关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的DAG学习方法局限于成对因果关系，无法建模多个变量共同对子节点产生影响的联合因果关系（如基因调控中的协同效应）。

Method: (i) 采用带乘性交互项的广义线性结构方程模型，非零权重直接对应有向超边；(ii) 引入加权邻接张量表示，通过张量t-积的幂零性刻画无环性；(iii) 利用t-积的傅里叶分解将张量幂零性转化为切片矩阵幂零性，导出可微的无环约束，通过增广拉格朗日方法进行最小二乘学习。

Result: 成功将连续优化方法从成对DAG扩展到有向超图，能够学习联合父节点影响，且保持可微的无环约束。

Conclusion: 该方法突破了传统DAG学习对成对关系的限制，为捕捉更丰富的多元因果关系提供了可行的连续优化框架。

Abstract: Continuous optimization methods for learning Directed Acyclic Graphs (DAGs) operate on weighted adjacency matrices and are therefore limited to pairwise causal relationships. We propose a framework for learning Directed Acyclic Hypergraphs (DAHGs) from observational data, capturing joint parental influences that pairwise models cannot represent. Our approach rests on three components: (i) a generalized linear structural equation model (SEM) with multiplicative interaction terms whose non-zero weights correspond one-to-one with directed hyperedges; (ii) a weighted adjacency tensor representation whose acyclicity is characterized via nilpotency under the tensor t-product; and (iii) a differentiable acyclicity constraint derived through the Fourier decomposition of the t-product, which reduces tensor nilpotency to slice-wise matrix nilpotency and enables least-squares learning via the augmented Lagrangian method.

</details>


### [785] [Decodable but Not Faithful: Coupling Natural-Language Rationales to Programmatic Verifiers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21678)
*Vatsal Ananthula,Adarsh Kumarappan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出验证器耦合推理框架，通过一致性训练使推理表示可解码验证器信息，但发现可解码性与忠实性之间存在根本性鸿沟：模型可达98.6%的耦合度，但生成的解释仍不忠实（流畅但描述无关算法），表明一致性损失是有效的诊断和表示塑造工具，但不是忠实推理的充分条件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 语言模型可以为其预测生成看似合理的理由，但这些解释可能并不忠实地代表模型的内部推理过程。作者旨在探究能否通过一致性训练来弥合这一差距，以及可解码性与忠实性之间的关系。

Method: 提出验证器耦合推理框架，在推理轨迹中插入内联声明，并训练辅助一致性头从跨度隐藏状态预测程序化验证器输出。在LeanCheck（形式定理证明）、KataGo（围棋引擎）和代码生成三个场景中进行实验，并采用合成激活修补、FEVER分析等方法。

Result: 在LeanCheck中实现了完美的方向性分离；KataGo中以81%的准确率编码10路赢率桶；代码场景达到98.6%的耦合度但解释不忠实。合成激活修补确认因果影响（73-89% vs 31%基线），FEVER显示仅证据池化隔离了真实的证据敏感性但牺牲了原始准确率。

Conclusion: 一致性损失是有效的诊断和表示塑造工具，但不是忠实推理的充分条件。可解码性并不保证忠实生成，这一差距并非由模型容量驱动。

Abstract: Language models can generate plausible rationales for their predictions, but these explanations may not faithfully represent the model's internal reasoning. We propose verifier-coupled reasoning, a framework that inserts inline claims into reasoning traces and trains an auxiliary consistency head to predict programmatic verifier outputs from rationale-span hidden states. The central finding is a gap between decodability and faithfulness: consistency training reliably makes verifier information decodable from rationale representations, but decodability does not guarantee faithful generation. In LeanCheck (formal theorem proving), rationale-only and proof-only pooling achieve perfect directional separation under counterfactual conflict. In KataGo (Go engine), commentary spans encode 10-way win-rate buckets at 81% accuracy. Yet in a code setting, the model achieves 98.6% coupling while its generated explanations remain unfaithful: fluent prose with correct structured claims, but describing unrelated algorithms; a controlled pretrained-vs-from-scratch comparison shows the gap is not capacity-driven. Synthetic activation patching confirms causal influence (73-89% vs. 31% baseline), FEVER reveals that evidence-only pooling isolates genuine evidence sensitivity at the cost of raw accuracy, and per-claim analysis shows that consistency loss disproportionately benefits fine-grained claims over binary ones. These results establish that consistency losses are effective diagnostics and representation-shaping tools, but not sufficient conditions for faithful reasoning.

</details>


### [786] [Expressivity Saturation: Reduced Affine Region Usage Under Increasing Task Complexity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21687)
*Xuan Qi,Yi Wei,Fanqi Yu,Manuel Lecha*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了分段仿射神经网络（如ReLU网络）的理论区域容量与实际训练后实现的仿射区域之间的差距。作者从两个角度分析：一是给出了沿仿射线段的区域数上界定理，形式化了表示复杂信号所需的最小区间预算；二是发现随着任务复杂度增加，网络实际实现的区域数远低于理论容量，这一现象称为"表达饱和度"，且区域崩溃往往伴随决策边界退化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 分段仿射神经网络（如ReLU网络）的仿射区域数量是衡量其表达能力的重要指标，但理论上的最大区域容量与实际训练后实现的区域数之间存在显著差距，这一差距尚未被充分理解。

Method: 1) 理论分析：针对多层感知机，给出了沿仿射线段的仿射片段数的架构依赖上界定理；2) 实验分析：在固定架构和训练协议下，系统枚举有限二维及高维域中实际实现的仿射区域，通过增加输入-标签复杂度观察区域数的变化。

Result: 1) 理论证明了沿仿射线段的区域数上界，得出神经元阈值下界；2) 发现"表达饱和度"现象：任务复杂度增加时，实际区域数远低于理论容量；3) 在高难度任务中，区域使用崩溃常伴随决策边界退化；4) 训练动态可视化显示区域划分和决策边界存在一致的细化过程。

Conclusion: 理论区域容量与实际实现区域之间存在系统性差距，表达能力并非总能被充分利用，这为理解神经网络的实际表达能力提供了新视角。

Abstract: Piecewise-affine neural networks (e.g., with ReLU or LeakyReLU activations) implement continuous piecewise-affine maps, and the number of affine regions provides a natural proxy for expressive capacity. However, the gap between theoretical region capacity and the affine regions realized after training remains insufficiently understood. We study this gap from two complementary perspectives. First, we give a rigorous, architecture-dependent theorem for affine line-segment probes: for multilayer perceptrons with piecewise-affine activations, the number of affine pieces realized along an affine line-segment probe is upper bounded by an explicit product of layer-wise width terms (and activation breakpoint factors). This yields a neuron-threshold lower bound for representing target functions with prescribed one-dimensional piece complexity, formalizing the minimal region budget required for complex signals. Second, we exactly enumerate affine regions realized within bounded 2D and higher-dimensional domains under controlled task complexity. Under fixed architectures and training protocols, increasing input--label complexity yields trained solutions with markedly fewer realized regions in the evaluation domain, even though worst-case architectural capacity is unchanged; we call this reduced region usage expressivity saturation. Moreover, in the most challenging regimes, 2D visualizations show that region-usage collapse often coincides with degraded decision boundaries. Finally, we visualize the training dynamics of affine-region partitions and decision boundaries, revealing a consistent refinement process during optimization.

</details>


### [787] [Embedding Linear Equality Constraints in Probabilistic Neural Networks for Dynamic Modelling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21728)
*Matthew Marsh,Benoit Chachuat,Antonio del Rio Chanona*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种概率神经网络框架，能够在给定容差内保证线性等式约束的满足，同时捕获偶然不确定性，在批量反应器案例中实现了更好的预测精度、不确定性校准和约束遵守。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器学习模型在化工过程建模中缺乏原则性的不确定性量化和物理约束机制。

Method: 提出一种概率神经网络框架，在给定容差内保证线性等式约束的满足，同时捕获偶然不确定性。

Result: 相比现有方法，在减少数据情况下具有更好的预测精度、不确定性校准和约束遵守；在大数据情况下训练更快且性能具有竞争力。

Conclusion: 该框架在批量反应器案例中有效实现了质量平衡约束，兼顾了不确定性与物理一致性。

Abstract: Machine learning models are increasingly used to model chemical process systems, yet they often lack principled uncertainty quantification and mechanisms to enforce physical constraints. We propose a probabilistic neural network framework that guarantees satisfaction of linear equality constraints within a given tolerance, while capturing aleatoric uncertainty. Compared to state-of-the-art methods, our formulation demonstrates improved predictive accuracy, uncertainty calibration, and adherence to constraints on reduced data. It also demonstrates competitive performance, but with significantly faster training times when evaluated on large data regimes. We evaluated this on two batch reactor case studies, enforcing mass balances.

</details>


### [788] [AdaPrivate-TS: Private Thompson Sampling for Contextual Bandits with Privacy Amplification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21757)
*Mohammadreza Riyazat,Eranga Ukwatta*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出AdaPrivate-TS，一种结合Thompson采样与批处理zCDP组合的差分隐私上下文Bandit算法，通过将隐私噪声解释为不确定性而非破坏，在事件级隐私下实现接近非私有的性能（93-99%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有差分隐私上下文Bandit算法（如UCB）将噪声视为破坏，忽略了噪声对后验协方差的结构化影响，导致隐私预算消耗大、性能损失严重。

Method: 将高斯噪声N(0,σ²I)添加到b后，Thompson采样的采样协方差变为v²A⁻¹+σ²A⁻²，将噪声解释为不确定性增加；利用批处理并行组合实现zCDP隐私成本对数级别；引入泊松子采样实现隐私放大。

Result: 在ε∈[0.5,5]时达到非私有性能的93-99%，比UCB高0.5-3.7%；极端ε下通过自适应探索提升18%；隐私放大在低ε下额外提升2-5%；在MovieLens和Jester上整体最优；DP-SVD特征下TS比UCB优势扩大到11%。

Conclusion: 将隐私噪声重新解释为不确定性的框架在理论和实践上都优于传统方法，证明了"噪声即不确定性"的视角不仅适用于奖励隐私，也适用于特征隐私。

Abstract: We present AdaPrivate-TS, a differentially private contextual bandit algorithm that combines Thompson Sampling with batched zCDP composition. Our key insight is that differential privacy noise inflates the posterior covariance in a structured way: adding Gaussian noise $N(0,σ^2 I)$ to $b$ yields sampling covariance $v^2 A^{-1} + σ^2 A^{-2}$, which Thompson Sampling interprets as increased uncertainty rather than pure corruption. Under event-level privacy (protecting individual interactions) with stochastic contexts, we prove that the privacy cost is only $O(\sqrt{d}\,\log T/\sqrtρ)$, logarithmic in $T$, because parallel composition amortizes noise across batches. Additionally, we explore privacy amplification via Poisson subsampling, which can reduce effective noise at stringent privacy budgets. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate: (1) AdaPrivate-TS achieves 93-99% of non-private performance at $\varepsilon \in [0.5, 5]$, outperforming UCB by 0.5-3.7% and up to 18% with tuned adaptive exploration at extreme $\varepsilon$; (2) privacy amplification provides additional 2-5% gains at low $\varepsilon$; (3) on MovieLens and Jester, AdaPrivate-TS achieves the best overall performance among event-level baselines, dominating at $\varepsilon \geq 2$; (4) under DP-SVD private features, TS's advantage over UCB grows to +11%, confirming noise-as-uncertainty is not limited to reward privacy. We provide rigorous proofs for privacy guarantees under interactive zCDP composition and comprehensive evaluation including convergence curves, 12-seed CIs, and DP-SVD feature ablation.

</details>


### [789] [Decision-Focused Learning: When and Why Traditional Prediction Models Fail](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21773)
*Mo Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文综述了决策导向学习（DFL）在“预测-然后-优化”范式中的发展，指出预测精度提升不必然带来决策质量改善，并讨论了传统统计学习工具（如基于预测不确定性的数据收集策略和Wasserstein距离等分布距离度量）在决策导向场景中的局限性，为开发新的决策导向工具提供了见解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统“预测-然后-优化”范式中，预测精度与决策质量之间存在脱节，即更好的预测不一定带来更好的决策，这促使研究者重新思考如何将预测模型与下游优化问题直接对齐。

Method: 通过综述方式梳理决策导向学习（DFL）的最新进展，重点以随机线性规划为下游决策问题，分析传统统计学习工具（如基于预测不确定性的数据收集、Wasserstein距离）在DFL中的不适配性，并总结DFL区别于传统预测建模的关键特性。

Result: 指出传统统计学习中的两类工具——纯粹基于预测不确定性的数据收集策略和Wasserstein距离等分布距离度量——在决策导向场景中并不适用，需要重新设计。

Conclusion: 总结了DFL区别于传统预测建模的性质，为开发新的决策导向工具提供了方法论见解。

Abstract: Plugging predictions of unknown parameters into downstream optimization problems, often referred to as the ``predict-then-optimize'' paradigm, has long been a standard approach in decision-making under uncertainty. However, improved predictive accuracy does not, in general, translate into improved decision quality. This disconnect has motivated growing interest in decision-focused learning (DFL) within the operations research community. This tutorial reviews recent developments in DFL and highlights key methodological insights, with a particular focus on stochastic linear programming as the downstream decision-making problem. We discuss why several widely used tools in traditional statistical learning are not directly suited to decision-focused settings and must be rethought, including (i) data collection strategies driven purely by predictive uncertainty and (ii) distributional distance measures such as the Wasserstein distance. We summarize properties of DFL that distinguish it from conventional predictive modeling and provide insights into the development of new decision-focused tools.

</details>


### [790] [Beyond the Next Step: Variable-Length Latent World Models for Long-Horizon Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21775)
*Tianqi Du,Qi Zhang,Yifei Wang,Yisen Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出变长潜世界模型（VLWMs），通过直接预测变长动作序列对应的未来潜状态，替代传统单步递归预测方式，解决长程规划中误差累积问题，在多个长程控制任务上平均提升13%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有潜世界模型仅训练单步转移预测，长程规划时需递归展开，导致误差累积且训练目标与下游规划任务不匹配。

Method: 1）提出VLWMs框架，直接建模变长时间跨度的动力学预测；2）设计课程训练策略，逐步扩展动作预测长度；3）设计适配VLWMs的规划方法。

Result: 在长程控制任务上，相比最先进方法LeWM，平均提升13%，尤其在需要长程规划的任务上增益明显。

Conclusion: VLWMs为改进潜世界模型的长程预测与规划提供了一种简单有效的范式。

Abstract: Recently, world models have emerged as a promising paradigm for building intelligent agents by learning predictive models that estimate future environment states conditioned on observations and actions. In particular, JEPA-style latent world models provide an efficient alternative to pixel space prediction by learning action-conditioned dynamics in compact representation spaces. However, existing latent world models typically rely on one-step prediction and must be recursively rolled out for long-horizon planning, which leads to compounding errors and a mismatch between training objectives and downstream planning tasks. To address this limitation, we propose Variable-length Latent World Models (VLWMs), a framework that learns to predict future latent states conditioned on action sequences of variable lengths. Instead of training only on one-step transitions, VLWMs directly model temporally extended dynamics, allowing the same predictor to evaluate action plans over different horizons. We further introduce a curriculum training strategy that progressively expands the action horizon, stabilizing optimization from short-range dynamics to long-range prediction. At test time, we design planning methods tailored to VLWMs to better exploit their variable-length predictive capabilities. Experiments on long-horizon control tasks show that VLWMs significantly improve latent space world models, achieving 13\% average improvement over the state-of-the-art LeWM across different datasets, with especially large gains on tasks requiring extended planning. These results suggest that VLWM provides a simple yet effective paradigm for improving long-horizon prediction and planning in latent world models.

</details>


### [791] [A Causal DAG Prior for Synthetic Time-Series Classification Datasets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21776)
*Franco Martino O'Rourke,Ana Trisovic,Dimitris Bertsimas*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种因果先验生成器，用于生成包含表格属性和时间序列的多变量时间序列分类数据集，并基于此微调TabPFN v2.5，在UCR/UEA数据集上显著优于未修改的上游模型和仅表格消融版本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Prior-data fitted网络需要由训练先验生成的数据，而现有合成先验无法生成具有跨模态因果结构（通道、时间步和标签之间）的多变量时间序列分类数据集。

Method: 引入因果先验：从随机采样的有向无环图（DAG）生成数据集，包含表格属性和时间序列两种模态；对TabPFN v2.5进行最小适应微调，并在UCR/UEA的75个数据集上评估。

Result: 微调后的模型在ROC-AUC上显著优于未修改的上游模型和仅表格消融版本（Wilcoxon符号秩检验p=3.0×10⁻⁸）。

Conclusion: 跨模态时间因果结构对性能提升有显著贡献，验证了所提出的因果先验的有效性。

Abstract: A Prior-data fitted Network learns the posterior predictive induced by its training prior; bringing this paradigm to multivariate time-series classification therefore calls for a synthetic generator that produces complete labelled datasets with temporal structure. We introduce a causal prior that synthesizes each dataset from a randomly sampled DAG over typed nodes across two modalities (tabular attributes and time series), natively producing multivariate, multi-class TSC datasets with cross-modal causal structure across channels, timesteps and labels, a regime not addressed by existing synthetic priors. To validate the prior, we finetune TabPFN v2.5 with minimal adaptations and evaluate on 75 UCR/UEA datasets within TabPFN's operating regime. Finetuning on our generator significantly outperforms both the unmodified upstream model and a tabular-only ablation of the same prior (Wilcoxon signed-rank $p=3.0\times 10^{-8}$ on ROC-AUC), isolating the contribution of the cross-modal temporal structure.

</details>


### [792] [RocketPFN: Accurate Time Series Classification via In-Context Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21786)
*Franco Martino O'Rourke,Ana Trisovic,Dimitris Bertsimas*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: RocketPFN 结合Rocket特征提取与TabPFN上下文分类，实现零训练、零参数的时间序列分类，在UCR数据集上匹配SOTA集成方法HC2的平均准确率(0.900)，且显著优于单个分类器及多个TSC基础模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有时间序列分类( TSC)基础模型需要大量预训练且性能不稳定，本文旨在探索一种无需训练、无需学习参数的轻量级管道，作为评估零样本TSC基础模型的参考基准。

Method: 两阶段流水线：1) 使用Rocket进行随机卷积特征提取；2) 将提取的特征输入预训练表格基础模型TabPFN v2.5 进行上下文分类，整个过程无需任何目标数据训练。

Result: 在92个UCR数据集上，RocketPFN平均准确率0.900，与集成方法HC2持平；显著优于HC2中的每个单独分类器及MOMENT、Mantis、MantisV2等TSC基础模型(p<0.001)；中位推理时间仅30秒/折。

Conclusion: RocketPFN证明无需训练的两阶段管道在时间序列分类上可达到甚至超越复杂集成模型和预训练基础模型，为零样本TSC方法提供了一个简洁、高效的参考基准。

Abstract: We introduce RocketPFN, a training-free pipeline for time series classification that combines random convolutional feature extraction (Rocket) with in-context classification via a pretrained tabular foundation model (TabPFN v2.5). On 92 UCR datasets (30-resample protocol), RocketPFN matches HC2, the strongest published method on the archive, in mean accuracy (both 0.900, Wilcoxon p=0.50), with no training on the target data and a median inference time of 30 seconds per fold. It also significantly outperforms every individual classifier in the HC2 ensemble. On UEA (20 datasets) the difference is likewise not statistically significant. A separate comparison concerns TSC foundation models: when paired with the same downstream classifier, MOMENT, Mantis, and MantisV2 are all significantly outperformed by RocketPFN using fewer extracted features and no learned parameters (p<0.001 in each case). This holds even when the encoders were pretrained on corpora that include the UCR training samples. We propose this two-stage pipeline as a reference point for evaluating zero-shot TSC foundation models.

</details>


### [793] [What Do Lorentz-Equivariant Jet Taggers Learn?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21790)
*Jay Agarwal,Siddharth Khare,Dhruv Kumar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了洛伦兹等变喷注标记器（L-GATr、L-GATr-slim、LLoCa-T等）的内部学习机制，通过等变性测试、线性探测和等级消融实验发现：等变模型会抑制参考系依赖的赝快度，同时强化喷注质量和N-subjettiness等物理特征；双向量通道对顶夸克标记贡献可忽略，而类矢量通道占主导地位且具有种子变量特性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解洛伦兹等变神经网络在喷注标记任务中究竟学习了什么物理特征，揭示其内部表示机制，为未来模型设计提供指导。

Method: 使用等变性测试、线性探测（linear probes）和等级消融（grade ablations）三种分析手段，对L-GATr、L-GATr-slim、LLoCa-T等五个等变喷注标记模型进行系统性剖析。

Result: 1）线性探测表明等变模型将依赖参考系的赝快度（pseudorapidity）抑制为零，同时强烈编码喷注质量和N-subjettiness。2）等级消融实验显示，在L-GATr中双向量（bivector）通道对顶夸克标记几乎无贡献，而类矢量（vector-like）通道占主导但呈现种子变量特性（seed variable），表明网络利用了多条表征通路。

Conclusion: 该研究刻画了等变喷注标记器中哪些物理特征和代数等级结构携带判别信息，对后续等变模型的开发具有指导意义。

Abstract: We study what Lorentz-equivariant jet taggers learn internally, using equivariance tests, linear probes and grade ablations across five models including L-GATr, L-GATr-slim and LLoCa-T. Linear probes show that equivariant models suppress frame-dependent pseudorapidity to zero while encoding jet mass and N-subjettiness strongly. Grade ablations on L-GATr reveal that bivector channels are negligible for top-quark tagging while vector-like channels are dominant but seed variable, consistent with the network exploiting multiple representational pathways. These results characterize which physical features and algebraic grade structures carry discriminative information in equivariant taggers and may inform future development of such models.

</details>


### [794] [Discretizing Reward Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21795)
*Vijay Viswanathan,Shiqi Wang,Devamanyu Hazarika,Chirag Nagpal,Tongshuang Wu,Graham Neubig,Yuning Mao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文揭示奖励模型的过度敏感性问题：看似完美的奖励模型会对同等质量的回答给出不同分数，导致策略劣化。作者提出区分"判别能力"与"特异性"的新评估指标，并设计基于蒙特卡洛dropout的无训练离散化算法，在理论上证明存在能降低过度敏感性且几乎不损失判别能力的离散化方案，实验表明离散化奖励可减少奖励破解并改进策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 奖励模型在强化学习中广泛使用却未被充分理解，其连续评分特性带来的"敏感性"表面上是优势，实则可能是严重缺陷——过度敏感导致对同等质量的回答给出不同分数，进而引发奖励破解和次优策略。

Method: 提出两个新评估指标：判别能力（区分不同质量回答）和特异性（不过度敏感的补集）；设计无需训练的后处理算法，对任意神经奖励模型应用蒙特卡洛dropout生成离散奖励簇，从理论上证明存在最优离散化方案。

Result: 理论上证明看似完美的奖励模型可能高度过度敏感；实验中在受控和自然RL场景下，离散化奖励相比原始连续奖励显著减少奖励破解，得到更优策略。

Conclusion: 奖励模型的连续评分特性非优势而是隐患，离散化处理是简单有效的修复手段；建议学界重新审视奖励模型评估方式，从单一"准确率"转向"判别能力+特异性"双维度。

Abstract: Despite their widespread use, the role of reward models in shaping reinforcement learning is poorly understood. Reward models offer a tempting promise: they automatically estimate response quality in the absence of verifiers or human judges. Unlike "verifiable rewards" which typically produce binary scores, reward models typically produce continuous scores, allowing them to be sensitive to fine-grained differences in responses. However, we show this apparent strength is a serious weakness: many popular reward models are oversensitive, assigning different scores to equally good responses. Theoretically, we show that seemingly perfect reward models can be highly oversensitive; empirically, this oversensitivity can lead to bad policies. In place of existing notions of "reward model accuracy," we propose evaluating reward models using distinct measures of "discriminative ability" and "specificity" (the complement of oversensitivity). As a solution, we describe a training-free algorithm that uses Monte Carlo dropout on any neural reward model to produce discrete reward clusters. Theoretically, we prove there exist discretizations that reduce oversensitivity at minimal expense of discriminative ability; empirically we show, in both controlled and natural RL settings, that discretizing rewards leads to less reward hacking and better policies than training on the original rewards.

</details>


### [795] [Causal Variational Deep Embedding: A Family of Interventional Generators for Confounded Images](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21806)
*Jingyuan Chen,Kangrui Ruan,Junzhe Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出CauVaDE，一种基于规范增广SCM的因果变分深度嵌入方法，通过将未观测混杂因子离散化为有限支撑的聚类变量，并利用熵正则化在观测数据似然相当的情况下扫描可行因果效应区域，从而从图像数据中生成多样化的干预样本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度生成模型会继承训练数据中的虚假关联，其中一个常见来源是未观测的混杂因子同时影响用户想控制的属性和期望响应的属性。现有因果方法依赖过强的结构假设来确定单一干预分布，而在图像领域这些假设往往不成立，数据通常与一组不同的因果机制一致。

Method: 构建规范增广SCM，将未观测混杂因子无损地坍缩为离散潜聚类变量（有限支撑），连续变化吸收到独立噪声中。证明该规范类在观测和干预Wasserstein距离下稠密。实例化为混合变分自编码器，聚类变量作为规范混杂因子，使用熵正则化（权重γ）在聚类后验上追踪一族候选因果效应。

Result: 在图像数据基准上，CauVaDE产生多样化的干预样本，并相比无混杂参考基线提升了FID分数。

Conclusion: 通过放松单一干预分布的假设，CauVaDE成功刻画了可行因果效应区域，在不依赖强结构假设的前提下实现了有效的因果干预生成，为图像领域的因果生成建模提供了新思路。

Abstract: Deep generative models reproduce the observational distribution of their training data, inheriting any spurious associations it contains. A common source is an unobserved confounder that shapes both an attribute the user wants to control at sampling time and an attribute expected to vary in response. Existing causal generative approaches resolve the resulting ambiguity by imposing structural assumptions strong enough to single out one interventional distribution; in image domains, such assumptions are rarely warranted, and the data is generally consistent with a set of distinct causal mechanisms -- a feasible region of interventional distributions. We propose CauVaDE (Causal Variational Deep Embedding), built on a canonical augmented SCM in which the unobserved confounder collapses, without loss of generality, into a discrete latent cluster of bounded support while continuous variation is absorbed into independent noises. We prove that this canonical class is dense, in both observational and interventional Wasserstein distance, in the class of augmented SCMs compatible with a given causal diagram, and instantiate it as a mixture variational autoencoder whose cluster variable plays the role of the canonical confounder. An entropy regularizer with weight $γ$ on the cluster posterior then traces a family of candidate causal effects that fit the observational data to comparable likelihood while spanning the feasible region. Experiments on image data benchmarks show that CauVaDE produces diverse interventional samples and improves FID against an unconfounded reference.

</details>


### [796] [Causal Gaussian Processes for Robust Treatment Effect Evaluation with Unobserved Confounding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21809)
*Junzhe Zhang,Jingyuan Chen,Elias Bareinboim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的因果高斯过程（CGP）模型，通过对外生域进行离散化近似，能够在仅需治疗和结果的时间顺序信息下，从混杂观测数据中估计连续域上的因果效应，无需详细的先验知识。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有因果效应评估方法要么需要详细的先验知识，要么只适用于离散处理变量和结果变量，难以处理连续域上的混杂偏差问题。本文旨在解决这一挑战，仅需基本的时间顺序信息即可评估连续域上的因果效应。

Method: 提出了一种外生域的普适离散化方法，能够以任意精度近似任意因果模型的观测分布和干预分布。基于这一普适近似性质，开发了因果高斯过程（CGP）模型系列，用于近似具有混杂观测的因果模型。

Result: 通过离散化外生域，实现了对任意因果模型的观测和干预分布的有限状态近似，并在此理论基础上构建了CGP模型。

Conclusion: 本文的CGP模型为连续域上的混杂因果效应评估提供了一种新的、无需详细先验知识的解决方案，拓展了因果推断的适用范围。

Abstract: The presence of confounding bias poses a key challenge in policy evaluation, as the target causal effects of actions are not identifiable (i.e., underdetermined) from observational data. On the other hand, existing confounding-robust evaluation strategies require detailed prior knowledge about the environment or apply only to discrete treatments and outcomes. This paper investigates causal effect evaluation over the continuous domain from confounded observations, while requiring only basic temporal ordering between the treatment and the outcome. We introduce a universal discretization of the exogenous domains that approximates the observational and interventional distributions of any causal model with arbitrary accuracy using a finite number of latent states. Building on this newfound universal approximation property, we develop a novel family of Causal Gaussian process (CGP) models that effectively approximate the observational and interventional distributions of any causal model with confounded observations.

</details>


### [797] [Local Causal Attribution of Chain-of-Thought Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21821)
*Dennis Wei,Yannis Belkhiter,Erik Miehling,Radu Marinescu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了AttriCoT方法，通过结构因果模型对语言模型思维链中的组件进行因果归因，仅需O(U)次前向传播即可获得忠实于模型行为的归因结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解语言模型思维过程的因果结构对透明性和安全性至关重要，现有方法缺乏对思维链内部组件间因果关系的系统分析。

Method: 构建结构因果模型（SCM）将思维链中的每个单元（unit）作为变量，通过O(U)次前向传播估计因果参数，实现黑色盒归因。

Result: 在5个数据集和4个推理模型上的扰动曲线评估表明，AttriCoT产生的归因比现有方法更忠实于模型行为，并揭示了不同模型和领域间思维结构的显著差异。

Conclusion: AttriCoT能够高效、忠实地归因语言模型思维链的因果结构，为理解和比较不同模型的推理过程提供了新工具。

Abstract: Understanding the causal structure of a language model's thought process is a problem of significant importance for both transparency and safety. In this work, we take a local approach toward this goal by analyzing the causal relationships among individual components, termed units, of a given, specific chain-of-thought trace. We construct a structural causal model on these units and relate each unit to the log probability of generating (subsequent) output units. Our algorithm, termed AttriCoT, is a black-box method that performs attribution by estimating importance parameters in the structural causal model using $O(U)$ forward passes through the model, where $U$ is the number of units. Evaluation of perturbation curves across 5 datasets and 4 reasoning models shows that AttriCoT produces attributions that are more faithful to the model's behavior than alternative methods. The attribution results also reveal notable differences in thought structure between models and domains.

</details>


### [798] [Mat-Pref: Verifiable-Reward Training Improves Compositional Reasoning in Inorganic Materials](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21830)
*Sarrah R. Mikhail Leung,Taehan Kim,Jeongbin Park*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出 Mat-Pref 基准，用于评估材料科学中的组合化学推理，发现单纯扩大模型规模无法解决该任务，而 SFT + GRPO 两阶段 pipeline 可将 8B 模型提升至超越 235B 零样本模型，并揭示了 GRPO 通过重塑答案分布实现推理能力提升的机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有 RLVR 在科学领域取得进展，但现有基准无法分解能力来源（结构泛化、性质迁移还是记忆）。作者希望构建一个能隔离这三种泛化类型的基准，并探究小模型在何种训练策略下能在材料组合推理中超越大模型。

Method: 构建 Mat-Pref 基准（10,837 个离子替换问题，11 种无机结构家族），设计三种评估拆分（分布内、保留结构家族、跨性质迁移）。采用 SFT + GRPO 两阶段训练 Qwen3-8B，并使用自一致性采样、logit lens 分析和干扰项排列一致性指标进行机制分析。

Result: 零样本前沿模型（70-671B）在所有拆分上仅 33-54%；Qwen3-8B 经 SFT+GRPO 后在分布内达 65.2%，在保留家族上达 71.6%，超越 Qwen3-235B 零样本超 20 个百分点。GRPO 使正确答案从"可达到"变为"模态响应"，在关键决策层将回答结晶优势提升约 20 个百分点，并将干扰项排列一致性差距从 24.0 降至 14.3 个百分点。

Conclusion: 材料科学中的组合化学推理不会随模型规模扩大而自动解决；GRPO 的核心作用不在于让模型"学会"正确推理，而在于提升正确推理的稳定性——将正确答案从可达但非模态重塑为稳定模态输出，这种机制为该类复杂推理任务提供了有效方向。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards (RLVR) has driven rapid progress in mathematical and code reasoning, but when extended to science, existing benchmarks do not decompose what generalizes: do gains reflect structural transfer, property transfer, or memorization? We introduce Mat-Pref, a benchmark of 10,837 ionic-substitution questions across 11 inorganic structure families, grounded in density functional theory calculations from the Materials Project, with three evaluation splits that isolate in-distribution performance, generalization to entirely held-out structure families, and cross-property transfer: applying band-gap reasoning to hosts seen during training only through formation-energy supervision. Four zero-shot frontier models (70-671B parameters) remain in the 33-54% range on every split, confirming that scale alone does not resolve the compositional chemical reasoning this task demands. A two-stage pipeline of supervised fine-tuning followed by Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) lifts Qwen3-8B to 65.2% in-distribution and 71.6% on held-out families, exceeding zero-shot Qwen3-235B by over 20 percentage points on both structural-generalization splits. Self-consistency sampling shows that the SFT policy can already produce correct answers but cannot reliably surface them as the modal response; GRPO reshapes the distribution so that correct answers become modal rather than merely reachable, and this sharper commitment is visible mechanistically: logit lens analysis reveals a ${\sim}$20pp advantage in answer crystallization at the critical decision layer. We formalize this observation as a distractor-permutation consistency metric under which GRPO narrows the gap between lenient scoring (at least one permutation correct) and strict scoring (all permutations correct) from 24.0 to 14.3 percentage points.

</details>


### [799] [UniRank: Unified Rank Allocation for Low-Rank LLM Compression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21847)
*Chao Han,Haozhe Hu,Fei Ma,Wei Zhang,Xiaoyu Shen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于局部奇异能量比和全局功能重要性（输入-输出余弦相似度）的双标准排序-截断低秩分解方法，并引入秩保持微调以避免截断信息损失，在多种LLM上实现高达50%的困惑度降低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的低秩分解压缩方法中，秩分配要么依赖缺乏泛化性的手工规则，要么依赖计算开销巨大的学习方法，急需一种高效且通用的全局秩分配方案。

Method: 1) 将全局低秩分配形式化为"排序-截断"流程；2) 用局部奇异能量比衡量参数矩阵内部重要性，用输入-输出余弦相似度衡量模块的功能重要性；3) 验证了高余弦相似度与低有效秩之间的强相关性；4) 提出秩保持微调，直接在分解权重上进行LoRA微调，避免传统合并流程中截断带来的信息损失。

Result: 在一次性压缩（无微调）场景下，相比均匀分配和启发式分配基线，困惑度降低高达50%；且能与不同分解方案、模型规模和架构设计兼容，带来持续的性能提升。

Conclusion: 所提双标准排序-截断方法可高效实现全局秩分配，秩保持微调进一步避免了信息损失，为LLM低秩压缩提供了一种通用且有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Low-rank decomposition serves as a promising compression paradigm for large language models, however, rank allocation remains challenging: manual rules lack generalizability, and learning-based approaches incur heavy computational overhead. To address these issues, we formulate global low-rank allocation as a sorting-and-truncation pipeline, and score each singular component via dual criteria: \textbf{Local} singular energy ratio that quantifies the intrinsic importance within the decomposed parameter matrix and \textbf{Global} functional importance (measured by input-output cosine similarity) that evaluates the functional significance of decomposed modules. We verify the strong correlation between high input-output cosine similarity and low effective rank through geometric interpretation and experimental validation. Furthermore, we propose rank-preserving fine-tuning, which performs direct LoRA tuning on decomposed weights and avoids extra information loss caused by re-truncation in conventional merging pipelines. Empirical results confirm that our method delivers sustained performance enhancements when combined with models featuring distinct decomposition schemes, model sizes and architectural designs, e.g. in one-shot compression without further fine-tuning, our method reduces perplexity by up to 50\% compared with uniform and heuristic allocation baselines. Code will be available at https://github.com/EIT-NLP/LLM-Pruning.

</details>


### [800] [WiSP: A Working-Set View of Mixture-of-Experts Serving on Extremely Low-Resource Hardware](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21868)
*Jiamu Zhang,Liang Wu,Mayank Darbari,Liangjie Hong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: WiSP提出了一种路由感知的专家分页机制，将低资源MoE推理建模为GPU工作集管理问题，通过动态管理专家权重和KV缓存的内存分配，在模型无法完全放入VRAM时实现最高1.95倍的解码吞吐量提升。同时提出的MV-WSA方法通过边际收益均衡机制优化两者间的内存分配，离线配置器在真实服务中表现最佳，在线控制器可额外提供1.20x加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MoE模型虽然具有稀疏激活特性，但所有专家参数仍必须存储在GPU可访问的位置。当模型无法完全放入GPU显存时，常见的层级CPU卸载方案虽能降低内存压力，但每次前向传播需将所有专家通过PCIe传输，丧失了MoE的稀疏性优势。作者将问题重新定义为GPU上工作集（路由专家权重）与KV缓存之间的显存竞争管理问题。

Method: 提出WiSP（工作集分页）系统，包含：1) 路由感知的专家分页器，仅保留工作负载重用的专家在显存中，可插入未修改的服务引擎；2) MV-WSA（边际价值工作集分配）方法，通过均衡每字节的边际延迟收益来确定专家与KV缓存的最优分配比例，支持离线配置和在线动态调整。

Result: WiSP在模型无法完全放入显存时，相比静态卸载方案实现最高1.95倍解码吞吐量提升。MV-WSA离线配置器是唯一在预填充和解码阶段均表现良好的策略；在轨迹驱动模拟中，与每工作流最优解相差仅几个百分点，而固定分割策略差约20%。在线控制器额外提供1.20x加速。
