Abstract: Rubric-based rewards offer interpretable and fine-grained optimization signals for reinforcement learning in open-ended tasks where verifiable answers are unavailable. However, pre-constructed rubrics remain static throughout training, creating a fundamental mismatch with the evolving policy: fixed criteria gradually lose discriminative power as the model improves, leading to reward saturation and potential hacking. Recent dynamic rubric methods partially address this but rely on external frontier models or ground-truth answers, and update rubrics only at coarse granularity. We propose EvoRubrics, a co-evolutionary RL framework where a Policy LLM and a Rubric Generator jointly improve through adversarial interaction within each training step. As the policy improves under the rubric generator's guidance, the rubric generator adapts its criteria to remain discriminative and informative, enabling evaluation to track the policy in real time and naturally inducing an automatic curriculum. Experiments show that EvoRubrics consistently outperforms static and dynamic rubric baselines across benchmarks. The learned Rubric Generator further generalizes as a transferable reward model. Notably, even a fully self-supervised variant without any external supervision achieves meaningful gains, suggesting that co-evolution between generation and evaluation alone can provide sufficiently rich learning signals. Our code is publicly available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/EvoRubrics-2155/.

</details>


### [913] [SVD-Surgeon: Optimal Singular-Value Surgery for Large Language Model Compression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23568)
*Mahmoud Safari,Frank Hutter*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出SVD-Surgeon，一种无需训练的SVD压缩增强方法，通过在奇异值分解上应用最优脑外科医生（OBS）框架，对保留的奇异值进行闭式补偿，从而改善模型压缩后的困惑度-压缩权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型（LLMs）虽性能卓越，但内存和计算需求巨大。低秩压缩（如SVD）虽能缓解，但现有方法只关注如何分解和保留哪些成分，缺乏对截断后损失的补偿机制。

Method: 将最优脑外科医生（OBS）框架引入奇异值基，将每个奇异值视为参数，对被截断的奇异值造成的损失进行二阶闭式补偿更新；同时利用同样的分析得到奇异值的重要性（saliency），指导剪枝决策。

Result: 在SVD-LLM基础上叠加SVD-Surgeon，在OPT家族和LLaMA 2-7B上改善了困惑度-压缩权衡，且无需重新训练。

Conclusion: SVD-Surgeon是一种轻量、即插即用的增强方案，可叠加于现有SVD压缩方法之上，进一步提升压缩效率。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) achieve remarkable performance across a wide range of tasks, but their deployment is constrained by substantial memory and compute requirements. Low-rank compression via singular value decomposition (SVD) is an effective remedy, but existing methods focus on how to factorize and which components to keep. We introduce SVD-Surgeon, a training-free method that brings the Optimal Brain Surgeon (OBS) framework to the singular-value basis. Treating each singular value as a parameter, it computes a closed-form update of the retained singular values that compensates, to second order in the model loss, for those removed by truncation. The same analysis yields a saliency for choosing which values to prune. As it operates directly on the singular-value factorization, SVD-Surgeon can be layered on top of existing SVD compressors. Applied to SVD-LLM, a leading SVD-based method, it improves the perplexity-compression trade-off on the OPT family and LLaMA 2-7B without any retraining.

</details>


### [914] [Prime Fourier Embeddings: A Principled Basis for Modular Arithmetic](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23044)
*Hyunsang Hwang,Suhyun Bae,Donghun Lee*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Prime Fourier Embeddings (PFE)，将整数编码为质数索引的(cos, sin)对，利用Q上的调和分析提供预结构化表示。作者证明PFE上任何关于乘积群作用等变的线性映射都是按质数分块对角化的，并利用中国剩余定理预测任务相关通道。实验显示任务相关与无关通道的特化比率超过500倍，在所有测试的无平方因子复合模数上达到完美分布内测试准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准神经嵌入往往无法暴露数字的代数结构（如模运算），因此需要一个能够天然编码整数代数结构的表示方法，使模运算等代数任务不再需要从头学习代数结构。

Method: 将整数编码为质数索引的(cos, sin)对（基于Q上的调和分析）；利用Schur引理证明等变线性映射的块对角化性质；利用中国剩余定理预测任务相关质数通道。

Result: 任务相关与无关通道的特化比率超过500倍；在所有测试的无平方因子复合模数上达到完美分布内测试准确率。

Conclusion: PFE通过预结构化表示有效暴露了数字的代数结构，为神经网络的算术推理提供了理论驱动的嵌入方案。

Abstract: Numbers have algebraic structure that standard neural embeddings often fail to expose. We introduce Prime Fourier Embeddings (PFE), which encode integers as prime-indexed (cos, sin) pairs derived from the harmonic analysis of Q, providing a pre-structured representation in which modular arithmetic reduces to selecting the relevant prime channel rather than discovering algebraic structure from scratch. We prove that any linear map equivariant with respect to the product group action on PFE must be block-diagonal with one independent block per prime -- a consequence of Schur's lemma applied to the resulting character decomposition. For square-free composite moduli, the Chinese Remainder Theorem predicts which prime channels are task-relevant. Both predictions are confirmed empirically: ablation studies show specialization ratios exceeding 500x between task-relevant and task-irrelevant channels, with perfect in-distribution test accuracy across all square-free composite moduli tested.

</details>


### [915] [Tapered Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23670)
*Reza Bayat,Ali Behrouz,Aaron Courville*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出“锥形语言模型”（TLM），在固定参数预算下，通过将MLP宽度从浅层到深层单调递减（余弦调度），显著提升各架构（Transformer、Gated Attention、Hope-attention、Titans）的困惑度与下游性能，且不增加额外参数或计算成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有语言模型默认各层参数均匀分配，但大量证据表明各层对最终输出的贡献不均（后层更多是细化而非变换残差流）。本文旨在探索是否应让参数容量反映这种不对称性。

Method: 通过控制实验验证“早期层多分配、后期层少分配”优于均匀基线；在此基础上提出TLM架构原则，对MLP宽度采用平滑余弦调度实现单调锥形化，在三种模型规模和四种架构上进行验证。

Result: 在固定预算下，锥形化MLP宽度一贯优于均匀基线，在困惑度和下游基准测试上均有提升，且不增加参数或计算开销。

Conclusion: 深度感知的容量分配是一种简单、架构无关的语言模型设计维度，是“藏于眼前”的免费杠杆。

Abstract: Modern language models, including transformer, recurrent, and memory-based variants, share a common chassis: a stack of identical layers in which parameters are allocated uniformly across depth. This is a default inherited from the original transformer and largely unchanged since, yet a growing body of evidence suggests that layers contribute non-uniformly to the final output, with later layers refining the residual stream rather than transforming it. We ask whether parameter capacity should reflect this asymmetry. Our controlled experiment shows that, under a fixed budget, allocating more capacity to earlier layers and less to later layers improves perplexity over a uniform-width baseline, while the reverse allocation hurts. Building on this result, we introduce Tapered Language Models (TLMs), an architectural principle in which a parameter-bearing component is monotonically tapered across depth under a fixed total budget. MLPs are the natural site for this instantiation: they dominate parameter count across all modern LM families and expose width as a single, clean axis of variation. Across three model scales and four architectures (Transformer, Gated Attention, Hope-attention, and Titans), tapering MLP width via a smooth cosine schedule consistently improves perplexity and downstream benchmark performance over uniform baselines, at no additional parameter or compute cost. These findings establish depth-aware capacity allocation as a simple, architecture-agnostic axis of language model design, a free lever hidden in plain sight.

</details>


### [916] [PeLAP-A: Adaptive Latent Pruning for Lightweight Latent Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23086)
*Kissa Zahra,Zaib Un Nisa*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出PeLAP-A框架，通过可学习的通道重要性预测器对潜在扩散模型进行通道剪枝。实验发现极端稀疏正则化下所有通道被压制，但去噪UNet性能反而提升，将此现象称为"稀疏崩溃"。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究潜在扩散模型中，VAE编码的潜在通道是否同等重要，是否存在冗余。

Method: 设计轻量级框架PeLAP-A，在标准潜在扩散管道中加入一个由两层MLP组成的可学习通道重要性预测器，对全局池化后的潜在特征生成软掩码，抑制不重要通道后再输入去噪UNet。联合训练扩散损失、重建损失和稀疏性损失。

Result: 在CIFAR-10上，强稀疏正则化（lambda=0.01）下所有通道被抑制，但扩散损失（0.0236 vs 0.0240）和VAE重建MSE（22.59 vs 24.67）均优于未剪枝基线。

Conclusion: 揭示了"稀疏崩溃"现象，证明去噪UNet对潜在通道抑制具有显著鲁棒性，表明潜在扩散模型存在信息冗余。

Abstract: Latent diffusion models achieve strong generative performance by operating in a compressed latent space produced by a variational autoencoder (VAE). However, it remains unclear whether all latent channels contribute equally to the diffusion process, or whether significant redundancy exists. We introduce PeLAP-A (Adaptive Latent Pruning for Diffusion), a lightweight framework that augments a standard latent diffusion pipeline with a learnable channel-wise importance predictor. A two-layer MLP operating on globally pooled latent features produces a soft mask that suppresses unimportant latent channels before they enter the denoising UNet. The entire system is trained jointly on CIFAR-10 under a combined diffusion, reconstruction, and sparsity loss. Experiments reveal a striking result: under aggressive sparsity regularization (lambda = 0.01), the importance predictor drives all latent channels to near-zero yet the denoising UNet achieves lower diffusion loss (0.0236 vs. 0.0240) and lower VAE reconstruction MSE (22.59 vs. 24.67) compared to the unpruned baseline. We term this the sparsity collapse phenomenon and provide an analysis of why it occurs and what it reveals about the information requirements of latent diffusion models. These findings constitute an exploratory study of sparsity dynamics in latent diffusion training, and demonstrate that denoising UNets can remain remarkably robust to latent channel suppression even under aggressive regularization. Code is available at: https://github.com/kissasium/PeLAP-A.git.

</details>


### [917] [FlowTrain: Flow-Based Decoupled Training for Industrial-Grade Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23087)
*Zhida Jiang,Zhaolong Xing,Yang Pei,Xiaolong Chen,Yuanhang Xiao,Chengzhi Huang,Xiyu Liu,Haopeng Liu,Qingyuan Sang,Lingfeng Zhou,Jiaxing Wang,Zicheng Zhang,Wenzhe Wang,Xinyu Liu,Yan Li,Zhen Chen,Ke Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FlowTrain提出了一种基于流的解耦训练框架，将VLM训练重构为生产者-消费者数据流，通过统一内存池协调编码器和主干的独立执行，并引入异构并行分配器和动态打包调度器，实现高达1.7倍的吞吐量提升，将MFU提升至50%以上。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLM分布式训练方案（一体化设计或分离部署）效率远低于纯语言模型，异构模块间的同步耦合成为性能瓶颈，亟需进一步解耦。

Method: 提出FlowTrain框架：(1) 将VLM训练建模为生产者-消费者数据流，通过统一内存池解耦执行；(2) 异构并行分配器，通过求解吞吐匹配问题分配模块级并行策略；(3) 动态打包调度器，根据LLM端实际计算成本构建平衡的微批次。

Result: 在真实工作负载上实现超过50%的MFU，最高1.7x吞吐量提升，缩小了与纯LLM训练的效率差距。

Conclusion: FlowTrain通过流式解耦有效提高了VLM分布式训练效率，验证了进一步解耦异构模块的可行性。

Abstract: Industrial-grade distributed training of vision-language models (VLMs) remains far less efficient than that of unimodal LLMs. Existing solutions either follow a monolithic design that assigns uniform parallelism to heterogeneous modules or adopt a disaggregated deployment that separates modules while executing them as a batch-synchronized pipeline. In this paper, we highlight that the above solutions are still not sufficient, and VLM training can be further decoupled. To this end, we present FlowTrain, a flow-based decoupled training framework that reformulates VLM training as a producer-consumer dataflow coordinated through a unified memory pool. The encoder and backbone can progress independently over a global virtual address space. Since this execution decoupling fundamentally changes the optimization objective of allocation and scheduling, FlowTrain further introduces a heterogeneous parallel allocator that assigns module-specific parallelism strategies by solving a throughput matching problem. The dynamic packing scheduler is used to construct balanced microbatches at runtime according to the actual LLM-side computation cost. Extensive experiments on real-world workloads show that FlowTrain achieves over 50% MFU and up to 1.7x throughput improvement, narrowing the efficiency gap to LLM-only training.

</details>


### [918] [FLFL: Federated Latent Factor Learning for Private Recovery of Spatio-Temporal Signals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23091)
*Chengjun Yu,Di Wu,Yi He,Jia Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种联邦潜在因子学习（FLFL）模型，用于无线传感器网络中隐私保护的时空信号恢复。该模型通过传感器级联邦学习框架（只上传梯度而非原始数据）结合时空相关性正则化约束，在保护数据隐私的同时实现高精度缺失数据恢复，在四个真实数据集上优于八种先进模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有潜在因子学习（LFL）模型要求将所有传感数据集中到中央服务器处理，这在数据隐私日益敏感的背景下变得不可接受。为了在保护数据隐私的前提下实现高效的时空信号恢复，本文提出了FLFL模型。

Method: 1）基于LFL设计传感器级联邦学习框架，各传感器只上传梯度信息而非原始数据；2）将时空相关性作为正则化约束融入联邦学习框架，提升恢复精度。

Result: 在四个真实WSN数据集上的实验表明，FLFL在保护隐私的同时，在恢复精度上显著优于八种最先进的联邦与非联邦信号恢复模型。

Conclusion: FLFL模型成功实现了隐私保护与高精度缺失数据恢复的双重目标，为WSNs中隐私敏感场景下的信号恢复提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Wireless sensor network (WSNs) stands out as a burgeoning and promising domain in intelligent sensing. Owing to various factors such as sudden sensor malfunctions or deliberate shutdown of partial nodes to save energy, the collected sensing signals from WSNs commonly have massive missing data, leading to adverse effects on subsequent analysis or decision-making. Latent factor learning (LFL) has proven to be highly effective in recovering the missing data for WSNs. However, the existing LFL models require the collected sensing signals to be maintained in one central place like a central server, which is becoming unacceptable for data owners who are getting increasingly privacy-sensitive. To address this issue, this paper innovatively proposes a federated latent factor learning (FLFL) model for privacy-preserving spatio-temporal signal recovery. Its main idea is two-fold: 1) it designs a sensor-level federated learning framework based on LFL, where each sensor only needs to upload gradient information rather than raw data for training a privacy-preserving recovery model, and 2) it incorporates the spatio-temporal correlation into the designed federated learning framework as the regularization constraint to improve its recovery accuracy. With such designs, FLFL can not only accurately recover the missing data of WSNs but also ensure data owners' privacy-preserving of raw data. To evaluate the proposed FLFL model, extensive experiments have been conducted on four real-world WSN datasets. The results demonstrate that FLFL significantly outperforms eight state-of-the-art federated and non-federated signal recovery models in terms of recovery accuracy with privacy-preserving.

</details>


### [919] [Minimax Quantile Lower Bounds for Interactive Statistical Decision Making with Privacy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23096)
*Raghav Bongole,Amirreza Zamani,Tobias J. Oechtering,Mikael Skoglund*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种δ-显式极小极大分位数理论，用于交互式统计决策，通过高概率Fano方法和Le Cam方法导出下界，并展示了该框架在隐私保护问题中的应用，得到了显式的置信水平δ依赖的下界结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的极小极大风险（期望准则）无法捕捉罕见但后果严重的失败情况，因此需要发展基于分位数（高概率）的决策理论框架。

Method: 建立了极小极大分位数、下极小极大分位数与极小极大风险之间的结构关系；推导了两个共轭工具：高概率交互式Fano方法和高概率交互式Le Cam方法；通过限制可接受决策类，将互信息隐私纳入同一框架；针对坐标高斯私有化，推导了两点模板以隔离隐私导致的方差膨胀。

Result: 得到了显式的置信水平δ依赖的下界：高斯均值估计为log(1/δ)/n缩放；双臂高斯bandit为√(T log(1/δ))缩放；K臂bandit为√(KT log(1/δ))型缩放，隐私通过高斯方差膨胀因子体现。

Conclusion: 提出的分位数理论能够更全面地刻画交互式统计决策中的罕见失败风险，并且与隐私保护机制自然兼容，为高概率保证下的统计学习提供了理论基础。

Abstract: Minimax risk and regret are expectation-based criteria and do not capture rare but consequential failures. To address this concern, we develop a $δ$-explicit minimax-quantile theory for interactive statistical decision making (ISDM). We first provide structural relations between minimax quantiles, lower minimax quantiles, and minimax risk. This includes a quantile-to-expectation conversion and an equivalence between strict and lower minimax quantiles outside a countable set of confidence levels. We then derive two converse tools for ISDM: a high-probability interactive Fano's method and a high-probability interactive Le Cam's method. Then, we show that mutual-information (MI) privacy can be handled in the same framework by restricting the admissible decision class. For coordinatewise Gaussian privatization, we derive a two-point template that isolates the privacy-induced variance inflation. We instantiate this template for Gaussian mean estimation, and use the same two-point strategy directly for two-armed Gaussian bandits. We then derive a minimax quantile lower bound for the $K$-armed Gaussian bandit problem, showing that the interactive Fano method captures the exploration cost over multiple possible best arms. The resulting lower bounds are explicit in the confidence level $δ$ and in the privacy budget for the private problems. They yield $\log(1/δ)/n$ scaling for squared-error Gaussian mean estimation, $\sqrt{T\log(1/δ)}$ scaling for two-armed bounded-mean Gaussian bandits, and $\sqrt{KT\log(1/δ)}$-type scaling for the $K$-armed bandits, with privacy appearing through a Gaussian variance-inflation factor for the private problems.

</details>


### [920] [ReNIO: Reweighting Negative Trajectory Importance for LLM On-Policy Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23104)
*Chen Lin,Kedi Chen,Wei Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ReNIO是一种通过重加权错误轨迹来提升LLM推理能力的on-policy蒸馏方法，无需依赖最终答案正确性即可识别并利用更具信息量的错误生成样本，在数学推理和代码生成任务上取得显著改进。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准on-policy蒸馏对所有学生生成样本（SGOs）一视同仁，但实验发现仅用错误SGOs训练优于仅用正确SGOs。作者旨在利用这一不对称信号，无需完整答案rollout即可自动识别并加权更有信息量的错误轨迹。

Method: 提出ReNIO，通过学生与教师模型之间的token概率比值（student-to-teacher probability ratio）识别导致错误推理轨迹的关键token，将这些信息聚合为归一化的样本权重，从而自动对潜在负向轨迹赋予更大权重，且无需观察最终答案的正确性。

Result: 在数学推理任务上，Qwen3-1.7B相对提升8.90%，R1-Distill-Qwen-7B相对提升10.00%；在代码生成任务上也取得一致改进。

Conclusion: ReNIO有效地利用了错误轨迹中蕴含的探索性推理信号，在保持on-policy蒸馏前缀训练优势的同时，显著提升了蒸馏效果，验证了负样本在LLM推理蒸馏中的关键价值。

Abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) improves LLM reasoning by training a student model on its own generated outputs, but standard OPD treats all student-generated outputs (SGOs) equally regardless of their informativeness. We observe a consistent asymmetry in controlled filtering experiments: in both OPD and on-policy self distillation (OPSD), training only on incorrect SGOs outperforms training only on correct ones. Our further analysis suggests that models trained on correct-only SGOs tend to generate shorter reasoning traces and show weaker reflection behavior, while incorrect SGOs better preserve exploratory reasoning near the model's capability boundary. To exploit this signal without requiring full answer-containing rollouts, we introduce ReNIO, which Reweights Negative trajectory Importance for LLM On-policy distillation. By using the student-to-teacher probability ratio, ReNIO identifies pivotal tokens leading to wrong reasoning traces and aggregates their information into a normalized sample weight, inherently assigning larger weights to likely negative trajectories without observing the correctness of final-answer. Since Re-NIO only uses prefix-conditioned token probabilities, it preserves OPD's prefix training advantage over full-rollout reinforcement learning. Across both mathematical reasoning and code generation tasks, ReNIO improves both OPD and OPSD, with representative relative gains of up to 8.90% for Qwen3-1.7B and 10.00% for R1-Distill-Qwen-7B on mathematical reasoning benchmarks. Code repo: https://github.com/BDML-lab/ReNIO.

</details>


### [921] [Temporal-Spectral Alignment with Frequency Adaptation for Source-Free Time-Series Adaptation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23120)
*Shichang Meng,Linquan Wu,Xuan Ai,Linqi Song*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出SAFA方法，通过时间-频谱对齐和频率自适应模块，解决无源时间序列域适应中未被充分研究的频谱偏移问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有无源时间序列域适应方法忽略了数据中的频谱偏移，仅关注时间动态变化。

Method: 1) 多尺度建模源域的时域依赖和频谱特征；2) 引入可训练的频率自适应模块，通过调整目标信号的相位和幅度来对齐源分布。

Result: 在多个基准数据集上验证了SAFA的有效性和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: SAFA通过频谱对齐弥补了现有方法忽视频谱偏移的不足，为时间序列SFDA提供了新思路。

Abstract: The goal of source-free domain adaptation (SFDA) for time-series data is to transfer knowledge from a pre-trained source model to an unlabeled target domain without requiring access to source data, while addressing feature shift and temporal drift inherent in the signals. Although existing approaches have explored temporal dynamics in unsupervised source-free adaptation, they largely overlook spectral shifts in time-series data. Towards this end, we propose a novel approach termed temporal-Spectral Alignment with Frequency Adaptation (SAFA) for source-free time-series domain adaptation. Specifically, we first model the source domain at multiple scales by jointly capturing temporal dependencies and spectral characteristics. To adapt time-series data in the target domain, we introduce a trainable frequency adaptation module that modulates the phase and amplitude of target signals in the frequency domain to align them with the source distribution. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate the efficacy and robustness of SAFA.

</details>


### [922] [The Fractal Neural Operator: Overcoming Spectral Bias in Chaotic Attractors via Prime-Harmonic Weierstrass Encodings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23123)
*Kanishk Awadhiya*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Fractal Neural Operator (FNO)，利用非共振素数基近似混沌动力系统，通过Harmonic Weierstrass Encoder注入无限频谱分辨率，在Lorenz-63系统上实现347 Lyapunov时间的预测，超越SOTA 2.3倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度学习模型（Transformer、Neural Operator）存在频谱偏差，对混沌动力系统中的高频分形特征处理效果差，导致预测失效。作者认为混沌并非本质不可预测，而是需要非可微的分形嵌入流形。

Method: 提出Fractal Neural Operator (FNO)，核心是Harmonic Weierstrass Encoder，利用非共振素数基（而非$2^k$几何编码）避免频谱间隙和共振，将无限频谱分辨率注入潜在空间，近似连续动力系统。

Result: 在Lorenz-63混沌系统上，FNO将有效预测范围扩展到347 Lyapunov时间，比现有最先进的Reservoir Computing基线提升2.3倍。

Conclusion: 混沌系统对神经网络并非本质不可预测，关键在于使用非可微的、分形嵌入流形来替代传统平滑架构，突破频谱偏差限制。

Abstract: Deep learning models, particularly Transformers and Neural Operators, exhibit a well-documented "spectral bias," effectively acting as low-pass filters that smooth out high-frequency information. While benign in fluid dynamics, this bias is catastrophic for Chaotic Dynamical Systems, where the underlying strange attractor is characterized by fractal geometry and infinite spectral density. We introduce the Fractal Neural Operator (FNO), a novel architecture that utilizes a non-resonant prime number basis to approximate continuous dynamical systems. Unlike geometric encodings ($2^k$), which suffer from spectral gaps and resonance, our Harmonic Weierstrass Encoder injects infinite spectral resolution into the latent space. We demonstrate that FNO extends the valid prediction horizon of the Lorenz-63 system to 347 Lyapunov times, exceeding state-of-the-art Reservoir Computing baselines by a factor of 2.3x. These results suggest that "chaos" is not inherently unpredictable to neural networks, but rather requires non-differentiable, fractal embedding manifolds.

</details>


### [923] [Weighted Score-Oriented Losses for Temporally Localized Event Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23145)
*Edoardo Legnaro,Sabrina Guastavino,Francesco Marchetti*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种时间局部化的加权面向分数损失（wSOL）函数，用于事件预测和检测。该损失函数通过引入时间权重来区分报警的时间位置效用，解决了传统损失函数（如交叉熵）与事件级评估指标之间的不匹配问题，在三个基准数据集上取得了性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 事件检测系统在实际部署中通常使用时态相关的评估指标（如检测窗口、误报成本），但神经网络训练时使用的交叉熵等损失函数是逐点计算的，与事件级评估指标存在不匹配（score-loss mismatch）。

Method: 基于加权面向分数损失（wSOL）框架，引入时间权重：对靠近事件的误报给予折扣，若事件前存在可接受的报警则降低漏报惩罚。该损失函数可微，支持反向传播，可实例化为平衡准确率、TSS、F1、CSI等多种混淆矩阵指标。

Result: 在三个时间序列事件预测/检测基准数据集上的实验表明，当评估效用具有时间局部性且未被逐点标签编码时，wSOL相比交叉熵和未加权的面向分数损失能显著提升性能。

Conclusion: 时间局部化的加权损失函数能够有效弥合训练目标与部署评估之间的差距，在事件检测任务中是一种优于传统逐点损失函数的选择。

Abstract: Operational event-detection systems are rarely assessed by pointwise accuracy alone. In anomaly detection, changepoint detection, and warning systems, the utility of an alarm depends on its temporal position relative to an event. This produces a score-loss mismatch. Neural networks are commonly trained with classical loss functions, such as cross-entropy, whereas deployment decisions are obtained by thresholding network predictions, merging alarms through post-processing rules, and evaluating them with event-based metrics defined by detection windows and false-alarm costs. This paper studies a temporally localized specialization of weighted score-oriented loss (wSOL) for event prediction. Starting from score-oriented losses based on expected confusion matrices and from the weighted SOL framework of Marchetti et al., we consider temporal weights that discount near-event false positives and reduce false-negative penalties when an event is preceded by an admissible alarm. The resulting objective is differentiable with respect to the network predictions, and therefore can be optimized by back-propagation. It can be instantiated with balanced accuracy, true skill statistic, F1, critical success index, and related confusion-matrix scores. We evaluate the proposed approach by comparing cross-entropy, unweighted score-oriented loss, and wSOL on three benchmark datasets for time-series event prediction and detection. The results show that wSOL can improve performance when the evaluation utility is localized in time and is not already encoded by the pointwise labels.

</details>


### [924] [Substitution-Based Analysis of Structural Novelty for Generative Models of Materials](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23166)
*Masahiro Negishi,Aron Walsh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文评估了当前生成式AI模型在无机晶体设计中的局限性，发现81-92%的生成晶体实际上是训练集的重复或可通过元素替换获得，尤其在高对称性晶体系统中更为明显，表明模型存在偏向已知结构原型的记忆化问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管生成式AI模型在无机晶体设计方面取得了快速进展，但尚不清楚这些模型是否真正扩展了可搜索的材料空间，还是仅仅复现了已知的结构模式。作者希望系统性地评估AI生成晶体的新颖性。

Method: 开发了一套工作流，用于评估AI生成的晶体是否属于：(1)训练集重复；(2)可通过元素替换从已知结构衍生；(3)不满足上述任一条件的新颖结构。将该工作流应用于多个代表性生成模型进行定量分析。

Result: 81-92%的化学有效且亚稳态的生成晶体是训练重复或元素替换衍生物；高对称性晶体中这一倾向尤为强烈，而低对称性结构中有更多超出重复或替换的新颖结构。高对称性重复源于模型在训练稀疏区域的记忆化，低对称性新颖结构则是对训练密集数据的插值。

Conclusion: 当前生成模型存在显著局限：在高对称性区域偏向已知结构原型（记忆化），但在低对称性结构空间中有更广泛的探索能力。这为未来模型改进指明了方向——需要突破对已知结构原型的偏向。

Abstract: There has been rapid progress in generative artificial intelligence (AI) models for inorganic crystal design, which can efficiently generate large numbers of candidate compounds after being trained on databases of known crystals. However, it remains unclear whether they genuinely expand the accessible materials search space beyond conventional strategies such as elemental substitution within known structure types. We address this question by developing a workflow to assess whether AI-generated crystals are duplicates of training structures, reproducible by elemental substitution, or unmatched by either criterion. Applying this workflow to representative generative models reveals that 81-92% of chemically valid and metastable generated crystals are either training duplicates or substitution-derived structures. This tendency is particularly strong in high-symmetry crystal systems, even though many possible structural prototypes remain unexplored. Further analysis of the underlying structural fingerprints shows that low-symmetry structures beyond duplication or substitution can be interpreted as interpolation in training-data-rich regions, while high-symmetry duplicates appear to result from memorisation in training-sparse regions. Our findings highlight a limitation in the current generation of models that exhibit a bias towards known structural prototypes in the high symmetry regions, but enable wider exploration of the low-symmetry structural space.

</details>


### [925] [Position: Correct Answer, Wrong Mechanism -- When AI Scientists Defend General Claims Their Own Data Contradicts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23175)
*Steven Young Eulig*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文论证仅以最终结果评估AI科学家系统是不充分的，必须分别测量任务结果、机制保真度和认知诚实度。通过对28个编码代理实验的分析，发现大量"正确答案、错误机制"（CAWM）案例，并提出轻量级测试方案来检测这些问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前AI科学家系统被描述为工具、合著者或创始人，但评估方式却仅关注最终答案是否正确。这种结果导向的评估忽略了AI在推理过程中的机制保真度和认知诚实度，可能导致看似正确但实际不可靠的结论。

Method: 分析了28个编码代理实验（其中8个为跨模型探测），让代理尝试在Geant4模拟中重新发现已知的粒子识别可观测量。通过比较代理的最终答案与推理过程，识别"正确答案、错误机制"（CAWM）案例，并提出两步轻量级测试：一步状态转移检查和一键式重计算检查。

Result: 在主要模型的4/20和跨模型的3/8实验中，代理通过错误推理得到了正确答案（CAWM）。所有五个代理在有误导性先验条件时都能拒绝错误信息，但其中一个代理用与自身数据不一致的物理学来捍卫其选择的可观测量。诚实性与机制保真度在同一代理轨迹内出现分离。

Conclusion: 编码代理是可靠的工具，但不可靠的科学合著者。提出的两步轻量级测试可检测本研究中的所有CAWM案例。在基于模拟的科学发现场景中，需要机制保真度验证来确保AI作为合著者的可信度。

Abstract: AI scientist systems are described as tools, coauthors, or founders, but we evaluate them as if only the final answer matters. This position paper argues that outcome-only evaluation is insufficient, and that task outcome, mechanism fidelity, and epistemic honesty must be measured separately. Our evidence comes from 28 episodes of a coding agent attempting to rediscover a known particle identification observable in a Geant4 simulation, including an 8-episode probe across two additional frontier models. In 4/20 primary-model and 3/8 cross-model episodes, agents reach right-looking results through incorrect reasoning that breaks when conditions change, which we call Correct Answer, Wrong Mechanism (CAWM). Honesty and mechanism fidelity dissociate within a single agent trajectory. When given a partially misleading prior, all five agents reject the false component on evidence, yet one defends its chosen observable with physics inconsistent with its own data. In the simulation-based discovery setting studied here, coding agents prove reliable tools but unreliable scientific co-authors for open-ended claim-making, where co-author trust requires mechanism-fidelity verification they do not reliably self-apply. The failure is detectable, and we propose a lightweight test. A one-step regime-shift check needs only the agent's claim and flags the over-generalized cases. A companion recomputation flags the remaining cases when the correct observable is known. Together, these checks flag every CAWM case in this study.

</details>


### [926] [Stage-dependent integer-binary encoding in factorization-machine black-box optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23188)
*Ryo Ogawa,Mayumi Nakano,Yuya Seki,Shu Tanaka*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种阶段依赖的FMQA框架，在学习和搜索阶段分别使用不同的编码（one-hot用于学习，domain-wall用于搜索），并通过QUBO矩阵转换公式保持代理目标一致。实验表明学习阶段使用one-hot编码是性能主要驱动力，在细粒度离散化下阶段依赖编码可带来额外提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统FMQA在整个优化过程中使用单一的整数-二进制编码，但最适合代理学习的编码与最适合Ising机求解的编码可能不同，因此需要一种阶段依赖的编码策略。

Method: 提出阶段依赖的FMQA框架，推导了one-hot编码和domain-wall编码的QUBO矩阵之间的转换公式，使得代理目标在可行整数状态上保持不变（仅差一个加性常数）。具体设计了OhDw变体：学习阶段用one-hot编码，搜索阶段用domain-wall编码。

Result: 在Rastrigin函数上（N=2,5；q=61,301）实验发现：学习阶段的编码是主导性能因素，one-hot编码始终优于domain-wall和二进制编码。OhDw在N=5,q=301时性能优于纯one-hot FMQA，但在N=5,q=61时纯one-hot表现更好。

Conclusion: 学习阶段使用one-hot编码是优化性能的主要驱动力，阶段依赖编码在细粒度离散化下能提供进一步改进。

Abstract: Black-box optimization (BBO) deals with problems where objective functions lack explicit analytical forms and are expensive to evaluate. Factorization machine with quadratic-optimization annealing (FMQA) constructs a surrogate model using a factorization machine (FM) and optimizes it with an Ising machine. Conventional FMQA applies a single integer-binary encoding throughout the optimization process, although the encoding best suited to surrogate learning may differ from the one best suited to Ising-machine solution search. We propose a stage-dependent FMQA framework and derive conversion formulas between one-hot and domain-wall QUBO matrices that preserve the surrogate objective over feasible integer states up to an additive constant. We evaluate the OhDw variant, which employs one-hot encoding for learning and domain-wall encoding for search, on the Rastrigin function with input dimensions N = 2 and 5 and discretization levels q = 61 and 301. Across all conditions, the dominant factor governing optimization performance is the encoding used in the learning stage, with one-hot encoding consistently yielding lower residual errors than domain-wall or binary encoding. The additional benefit of switching to domain-wall encoding for solution search is condition-dependent. For N = 5 and q = 301, OhDw achieves a lower residual error and solutions closer to the global optimum than one-hot-only FMQA, whereas for N = 5 and q = 61 the latter achieves a lower residual error. These results indicate that one-hot encoding in the learning stage is the primary performance driver and that stage-dependent encoding can provide further improvement under finer discretization.

</details>


### [927] [Bridge the Gaps: Heterogeneous Attributed Graph Clustering via Quaternion Representation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23199)
*Xinxi Chen,Junyang Chen,Yiqun Zhang,Chuangming Qiu,Xiang Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出AGREE框架，通过四元数图卷积和浅层图架构，统一处理任意类型属性（数值/类别）的图聚类，解决异质属性、过度平滑和过度主导问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有属性图聚类方法面临三大挑战：1）真实数据包含数值和类别等异质属性，难以统一表示；2）深层图架构中重复传播导致过度平滑（OS）；3）图表示学习放大拓扑影响，使判别性属性信息被过度主导（OD），难以有效聚类。

Method: 提出AGREE框架，核心包括：1）多层级对齐和基于相似度的图构建，统一处理任意类型属性；2）四元数图卷积增强属性交互，缓解OD问题；3）采用浅层图架构缓解OS问题；4）联合优化图重建和聚类目标，训练中无需预定义聚类数。

Result: 在多个基准数据集上，AGREE在准确性、鲁棒性和适应性方面均取得了优异的整体性能。

Conclusion: AGREE有效解决了属性图聚类中属性异质性、过度平滑和过度主导三大难题，是一种端到端、无需预定义聚类数的通用框架。

Abstract: Attributed graph clustering partitions nodes by jointly exploiting node attributes and graph topology. It remains challenging due to attribute heterogeneity and representation degradation during graph learning. Real-world datasets often contain heterogeneous attributes, i.e., numerical and categorical attributes, complicating unified representation learning. This challenge becomes more complex in attributed graphs, where constructing a clustering-friendly graph structure from attributes and topology remains difficult. Under deep graph architectures, repeated graph propagation causes node embeddings to become overly similar, leading to the over-smoothing (OS) effect. Meanwhile, graph representation learning amplifies topological influence, making discriminative attribute information harder to exploit for clustering, an effect we refer to as over-dominating (OD). To bridge these gaps, an end-to-end framework, Any-type attributed Graph REpresentation lEarning (AGREE), is proposed. It unifies attributed graphs and any-type attributed data through multi-level alignment and similarity-based graph construction. Quaternion-based graph convolution strengthens attribute interaction to alleviate OD, while shallow graph architectures help relieve OS. The learned embeddings are jointly optimized for graph reconstruction and clustering, without requiring a predefined number of clusters during training. Experiments on diverse benchmarks show that AGREE achieves strong overall performance in accuracy, robustness, and adaptability.

</details>


### [928] [Leveraging AutoML for Sustainable Deep Learning: A Multi-Objective HPO Approach on Deep Shift Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23208)
*Leona Hennig,Marius Lindauer*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文利用AutoML技术对深度移位神经网络（DSNNs）进行多目标优化，在图像分类任务中同时提升约20%的准确率并降低超过60%的能耗。实验发现，量化网络中的小部分低精度层在能效和性能上反而最优，颠覆了常规认知。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度学习模型计算成本高，带来环境和资源挑战。DSNNs通过移位操作降低推理复杂度，但其设计尚未被充分理解和优化，需要自动化方法来平衡精度与能耗。

Method: 结合多保真度超参数优化与多目标优化，在图像分类任务上同时对DSNNs的准确率和能耗进行Pareto最优搜索，考虑量化策略对能效的影响。

Result: 相比默认DSNNs，优化后的配置在性能提升约20%的同时，排放降低超60%。量化实验显示，低精度量化网络中较小部分反而能实现最优能效，且这一发现在多种骨干网络上得到验证。

Conclusion: AutoML可有效优化DSNNs设计，量化策略存在反直觉、模型特定的权衡，为低资源环境下的节能深度学习提供了自动化设计路径。

Abstract: Deep Learning (DL) has advanced various fields by extracting complex patterns from large datasets. However, the computational demands of DL models pose environmental and resource challenges. Deep Shift Neural Networks (DSNNs) present a solution by leveraging shift operations to reduce computational complexity at inference. Compared to common DNNs, DSNNs are still less well understood and less well optimized. By leveraging AutoML techniques, we provide valuable insights into the potential of DSNNs and how to design them in a better way. We focus on image classification, a core task in computer vision, especially in low-resource environments. Since we consider complementary objectives such as accuracy and energy consumption, we combine state-of-the-art multi-fidelity (MF) hyperparameter optimization (HPO) with multi-objective optimization to find a set of Pareto optimal trade-offs on how to design DSNNs. Our approach led to significantly better configurations of DSNNs regarding loss and emissions compared to default DSNNs. This includes simultaneously increasing performance by about 20% and reducing emissions, in some cases by more than 60%. Investigating the behavior of quantized networks in terms of both emissions and accuracy, our experiments reveal surprising model-specific trade-offs, yielding the greatest energy savings. For example, in contrast to common expectations, quantizing smaller portions of the network with low precision can be optimal with respect to energy consumption while retaining or improving performance. We corroborated these findings across multiple backbone architectures, highlighting important nuances in quantization strategies and offering an automated approach to balancing energy efficiency and model performance.

</details>


### [929] [Efficient Network Inference via Hardware-Aware Architecture Search, Model Pruning & Quantization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23210)
*Lucas Heublein,Mark Deutel,Axel Plinge,Felix Ott*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了在资源受限的嵌入式平台上，通过迭代结构化剪枝、后训练静态量化和硬件感知的零样本神经架构搜索，实现紧凑高效的DNN模型用于GNSS干扰实时监测，在保持任务性能的同时显著降低模型大小和计算复杂度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: GNSS嵌入式干扰监测需要在资源受限硬件上实时处理大量IQ样本，而高表达力的DNN模型与硬件部署能力之间存在根本性矛盾，因此需要研究如何在保持预测性能的同时实现高效推理。

Method: 以MCUNet为紧凑基线，结合迭代结构化剪枝、后训练静态量化和硬件感知零样本神经架构搜索三种技术，在GNSS干扰数据集上进行分类和广义表征任务的实验评估。

Result: 在iMXRT1062 MCU、Raspberry Pi Zero 2W和Raspberry Pi 5三个嵌入式平台上验证了模型压缩与硬件感知设计相结合的有效性，在维持任务性能的同时降低了模型大小、计算复杂度和内存占用。

Conclusion: 模型压缩与硬件感知架构搜索的组合策略为实时GNSS干扰监测的嵌入式部署提供了实用指导，证明了紧凑ML模型在资源受限平台上的可行性和有效性。

Abstract: Embedded global navigation satellite system (GNSS) interference monitoring requires fast and memory-efficient inference to process large volumes of raw in-phase and quadrature (IQ) samples in real time. At the same time, increasingly expressive deep neural networks (DNNs) are needed for robust interference classification and characterization across diverse signal conditions. This creates a fundamental tension between predictive performance and deployability on resource-constrained hardware. In this paper, we investigate efficient network inference for GNSS interference characterization using iterative structured pruning, post-training static quantization, and hardware-aware zero-shot neural architecture search (NAS). Starting from MCUNet as a compact baseline, we analyze how model compression and automated architecture optimization affect model size, computational complexity, and memory usage while maintaining task performance. Experiments on a GNSS interference dataset, covering both classification and generalized characterization, show the benefits of combining compression and hardware-aware design for embedded deployment. Our results provide practical guidance for developing compact machine learning (ML) models for real-time GNSS interference monitoring on embedded platforms (iMXRT1062 MCU, Raspberry Pi Zero 2W, and Raspberry Pi 5).

</details>


### [930] [Deep learning-based detection of cessation of breathing in pre-term infants](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23213)
*Dineo Serame,Lionel Tarassenko,Mauricio Villarroel*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文利用深度学习方法，基于早产儿NICU中常规监测的阻抗呼吸描记（IP）、心电图（ECG）和光电容积描记（PPG）信号，检测呼吸暂停相关的呼吸停止（COBE）事件。在24名早产儿约430小时的记录中，结合IP和PPG的ConvNeXt架构实现了88.7%的平衡准确率和0.75的F1分数，优于单一模态模型，且信号模态对性能的影响大于架构复杂度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 早产儿呼吸暂停难以通过NICU现有 bedside 监测设备可靠检测，现有方法依赖呼吸频率和血氧饱和度阈值，导致高误报率且漏检短促或不规则事件。因此，需要利用常规采集的临床信号改进自动化检测，而无需额外传感硬件。

Method: 使用约430小时NICU记录（24名早产儿），三名独立评审员标注COBE事件，得到346个COBE和608个非COBE事件。比较了浅层CNN、残差网络（ResNets）和ConvNeXt架构，基于阻抗呼吸描记（IP）、心电图（ECG）和光电容积描记（PPG）三种信号模态进行检测。

Result: 信号模态对检测性能的影响大于架构复杂度。单模态IP模型平衡准确率86.8-88.0%，优于ECG（62.6-69.7%）和PPG（65.1-66.4%）衍生的呼吸替代信号。多模态融合略优于单一IP。最佳模型为结合IP和PPG输入的ConvNeXt，平衡准确率88.7%，F1分数0.75。

Conclusion: 深度学习模型可基于NICU常规监测信号可靠检测COBE事件，且信号模态选择在数据受限的新生儿监测场景中至关重要。

Abstract: Apnoea of prematurity is characterised by recurrent episodes of cessation of breathing and remains difficult to detect reliably using routinely monitored physiological signals in the Neonatal Intensive Care Unit (NICU). Existing bedside monitors rely primarily on respiratory rate and oxygen saturation thresholds, often generating high false-positive alarm rates and missing short or irregular events. Improving automated detection using routinely acquired clinical signals could enhance identification of clinically meaningful events without additional sensing hardware.
  We evaluated deep learning-based detection of apnoea-related Cessation Of BrEathing (COBE) events using impedance pneumography (IP), electrocardiography (ECG), and photoplethysmography (PPG) signals from approximately 430 hours of NICU recordings collected from 24 pre-term infants. Three independent reviewers annotated COBE events, producing a dataset of 346 COBE and 608 non-COBE events. We compared a shallow convolutional neural network (CNN), residual networks (ResNets), and a ConvNeXt architecture using an independent held-out test set.
  Across all architectures, detection performance was influenced more strongly by signal modality than by architectural complexity. Unimodal IP-based models achieved balanced accuracies of 86.8-88.0%, outperforming ECG-derived (62.6-69.7%) and PPG-derived (65.1-66.4%) respiratory surrogates. Multimodal fusion yielded modest improvements over IP alone. The best-performing model, a ConvNeXt architecture combining IP and PPG inputs, achieved 88.7% balanced accuracy and an F1 score of 0.75 on the independent test set.
  These findings demonstrate that deep learning models applied to routinely monitored NICU signals can reliably detect COBE events and highlight the importance of signal modality in data-constrained neonatal monitoring settings.

</details>


### [931] [Unlocking In-Context Learning in Audio-Language Models from Decentralized Medical Audio](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23243)
*Ran Piao,Tsai-Ning Wang,Martijn den Dekker,Linda Moonen,Hareld Kemps,Yuan Lu,Aaqib Saeed*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出FSC框架，通过少样本学习和联邦学习实现低资源环境下的临床音频诊断，在呼吸和心脏疾病分类中准确率达71.6%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 低资源场景下临床音频诊断面临标注数据稀缺的挑战，现有模型依赖大规模标注语料库，难以在现实联邦医院客户端中部署。

Method: FSC框架包含三阶段流水线：(1)基于字幕预训练对齐音频嵌入与语言模型；(2)通过联邦优化进行情景式上下文推理适应；(3)利用无监督聚类构建伪标签情景，实现少量支持集下的多模态推理。

Result: 在2-way 2-shot评估中达到71.6%准确率，超越现有音频-语言基线模型9%以上。

Conclusion: FSC通过结合联邦学习、少样本学习和自上下文机制，有效解决了低资源临床音频诊断的标注稀缺和隐私保护问题。

Abstract: Clinical audio diagnosis in low-resource settings requires models that identify conditions from minimal examples without large annotated corpora. We propose Federated Self-Contextualization (FSC), a multimodal language model framework for in-context clinical audio diagnosis across federated hospital clients. FSC constructs pseudo-label episodes via unsupervised clustering of audio representations, bypassing scarce real diagnostic labels, and enables contextual reasoning from support-query pairs. Our progressive three-stage pipeline first aligns audio embeddings with the language model via caption-based pretraining, then adapts it for episodic in-context inference through federated optimization. At test time, given a small labeled support set, the model diagnoses an unseen query through multimodal reasoning. On held-out respiratory and cardiac conditions, FSC achieves 71.6% accuracy in 2-way 2-shot evaluation, outperforming audio-language baselines by over 9%.

</details>


### [932] [Dynamic multi-agent deep reinforcement learning-based pricing and incentivization approach in multimodal transportation networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23257)
*Khadidja Kadem,Mostafa Ameli,Carlos Lima Azevedo,Mahdi Zargayouna,Latifa Oukhellou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种多智能体深度强化学习框架，通过动态定价和激励策略协调共享出行服务与公共交通，在减少拥堵、降低20%通勤成本和10%排放的同时，改善空间公平性并平衡各方利益冲突。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 共享出行服务需求集中在高密度区域，导致整合不均、排放和空间公平性问题，而当局、服务商和旅行者三方目标相互冲突，亟需协调机制。

Method: 提出多智能体深度强化学习框架，包含两个RL智能体：(1) 公共当局分配时空公共交通激励以改善公平、排放和效率；(2) SMS提供商动态调整票价以优化收入。两者在动态交通系统中交互适应。

Result: 三小时早高峰数值实验表明：动态激励有效降低拥堵峰值，通勤成本降低约20%，排放减少约10%，公共交通利润几乎翻倍，且收益分配更公平。结合动态定价后，两个RL智能体能够平衡私人提供商与公共当局的冲突目标。

Conclusion: 该框架可作为可持续和公平的多模式交通规划决策支持工具，有效调和多方利益冲突。

Abstract: In multimodal transportation systems, shared mobility services (SMSs) are promoted for their potential to enhance flexibility and reduce congestion. However, SMS demand is often concentrated in high-density areas, which can limit the effectiveness and accessibility for various commuter groups. This uneven integration challenges transportation system efficiency, especially in terms of emissions and spatial equity. Addressing these issues requires coordination among multiple stakeholders whose objectives frequently conflict. Whereas authorities aim to ensure sustainable and equitable mobility, SMS providers focus on revenue maximization, and travelers seek to minimize personal travel costs. This paper proposes a multi-agent deep reinforcement learning framework that captures these interactions through dynamic pricing and incentivization strategies for SMSs and public transport. The framework integrates two reinforcement learning (RL) agents: (i) a public authority that allocates spatio-temporal public transport incentives to improve equity, emissions, and efficiency, and (ii) an SMS provider that dynamically adjusts fares to optimize revenue. The agents interact with the transportation system and adapt strategies in response to evolving demand, congestion, and network conditions. Numerical experiments conducted over a three-hour morning peak period show that dynamic incentivization effectively reduces congestion peaks, lowers commuters' costs by around 20% and emissions by approximately 10%, while nearly doubling public transport profit and supporting a more equitable distribution of benefits. When combined with dynamic SMS pricing, the two RL agents demonstrate the ability to balance conflicting objectives between private providers and public authorities. The proposed approach provides a decision-support tool for sustainable and equitable multimodal mobility planning.

</details>


### [933] [Exposing the Illusion of Erasure in Knowledge Editing for LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23276)
*Advik Raj Basani,Anshuman Chhabra*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文揭示了知识编辑（KE）方法并未真正擦除LLM中的原始知识，而是以低秩更新将其重新分布到表征空间中，形成窄而各向异性的脆弱区域，使得编辑后的知识极易被对抗性攻击和间接提示绕过。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 知识编辑（KE）虽能高效更新LLM中的特定事实，但其可靠性存疑且底层机制尚不清晰，现有研究未能解释为何编辑后的知识仍会"浮出表面"。

Method: 采用对抗性启发视角，对多种KE方法进行机制分析：通过低秩更新分析表征空间中的知识分布、损失景观分析（发现窄各向异性区域）、间接提示与对抗攻击测试。

Result: 1) 编辑后的知识未被完全擦除，在多种架构中一致失败；2) 低秩更新仅重新分布而非覆盖原有知识；3) KE本质是"目标抑制机制"而非"知识移除"；4) 编辑后的知识位于窄各向异性区域，对扰动高度敏感。

Conclusion: KE算法具有本质上的可绕性（bypassable），其架构脆弱性无法通过简单修补消除，需从根本上重新评估在LLM应用中部署事后更新的方式。

Abstract: Knowledge Editing (KE) has emerged as a frontier for updating specific facts in LLMs without costly retraining, but its reliability and underlying mechanisms remain poorly understood. In this work, we examine KE from an adversarial elicitation perspective, revealing that edited knowledge is often not fully erased and continues to surface, with consistent failures observed across diverse model architectures. To explain this behavior, we conduct a mechanistic analysis of popular KE methods. We show that low-rank updates do not overwrite existing knowledge but instead redistribute it within the model's representation space. Furthermore, we find that these methods act as targeted suppression mechanisms that reduce the likelihood of expressing original facts, rather than removing them from the model. Analysis of the loss landscape reveals that edited knowledge lies in narrow, anisotropic regions that are highly sensitive to perturbations, making them highly vulnerable to indirect prompting and adversarial attacks. By exposing these profound architectural vulnerabilities, our work proves that KE algorithms are inherently bypassable and motivates a fundamental reevaluation of how we deploy post-hoc updates in several LLM applications.

</details>


### [934] [Non-asymptotic estimates of the minimal risk in statistical learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23295)
*Liming Wu,Sen Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文证明了统计学习中经验风险原则（ERP）下两类错误概率的浓度不等式，为非渐近高置信度下的最小风险（基于最小经验风险）提供了上下界。将经验风险函数的通常有界性条件放宽到高斯或指数可积条件。下界置信度与训练参数数量和输入向量维度无关，可有效检测学习机器缺陷；上界置信度在样本量远大于参数集在Orlicz度量下的盒维数时较高。基于Talagrand浓度不等式、传输-熵不等式以及经验过程和统计学习理论的最新进展。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统ERP分析需要经验风险函数的有界性假设，本文希望通过放松该条件（允许高斯或指数可积），获得更一般的非渐近浓度不等式，并分析最小风险上下界的置信度特性。

Method: 基于Talagrand浓度不等式（Bousquet和Klein-Rio的尖锐版本）、传输-熵不等式以及经验过程理论，证明两类错误概率的浓度不等式。

Result: 得到了最小风险的下界（置信度与参数数量及输入维度无关）和上界（置信度依赖于样本量相对于参数集在Orlicz度量下的盒维数）的非渐近高置信度结果。

Conclusion: 所提出的浓度不等式在更宽松的条件下（放宽有界性假设）为ERP的泛化性能提供了可靠的置信保证，且下界的维度无关性对检测学习机器缺陷具有实际意义。

Abstract: In this paper we prove some concentration inequalities for two types of error probabilities in the Empirical Risk Principle (ERP) in statistical learning, which provide a lower bound and an upper bound for the minimal risk (in terms of the minimal empirical risk) with non-asymptotic high confidence. The usual boundedness condition of the empirical risk function is relaxed to the Gaussian or exponential integrability condition. The confidence of the lower bound of the minimal risk is shown to be independent of the number of training parameters and the dimension of the input vectors, allowing one to detect the deficiency of a learning machine efficiently; and the confidence of the upper bound of the minimal risk is proved to be high provided that the sample size $n$ is much greater than the box dimension of the parameter set $Θ$ in the Orlicz metric $d_{ψ_1}$ associated with the risk functions. Our work is based on Talagrand's concentration inequalities (the sharp versions by Bousquet and Klein-Rio), transport-entropy inequalities and the recent progress in the theory of empirical processes and statistical learning.

</details>


### [935] [GRIMIP: A General Framework for Instance-Specific Configuration of MIP Solvers Using LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23299)
*Yidong Luo,Xuemin Chen,Chenguang Wang,Fangzhou Zhu,Tao Zhong,Tianshu Yu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出GRIMIP框架，将大语言模型的语义推理能力与贝叶斯优化的高效搜索相结合，用于混合整数规划求解器的超参数配置，在多个基准上实现了超过40%的Primal-Dual Integral降低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MIP求解器的超参数配置是一个高维、实例依赖的优化问题，默认配置往往次优，传统调优方法存在冷启动、搜索效率低或过度依赖专家经验的问题。

Method: 提出GRIMIP混合智能框架，将LLM作为贝叶斯优化循环内的完整概率代理模型，协同集成LLM的语义推理能力与BO的样本高效搜索能力。

Result: 在包括MIPLIB在内的七个基准上，对困难实例实现了超过40%的Primal-Dual Integral降低，性能优于SMAC及其他LLM辅助的BO方法。

Conclusion: 通过赋予LLM足够的自主性，GRIMIP结合了LLM的专家级推理与BO的高效搜索，达到了最先进的性能水平。

Abstract: Configuring the hyperparameters of Mixed-integer programming (MIP) solvers is a high-dimensional, instance-dependent optimization problem where suboptimal settings can degrade solving time by orders of magnitude. Default configurations are often suboptimal, while traditional tuning methods either suffer from the ``cold-start'' problem and inefficient search or heavily rely on expert experience. This paper introduces \textbf{GRIMIP} (\textbf{\underline{G}}eneral \textbf{\underline{R}}easoning for \textbf{\underline{I}}nstance-specific \textbf{\underline{MIP}} configuration), a novel hybrid intelligence framework that synergistically integrates the semantic reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs) with the sample-efficient search of Bayesian Optimization (BO). GRIMIP enables the LLM to function as a complete probabilistic surrogate within the BO loop, significantly improving performance and reducing sampling and evaluation costs. On seven benchmarks including MIPLIB, GRIMIP achieves over 40\% reduction in Primal-Dual Integral on hard instances, outperforming SMAC and other LLM-assisted BO methods. By granting LLMs sufficient autonomy, GRIMIP combines the expert-level reasoning of LLMs with the efficient search of BO, achieving state-of-the-art performance.

</details>


### [936] [Superhuman AI for Generals.io Using Self-Play Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23348)
*Matej Straka,Viliam Lisý,Martin Schmid*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一个在即时战略游戏Generals.io中达到超人类水平的AI智能体，通过在4块NVIDIA H200 GPU上训练四天，在5000多名人类玩家的公开排行榜上排名第一，并以199-70的战绩击败顶尖人类玩家。关键创新是JAX原生模拟器实现了单GPU每秒数千万帧的约10000倍加速，以及基于视觉Transformer的策略网络与自对弈训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在不完美信息、需要长程规划和短期战术的即时战略游戏中，实现超越人类的AI水平，并探究在消除数据瓶颈后（通过超快模拟器），哪些因素真正重要。

Method: 1) 构建JAX原生模拟器，实现单GPU每秒数千万帧（约10000倍加速）；2) 使用视觉Transformer（ViT）策略网络，端到端自对弈训练；3) 采用策略梯度循环与稀疏输赢奖励；4) 使用优势样本过滤和策略参数的指数移动平均。

Result: 在公开1v1排行榜（5000+玩家）排名第一，与第二名差距相当于第二名到第25名的差距；与顶尖人类选手对决取得199-70的战绩（269场比赛）。

Conclusion: 在消除数据瓶颈后，可以清晰地看出哪些技术真正起作用、哪些不重要；快速模拟器+自对弈+适当训练技巧足以实现超人类表现。

Abstract: We present a superhuman AI agent for Generals.io, a real-time strategy game that requires both long-horizon planning and short-term tactics under strong imperfect information. Trained for four days on 4x NVIDIA H200 GPUs, our agent reaches #1 on the public 1v1 leaderboard of over 5,000 human players, leading the second-ranked player by the same margin that separates second place from 25th, and beats the two top-ranked humans head-to-head with a combined 199-70 record across 269 ladder matches. A key enabler is a JAX-native simulator that reaches tens of millions of frames per second on a single GPU, roughly a 10,000x speedup over the prior simulator. On top of this, we train a vision transformer policy end-to-end by self-play with a policy-gradient loop and sparse win/loss reward, using top-advantage sample filtering and an exponential moving average of the policy parameters. Taken together, our findings highlight what matters, and what does not, once a fast simulator removes the data bottleneck.

</details>


### [937] [SOAP-Bubbles: Structured Weight Uncertainty for Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23357)
*Adrian Robert Minut,Nico Daheim,Marco Miani,Mohammad Emtiyaz Khan,Wu Lin,Thomas Möllenhoff*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出EVON优化器，通过在SOAP预条件子的特征空间中运行IVON对角协方差变分方法，再利用预条件子将对角估计转换为非对角协方差，从而在保持与SOAP相似成本的前提下，获得更优的深度学习后验分布估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 结构化权重不确定性有助于改进深度学习，但现有方法估计成本高且实现困难。

Method: 将IVON对角协方差变分方法运行在SOAP预条件子的特征空间中，再利用预条件子将对角估计转换为非对角协方差，形成新优化器EVON。

Result: 在逻辑回归中EVON能恢复精确的高斯协方差；在语言模型预训练中，EVON显著优于现有对角协方差方法。

Conclusion: 该方法使在大规模深度学习中估计更富有表达能力的后验分布变得更加容易。

Abstract: Structured weight-uncertainty can improve many aspects of deep learning, but it remains costly to estimate and difficult to implement. Here, we show that these issues can be addressed by adapting the SOAP optimizer. Our key idea is to run IVON, an existing diagonal-covariance variational method, in the eigenspace of SOAP's preconditioner and then use the preconditioner to transform the diagonal estimate into a non-diagonal covariance. The resulting method has costs similar to those of SOAP and requires no drastic changes to training pipelines. We call the posteriors obtained in this way SOAP-Bubbles and our new optimizer Eigenspace-VON (EVON). We show that, for logistic regression, EVON recovers the exact Gaussian covariance and that, for language model pretraining, it yields significantly better results than existing diagonal-covariance methods. Our work makes it easier to estimate more expressive posterior distributions for deep learning at scale.

</details>


### [938] [Adaptive Hard-Soft Physics-Informed Neural Networks for Robust Boundary-Constrained PDE Solving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23359)
*Duc Tien Nguyen,Trinh Minh Tuan,Nguyen Duc Manh,Vu Linh Nguyen,Dinh Gia Ninh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出统一硬-软物理信息神经网络（HSPINN），通过精确施加边界条件（硬约束）与自适应损失加权策略，解决传统PINN收敛慢、边界不准等问题，在椭圆、抛物、双曲三类PDE问题上表现更优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统PINN将所有约束作为软惩罚项，导致收敛慢、对损失权重敏感、边界条件执行不准确，亟需一种更鲁棒高效的解决方案。

Method: 1) 硬约束：通过解析/多项式 lifting、掩码函数、周期特征映射精确施加Dirichlet和周期边界条件；2) 软约束：PDE残差、Neumann通量、初始条件仍作为软约束；3) 自适应损失加权：采用逆-共享softmax策略动态平衡各损失项，无需手动调参。

Result: 在Poisson（椭圆）、Burgers（抛物）、对流（双曲）问题中，HSPINN相比传统PINN收敛更快、精度更高、稳定性更强。

Conclusion: HSPINN为物理约束深度学习提供了通用且可扩展的基础，有效结合硬约束与自适应软约束的优势。

Abstract: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) provide an effective way to solve partial differential equations (PDEs) by embedding physical principles into the learning process. However, the conventional PINN formulation, in which all constraints are imposed as soft penalty terms within a composite loss, often exhibits slow convergence, sensitivity to loss weight scaling, and inaccurate boundary enforcement due to poor conditioning of the optimization landscape. To address these limitations, this study proposes a unified hard--soft physics--informed neural network (HSPINN) with adaptive loss weighting. In this framework, Dirichlet and periodic boundary conditions are enforced exactly by construction through analytical or polynomial lifting, masking functions, and periodic feature mappings, while the governing PDE residuals, Neumann fluxes, and initial conditions are treated as soft constraints. An inverse-share softmax strategy dynamically balances the relative importance of individual loss components during training, eliminating manual penalty tuning and improving gradient stability. This formulation ensures boundary admissibility throughout optimization and enhances convergence efficiency and numerical robustness. Applications to representative elliptic (Poisson), parabolic (Burgers), and hyperbolic (convection with periodic boundaries) problems demonstrate that HSPINN consistently achieves faster convergence, higher accuracy, and greater stability than conventional PINNs, establishing a general and scalable foundation for physics-constrained deep learning across science and technology.

</details>


### [939] [Rethinking Molecular Graph Backdoors under Chemistry-aware Admission](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23361)
*Thinh T. H. Nguyen,Sze Jue Yang,Khoa D. Doan,Chee Seng Chan,Kok-Seng Wong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了ChemGuard（分子记录入检协议）和ChemBack（化学可行后门攻击），揭示了分子图神经网络中基于化学有效性的后门攻防博弈。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有分子图后门攻击在抽象图上评估，忽略了真实分子学习管线中的解析、清洗、规范化等准入检查环节，导致许多攻击实际上不可行。

Method: 提出ChemGuard作为准入检查协议（要求分子字符串可清洗且图-字符串一致），以及ChemBack攻击（构建化学可行的基序-锚点连接，用Tanimoto相似度筛选，无需模型访问）。

Result: ChemGuard能阻断许多现有图后门攻击，但ChemBack在满足准入检查的同时仍能实现高攻击成功率，且不牺牲干净准确率。

Conclusion: 化学感知的准入检查可抑制纯图后门，但化学有效且目标对齐的分子后门仍是实际威胁。

Abstract: Backdoor attacks on molecular graph neural networks (GNNs) are typically evaluated as abstract graph edits, but real molecular learning pipelines do not train on arbitrary graphs. Molecular records must first survive parsing, sanitization, canonicalization, and graph-string consistency checks. We formalize this overlooked admission stage as ChemGuard, an operational protocol for testing whether a submitted molecular record can enter a realistic learning pipeline, while complementing existing defenses. ChemGuard admits a record only when its molecular string is sanitizable and the graph reconstructed from that string matches the submitted molecular graph. Under this operational view, many existing graph-based backdoors lose much of their apparent efficacy because their poisons are chemically invalid or representation-inconsistent. We then show that admission checks alone are insufficient to rule out molecular backdoors. We propose ChemBack, an admission-aware molecular backdoor attack that constructs chemically feasible motif-anchor attachments and ranks admitted candidates by fingerprint-based Tanimoto similarity to clean target-class molecules. ChemBack is model-free during trigger selection, using molecular structures, target labels, fingerprints, and public validity checks, but no victim model, surrogate GNN, learned embedding, gradient, logit, or training-code access. Across molecular benchmarks, validators, architectures, and defenses, \textbf{ChemBack} achieves high attack success with fully admitted poisons while preserving clean accuracy. Our results reveal a two-sided lesson, chemistry-aware admission suppresses many graph-only backdoors, yet chemically valid and target-aligned molecular backdoors remain a practical threat.

</details>


### [940] [Convergence of Gradient Descent for General Neural Network Architectures Beyond the NTK Regime](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23364)
*Yuqing Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种适用于广泛神经网络架构（包括预归一化多层Transformer）的梯度下降收敛分析框架，突破了NTK机制限制，证明了在几乎任意初始化下GD收敛到驻点邻域，并揭示了学习率缩放依赖于深度和有效瓶颈维度而非最大宽度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经网络训练动力学理论分析困难，即使简单架构也难以分析，更复杂的现代架构（如Transformer）则更具挑战性。现有NTK机制框架有局限性，需要更通用的理论框架。

Method: 在网络块层面构建收敛框架，通过解析性和测度零论证建立与迭代相关的PL型不等式，利用多项式广义光滑性和局部松弛耗散条件证明GD轨迹上的Lipschitz光滑性，并结合Xavier初始化和实际架构缩放进行分析。

Result: 证明在温和假设下，对于几乎所有的初始化，使用常规学习率的GD收敛到驻点邻域；学习率缩放依赖于深度和有效瓶颈维度而非最大宽度；推导了残差连接和函数组合的结构非退化性影响。

Conclusion: 该框架为一般现代神经网络架构（如Transformer）的梯度下降动力学提供了理论保证，突破了NTK机制的限制，对理解深度网络训练具有重要理论价值。

Abstract: Training dynamics is central to understanding neural networks, yet its theoretical analysis remains difficult even for simple architectures and becomes substantially more challenging for general modern architectures. In this paper, we propose a convergence framework for analyzing gradient descent (GD) dynamics under a broad family of neural network architectures and datasets beyond the neural tangent kernel (NTK) regime. The framework is formulated at the level of network blocks and covers architectures including pre-normalized multi-layer transformers. More precisely, under mild assumptions, we prove that for almost all initializations, GD with regular learning rates converges to the neighbourhood of a stationary point. This is mainly proved by establishing an iterate-dependent PL-type inequality through analyticity and measure-zero arguments, and by proving Lipschitz smoothness along the GD trajectory through polynomial generalized smoothness and a local relaxed dissipative condition. We further interpret the theorem under Xavier initialization and practical architectural scaling, showing that the learning rate scale depends on the depth and effective bottleneck dimensions rather than the largest width. Finally, we derive structural nondegeneracy implications for residual connections and function composition, and provide a generic characterization of global minimizers within our framework.

</details>


### [941] [Distribution-Aware Diffusion-LLM for Robust Ultra-Long-Term Time Series Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23391)
*Falguni Ghosh,Vahid Hashemi,Bernhard Kainz*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出 Diffusion-LLM，将条件扩散模型集成到基于 LLM 的时间序列预测流程中，解决 LLM 在多模态设置下缺乏校准概率建模和异构表示对齐的问题，在六个长期预测基准上优于现有 LLM 基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM 在时间序列预测中虽具有强泛化、模式识别和零样本/少样本能力，但在多模态场景下存在两个关键问题：(1) 缺乏对非文本数据的校准概率建模；(2) 难以对齐异构表示。

Method: 提出 Diffusion-LLM 框架，将条件扩散模型融入基于 LLM 的预测流程中，联合设计使得模型能够学习未来数据的条件分布，同时在共享潜在空间中改善语义对齐。

Result: 在 ETT、Weather、ECL 等六个长期预测基准上评估，该方法 consistently 优于现有 LLM 基线，特别是在超长期预测和少样本预测中取得显著提升。

Conclusion: 分布感知正则化能够增强时间序列 LLM 的鲁棒性和泛化能力，验证了扩散模型与 LLM 联合设计的有效性。

Abstract: Time series forecasting is a fundamental machine learning task. Recent work has explored Large Language Models (LLMs) for this purpose due to their strong generalization, pattern recognition, and zero-shot or few-shot capabilities. Despite their suitability for long-context learning, LLMs face challenges in multimodal settings: they lack calibrated probabilistic modeling for non-text data and struggle to align heterogeneous representations. To address these issues, we propose a new framework Diffusion-LLM that integrates a conditional diffusion model into an LLM-based forecasting pipeline. This joint design enables learning the conditional distribution of future data while improving semantic alignment in a shared latent space. We evaluate Diffusion-LLM on six long-term forecasting benchmarks, including ETT, Weather, and ECL. Our method consistently outperforms existing LLM-based baseline, achieving notable gains in ultra-long-term and few-shot forecasting and demonstrating the value of distribution-aware regularization for enhancing robustness and generalization in time series LLMs.

</details>


### [942] [Physics-Informed Modeling for Wood Thermal Analysis and Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23402)
*Jingren Xie,Alex John Buckthal,Ryan Anthony O'Connor,Isak Worre Foged,Dim P. Papadopoulos*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了两种物理信息深度学习框架（PICNN和PInteCNN），通过将偏微分方程嵌入神经网络，利用木材RGB图像预测空间异质性木材的热响应，在三个真实数据集上验证了该方法在预测精度、物理可解释性和处理材料异质性方面优于纯数据驱动方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统建筑假设木材为均质材料，但实际木材热性能空间变化复杂。数据驱动方法虽能映射RGB图像到热响应，但作为黑箱模型，可能吸收实验噪声而非热力学合理性，缺乏可解释性。

Method: 提出两种物理信息深度学习框架：(1) PICNN，将归一化2D稳态热传导方程作为软惩罚项嵌入损失函数；(2) PInteCNN，将解析近似-预测-校正求解器硬编码到卷积神经网络中。使用三种真实木材数据集（杨木、Grandis横切面和径切面）进行验证。

Result: 嵌入物理归纳偏置的方法在预测精度、物理可解释性和处理种内多样性方面均优于纯数据驱动方法，能更好地处理木材材料异质性，并可提取可解释的物理参数。

Conclusion: 物理信息深度学习框架有效平衡了预测精度、物理可解释性和种内多样性，为处理空间异质材料的热响应预测提供了可靠方案。

Abstract: Wood materials exhibit complex, spatially varying thermal properties that challenge traditional architectural assumptions of material homogeneity. Although data-driven approaches can directly map wood RGB images to their corresponding thermal responses, they operate as uninterpretable black boxes that prioritize statistical correlation and may absorb experimental noise rather than thermodynamic plausibility. To address these limitations, we present physics-informed deep learning frameworks that integrate partial differential equations (PDEs) to predict pixel-level thermal responses of spatially heterogeneous wood materials using wood RGB images and testbed temperature maps. Specifically, we investigate two distinct approaches to enforcing a normalized 2D steady-state heat transfer equation derived from the general heat transfer equation: Physics-Informed Convolutional Neural Networks (PICNNs), which embed physics as a soft penalty term in the loss function, and Physics-Integrated Convolutional Neural Networks (PInteCNNs), which hard-code an analytical approximator-predictor-corrector solver directly into convolutional neural networks. To validate our proposed approaches, we collect three real-world multimodal datasets of Poplar, Grandis Cross-Cut (Grandis-CC), and Grandis Radial-Cut (Grandis-RC) wood samples. We further demonstrate that embedding physical inductive biases successfully balances predictive accuracy, physical interpretability, and intra-species diversity, outperforming data-driven approaches in handling complex wood material heterogeneity and enabling the extraction of interpretable physical parameters. Project: https://zekifayes.github.io/pim

</details>


### [943] [HyperQuant: A Rate-Distortion-Optimal Quantization Pipeline for Large Language and Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23406)
*Yuval Domb,Hadar Sackstein,Tomer Solberg*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: HyperQuant 是一个统一的训练后量化管线，结合随机Hadamard变换、最优格量化、熵编码和偏差校正，实现大语言模型和扩散Transformer的权重量化（3-5 bps）和KV缓存量化（低至1.7 bps），在H100上以近无损质量实现约3.9x权重压缩和约3.79x KV缓存压缩。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有量化方案（如HIGGS、TurboQuant、OCTOPUS）在不同bps点上表现不够全面，且缺乏同时高效处理权重和KV缓存的统一方案。本文旨在构建一个在全量化范围内均优于现有方法的统一后训练量化管线。

Method: (i) 逐块随机Hadamard变换使分布近似高斯；(ii) 量化到低维最优格（E8/D4/A2/Z）；(iii) 无损剥离比特 + 近熵最优变长Rice编码格索引；(iv) KV缓存偏差校正保持内积无偏。可融合fp8/int8/nvfp4/mxfp4 Tensor-Core MMA路径。

Result: 权重量化在3-5 bps全面优于HIGGS；KV量化低至1.7 bps超越TurboQuant和OCTOPUS；19B LTX-2 DiT视频模型量化无可见逐帧伪影；H100上4 bps时权重~3.9x压缩，KV缓存~3.79x压缩，近无损质量。

Conclusion: HyperQuant 通过巧妙组合四种已知技术，在多个模型和量化粒度上实现了SOTA性能，并发现int8在RHT后格输出上优于fp8，为高效部署提供了实用方案。

Abstract: We present HyperQuant (Hadamard, optimallY Packing, Entropy Rice-coding), a unified post-training quantization pipeline for the weights and the KV cache of large language and diffusion transformers. Across a suite of self-contained experiments (Table 1), HyperQuant outperforms the recent HIGGS scheme at every operating point from 3 to 5 bits per scalar (bps) on weights, and beats both TurboQuant and OCTOPUS on KV quantization down to 1.7 bps. Beyond the LLM setting, HyperQuant quantizes the 19B-parameter LTX-2 DiT video model with no observable per-frame artifacts. End-to-end on an H100 at 4 bps, HyperQuant compresses the linear weights ~3.9x and the KV cache ~3.79x at near-lossless quality.
  HyperQuant combines four known ideas into a single construction: (i) a per-tile Randomized Hadamard Transform that makes the per-coordinate distribution of weights and activations approximately Gaussian; (ii) quantization to a low-dimensional optimal lattice (E8, D4, A2, or Z); (iii) lossless bit-stripping and near-entropy-optimal variable-length Rice coding of the lattice indices; and (iv) bias-correction methods for the KV cache that keep the reconstruction unbiased under inner products, preserving attention semantics. We further integrate the pipeline with 8-bit and 4-bit Tensor-Core MMA paths (fp8-e4m3, int8, nvfp4, mxfp4), and find that int8 beats fp8 on the post-RHT lattice output. Project page: https://moonmath.ai/hyperquant/

</details>


### [944] [Differential Spectral Damping Gap Adaptive Regularization for Ill-Conditioned Kernel Methods](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23407)
*Praveg Vashishtha*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出差分谱阻尼（DSD）方法，基于Davis-Kahan sin(Θ)定理自适应惩罚特征值小间隙方向，解决核方法矩阵求逆的病态问题，在LSTSVM分类任务上最高提升10.4个百分点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 最小二乘孪生支持向量机（LSTSVM）等核方法在矩阵求逆时面临严重的特征值指数衰减问题，导致病态条件数。标准Tikhonov正则化对所有特征向量施加均匀惩罚，未考虑不同特征向量可靠性的差异，在病态条件下性能受限。

Method: 提出差分谱阻尼（DSD）正则化公式，基于Davis-Kahan sin(Θ)定理的设计流程：保留大谱间隙的特征向量（可靠方向），抑制小谱间隙的特征向量（方向已被噪声污染）。通过理论推导可靠性感知阻尼函数的需求，选择指数形式以保证光滑性、可微性和自然饱和特性。

Result: 在GINA数据集（d=970）上分类准确率提升+4.8个百分点（Cohen's d=4.49, p<0.0001），d=200时提升+10.4个百分点，Madelon（d=500）提升+2.6个百分点。DSD仅使用原理性谱初始化，而Tikhonov使用网格搜索。在流形数据的预图像重建任务中，高噪声水平（p=0.99）下与Tikhonov持平，低噪声下略逊；两者均将朴素求逆误差降低66倍。

Conclusion: DSD在条件数>10³且维度d≥100的病态问题中显著优于Tikhonov正则化，在更简单场景下传统方法仍可胜任，为实践者提供了明确的部署指导。

Abstract: Kernel methods requiring matrix inversion -- particularly Least-Squares Twin Support Vector Machines (LSTSVM) -- suffer from exponential eigenvalue decay in their system matrices, producing severely ill-conditioned problems where standard Tikhonov regularization applies uniform damping regardless of eigenvector reliability. We propose Differential Spectral Damping (DSD), a regularization formula that adapts its penalty to localized eigengap structure: preserving eigenvectors with large spectral gaps (reliable per Davis-Kahan perturbation theory) while aggressively suppressing those with small gaps (directionally corrupted beyond recovery). We motivate DSD through a principled design procedure grounded in the Davis-Kahan $\sin(Θ)$ theorem, systematically deriving the requirements for a reliability-aware damping function and selecting the exponential form for its smoothness, differentiability, and natural saturation properties. Through rigorous paired testing with fairly optimized baselines (including gradient-optimized Tikhonov receiving equal optimization opportunity), we demonstrate that DSD improves LSTSVM classification accuracy by +4.8 percentage points on real-world GINA ($d=970$, Cohen's $d = 4.49$, $p < 0.0001$), +10.4 percentage points at $d=200$, and +2.6 percentage points on Madelon ($d=500$) -- all using only principled spectral initialization while Tikhonov receives grid search. For pre-image reconstruction on manifold data, DSD ties Tikhonov at high perturbation noise ($p=0.99$) but slightly underperforms at lower noise levels; both reduce naive inversion error by $66\times$. We characterize the precise operating regime ($d \geq 100$, condition number $> 10^3$) and document where simpler methods suffice, providing practitioners with clear deployment guidance.

</details>


### [945] [Leveraging Similarities in Multi-Armed Bandits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23414)
*Khaled Eldowa,Thibaud Rahier,Augustin Cablant,Panayotis Mertikopoulos,Pierre Gaillard*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究具有相似性结构的在线学习问题，证明单点反馈无法利用动作相似性，并提出统一算法族在多种反馈模型下实现相似性感知的遗憾界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实中的动作往往具有内在相似性（如共享潜在特征、标签或层级结构），而现有研究缺乏对相似性结构化动作集在线学习的系统性理解，尤其是不清楚何种反馈形式能有效利用相似性信息。

Method: 构建基于树的动作相似性编码框架，假设损失序列满足树相容性约束。先通过不可能性结果揭示单点反馈的局限，再设计统一算法族适配半反馈、多点反馈等丰富模型，用相似性感知有效动作数 K_eff 替代 K 来改进遗憾界。

Result: 1) 单点反馈无法利用树诱导的相似性；2) 提出统一算法在多点反馈等模型下实现最优遗憾界；3) 在二维Lipschitz bandits中，两点反馈可实现√T遗憾。

Conclusion: 相似性结构化动作集下，反馈信息的丰富程度至关重要——单点反馈不足，而多点反馈可有效利用相似性，实现显著更优的遗憾界。

Abstract: In many online learning and bandit problems, the actions we consider possess inherent similarities--for instance because they share latent traits, tags, or hierarchical structure. We study online learning with a similarity-structured action set, encoded by a rooted tree whose leaves are the actions and whose levels quantify how closely two actions are related. The loss sequence is assumed tree-compatible: losses of similar actions are constrained to be close. We establish an impossibility result showing that usual one-point bandit feedback cannot, in general, leverage range or tree-induced similarity, even under very strong similarity constraints. We then provide a unified set of algorithms which adapt to a wide range of richer feedback models, from semi-bandit feedback down to multi-point bandit protocols, including the minimal two-point feedback setting. We show these algorithms exhibit best-of-both-worlds guarantees and provably exploit action similarities by replacing the number of actions $K$ by a similarity-aware effective number of actions $K_{\mathrm{eff}}$ in the regret bounds. As an application, we show that under two-point feedback, it is possible to achieve $\sqrt{T}$ regret in Lipschitz bandits when $d \leq 2$.

</details>


### [946] [GRINQH: Graded Input-based Quantization Hierarchy for Efficient LLM Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23419)
*Jette Oberländer,Jan Finkbeiner,Catherine M. Schöfmann,Emre Neftci*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: GRINQH是一种结合量化和稀疏化的权重后训练量化框架，利用激活值大小动态分配权重的精度级别，在解码阶段实现灵活的平均位宽，在3/4位设置下优于现有方法，甚至支持2位生成，建立了生成质量与推理速度之间的新帕累托前沿。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型自回归解码主要受GPU内存带宽瓶颈限制（尤其在边缘计算场景），现有量化方法未能区分计算密集的预填充阶段和内存密集的解码阶段之间的不对称性。

Method: GRINQH：一种基于激活值大小（作为计算重要性代理指标）的权重量化层次框架，将量化与稀疏化统一，动态将权重通道分配到不同精度级别，并通过层次化嵌套内存布局的多精度存储定制GPU内核实现加速。

Result: 在Llama3和Qwen3模型上，GRINQH在3位和4位设置下优于最先进的固定精度和混合精度基线，甚至实现了有效的2位生成，并实验验证了理论加速。

Conclusion: GRINQH为大语言模型生成了新的最先进帕累托前沿，实现了生成质量与推理速度之间的动态权衡。

Abstract: Autoregressive decoding with LLMs is primarily bottlenecked by GPU memory bandwidth, especially in edge-computing settings. While quantization is essential for mitigating this bottleneck, most existing methods treat inference as a uniform process and fail to account for the asymmetry between the compute-bound prefill stage and the memory-bound decoding stage. We propose GRINQH (GRaded INput-based Quantization Hierarchy), a weight-only post-training quantization framework that accelerates decoding by unifying quantization and sparsification. GRINQH leverages activation magnitudes as a proxy for computational importance to dynamically assign weight channels to different precision levels, enabling flexible average bit widths during decoding. Evaluated on Llama3 and Qwen3 models, GRINQH outperforms state-of-the-art fixed- and mixed-precision baselines at comparable 3- and 4-bit settings, even enabling effective 2-bit generation. We experimentally verify theoretical speedups by leveraging a hierarchical nested memory layout for multi-precision storage in a custom GPU kernel. Ultimately, GRINQH establishes a new state-of-the-art Pareto frontier for LLM generation, enabling a dynamic trade-off between generation quality and inference speed.

</details>


### [947] [Interpretable Kolmogorov-Arnold Network with Feature-Isolated Temporal Attention Mechanism for Electricity Load Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23425)
*Jinhao Li,Hao Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出LoadKAN，一种混合可解释的电力负荷预测框架，结合特征隔离的时间注意力机制与KAN模块，在三个美国电力市场数据集上达到与黑盒深度学习模型相当的性能，并通过可解释的激活函数揭示了六种人类移动模式与电力负荷之间的复杂非线性关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度学习负荷预测模型虽性能优异但缺乏可解释性；KAN虽有可学习激活函数的优势，但直接应用于时间序列预测面临困难，简单替代现有模块也无法充分利用其可解释性优势。

Method: 开发LoadKAN框架，将特征隔离的时间注意力机制与KAN模块协同结合：注意力阶段独立提取每个输入特征（如历史负荷、人类移动性）的时间动态，生成精炼特征表示；KAN模块基于这些表示进行可解释预测。

Result: 在三个美国电力市场数据集上，LoadKAN与经过广泛调优的最先进黑盒深度学习基准相比保持高度竞争力；通过KAN学习的激活函数，定量敏感性分析揭示了六种移动模式与电力负荷之间复杂且市场特定的依赖关系。

Conclusion: LoadKAN在保持预测性能的同时提供了可解释性，能够揭示被黑盒模型掩盖的洞察，验证了混合可解释框架在电力负荷预测中的价值。

Abstract: Accurate electricity load forecasting is a crucial prerequisite for stable power system operations. While prevalent deep learning models present competitive performance, they often operate as black boxes and lack interpretability. While the Kolmogorov-Arnold network (KAN) has emerged as a promising alternative because of its learnable activation function design, its direct application to time-series forecasting faces challenges in modeling complex temporal data patterns. Also, simple integration into existing architectures, such as serving as replacement of neural modules, cannot fully leverage KAN's interpretability strengths. To address these gaps, this study develops LoadKAN, a novel hybrid and interpretable framework for load forecasting that synergistically combines a specifically-designed feature-isolated temporal attention mechanism with a KAN module. The attention stage aims to extract temporal dynamics from each input feature independently, such as historical load and human mobility, providing distilled feature representations to the KAN module for interpretable predictions. When evaluated on datasets from three representative U.S. electricity markets, our LoadKAN remains highly competitive when compared to extensively-tuned, state-of-the-art, black-box deep learning benchmarks. More importantly, LoadKAN's interpretability enables a granular analysis of the learned non-linear relationships between six distinct mobility patterns and electricity load. Through KAN-learned activation functions, our quantitative sensitivity analyses on mobility features reveal complex and market-specific dependencies. These findings further demonstrate the ability of our LoadKAN to generate insights often obscured by opaque black-box neural forecasting models.

</details>


### [948] [What Does a Chemical Language Model Know About Molecules?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23443)
*Christian Kenneth,Etowah Adams,Liam Bai,Gerard JP van Westen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文使用稀疏自编码器（SAEs）分析MolFormer模型，发现早期层追踪位置以解析分子语法，后期层编码子结构及药理学特征；非规范SMILES比无效SMILES更具破坏性，并开发了InterMol可视化工具。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究化学语言模型（cLMs）是否仅学习表层句法模式，还是能学习有意义的分子语义，通过机制性分析揭示模型内部表征的构建过程。

Method: 对编码器-only的cLM（MolFormer）应用稀疏自编码器（SAEs），逐层分析分子表征的构建机制，并开发交互式可视化工具InterMol。

Result: 早期层依赖位置跟踪潜变量解析分子语法；后期层编码原子-子结构和药理学相关特征；非规范SMILES比无效SMILES引起更具破坏性的表征偏移，且位置潜变量的破坏会跨层传播。

Conclusion: cLMs并非仅学习表层语法，其深层能学习到有意义的分子语义和药理学特征；非规范SMILES的破坏性效应揭示了位置编码在模型理解中的关键作用。

Abstract: Chemical language models (cLMs) are widely assumed to learn surface-level syntactic patterns rather than learning meaningful molecular semantics. Here, we apply sparse autoencoders (SAEs) to MolFormer, an encoder-only cLM, to mechanistically examine how molecular representations are built across layers. We discover that early layers rely on position-tracking latents to parse molecular grammar, while later layers encode atom-in-substructure and pharmacologically relevant features. Additionally, we show that non-canonical SMILES produce more disruptive representation shifts than invalid SMILES, driven by position-latent disruption propagating across layers. To support further exploration, we develop InterMol, an interactive visualizer for SAE activations on molecular strings and structures.

</details>


### [949] [Selective Time Series Forecasting via Metalearning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23448)
*Ricardo Inácio,Vitor Cerqueira,Marília Barandas,Carlos Soares*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于元学习和尺度不变统计量的选择性预测框架，通过从最近滞后中提取结构特征来建模预测误差的经验百分位数，实现跨异质时间序列的弃权迁移，在域内和迁移学习场景中均能通过拒绝高难度样本来持续提升预测精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有时间序列预测方法的准确性在不同样本间差异显著，但拒绝机制（允许模型放弃高风险预测）在预测领域未得到充分探索；现有弃权策略依赖于预测区间宽度或学习置信度分数等代理指标，这些指标与训练领域紧密耦合，限制了泛化能力。
