Method: 提出选择性预测框架，通过元学习从近期滞后数据中提取结构特征，建模预测误差的经验百分位数（一种尺度不变统计量），将拒绝决策与预测本身解耦，并基于领域无关特征实现跨异质时间序列的有效弃权迁移。

Result: 在域内和迁移学习设置下的实验表明，拒绝被预测为具有挑战性的样本能够一致地提高不同覆盖率水平下的预测准确性。

Conclusion: 通过解耦拒绝决策与预测过程，并利用尺度不变特征，该框架有效突破了现有方法泛化能力有限的瓶颈，为时间序列预测中的选择性预测提供了可迁移的解决方案。

Abstract: Deep learning methods have achieved state-of-the-art in time series forecasting, yet their accuracy varies considerably across samples, as some instances remain inherently difficult to predict. Reject option mechanisms, which allow models to abstain from high-risk predictions, are well established in classification and regression but underexplored in forecasting. Existing abstention strategies typically rely on proxies, such as the width of the prediction interval or learned confidence scores derived from forecasts. However, these approaches are inherently tied to the training domain, limiting their ability to generalize. We propose a selective forecasting framework that addresses this limitation by modeling the empirical percentile of forecasting errors, that is, a scale-invariant statistic, based on structural characteristics extracted from recent lags via metalearning. By decoupling the rejection decision from the forecast itself and grounding it in domain-agnostic features, the framework enables effective abstention transfer across heterogeneous time series. Experiments in both in-domain and transfer learning settings show that rejecting samples predicted as challenging consistently improves forecasting accuracy across coverage levels.

</details>


### [950] [Do Location Encoders Capture Spatial Effects? A GeoShapley Benchmark Across Scales](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23453)
*Daniel Kiv,Shaowen Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文评估GeoShapley方法能否从位置编码器的嵌入中恢复空间变化系数。实验测试了11种编码器，发现主系数恢复效果一致良好，而次系数恢复依赖空间尺度，原始坐标基线始终具有竞争力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 位置编码器将地理坐标转换为高维嵌入用于机器学习，但这些表示能否捕捉可解释的空间效应尚不清楚，因此需要系统性评估。

Method: 使用GeoShapley（博弈论解释器）对11种位置编码器的嵌入进行基准测试，在三种尺度（网格、县、全局）、有无原始坐标、以及未训练/对比训练条件下，评估对已知合成过程系数的恢复能力。

Result: 主系数恢复在所有编码器上表现一致良好；次系数恢复具有尺度依赖性，在全球尺度上差异最大；原始坐标基线始终具有竞争力。

Conclusion: GeoShapley能有效恢复位置编码器中的重要空间效应，但效果受空间尺度和编码器架构影响，原始坐标作为基线方法仍不可忽视。

Abstract: Location encoders transform geographic coordinates into high dimensional embeddings for downstream machine learning, but it is unclear how well these representations capture interpretable spatial effects. We benchmark whether GeoShapley, a game-theoretic explainer that treats all location features as a single joint player, can recover spatially varying coefficients from models built on location-encoder embeddings. Eleven encoders from the TorchSpatial framework are evaluated against a synthetic process with known coefficients, across three scales (grid, county, global), with and without raw coordinates alongside the embedding, and under untrained and contrastively trained conditions. Measuring recovery as the correlation between estimated and true coefficients, we report how it varies with scale and encoder architecture and compare the embeddings against a raw-coordinate baseline. Recovery of the primary coefficient is consistently high across encoders, whereas recovery of a secondary coefficient is more scale-dependent, differing most at the global scale; the raw-coordinate baseline remains competitive throughout.

</details>


### [951] [TROPT: An Open Framework for Unifying and Advancing Discrete Text Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23496)
*Matan Ben-Tov,Mahmood Sharif*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TROPT是一个统一离散文本优化器的开源框架，集成30+优化方案、15+优化器和15+损失函数，支持多种应用场景（如LLM越狱攻击、模型内部探测），大幅降低了离散文本优化的使用门槛。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有离散文本优化器分散在不同研究代码库中，难以复用和比较；优化器变体繁多，工程开销大，阻碍了该领域的进展和跨领域应用。

Method: 开发TROPT框架，统一离散优化器的执行接口和开发标准，支持模块化替换模型、目标和优化器等组件；内置30+优化方案，涵盖15+优化器和15+损失函数。

Result: 通过大规模对比实验揭示了LLM越狱攻击中有效但未被充分采用的技术；成功将优化器从LLM越狱领域迁移到新领域（如语料投毒嵌入模型）。

Conclusion: TROPT显著降低了离散文本优化的采纳和推进门槛，为相关研究和应用提供了标准化、可扩展的基础设施。

Abstract: Discrete text-trigger optimization -- searching for text sequences that, when ingested by a model, steer it toward a specified objective -- underpins model red-teaming (e.g., LLM jailbreaks), as well as auditing and interpretability. However, the current state of discrete optimizers hinders their adoption and progress. First, existing optimizers, when open-sourced at all, are scattered across research codebases tied to specific models, objectives, and problem domains. Second, optimizer variants proliferate, each requiring engineering overhead to use or extend, and remaining hard to compare head-to-head. Together, these raise the bar for adopting optimizers in existing or new domains, and for advancing them via new strategies. We address these gaps with TROPT, the first open-source framework that unifies discrete optimizers' execution and standardizes their development under a single interface. TROPT makes it easy to customize end-to-end optimization recipes by swapping any component -- models, objectives, and optimizers -- extending its reach across domains and new applications. TROPT currently ships with 30+ optimization recipes -- covering applications such as jailbreaking and probing model internals -- built from 15+ optimizers (spanning white-box to black-box access) and 15+ losses, from foundational to state-of-the-art methods. Demonstrating its utility, we leverage TROPT in several studies: (i) controlled, large-scale experiments comparing and enhancing optimization strategies for LLM jailbreaks, revealing potent-yet-underadopted techniques; and (ii) porting optimizers from one domain (e.g., LLM jailbreak) to new domains (e.g., corpus-poisoning embedding model). In all, TROPT significantly lowers the barrier to adopting and advancing discrete text optimization.

</details>


### [952] [Collapsed Effective Operators for Higher-order Structures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23517)
*Maximilian Krahn,Lennart Bastian,Vikas Garg,Björn Schuller,Tolga Birdal*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出折叠有效算子(Collapsed Effective Operators)，通过Schur补将高阶拉普拉斯算子压缩为顶点级算子，保留了高阶拓扑信息并具有正半定性，实验证明在谱聚类、信号平滑和图神经网络位置编码中效果优于传统方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有高阶谱算子将拓扑分解为不同秩，导致从业者需要通过临时选择将信息融合回顶点，缺乏统一且原则性的方法。

Method: 通过分层拉普拉斯的Schur补，将高阶自由度压缩为单个顶点级算子，得到一般稠密的编码长程拓扑相互作用的算子。

Result: 算子保持正半定性，谱上界不超过秩-0 Hodge拉普拉斯，能有效降低高阶连接下的系统能量；在谱聚类、信号平滑和图神经网络位置编码任务中表现优异。

Conclusion: 折叠有效算子为高阶拓扑结构提供了一种统一、理论保证的顶点级表示工具，可广泛应用于各类高阶数据分析任务。

Abstract: Higher-order structures are powerful relational modeling tools, yet existing spectral operators decompose the topology into separate ranks, leaving practitioners to fuse the information back to vertices through ad hoc choices. We introduce Collapsed Effective Operators, which condense higher-order degrees of freedom into a single vertex-level operator via Schur complementation of a graded Laplacian. This yields a (generally dense) operator that encodes long-range interactions mediated by topology and is applicable to arbitrary higher-order constructs. We show it preserves positive semi-definiteness with a spectral upper bound relative to the rank-0 Hodge Laplacian, effectively lowering system energy under higher-order connectivity. Empirically, our operator improves spectral clustering, signal smoothing, and enables the inclusion of topological features in neural network architectures via positional encoding. The project page can be found http://circle-group.github.io/research/CollapsedEffectiveOperators

</details>


### [953] [Simulation-Free Estimation of Traffic Flows from Sparse Count Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23536)
*Davide Guastella,Gianluca Bontempi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种从稀疏聚合车辆计数中估计时变交通流模式的方法，通过区域划分、路径构建和加权最小二乘优化来分配车辆，并在布鲁塞尔路网上验证了其高效性和准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决稀疏聚合车辆计数数据下时变交通流模式估计的难题，现有方法计算成本高或精度不足。

Method: 将研究区域划分为空间区域，构建区域间可行路径集，求解加权最小二乘优化问题分配车辆数；利用加权贡献矩阵编码传感器覆盖范围，引导优化器朝向可观测的流量配置；最后通过候选路径与传感器时间/体积分布的评分推导边缘级轨迹。

Result: 在布鲁塞尔路网上的真实和合成数据实验中，该方法能复现输入数据的日交通流量分布，且以更低的计算成本优于基线方法。

Conclusion: 提出方法在精度和计算效率上均表现优越，适合从稀疏聚合数据中恢复时变交通流模式。

Abstract: We propose a method for estimating time-varying traffic flow patterns from sparse aggregated vehicle counts. The method partitions the study area into spatial regions, constructs a set of feasible region-to-region routes, and solves a weighted least-squares optimization problem to determine the number of vehicles to allocate on each route. A weighted contribution matrix encodes sensor coverage, steering the optimizer toward flow configurations that are directly observable by sensors. Edge-level trajectories are then derived by scoring candidate routes against the temporal and volumetric profiles of aggregated regional sensor counts.
  The method is evaluated on the Brussels road network using real and synthetic traffic data. Results show that the proposed approach reproduces the daily traffic profile in the input data and outperforms the baseline methods at a fraction of the computational cost.

</details>


### [954] [Scheduling Thoughts: Learning the Order of Thought in Diffusion Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23567)
*Jiawei Xu,Minghui Liu,Aakriti Agrawal,Yifan Chen,Furong Huang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Self-Aware Scheduling (SAS)方法，通过学习最优的掩码顺序来提升掩码扩散语言模型的生成质量，在数独和数学推理任务上显著优于启发式调度方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 掩码扩散语言模型的解码顺序（即"思维顺序"）对生成质量有显著影响，但传统方法依赖启发式规则来选择顺序，缺乏理论指导。

Method: 推导了顺序解码不匹配度的可计算上界（基于KL散度），将顺序选择形式化为策略优化问题；提出SAS方法，使用Group Relative Policy Optimization学习轻量级顺序策略，可无缝应用于任意顺序和半自回归解码。

Result: 在Sudoku+1B MDM上准确率从82.0%提升至91.8%（微调后达97.5%）；在LLaDA-8B上GSM8K的pass@1从64%提升至76%，MBPP从39.5%提升至41%。

Conclusion: 通过理论驱动的顺序策略学习，SAS能有效提升掩码扩散模型的生成质量，且在不同任务和模型规模上均优于启发式调度方法。

Abstract: Masked diffusion language models decode by iteratively unmasking tokens, where the unmasking order defines an "order of thought" that strongly influences generation quality yet is typically chosen heuristically. We derive a tractable upper bound on the sequential decoding mismatch, measured by the Kullback-Leibler divergence and expressed in terms of the model's pathwise log-likelihood, with tightness under sufficient model expressivity. This bound induces a dense self-aware reward over ordered trajectories, casting order selection as a principled policy optimization problem with a frozen denoiser. We instantiate this idea as Self-Aware Scheduling (SAS), which learns a lightweight order policy using Group Relative Policy Optimization and applies seamlessly to both any-order and semi-autoregressive decoding. On Sudoku with 1B MDM, SAS improves puzzle accuracy from 82.0% (best heuristic schedule) to 91.8%, and reaches 97.5% with second-stage fine-tuning along learned trajectories. On mathematical reasoning with LLaDA-8B, SAS improves pass@1 on GSM8K from 64% to 76% and on MBPP from 39.5% to 41%, consistently matching or exceeding heuristic schedules across generation lengths and block sizes. Project page: https://jimmyxu123.github.io/SAS

</details>


### [955] [Patient-Aware Contrastive Learning Preserves Per-Patient Structure in RR-Interval Representations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23570)
*Yasantha Niroshana,Weijith Wimalasiri,Chathuranga Hettiarachchi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种患者感知的对比学习目标，用于房颤检测中保留个体基线模式，实现鲁棒的跨患者泛化（AUROC 0.989）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生理信号中每位患者都有独特的基线模式，传统对比学习会抹除个体差异，导致模型无法泛化到未见患者。

Method: 提出患者感知对比目标，仅对同一患者、同一类别的片段构成正样本对，保留个体窦性心律基线同时推开两类。

Result: 患者内SR结构一致性0.850（SupCon 0.800, BCE 0.772）；IRIDIA-AF数据集上AUROC 0.989±0.003，种子方差比SupCon低2.6倍。

Conclusion: 跨患者泛化的关键在于保持个体几何结构一致性，而非全局类别可分性。

Abstract: Contrastive representation learning struggles on physiological signals when each subject contributes a distinct baseline pattern. If class differences overlap with subject differences,class-level objectives such as supervised contrastive learning tend to merge per-subject structure into a single per-class cluster,removing the individual variation that a model needs to generalize to unseen patients. We study this problem in the setting of Paroxysmal Atrial Fibrillation(PAF) detection from RR-interval(RRI) sequences and propose a patient-aware contrastive objective that forms positive pairs only from same-patient, same-class segments, preserving each patient's own sinus rhythm(SR) baseline while still pushing the two classes apart. Examining the learned embeddings directly, our objective achieves the most consistent per-patient SR structure (cohesion $0.850$ vs. $0.800$ for supervised contrastive loss (SupCon) and $0.772$ for binary cross-entropy (BCE)). We also identify that BCE produces the cleanest global class separation yet the most disordered per-patient structure. This is precisely why a linear probe trained on its features breaks down on unseen patients. On the IRIDIA-AF dataset, the resulting representation reaches a patient-independent Area Under the Receiver Operating Characteristic Curve (AUROC) of $0.989 \pm 0.003$ with $2.6\times$ lower seed variance than supervised contrastive baselines.These results highlight that per-subject geometric consistency, rather than global class separability, is key to robust cross-patient generalization.

</details>


### [956] [A Spectral Theory of Normalized Corrected GNN Propagation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23572)
*Qihan Chen,Wei Li,Meng Qin,Jianfeng Hou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了归一化修正GNN传播的谱理论，证明在稠密多对数条件下，经过O(log n)层传播后仍能实现精确恢复，并给出了多类部分恢复定理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的GCN类模型在深层传播时存在过平滑问题，即节点表示趋于同质化，丧失类别区分能力。本文希望从理论上理解这一现象，并探索如何通过修正归一化传播算子来保留类别判别信号。

Method: 构建了归一化修正邻接矩阵（去除度平稳成分），将其作为传播算子；在二元Contextual随机块模型下进行理论分析，给出了精确恢复的高概率定理；并推广到多类部分恢复场景。

Result: 1) 在稠密多对数区域(p ≥ C log^B n/n, B>4)，经过k=O(log n)层传播后，可实现高概率的精确类别恢复；2) 多类场景下，大多数节点的表示会向类中心收缩；3) 合成和真实数据实验验证了理论预测的深度、图信号和特征噪声依赖性。

Conclusion: 修正的归一化传播算子在适当条件下能够抵抗过平滑，保留类别判别信号；理论结果与实验吻合，为深层GNN设计提供了理论基础。

Abstract: We develop a spectral theory for \emph{normalized corrected GNN propagation}. The object of study is the symmetric normalized adjacency with its degree-stationary component removed, matching the normalization used by standard GCN-style models while isolating the stationary direction most directly tied to oversmoothing. The central theoretical question is whether this corrected normalized operator preserves class-discriminative signal after many propagation layers. Our main result is a high-probability exact-recovery theorem for the binary Contextual Stochastic Block Model after \(k=O(\log n)\) propagation steps in the dense polylogarithmic regime \(p\ge C\log^B n/n\), for any fixed \(B>4\), under explicit graph-signal and feature-SNR conditions. We also establish a multi-class partial recovery theorem showing contraction toward class centers for most nodes. Synthetic and real node-classification experiments are included as empirical checks of the theory's predicted dependence on depth, graph signal, and feature noise.

</details>


### [957] [Solve for the Hyperparameter, Skip the Search: Kolmogorov-Optimal Scaling Laws for Spline Regression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23575)
*Yong Yi Bay,Kathleen A. Yearick*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出KORE算法，利用逼近理论和ANOVA分解，通过闭式解替代网格搜索实现最优样条回归超参数（分辨率）的选择，在保持精度的同时将模型拟合次数减少约8倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统超参数调优依赖网格搜索+交叉验证，计算成本高昂。作者发现对于样条回归，最优分辨率可以通过闭式解析解直接求得，无需穷举搜索。

Method: 三个理论支柱：(1)经典逼近理论将平方偏差关联到分辨率的已知幂次；(2)基维度是分辨率的显式多项式；(3)留一法误差通过PRESS恒等式一次拟合得到。通过偏置-方差平衡得到解析最小化器。扩展到高维用交互阶数替代输入维度，得到尺度律。KORE算法只需拟合两个试点分辨率，求解2x2系统估计偏置和噪声尺度，输出闭式最优分辨率。

Result: 在高达80维的加性和稀疏成对目标上，KORE与穷举3折交叉验证及GCV、Cp、AIC、BIC等经典方法匹配，模型拟合减少约8倍。在36个真实表格数据集中，21种方法中单位计算量精度排名第一，超过调优后的Boosting和核方法。

Conclusion: 当复杂度存在于低交互阶数时，求解分辨率优于搜索分辨率。

Abstract: Hyperparameter tuning almost always means search: fit the model at every value on a grid, score each by cross-validation, and keep the winner. For spline regression that search is unnecessary. The optimal resolution can be solved for in closed form, to the accuracy an exhaustive search reaches, at a fraction of the compute. Three ingredients make this possible: classical approximation theory pins the squared bias to a known power of the resolution G, exactly the Kolmogorov n-width of the smoothness class; the basis dimension is an explicit polynomial in G; and leave-one-out error follows from a single fit via the PRESS identity. Balancing the two known curves gives the minimizer analytically. We extend this calculus to many coordinates by replacing ambient input dimension with interaction order, the number of active low-order components in an ANOVA decomposition, yielding a scaling law in which the optimal resolution and error are power functions of the effective density (sample size per active component), with input dimension absent from the exponent. The law becomes an algorithm. KORE (Kolmogorov-optimal Order-aware Resolution Estimation) fits two pilot resolutions, solves a leverage-calibrated 2x2 system for the bias and noise scales, and evaluates the closed-form plug-in resolution with a tiny leave-one-out certificate: about a dozen fits instead of a full grid sweep, with a consistency guarantee as the sample grows. Across additive and sparse pairwise targets up to 80 input dimensions, KORE matches exhaustive 3-fold cross-validation and the full classical ladder (GCV, Mallows' Cp, AIC, BIC) while fitting roughly 8x fewer models; on 36 real tabular datasets it ranks first among 21 methods in accuracy per unit of compute, ahead of tuned boosters and kernel machines. When complexity lives in low interaction order, solving for the resolution beats searching for it.

</details>


### [958] [Quantifying the Agreement Between Data-Influence and Data-Similarity to Understand LLM Behavior](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23591)
*Christopher J. Anders,Henrique Da Silva Gameiro,Nico Daheim,Mohammad Emtiyaz Khan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统比较了两种用于追溯LLM输出到训练数据的方法——数据相似度（data-similarity）和数据影响力（data-influence），发现两者排序结果显著一致但存在不对称性：相似度排名靠前的文档在影响力排序中更稳定，反之则不然。基于此提出用低成本相似度筛选、高成本影响力精调的成本-精度权衡策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管数据相似度和数据影响力被广泛用于LLM输出追溯，但缺乏对两者在输出追溯任务上的直接比较，不清楚它们究竟在多大程度上一致或不同。

Method: 分别用两种度量对训练文档排序，计算排序重叠度；在OLMo2-1B、Qwen3-1.7B、LlaMa3.2-1B、Gemma3-1B和GPT2等多个模型上进行实验验证。

Result: 两种排序结果显著一致，但存在不对称性：相似度排名的top文档在影响力排序中具有更一致的排名，反之则不然。

Conclusion: 可以利用这种不对称性，先用低成本的数据相似度进行初筛，再用高成本的数据影响力进行精排，从而在成本与准确性之间取得更优的平衡。

Abstract: One way to understand LLM behavior is to trace its output back to the training data. Two types of measures are commonly used for output tracing: data-similarity and data-influence. The former is cheaper while the latter is believed to be more accurate. Even though many works have compared them for ground-truth tasks, no such comparisons exist for output tracing. Here, we fill this gap and precisely quantify the commonalities and differences between the two measures. We do this by first ranking the training documents according to each measure and then computing the overlap between the two rankings. Our main finding is that the two rankings agree significantly, but there is an asymmetry between them: The top documents of data-similarity are assigned more consistent ranks by data-influence than the other way around. This result is valid across a range of experiments involving OLMo2-1B, Qwen3-1.7B, LlaMa3.2-1B, Gemma3-1B, and GPT2. We exploit the asymmetry to obtain a favorable cost-accuracy trade-off by using the costly data-influence to refine the results of data-similarity.

</details>


### [959] [MORL-A2C: Multi-Objective Reinforcement Learning Reranker for Optimizing Healthiness in MOPI-HFRS](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23603)
*Aarya Vasantlal,Joshua Zolla*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出MORL-A2C，一个基于强化学习的序列化决策扩展模型，用于多目标食物推荐系统。通过将推荐建模为K步重排序问题，采用Advantage Actor-Critic算法联合优化偏好与健康，在牺牲少量排序质量的情况下大幅提升健康对齐度（H-Score@20从46.05%提升至69.57%）。同时修正了基线评估中的bug。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有食物推荐系统过度关注用户偏好而忽视营养健康，MOPI-HFRS虽通过Pareto优化同时考虑偏好、健康和多样性，但其静态单步优化无法捕捉饮食决策的序列性本质。

Method: 将推荐建模为K步重排序问题，利用冻结的GNN嵌入，采用Advantage Actor-Critic（A2C）算法，使用标量化相关性/健康奖励函数，并通过行为克隆从点积排序器进行策略热启动。

Result: 在宏营养素基准上，Recall@20从25.64%降至23.61%，NDCG@20从23.52%降至20.64%，但H-Score@20从46.05%大幅提升至69.57%。全营养素基准上趋势一致。

Conclusion: 验证了策略驱动的序列优化能够有效平衡多目标食物推荐中健康与偏好的权衡。

Abstract: Unhealthy dietary behavior continues to be a persistent public health issue in the United States, exacerbated by recommendation systems that prioritize user preference without considering nutritional health. The Multi-Objective Personalized Interpretable Health-aware Food Recommendation System (MOPI-HFRS), from which this work extends, addresses this by jointly optimizing preference, health, and diversity through Pareto-based optimization. However, this approach relies on static, per-step tradeoff solutions that fail to capture the sequential nature of dietary decision-making. We introduce MORL-A2C, a sequential decision-making extension to MOPI-HFRS targeting the health-preference axis. Leveraging frozen GNN embeddings, MORL-A2C formulates recommendation as a K-step reranking problem using an Advantage Actor-Critic algorithm with a scalarized relevance/health reward. The policy is warm-started via behavior cloning against a dot-product ranker derived from frozen embeddings. We also identify and correct a non-trivial bug in the MOPI-HFRS evaluation pipeline that understated baseline performance; all results are reported against the corrected baseline. On the macro-nutrient benchmark, MORL-A2C achieves a modest reduction in ranking quality (Recall@20: 25.64% to 23.61%, NDCG@20: 23.52% to 20.64%) in exchange for a substantial improvement in health alignment (H-Score@20: 46.05% to 69.57%), with consistent trends on the full-nutrient benchmark. These findings validate that policy-driven sequential optimization can effectively navigate the health-preference trade-off in multi-objective food recommendation.

</details>


### [960] [Scaling Linear Mode Connectivity and Merging to Billion Parameter Pretrained Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23607)
*Tianyi Li,Zhiqiang Shen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种双学习框架（Dual-Learned Matching），通过对两个预训练Transformer模型分别施加参数化功能保持变换，进行双向联合优化，使它们在线性插值路径上对齐，首次在十亿参数级模型上实现了近乎零障碍的线性模式连通性（LMC）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LMC方法通常只从单一模型端点优化插值路径，限制了在大规模预训练Transformer上的可扩展性和有效性。

Method: 对两个模型分别应用参数化的功能保持权重变换，然后双向联合学习各自的变换参数，使两者朝着共享的线性插值路径对齐。

Result: 中规模语言模型在WikiText上实现接近零损失屏障；ViT-L在插值路径上维持超过69%的ImageNet top-1准确率；十亿参数级LLM仅表现出极小的损失屏障。

Conclusion: 通过适当解决参数对称性，大型预训练Transformer可以通过简单的线性路径进行连接和合并，显著提升插值性能。

Abstract: Linear mode connectivity (LMC) provides a promising foundation for understanding and merging independently trained neural networks, but existing methods typically optimize the interpolation path from only one model endpoint, limiting their scalability and effectiveness for large pretrained transformers. We propose a novel and scalable framework for enabling LMC-based model merging to {\em billion-parameter pretrained transformers}. Our method applies properly parameterized functionality-preserving weight transformations to align functionally equivalent solutions, and introduces a dual learning procedure in which both models jointly learn their corresponding transformations toward a shared linear interpolation path. This bidirectional optimization substantially reduces interpolation barriers and enables more reliable merging across large-scale architectures. Empirically, we show that our approach achieves near-zero loss barriers on WikiText for language models with medium-sized parameters, representing, to our knowledge, the first demonstration of near-barrier-free linear connectivity at this scale. In the vision domain, ViT-L maintains above 69\% ImageNet top-1 accuracy throughout the interpolation path, while modern billion-parameter LLMs exhibit only small loss barriers. These results suggest that properly resolving parameter symmetries enables large pretrained Transformers to be connected and merged through simple linear paths with substantially improved interpolation performance. Code: https://github.com/VILA-Lab/Dual-Learned-Matching .

</details>


### [961] [Discovering Latent Groups for Robust Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23609)
*Ankur Garg,Ulrich Aïvodji,Samira Ebrahimi Kahou,Vincent Michalski*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出神经分类树（NCT）框架，通过树形架构编码子组结构，在不依赖子组标注的情况下，利用样本路由机制分离冲突子组，实现鲁棒性并提升可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法虽然能通过调整网络参数解决虚假相关性问题，但推理时仅输出类别预测，无法揭示样本的潜在子组信息，缺乏可解释性。

Method: 设计神经分类树（NCT），树形架构中包含"易"和"难"两类节点；根据预测正确性将样本路由到不同节点，并将路由路径作为伪标签迭代训练，从而无需子组监督即可分离冲突子组。

Result: 在五个基准数据集（涵盖二分类和多分类虚假相关性）上，NCT持续隔离少数子组，提供了透明的模型架构与数据潜在子组结构之间的映射，鲁棒性与最先进方法相当。

Conclusion: NCT通过树形架构同时实现了鲁棒性提升和可解释性增强，为理解模型在子组层面的行为提供了新途径。

Abstract: Machine learning models exploit spurious correlations, achieving high average accuracy but failing disproportionately on underrepresented subgroups. Existing methods address this by adjusting network parameters, guided either by subgroup annotations or inferred pseudo-group labels. Yet at inference, these methods produce only a class prediction, with no insight into a sample's latent subgroup. We propose neural classification trees (NCT), a framework that achieves robustness by encoding subgroup structure in its tree-shaped architecture. By routing each sample to an "easy" or "hard" node of this tree -- based on prediction correctness -- and reusing these routes as pseudo-labels for the next iteration, NCT disentangles conflicting subgroups, without requiring subgroup supervision. We evaluate NCT on five benchmarks spanning binary and multi-class spurious correlations. Our experiments show that the learned tree topology provides strong interpretability by consistently isolating minority subgroups, which provides a transparent mapping between the model architecture and the data's latent group structure, while yielding competitive robustness with state-of-the-art methods.

</details>


### [962] [DiT-Reward: Generative Representations for Text-to-Image Reward Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23626)
*Yuanming Yang,Guoqing Ma,Bo Wang,Yuan Zhang,Wei Tang,Chenyi Li,Haoyang Huang,Nan Duan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出DiT-Reward，将预训练的文生图扩散Transformer（DiT）直接转换为奖励模型，在偏好预测上超越现有方法HPSv3，并用于优化Stable Diffusion模型生成质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究生成式表征学习中学到的表示是否能同时用于评估生成图像的质量，即验证生成模型内部表征对奖励建模的可迁移性。

Method: 将预训练的文生图扩散Transformer（DiT）转化为奖励模型：处理接近干净的图像潜变量，聚合各Transformer层中文本条件化的图像表征。生成骨干网络可冻结，仅训练轻量级预测头。

Result: 在HPDv2和HPDv3上分别达到85.6%和77.6%，全面超越HPSv3。中层到深层表征最强，跨层聚合有益。生成骨干网络规模越大，奖励性能越强。用于Flow-GRPO优化Stable Diffusion 3.5 Large时，优于HPSv3，且推理速度提升1.65倍。

Conclusion: 预训练的生成式DiT提供的表征可用于奖励建模和策略优化，生成与评估可共享同一套表征空间。

Abstract: Can representations learned for image generation also support the evaluation of generated images? We study text-to-image reward prediction as a downstream task of generative representation learning. To this end, we introduce DiT-Reward, which converts a pretrained text-to-image Diffusion Transformer into a reward model by processing near-clean image latents and aggregating text-conditioned image representations across transformer layers. Under the same training data mixture as HPSv3, DiT-Reward outperforms HPSv3 on all four evaluated preference benchmarks, reaching 85.6% on HPDv2 and 77.6% on HPDv3. When the generative backbone is frozen, a lightweight learned head can still extract meaningful preference predictions from its representations. Probing across depth further reveals that downstream reward performance is strongest in the middle-to-late layers and benefits from combining representations across different stages. We also observe consistent positive scaling with generative backbone capacity. Finally, when used to optimize Stable Diffusion 3.5 Large with Flow-GRPO, DiT-Reward outperforms HPSv3 along the matched training trajectory, with particularly clear gains in realism. Direct latent scoring also achieves a 1.65x inference speedup over HPSv3 with comparable peak memory. These results show that pretrained generative DiTs provide transferable representations for reward modeling and policy optimization.

</details>


### [963] [Muown Implicitly Performs Angular Step-size Decay](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23637)
*Florian Hübler,Kai Lion,Antonio Orvieto,Niao He*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了AngularMuown优化器，通过将方向更新与径向幅度更新解耦，改进了Muown优化器，在Transformer预训练中取得了更好的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Muown优化器在Transformer预训练中表现优异，但其中方向步长受未归一化参数化方式影响而不稳定。作者希望将方向步长显式化，实现更好的控制与调度。

Method: 将Muown的方向更新等价为归一化方向上的黎曼步长，并将角度步长显式解耦出来，提出AngularMuown，直接优化归一化方向，使用可调度的角度乘子。

Result: AngularMuown在modded nanoGPT速度竞赛的per-optimizer类别中领先，并在Qwen2-0.5B和1.1B MoE模型上验证了可扩展性。

Conclusion: 通过显式化角度步长，AngularMuown比Muown更稳定且性能更优，且能够扩展到更大规模的模型。

Abstract: Matrix-aware optimizers such as Muon and Muown have recently shown strong empirical performance for pre-training Transformers. In particular, Muown separates each weight matrix into row magnitudes and an un-normalized direction variable, updating the former with Adam and the latter with Muon. We show that the directional update of Muown is equivalent to a Riemannian step on the normalized directions, while the magnitude of the un-normalized parameterization only modulates the angular step size. This explains the step-size stability of Muown and suggests making the angular step size explicit. The resulting method, AngularMuown, optimizes directly over the normalized directions and uses a schedulable angular multiplier decoupled from the radial magnitude update. AngularMuown improves over Muown and, at the time of writing, a preliminary version is leading the per-optimizer category of the modded nanoGPT speedrunning competition. Further experiments on Qwen2-0.5B, and 1.1B parameter mixture-of-experts models confirm the algorithm scales beyond small models. An implementation of the algorithm is available at https://github.com/fhueb/angular-muown

</details>


### [964] [Learning Process Rewards via Success Visitation Matching for Efficient RL](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23640)
*Raymond Tsao,Andrew Wagenmaker,Sergey Levine*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种将稀疏结果奖励转化为密集过程奖励的简单方法，通过训练判别器区分成功与不成功的轨迹，激励RL策略模仿成功轨迹的状态-动作访问模式，从而加速机器人控制策略的微调。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在许多现代RL应用中，任务的自然奖励是稀疏的（只有完成任务时才获得+1奖励），这导致信用分配困难，训练缓慢且低效。作者希望解决稀疏奖励带来的RL优化挑战。

Method: 训练一个判别器来区分之前成功和失败的轨迹片段，利用该判别器提供密集奖励信号，激励RL策略匹配成功轨迹的状态-动作访问模式，同时避免失败轨迹的模式。该奖励覆盖所有状态，而不仅仅是任务成功对应的状态。

Result: 在模拟和真实世界的机器人操作任务上，该方法相比直接最大化稀疏结果奖励，显著加速了RL微调性能。

Conclusion: 该方法能将稀疏奖励转化为密集奖励而不改变最优策略，理论上证明了这一点，并在实践中验证了其加速RL微调的有效性。

Abstract: In many modern applications of reinforcement learning (RL), the natural reward for a task of interest is inherently sparse: a reward of 0 is given everywhere except when the task is completed, when a reward of +1 is given. Training a policy to maximize such a sparse reward requires solving a challenging credit assignment problem, leading to slow or ineffective RL improvement. We propose a simple approach to transform a sparse outcome reward into a dense process reward. Our approach relies on training a discriminator to distinguish between previous successful and unsuccessful episodes, and using this discriminator to incentivize the RL-learned policy to match the state-action visitations of successful episodes, while avoiding those of unsuccessful episodes. By incentivizing the policy to match the visitations over all states, not just those that correspond to task success, this reward provides dense feedback on whether progress is being made towards task completion, and, we show, provably achieves this without changing the optimal policy. Focusing on finetuning of robotic control policies, we demonstrate that our approach leads to significantly faster RL finetuning performance on both simulated and real-world manipulation tasks, as compared to simply maximizing the sparse outcome reward.

</details>


### [965] [Dynamic estimation of slowly varying sequences](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23655)
*Prashant Gokhale,Mikhail Khodak,Sandeep Silwal*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一个通用框架，用于在向量空间中顺序近似缓慢变化序列中每个元素的线性/非线性函数。该框架通过局部缩放估计预算来适应变化幅度α_i，获得更紧的路径长度型变差界 O(∑α_i)，优于此前 O(m·max α_i) 的最坏情况界，并在矩阵幂、谱密度、蒙特卡洛积分和PDE边界值问题中获得新结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有隐式迹估计方法仅针对线性函数且预算分配基于最坏情况α_i（即O(m·max α_i)），对于序列中大部分时间变化小、偶尔有突发的场景不够高效。需要一种通用的、自适应的顺序估计框架，能够根据不同时刻的变化幅度动态分配计算预算。

Method: 1) 提出通用框架，将顺序估计问题扩展到多种线性与非线性函数及多样向量空间；2) 设计局部缩放算法，根据α_i的大小自适应调整每个位置i的估计预算，得到总和形式的界O(∑α_i)；3) 在某些情况下，无需预先知道α_i，可在估计过程中近乎零额外成本地在线估计变化幅度。

Result: 1) 获得矩阵幂、谱密度、蒙特卡洛积分和PDE边界值问题的顺序估计新结果；2) 成本界从O(m·max α_i)改进为O(∑α_i)，对稳定但有罕见突变的序列更高效；3) 部分情况下可实现α_i的在线估计且几乎无额外开销。

Conclusion: 该框架使顺序近似工具变得通用且自适应，在动态迹估计问题上超越了现有最优保证。

Abstract: We consider the problem of sequentially approximating functions of each element in a slowly-varying sequence, i.e. one where the magnitude $α_i$ of the difference between the elements at positions $i$ and $i-1$ is small. Recent work on implicit trace estimation shows that when $α_t$ is small, reusing queries to past sequence elements can reduce the overall cost [Dharangutte \& Musco, NeurIPS~2021; Woodruff et al., NeurIPS~2022]. We introduce a framework generalizing this to a variety of linear and nonlinear functions on diverse vector spaces, obtaining novel sequential estimation results for matrix powers, spectral densities, Monte Carlo integration, and a boundary value problem from partial differential equations~(PDEs). Furthermore, we develop a novel algorithm for use with this framework that locally scales the estimation budget with $α_t$, obtaining sharper path-length-style variation bounds of form $\mathcal O(\sum_{i=1}^mα_i)$ on the cost of estimating a sequence of length $m$. This improves upon the previous implicit trace estimation bound of $\mathcal O(m\cdot\max_iα_i)$ [Dharangutte \& Musco, NeurIPS~2021], which is achieved by fixing the query budget using the worst-case $α_i$ and is thus inefficient for stable sequences with rare bursts. Lastly, while all past work assumes a known bound on $α_i$, we show in certain cases how the changes can be estimated on-the-fly with (nearly) no added cost. In summary, our framework makes the sequential approximation toolkit general-purpose and adaptive while improving upon state-of-the-art-guarantees for dynamic trace estimation.

</details>


### [966] [MAS-PromptBench: When Does Prompt Optimization Improve Multi-Agent LLM Systems?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23664)
*Juyang Bai,Laixi Shi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 这篇论文系统研究了多智能体系统中的系统提示词优化问题，发现其能显著提升性能，但效果高度依赖于系统配置，并面临搜索空间指数级增长的挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体系统（MAS）由多个基于LLM的智能体组成，每个智能体都有系统提示词，这些提示词构成了重要的优化空间。虽然提示词优化在单LLM场景下效果显著，但在MAS中面临搜索空间指数级增长的独特挑战，且优化效果的影响因素尚不明确。

Method: 在多种MAS设置（不同任务、工作流、通信协议、团队规模）下进行系统化实验，使用两种从单智能体方法自然扩展而来的提示词优化器进行基准测试。

Result: 提示词优化能够释放显著的性能增益，但效果高度依赖于系统配置（任务类型、工作流、通信协议、团队规模等），且存在尚未解决的开放挑战。

Conclusion: 研究揭示了MAS中提示词优化何时及多大程度上有帮助，为多智能体系统的自动化优化提供了重要见解，同时指出了当前面临的开放性挑战。

Abstract: Multi-agent systems (MAS) offer a scalable path forward for agentic AI, comprising multiple LLM-based agents, each assigned a system prompt and a position within a workflow that governs inter-agent coordination and output aggregation. System prompts thus form a critical and accessible optimization surface: they specify agents' roles and behaviors, enabling system-level improvements without model finetuning. Although prompt optimization has shown substantial potential for single LLMs, extending it to MAS poses distinct challenges, notably an exponentially growing search space. It remains unclear whether, when, and by how much prompt optimization improves MAS performance, and how sensitive such gains are to system configuration. In this work, we systematically study system-prompt optimization across a broad range of MAS setups varying in task, workflow, communication protocol, and team size, benchmarking two prompt optimizers that naturally extend state-of-the-art single-agent methods. The results reveal its potential to unlock significant gains while exposing open challenges, characterizing when and how much prompt optimization helps across diverse MAS settings.

</details>


### [967] [On the Limits of Prompt-Conditioned Language Models as General-Purpose Learners](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23668)
*David Mguni,Julian Ma,Jun Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文从信息论和博弈论角度证明，基于提示的大语言模型并非通用问题求解器。语言作为容量有限的压缩通信通道，当任务家族的信息复杂度超过通道容量时，会产生不可消除的误差下限；同时，对齐约束也会导致不可约的失真。结论是：仅通过提示，LLM无法普遍解决所有任务，即使在无限数据条件下也存在固有局限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 挑战LLM被普遍描绘为通用问题求解器的观点，揭示语言作为任务信息传递界面的根本限制，从理论层面论证提示驱动LLM的能力边界。

Method: 将用户-系统交互建模为双层廉价谈话博弈，引入任务推断与执行的概念分解，结合PAC-Bayes界限推导，分别建立表达能力下限和目标对齐下限两个理论结果。

Result: 1) 表达能力下限：语言作为容量有限通道，当任务复杂度超过容量时，不同任务不可区分，产生不可消除的正误差下限；2) 目标对齐下限：对齐约束限制输出集，用户理想分布可能超出可行类，导致不可约失真。

Conclusion: 提示条件的LLM不是通用问题求解器，其局限源于信息受限通信和对齐受限目标。超越自然语言的界面（多模态、外部记忆）可能通过增加任务相关信息来缓解这些固有局限。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are frequently portrayed as general-purpose solvers capable of solving arbitrary tasks. We argue that this view overlooks a fundamental constraint: language is a compressed and capacity-limited interface for conveying task information. Modelling User--System interaction as a bilevel \emph{cheap-talk} game, we analyse how latent tasks are encoded into prompts and reinterpreted under alignment and safety constraints. We introduce a conceptual decomposition separating task inference from execution and derive PAC-Bayes bounds that distinguish finite-sample estimation error from irreducible structural limitations. Our first main result establishes an \emph{expressivity floor}: language acts as a capacity-limited communication channel, and whenever the informational complexity of a task family exceeds the capacity of that channel, distinct tasks become unavoidably indistinguishable to the Solver, inducing a strictly positive error floor that cannot be eliminated by additional data, optimisation, or model scaling alone. We then establish an \emph{objective-misalignment floor}: when alignment constraints restrict the admissible output set, the User-ideal distribution may lie outside the feasible class, inducing an irreducible distortion. Together, these results yield a formal negative conclusion: prompt-conditioned LLMs are not universal problem solvers through prompting alone, as there exist task families for which correct behaviour is provably unattainable even in the infinite-data regime. More broadly, our analysis shows the limits of prompt-based generalisation arise from information-constrained communication and alignment-constrained objectives. This suggests that interfaces beyond natural language, including multimodal observations and, external memory, may reduce the inherent LLM limitations by increasing the task-relevant information available to the System.

</details>


### [968] [Open Problem: Is AdamW Effective Under Heavy-Tailed Noise?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23676)
*Dingzhi Yu,Hongyi Tao,Yuanyu Wan,Luo Luo,Lijun Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文指出AdamW在重尾噪声（LLM训练中的常见现象）下的收敛理论仍缺失，通过加权度量基准和梯度隐藏下界机制，将AdamW在重尾假设下的收敛性正式确立为开放问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AdamW收敛理论主要局限于有限方差场景，而实际LLM预训练中的随机梯度噪声往往呈现重尾分布，且已有研究表明Lion、Muon等符号优化器以及AdaGrad能在重尾噪声下收敛，但AdamW的严格收敛理论尚未建立，因此需要探讨其第二矩累积器是否会构成根本性障碍。

Method: 将问题形式化为开放问题，提出加权度量基准（positive weighted-metric benchmark）作为理论下界，并设计走廊下界机制（corridor lower-bound mechanism）展示分母记忆如何隐藏大梯度。

Result: 给出了一个正面的加权度量基准结果，同时通过下界机制揭示了分母记忆可能导致梯度被隐藏的缺陷。

Conclusion: AdamW在重尾噪声下的收敛性仍为开放问题，分母记忆可能构成收敛障碍，需要进一步研究。

Abstract: AdamW is the de facto optimizer for training large language models (LLMs), yet the theory behind it still lives mostly in finite-variance regimes. This is increasingly unsatisfying, as empirical evidence indicates that stochastic gradient noise in LLM pretraining is typically heavy-tailed. Recent work shows that sign-based optimizers such as Lion and Muon achieve sharp heavy-tailed rates, and that AdaGrad can also converge under heavy-tailed noise. However, no rigorous convergence theory for AdamW has yet been established in this regime. Can AdamW converge under the same heavy-tailed assumptions, or does its second-moment accumulator create a genuine obstruction? We formulate this as an open problem, prove a positive weighted-metric benchmark, and give a corridor lower-bound mechanism showing how denominator memory can hide large gradients.

</details>


<div id='cs.IR'></div>

# cs.IR [[Back]](#toc)

### [969] [The Token Tax of Epistemic Accuracy: Comparing RAG and Long-Context Architectures for Document-Grounded Generative AI Applications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20898)
*Austin Hamilton,Ryan Singh,Michael Wise,Ibrahim Yousif,Arthur Carvalho,Zhe Shan,Mohammad Mayyas,Lora A. Cavuoto,Fadel M. Megahed*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文通过对比检索增强生成（RAG）与长上下文提示两种架构，研究证据分配方式对文档型LLM助手准确性与成本的影响。以制造业安全培训为案例发现：长上下文提示正确率更高（73.1% vs 65.4%），但每查询token成本高出26倍，这种"token税"是更广泛证据获取的代价。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索在高风险、知识密集型工作中，基于LLM的文档助手在生成前如何分配证据（即采用何种"认知访问"机制）会如何影响其准确性与成本。

Method: 对比两种架构：检索增强生成（RAG，仅检索少量相关段落）与长上下文提示（将整份文档集合加载到上下文中）。以制造业安全培训为案例，使用专家验证的基准，评估了972个答案，涉及两台小型语言模型、三种检索/上下文提示方法。

Result: 长上下文提示的正确率最高（73.1%），语义RAG为65.4%，但长上下文提示的每查询token成本是语义RAG的26倍。

Conclusion: 更广泛的证据获取（长上下文）可提升"认知准确性"，但需支付高昂的"token税"。对于资源受限的组织，需要在准确性与成本之间进行权衡。

Abstract: Document-grounded assistants built on large language models are increasingly used in high-stakes, knowledge-intensive work. Their usefulness, however, may depend on how evidence is allocated before generation. We investigate such a claim by comparing two grounding architectures: (a) retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) that retrieves a few relevant passages, and (b) long-context prompting, which loads the whole document collection in context. We view these as two regimes of "epistemic access" on an accuracy--cost frontier. We use "epistemic accuracy" to capture model correctness that depends on having the right evidence. We posit that broader access (via long context) can increase it, but with a "token tax" (i.e., a substantial increase in cost due to larger input token consumption). We probe this framing with a case study in manufacturing safety training. Using an expert-validated benchmark, we evaluate 972 answers across three machines, two small language models, and three retrieval/in-context prompting approaches. Long-context prompting achieved the highest correctness (73.1% vs. 65.4% for semantic RAG), but at 26 times the per-query token cost. We interpret this gap as the token tax of broader evidentiary access. We carefully discuss the implications of our findings for resource-constrained organizations.

</details>


### [970] [A Rank-One Popularity Component in Dot-Product Recommender Scores:Population Theory and Prior-Separation Evidence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21275)
*Yang Cheng*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文发现推荐系统中的表示各向异性（representation anisotropy）并非源于Transformer架构，而是源于条件训练分布中的物品边缘分布（item marginal log p(i)）。通过理论分析，作者证明了点积softmax解码器的评分可分解为互信息、物品边缘项和上下文偏移项，其中物品边缘项导致低秩流行性子空间。实验表明，将log p(i)从学习到的点积中分离后，流行度对齐的评分能量降低了98.6%，表明这种"表示退化"本质上是解码器层的长尾物品边缘分布所致。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 过去研究常将推荐系统中的表示各向异性归因于Transformer架构，但实际上Transformer只是其中一个因素。本文旨在揭示更深层的根本原因——条件训练分布中的物品边缘分布（尤其是长尾分布）才是导致评分出现流行度对齐低秩结构的主要机制，从而纠正学界对表示退化来源的误解。

Method: 作者从理论上证明了使用点积softmax解码器的编码器，其群体最优评分可分解为点间互信息、物品边缘项log p(i)和上下文依赖偏移项。通过中心化处理，物品边缘项产生上下文共享的秩一评分分量，时变边缘项则形成低秩流行性子空间。实验使用合成数据和阿里巴巴、天梯公共交互日志验证。

Result: 将log p(i)从学习到的点积中分离后，流行度对齐的评分能量降低了98.6%。排列检验确认该降低对经验流行度方向具有特异性，表明分离操作精确移除了与流行度相关的主成分。

Conclusion: 推荐系统中的表示各向异性本质上是解码器层中长尾物品边缘分布的结果，而非Transformer编码器的特有属性。该发现为理解推荐模型中的流行度偏差提供了新的理论视角，并提示未来应关注训练数据分布本身的影响。

Abstract: Representation anisotropy in recommender systems is often attributed to Transformer architectures. We identify a more general source in the conditional training distribution. For any encoder using a dot-product softmax decoder, the population-optimal score decomposes into pointwise mutual information, an item-marginal term log p(i), and a context-dependent offset. After centering, the item marginal produces a context-shared rank-one score component, while time-varying marginals induce a low-rank popularity subspace. This score-level result does not imply universal embedding collapse because its transfer to embeddings depends on factorization geometry. Experiments on synthetic data and public Alibaba and Tianchi interaction logs support the proposed mechanism. Separating log p(i) from the learned dot product reduces the measured popularity-aligned score energy by 98.6 percent in a matched intervention. Permutation tests confirm that this reduction is specific to the empirical popularity direction. These results explain a class of apparent representation degeneration as a decoder-level consequence of long-tailed item marginals rather than a property unique to Transformer encoders.

</details>


### [971] [From Embedding Geometry to Spectral Search: Energy Dispersion Networks For Vector Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21535)
*Lorenzo Moriondo,Ilias Azizi*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 提出Graph Wiring框架，利用特征空间的谱图结构改进向量检索，通过谱索引(Spectral Indexing)和τ调制实现更优的语义对齐与自适应搜索，在基准和工业场景中验证有效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统向量检索仅依赖点态几何相似度，忽略了嵌入空间中特征向量的拓扑结构（谱图结构），导致头尾不一致、语义对齐不佳，且缺乏RAG流水线所需的灵活自适应搜索能力。

Method: 提出Graph Wiring框架：1) 通过特征列向量的拓扑结构构建谱图；2) 提出Spectral Indexing，将谱信息与几何相似度耦合；3) 引入τ调制机制实现自适应搜索行为。

Result: 相比纯几何检索方法，改进了头尾一致性和语义对齐；通过τ调制提供了灵活的搜索行为；在基准和工业设置中进行了评估（基于开源arrowspace库）。

Conclusion: 特征空间不应仅从点态几何角度分析，其谱图结构能显著提升检索质量；Graph Wiring框架为RAG等现代检索任务提供了更灵活、语义更一致的解决方案。

Abstract: Vector spaces, such as embedding spaces that encode dense semantic information, need not be analyzed solely through pointwise geometry. They can also be interpreted as energy networks through the spectral graph induced by the topology of their column vectors, i.e., their feature-space structure. Building on this perspective, we introduce Graph Wiring, a general framework for exploiting feature-space spectral structure, together with Spectral Indexing, its task-specific instantiation for vector search. By coupling geometric similarity with spectral information, the proposed method improves head-tail coherence and semantic alignment relative to purely geometric retrieval methods. It further supports adaptive search behavior through tau-modulation, providing the flexibility increasingly required by modern Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines. We present the complete algorithmic pipeline, establish its theoretical foundation through epiplexity, and evaluate the approach across benchmark and industrial settings using the open-source arrowspace library.

</details>


### [972] [CRAwLeR -- Cross-Reference Aware Legal Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21676)
*Maciej Jalocha,William Michelsen*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出CRAwLeR，一个针对法律文本中交叉引用感知的块检索基准数据集。通过自动化pipeline检测法律交叉引用、生成真正需要上下文的查询，并构建了丹麦语和波兰语两个数据集。人工验证显示约80%的查询确实需要上下文，但最佳模型Recall@10仅达55-59%，差距主要来自上下文LLM而非检索器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有上下文感知块检索基准多依赖改造现有任务项，难以证明查询真正需要上下文，导致分数解读困难。作者聚焦于法律交叉引用这一明确定义的现象，旨在构建一个具有构念效度的基准数据集。

Method: pipeline包含：检测法律交叉引用→识别查询候选→将目标块链接到相关上下文→使用LLM生成需要上下文的查询→通过对抗性非上下文基线和保证提示进行过滤。构建了丹麦语(CRAwLeR-DK)和波兰语(CRAwLeR-PL)两个数据集，并提供了Anthropic风格的上文化基线。

Result: 人工分析显示约80%的随机采样查询确实针对标注目标块且需要上下文。最佳模型Recall@10在丹麦语数据集达55%，波兰语数据集达59%。消融和失败分析表明，剩余差距主要来自上文化LLM而非检索器。即使目标块在前十被检索到，标注的上下文块通常排名更高。

Conclusion: CRAwLeR是首个在上下文感知块检索中仔细考虑构念效度并基于狭窄明确定义现象检视结果的数据集。该基准具有挑战性但未被解决，揭示了当前方法在利用交叉引用上下文方面的局限性。

Abstract: Existing benchmarks for context-aware chunk retrieval rely heavily on repurposed task items and rarely demonstrate that their queries genuinely require context, making score interpretation difficult. We focus on a specific kind of context dependence, legal cross-references, and introduce CRAwLeR, an operationalization of a narrow, well-defined phenomenon: cross-reference-aware context utilization for chunk retrieval in legal documents. Our pipeline detects legal cross-references, identifies query candidates, links target chunks to their relevant context, generates context-demanding queries with an LLM, and filters them through both an adversarial non-contextual baseline and an assurance prompt. We release CRAwLeR-DK and CRAwLeR-PL, Danish and Polish datasets built with this pipeline, alongside a strong Anthropic-style contextualization baseline. Manual analysis finds that approximately 80% of randomly sampled queries genuinely target the labelled target chunk and require context, with failures following systematic and named patterns. The benchmarks are hard but not solved: best Recall@10 reaches 55% on CRAwLeR-DK and 59% on CRAwLeR-PL. Ablation and failure analysis attribute the remaining gap to the contextualising LLM, not the retriever. Even when the target is retrieved in the top ten, labelled context chunks routinely outrank it. We are the first dataset for context-aware chunk retrieval to carefully consider construct validity and inspect our results in the light of such a narrow, well-defined phenomenon.

</details>


### [973] [The Pitfall of Scaling Up: Uncovering and Mitigating Popularity Bias Amplification in Scaling Transformer-based Recommenders](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21911)
*Weiqin Yang,Yue Pan,Chongming Gao,Sheng Zhou,Xiang Wang,Can Wang,Jiawei Chen*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文发现基于Transformer的序列推荐模型在扩大规模时，虽然准确率提升，但会加剧流行度偏差（过度推荐热门物品）。通过理论和实证分析，揭示了注意力聚合和前馈投影协同导致频谱坍塌是根本原因，并提出SPRINT方法通过约束注意力矩阵列和与前馈参数谱范数来缓解该问题，实验证明能同时提升准确率和长尾公平性，且支持从0.05M到0.34B参数的有利扩展。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Transformer推荐模型在规模扩展时会出现流行度偏差被放大的问题，导致马太效应和信息茧房，损害公平性与生态系统健康，成为可持续扩展的根本障碍。

Method: 提出SPRINT方法，通过两方面约束缓解频谱坍塌：(i) 限制注意力得分矩阵的最大列和；(ii) 限制前馈参数的谱范数。

Result: 实验表明SPRINT显著提升了推荐准确率和长尾公平性，在0.05M到0.34B参数规模下均表现出更有利的扩展行为。

Conclusion: 频谱坍塌是Transformer推荐模型扩展时流行度偏差放大的根本原因，SPRINT能有效缓解该问题，实现准确率与公平性的双赢，为可持续模型扩展提供可行方案。

Abstract: We identify a critical pitfall in scaling transformer-based sequential recommenders: while increasing model size improves recommendation accuracy, it simultaneously amplifies popularity bias. This bias drives systems to over-recommend popular items at the expense of niche ones, which not only undermines fairness but also degrades the broader ecosystem by reinforcing the Matthew effect and filter bubbles. Consequently, this bias amplification emerges as a fundamental obstacle to sustainable model scaling.
  Through comprehensive theoretical and empirical analyses, we uncover the root cause of this amplification. Our findings reveal that as model depth increases, the two core components of the transformer architecture, i.e., attention aggregation and feed-forward projections, synergistically induce severe spectral collapse in model predictions, which directly translates to the amplification of popularity bias. To address this challenge, we propose SPRINT (Scalable Popularity Regularization IN Transformers), which mitigates spectral collapse during scaling by constraining (i) the maximum column-sums of the attention score matrices and (ii) the spectral norms of the feed-forward parameters. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SPRINT significantly improves both accuracy and long-tail fairness. Crucially, it yields more favorable scaling behaviors when expanding model sizes from 0.05M to 0.34B parameters. The code is available at https://github.com/Tiny-Snow/GenRec.

</details>


### [974] [A feasibility study on filtering low-accessibility web pages considering color vision deficiency](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22095)
*Ryota Mizutani,Shiori Nakayama,Masateru Tsunoda*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本研究旨在通过自动过滤低可访问性网页来提升色觉缺陷人群的网页无障碍体验，实验表明预测模型AUC最高达0.76。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 通用设计日益重要，尤其是针对色觉缺陷（CVD）人群的色彩通用设计（CUD）。网页作为重要信息媒介，亟需提升其可访问性。

Method: 提出一种自动过滤低可访问性网页的方法，使用预测模型对网页进行评估，并在21个网页上进行实验验证。

Result: 预测模型能够以合理准确度识别低可访问性网页，最高AUC达到0.76。

Conclusion: 自动过滤方法具有一定可行性，有助于提升网页的色彩通用设计和可访问性。

Abstract: Recently, the importance of universal design has increased. Color universal design (CUD) is one type of universal design that takes people with color vision deficiency (CVD) into consideration. Websites are important media for providing various types of information and functions. Therefore, it is essential to enhance the accessibility of web pages by incorporating CUD principles. The goal of our study is to help improve the accessibility of web pages. Our approach is to automatically filter low-accessibility web pages. To evaluate the feasibility of this approach, we conducted an experiment using 21 web pages. The prediction model identified low-accessibility pages with reasonable accuracy, achieving a maximum AUC of 0.76.

</details>


### [975] [Novelty-Aware Agentic Retrieval: Comparing Research Contributions Through Structured Multi-Step Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22151)
*Shou-Tzu Han*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 提出Novelty-Aware Research Agent，一个在RAG管道上叠加多步推理的代理检索系统，能够生成结构化比较结果（论文贡献记录、重叠关系、问题×方法空白矩阵），超越了标准RAG仅返回排序列表的局限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 科学文献搜索中，仅返回排序列表不足以满足研究者需求，他们需要了解论文之间的关系、重叠、差异以及缺失的问题-方法组合。标准RAG独立总结文档，丢弃了这些比较信号。

Method: 构建了一个六组件代理检索系统：查询分析、ReAct风格检索循环、相关性排序、模式引导的贡献提取、三遍比较代理、答案生成。在100篇论文语料上支持五种结构化比较能力。

Result: 标准RAG不支持任何结构化比较能力；主查询平均Precision@5=1.000，nDCG@5=0.752；模式合规率86.7%；空白矩阵间隙精度0.600；对比检索结果多样性高（平均Jaccard 0.12）。

Conclusion: 代理检索能够在保持查询敏感性的同时提供结构化比较信号，但存在延迟-结构化权衡，受限于语料规模、作者标注和有限的独立评估。

Abstract: Scientific literature search is an information retrieval (IR) task in which ranked lists are insufficient: a researcher entering a new area needs to know not only which papers are relevant, but how they relate, where they overlap, how they differ, and what problem-method combinations are absent. Standard retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) summarizes documents independently, discarding this comparative signal. We present the Novelty-Aware Research Agent, a prototype agentic retrieval system that layers structured multi-step reasoning on a RAG pipeline through six typed-contract components: query analysis, a ReAct-style retrieval loop, relevance ranking, schema-guided contribution extraction, a three-pass comparison agent, and answer generation. Beyond returning relevant papers, it produces structured comparison artifacts: per-paper contribution records, paper-level overlaps, and a problem x method gap matrix. On a 100-paper corpus, the system supports five structured comparison capabilities that a standard RAG baseline supports none of, while remaining query-sensitive: across three main queries no paper appears in all three top-5 sets (mean pairwise Jaccard 0.12), and an extended seven-query evaluation holds the pattern across ten queries (mean Jaccard 0.115, 18 of 29 retrieved papers query-exclusive). Under author-assigned graded relevance the ranker attains mean Precision@5 1.000 and nDCG@5 0.752 on the main queries, ahead of BM25, dense, and hybrid retrieval; over ten queries Precision@5 is non-saturated at 0.980 with nDCG@5 0.739. Schema compliance is 86.7% on the main queries and 84.0% over the ten-query set, and validating 20 sampled empty gap-matrix cells yields a gap precision of 0.600. We discuss the latency-structure trade-off in agentic retrieval and identify corpus scale, author-assigned labels, and limited independent evaluation as the main limitations.

</details>


### [976] [Music Playlist Captioning at Scale with Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22460)
*Mathieu Delcluze,Léa Briand,Benjamin Chapus,Deniz Mekik,Guillaume Salha-Galvan*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: Deezer在2025年部署了基于大语言模型的自动播放列表描述系统，用于Daily Mix功能，通过自然语言描述帮助用户理解推荐内容，显著提升了用户参与度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 音乐流媒体平台（如Deezer）需要大规模地为个性化推荐播放列表生成自然语言描述，以帮助用户理解推荐内容背后的逻辑，但这一任务在规模化部署上具有挑战性。

Method: 利用大语言模型（LLMs）的最新进展，从多种数据源以受控方式生成描述性字幕，并将该系统部署于Deezer的Daily Mix功能中。

Result: 该系统已在数百万用户使用的Daily Mix功能中上线，并带来了用户参与度的显著提升。

Conclusion: 对未改变的推荐内容进行语义层面的框架性描述，能够显著影响用户对个性化在线体验的感知，展示了自然语言描述在推荐系统中的实用价值。

Abstract: Music streaming services such as Deezer often recommend personalized playlists to users. Playlist captioning, which involves describing these playlists in natural language, is essential for helping users understand the content behind each recommendation, yet remains challenging at scale. This paper presents the automatic playlist captioning system deployed on Deezer in 2025 to address this challenge. Leveraging recent advances in large language models (LLMs) to generate descriptive captions from diverse data sources in a controlled manner, this system now powers the Daily Mix feature, used by millions of users. This deployment has led to significant improvements in user engagement, highlighting how the semantic framing of an unchanged recommendation shapes user perception in online personalized experiences.

</details>


### [977] [All Relations Lead to Rome: Automated Knowledge Graph Creation and Question Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22645)
*Matthijs Jansen op de Haar,Tobias Stähle,Lorenzo Gatti*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 提出了ARLtR框架，统一构建知识图谱、嵌入和基于事实的问答对，并以罗马帝国历史数据集实例化（含19,000+实体、16,000文本块、8,400问答对），支持混合检索和语义引导评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据集要么支持基于向量的非结构化文本检索，要么支持知识图谱推理，缺乏统一表示；同时现有基准很少提供与语料对齐的真实实体、关系和基于事实的问答对。

Method: 提出ARLtR统一框架，自动构建知识图谱、嵌入以及明确基于提取实体、关系和支撑文本证据的问答对。将知识图谱符号表示与稠密检索表示紧密耦合。

Result: 以罗马帝国历史为领域实例化数据集，包含超过19,000个实体、16,000个文本块和8,400个问答对。

Conclusion: ARLtR通过在一个统一资源中耦合符号图表示和稠密检索表示，促进了混合检索系统和语义引导方法的评估与开发。

Abstract: Large language models have substantially improved information retrieval and question answering; however, existing datasets generally support either vector-based retrieval over unstructured text or reasoning over knowledge graphs, without providing a unified representation that combines both paradigms. Moreover, current benchmarks rarely provide ground-truth entities, relations, and fact-grounded question-answer pairs aligned with the underlying corpus. To address this gap, we introduce All Relations Lead to Rome (ARLtR), a unified framework for automated knowledge graph construction and fact-grounded question-answer generation. ARLtR jointly constructs a knowledge graph, embeddings, and question-answer pairs that are explicitly grounded in extracted entities, relations, and supporting textual evidence. We further instantiate the framework as a historical dataset centered on the Roman Empire, comprising over 19,000 entities, 16,000 chunks, and 8,400 question-answer pairs (https://huggingface.co/datasets/FaynePro/all-relations-lead-to-rome). By tightly coupling symbolic graph representations with dense retrieval representations, ARLtR facilitates the evaluation and development of hybrid retrieval systems and semantic steering approaches within a single coherent resource.

</details>


### [978] [PA-User: Simulating Trust and Verification under AI-Generated Content](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22738)
*Saber Zerhoudi*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 提出PA-User用户模拟器，通过检测努力预算、信任组件和决策规则，模拟用户对AI生成内容的检测行为，在HC3数据集上实现更优的信任校准和决策效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有信息检索用户模拟器未考虑用户对AI生成内容的不信任和验证成本，而真实用户已习惯混合内容环境且难以辨别AI内容，需要更真实的模拟模型。

Method: 提出PA-User框架，包含三个组件：1) 检测努力预算（跨会话恢复的验证成本）；2) 信任组件（对每个来源类别的Beta信念更新）；3) 决策规则（根据当前信任、努力和领域风险选择接受/验证/丢弃）。提出两种验证与确认性质作为理论保障。

Result: 在HC3语料库上，PA-User信任校准误差0.162（无信任组件基线为0.356），高风险后悔降至0.122（相对降低29%），验证34.5%的结果（无努力预算基线的一半）。

Conclusion: PA-User通过分离三个机制实现了可诊断性，是首个模拟用户对AI内容检测行为的检索用户模拟器，为更真实的用户行为建模提供了框架。

Abstract: Most users of online information now assume that some of what they read has been written, edited, or selected by an AI model. Hybrid cases are the hardest to tell apart: human prose rewritten by a language model, AI-curated lists presented as editorial, retrieval-augmented answers composed on the fly from human sources. Users cannot reliably distinguish these cases, and the ongoing cost of checking what is genuine has become part of how they search. Current user simulators in information retrieval do not model this. We propose PA-User, a user simulator with three new components: a detection-effort budget that is spent on verification and recovers between sessions; a trust component that holds a separate Beta belief over the factuality of each source class (domain by provenance) and updates from observed outcomes; and a decision rule that picks accept, verify, or discard for each result, conditional on current trust, current effort, and per-domain stakes. We state two verification-and-validation (V\&V) properties of the framework. The trust posterior converges to the true class factuality (face validity). Each component's contribution to any observable can be isolated by ablation (structural validity). On the HC3 corpus (85,449 paired human and ChatGPT answers in five domains), PA-User reaches a trust-calibration error of $0.162$, against $0.356$ for any configuration without the trust component. PA-User reduces high-stakes regret from $0.171$ to $0.122$ ($29\%$ relative) against an always-accept ablation, and verifies $34.5\%$ of results, half the rate of an ablation with no effort budget. Each single-mechanism ablation isolates one component, which makes the framework individually diagnosable.

</details>


### [979] [HAKARI-Bench: A Lightweight Benchmark for Comparing Retrieval Architectures and Efficiency Settings under Unified Conditions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22778)
*Yuichi Tateno*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: HAKARI-Bench是一个轻量级检索基准，通过构建小型数据集（Nano-sets）实现快速模型选择，在55个模型上的排名与MTEB、BEIR等大型基准的Spearman相关系数>0.97。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有检索基准（如MTEB、BEIR）虽然全面但过于沉重，不利于开发迭代；且缺乏在同一条件下比较不同模型及其效率变体的基础设施。

Method: 将现有检索套件重构为小规模Nano-sets，统一格式覆盖35个基准、551个任务、43种语言，支持5种检索家族（BM25、密集、稀疏、后期交互、重排序器）及其效率变体的同条件比较。

Result: 在55个模型上，HAKARI-Bench的整体排名与官方MTEB检索v2、MMTEB v2检索和English BEIR（完整版）的Spearman相关系数均超过0.97。

Conclusion: HAKARI-Bench不替代完整评估，而是用于快速模型选择、回归检测以及质量-效率帕累托前沿的读取。代码、数据和排行榜以MIT许可证发布。

Abstract: With the rapid spread of retrieval-augmented generation and semantic search, choosing the right embedding and retrieval configuration is increasingly hard. Large retrieval benchmarks are comprehensive but too heavy to rerun during development, and there is little infrastructure for comparing production settings--dimensionality reduction, quantization, reranking--across many models under identical conditions. We present HAKARI-Bench, a lightweight benchmark that reconstructs existing retrieval suites into small datasets (Nano-sets): 35 benchmarks and 551 tasks across 43 languages in a unified format, enabling same-condition, model-agnostic comparison of five retrieval families (BM25, dense, sparse, late interaction, rerankers) and their efficiency variants. Across 55 models, its overall ranking reproduces the official MTEB retrieval v2, MMTEB v2 retrieval, and English BEIR (full) at Spearman >0.97. HAKARI-Bench does not replace full evaluation; it enables rapid model selection, regression detection, and reading the quality-efficiency Pareto frontier. Code, data, and leaderboard are released under the MIT license.

</details>


### [980] [Breaking the Evaluation Paradox: Evaluating High-Entropy Search with Computationally Irreducible Constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22783)
*Juntao Wu,Wei Wen,Xianting Huang,Shuai Pang,Ruizhi Qiao,Xing Sun,Ke Wang*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出VERITAS框架，通过计算不可约约束（如哈希验证）构建可验证的稀疏答案搜索任务，打破LLM穷尽搜索评估中因人类无法标注完整真实值而产生的悖论，实现无限量、低成本、高精度的基准测试与训练数据生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM穷尽搜索能力评估存在根本性悖论：验证搜索完整性需要完整的真实值，但高熵枚举任务中人类无法创建完整真实值，导致基准测试系统性惩罚表现优于人工标注者的模型。当前评估依赖部分标注、LLM法官或单答案问题，无法处理真正的穷尽搜索场景。

Method: VERITAS框架基于计算不可约约束原理，设计不可优化的新约束（如哈希计算），创建可验证的稀疏答案搜索任务。这些约束易于验证但LLM和搜索引擎无法优化，迫使代理真正遍历整个搜索空间。框架可自动生成无限测试用例，具备完美真实值和精确难度控制，边际成本由哈希计算主导。

Result: VERITAS打破了评估悖论，提供了可自动生成、完美真实值、精确难度控制的无限量测试用例，边际成本极低（主要是哈希计算开销），既能作为鲁棒基准评估系统探索能力，也能规模化生成训练数据以提升模型能力。

Conclusion: 通过从模拟混乱现实转向构建计算纯净挑战的范式转换，VERITAS解决了LLM穷尽搜索评估的核心难题，为评估和训练生成式搜索代理提供了可扩展、高保真的解决方案。

Abstract: Evaluating the exhaustive search capabilities of large language models (LLMs) is plagued by a fundamental paradox: verifying completeness requires complete ground truth, yet high-entropy enumeration tasks make such ground truth impossible for humans to create. This causes benchmarks to systematically penalize models for outperforming their human annotators. Despite rapid progress in web-search and deep research agents -- which now issue hundreds of queries, traverse diverse sites, and synthesize long reports -- evaluation still largely relies on partially annotated answer sets, LLM-based judges, or single-answer questions that avoid genuinely exhaustive search scenarios. We break this paradox by shifting the evaluation paradigm from simulating a messy reality to constructing computationally pure challenges. We introduce VERITAS (Verifiable Traversal Assessment for Search), a framework built on the principle of computationally irreducible constraints. By introducing novel, non-optimizable constraints, we create verifiable, sparse-answer search tasks that are computationally equivalent to exhaustive enumeration. These constraints are easy to verify but impossible for LLMs or search engines to optimize, forcing agents to genuinely traverse the entire search space. VERITAS can automatically generate a virtually infinite number of test cases with perfect ground truth and precise difficulty control, with marginal instance cost dominated by hash computations. This provides not only a robust benchmark for evaluating systematic exploration under uncertainty but also a scalable method for generating training data to improve these crucial, yet underdeveloped, capabilities.

</details>


### [981] [Towards Fast Domain Adaptation and Fine-Grained User Simulation for Evaluating Conversational Recommender Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22803)
*Yuanzi Li,Quanyu Dai,Xueyang Feng,Zihang Tian,Junhao Wang,Xu Chen,Zhenhua Dong,Huifeng Guo*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 提出AdaptSim，一个自适应领域和自动提示调优的用户模拟器，用于更有效、更可靠地评估对话推荐系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于LLM的用户模拟器存在三大局限：缺乏领域适应性、用户建模有限、评估有效性不足，亟需更灵活、更真实的评估框架。

Method: 通过自动提示生成和开放动作机制减少人工成本并提升跨领域灵活性；采用"先思考后回应"的受控文本生成策略实现语言风格的细粒度控制；引入基于BFS的轮次级成对比较框架进行综合评估。

Result: 在三个领域和四个LLM上的实验表明，AdaptSim能生成真实对话，实现对CRS能力和鲁棒性的高效可靠评估。

Conclusion: AdaptSim通过自适应领域建模和自动提示调优，有效克服了现有用户模拟器的关键缺陷，为CRS评估提供了更全面、可靠的解决方案。

Abstract: Conversational Recommender Systems (CRSs) enhance user experience through multi-turn interactions, yet evaluating their performance remains challenging. While Large Language Model (LLM) based user simulators are effective, they suffer from three key limitations: (1) Lack of Domain Adaptability: Reliance on fixed prompts and predefined action spaces hinders transfer to novel domains; (2) Limited User Modeling: Inability to accurately replicate subtle linguistic styles and dynamic preferences; (3) Insufficient Evaluation Validity: Existing simulators fail to adequately assess fundamental capabilities and system robustness. To overcome these, we propose AdaptSim, an Adaptive domain and automatic prompt tuning User Simulator. AdaptSim offers an efficient framework for evaluating CRSs by enabling realistic behavior modeling and diverse style generation. It leverages automatic prompt generation and an open action mechanism to reduce manual effort and improve cross-domain flexibility. For response generation, we employ controlled text generation with a "think-then-respond" strategy for fine-grained control over language style. For CRS evaluation, AdaptSim incorporates a novel Breadth-First Search (BFS)-based, turn-level pairwise comparison framework for comprehensive assessment. Extensive experiments across three domains and four LLMs demonstrate that AdaptSim generates realistic dialogues, enabling a highly effective and reliable evaluation of CRS capabilities and robustness.

</details>


### [982] [Trajectory-Based Recommender Systems as Control Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22957)
*Eriam Schaffter,Ahmed Bounekkar,Elsa Negre*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出基于控制理论的轨迹推荐系统（TBRS）框架，将长期目标驱动型推荐系统统一形式化，并以教育推荐系统为例验证其可行性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有轨迹推荐系统（TBRS）研究众多但缺乏统一框架，学界尚未认识到长期目标导向型推荐系统应作为独立研究方向。

Method: 梳理相关文献，识别TBRS与传统RS的差异；以控制理论为基础构建TBRS形式化框架；以教育推荐系统（ERS）作为案例验证框架适用性。

Result: 提出控制理论可作为TBRS问题形式化与求解的恰当基础；论证了轨迹（trajectory）是TBRS的核心定义性要素；展示了ERS可被纳入TBRS框架建模。

Conclusion: TBRS应作为一个独立的研究领域被重视，控制理论为其提供了坚实的理论基础，教育推荐系统是典型应用场景。

Abstract: Recommender Systems (RS) are a key research domain and play an increasing role in our content-overwhelmed lives. In this paper, we explore Trajectory-Based Recommender Systems (TBRS), a subfield for which many related studies exist, yet still lacking a common framework. We argue that Control Theory provides an appropriate foundation for formalizing and solving TBRS problems. TBRS, sometimes named Long Term goal Recommender Systems, share core principles with classical RS, but at their core lies the concept of a trajectory, a defining element that makes these systems a singular category. To date, most RSs that include a notion of goal or long-term objective, when this goal is explicit, have not been recognized as having specific characteristics that make them worth regrouping under a dedicated field of research. We review related work, observe how they differ from already conceptualized RSs, and sketch the foundations of a possible theoretical framework based on control theory. Finally, we show how Educational Recommender Systems (ERS), intrinsically long-term and goal-driven, can be modeled within the proposed TBRS framework.

</details>


### [983] [LLM-as-a-Judge for Reliable and Explainable Offline Evaluation in Top-K Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22961)
*Yue Que,Junyi Zhou,Xiaokun Zhang,Haiming Jin,Qiao Xiang,Chen Ma*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出基于LLM的可靠且可解释的离线推荐评估框架，通过语义代理和推理-评分流程解决传统Top-K评估中可靠性和可解释性不足的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有离线推荐评估依赖Top-K指标和硬性ID匹配，存在两大缺陷：(1) 可靠性不足——观测到的用户反馈受限于不完整和有偏见的物品曝光，无法真实反映用户偏好；(2) 可解释性差——Top-K指标仅提供数值分数，缺乏支撑性洞察，加剧了离线评估的黑箱性质。

Method: 提出LLM-as-a-Judge框架：(1) 从用户文本行为构建语义代理表示真实偏好，在语义空间而非ID空间进行灵活匹配，提升可靠性；(2) LLM Judge采用推理-评分流程(reasoning-then-scoring)生成相关性判断及明确依据，确保可解释性；(3) 将个体分数聚合为全局Top-K指标，并为每次偏好命中或缺失提供合理性说明。

Result: 大量实验表明，所提出的LLM Judge框架在评估可靠性、可解释性和鲁棒性方面均表现出色。

Conclusion: LLM-as-a-Judge框架有效克服了传统离线评估的局限性，为推荐系统评估提供了更可靠且可解释的替代方案。

Abstract: Recommendation evaluation plays a crucial role in guiding the refinement and deployment of recommender systems. Most existing trials rely on offline evaluation using Top-K metrics computed over holdout user behaviors. However, we identify two fundamental limitations that undermine their ability to deliver reliable and explainable evaluations. Regarding reliability, offline evaluation treats observed user feedback as a proxy of true preferences and enforces rigid ID matching between the proxy and recommendation. In practice, feedback collections are inherently shaped by incomplete and biased item exposure, leading to distorted and unreliable assessments. Regarding explainability, Top-K metrics only establish numerical scores without offering meaningful insights to support them, thereby reinforcing the black-box nature of offline evaluation.
  In this paper, we propose a reliable and explainable LLM-as-a-Judge framework for offline recommendation evaluation. To enhance reliability, we introduce a semantic proxy from user textual behaviors to represent their true preferences. This proxy allows for more flexible matching between preferences and recommendations in the semantic space, rather than depending on the holdout feedback. To ensure explainability, the LLM Judge adopts a reasoning-then-scoring process to generate relevance judgments along with explicit rationale. Finally, we aggregate the individual scores into global Top-K metrics to quantify overall recommendation quality, and provide justification for each preference hit or miss. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the LLM Judge achieves solid reliability, explainability, and robustness in evaluation.

</details>


### [984] [Who Owns the AI Recommendation? A Multi-Industry Empirical Map of Brand Category Ownership Across Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23057)
*Dmitrij Żatuchin*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文分析了3个AI模型在50个品牌、5个行业中250个类别的3750次查询结果，发现AI推荐集中度中等（基尼系数均值0.28），竞争真空罕见（8%），跨模型头部品牌一致性仅41.6%，并提出了三个竞争情报指标：类别所有权指数、竞争真空指数和位移分数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型正改变消费者发现产品与服务的方式，AI生成推荐的竞争结构成为品牌的战略关切，但缺乏大规模实证研究来回答"模型推荐哪个品牌、推荐集中度多高"这一基本问题。

Method: 在3个模型（GPT-5.2、Gemini 3 Flash、Perplexity sonar-pro）上，对5个行业50个品牌的250个无品牌类别查询各重复5次（掷骰子稳定性协议），共收集3750条响应。提出三个指标：类别所有权指数（COI）、竞争真空指数（CVI）、位移分数（DS），并用基尼系数衡量集中度、BERTopic验证类别一致性。

Result: 推荐集中度中等（基尼系数均值0.28，低于0.60幂律阈值）；竞争真空仅占8%；跨模型顶部品牌一致性41.6%；位移分数行业差异大（咨询0.4:1至单向替代4.3:1，均值2.4:1）；BERTopic仅4.2%的主题簇超出原始类别。

Conclusion: AI推荐并未呈现强烈的"赢家通吃"格局，三个指标为竞争情报分析提供了可复现的候选程序，有待未来研究进一步验证。

Abstract: Large language models now mediate how buyers discover products and services, making the competitive structure of AI-generated recommendations a strategic concern for brands. A basic question has lacked large-scale empirical answers: in a given category, which brand does a model recommend, and how concentrated is that ownership? Across 3,750 responses spanning 50 brands, five industries, and 250 brand-free category queries on three models (GPT-5.2, Google Gemini 3 Flash, and Perplexity sonar-pro), each query repeated five times under a dice-roll stability protocol, we propose three exploratory metrics: the Category Ownership Index (COI), a brand's share of mentions within a category; the Competitive Vacuum Index (CVI), flagging categories with no single leader; and the Displacement Score (DS), quantifying asymmetric substitution between brand pairs. In this sample, recommendation concentration was moderate: the mean Gini coefficient was 0.28 (95% CI [0.16, 0.41]), below the 0.60 power-law threshold we set. Competitive vacuums were rare, appearing in 8.0% of queries, so the models named at least one sampled brand in most cases. Cross-model agreement on the top-recommended brand was 41.6%: a top position on one model did not reliably hold on another. Displacement was industry-dependent, from co-recommendation in consulting (0.4:1) to one-directional substitution up to 4.3:1, with an unweighted mean of 2.4:1 across the five industries. A BERTopic check placed only 4.2% of discovered topic clusters outside the original categories. Within the scope studied, these results sit in tension with a strong winner-takes-all narrative around AI recommendation, and the three metrics offer a candidate, reproducible procedure for competitive-intelligence analysis that future work can validate.

</details>


### [985] [The Language Blind Spot: How Query Language and Brand Recognition Tier Shape AI-Constructed Brand Reputation Across Twelve European Languages](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23165)
*Dmitrij Żatuchin*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文研究了大型语言模型（LLMs）在不同语言下对品牌声誉的构建差异。通过查询66个品牌、12种语言、3个LLM，生成了35,640条回复。发现：AI构建的声誉具有语言依赖性，跨语言相似度0.825；查询语言对品牌推荐的影响远大于对描述的影响；英语审计会低估本地品牌的AI可见性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM声誉监控主要集中在英语环境，默认英语查询能代表全貌。但这一假设缺乏验证，可能导致对非英语市场品牌声誉的系统性误判。

Method: 对66个品牌（来自11个北欧、波罗的海和中欧市场）使用3个LLM（GPT-5.4、Gemini 3.1 Pro、Perplexity Sonar Pro），在12种语言（4个语系：日耳曼、乌拉尔、波罗的、斯拉夫）中查询，生成35,640条回复。使用多语言嵌入（BGE-M3）进行跨语言比较，无需翻译。

Result: 1）AI声誉具有语言依赖性：跨语言余弦相似度均值0.825，同语系内更高（0.844 vs 0.820），情感因语言而异（F=268.5, eta²=0.077），聚类可恢复斯拉夫和波罗的语系（cophenetic=0.915）；2）查询语言大幅改变品牌推荐：从英语到本地语言，本地品牌推荐提升0.80，全球跨国品牌仅0.15（t=-8.84, p<0.001），情感无反向变化；3）稳定性上模型差异大于语言差异（eta²_model=0.32 vs eta²_language=0.01）。

Conclusion: 仅用英语进行AI声誉监控存在语言盲区，尤其低估本地总部品牌的可见性。建议多语言审计以获取全面评估。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) increasingly mediate how people form impressions of organisations, yet most monitoring is done in English, assuming an English query returns a representative picture. We measure how far that holds. We queried three grounded LLMs (GPT-5.4, Gemini 3.1 Pro, Perplexity Sonar Pro) about 66 brands from eleven Northern, Baltic, and Central European markets, in twelve languages across four families (Germanic, Uralic, Baltic, Slavic), generating 35,640 responses. Multilingual embeddings (BGE-M3) allow cross-language comparison without translation. Three results emerge. First, AI-constructed reputation is language-bound: mean cross-language cosine similarity is 0.825, same-family responses are more similar than cross-family (0.844 vs 0.820; d = 0.31), and sentiment varies by language (F = 268.5, eta^2 = 0.077), with Uralic and Baltic languages most positive and Germanic, including English, most critical; clustering recovers the Slavic and Baltic families (cophenetic 0.915). Second, query language shifts which brands are recommended far more than how they are described: moving from an English query to a brand's home language raises recommendation share by 0.80 for local champions but only 0.15 for global multinationals (t = -8.84, p < 0.001), with no comparable reversal in sentiment. An English-only audit therefore understates a local champion's AI visibility. Third, response stability varies more with model choice than with language (eta^2_model = 0.32 vs eta^2_language = 0.01, on a five-iteration replication over a 20-brand subset). These results indicate that English-only AI reputation monitoring leaves a measurable language blind spot, concentrated in the visibility of locally headquartered brands.

</details>


### [986] [URecJPQ: Memory-efficient Multimodal Recommendation Models through RecJPQ in Large-Scale Scenarios](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23291)
*Giuseppe Spillo,Zixuan Yi,Aleksandr Petrov,Cataldo Musto,Craig Macdonald,Iadh Ounis*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出URecJPQ，一种联合乘积量化方法，用于大规模多模态top-k推荐。核心思想是将用户/物品表示为由共享子嵌入拼接而成，而非完全独立学习，从而大幅减少参数量。实验表明，在三个数据集上，该方法可减少86-99%的参数量和检查点大小，同时仅造成轻微精度损失（平均recall下降8.5%，NDCG下降16%），在某些场景下甚至性能提升高达85%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模推荐系统中，ID嵌入需大量内存资源；多模态推荐虽能提升性能但进一步加剧资源消耗。现有方法难以在保持推荐质量的同时大幅降低存储和计算开销。

Method: 提出URecJPQ（Joint Product Quantization），将每个用户/物品表示为多个共享子嵌入的拼接，而非完整独立嵌入。通过共享子嵌入显著减少可训练参数总量，适用于多模态大规模推荐场景。

Result: 在电影、婴儿用品、体育用品三个数据集上，检查点大小减少86%-98%，可训练参数减少98%-99%；平均recall下降8.5%，NDCG下降16%；婴儿用品领域性能提升高达85%。

Conclusion: URecJPQ能有效应用于多模态推荐场景，在大规模设置下大幅降低内存需求，仅带来轻微精度损失，部分领域甚至能提升性能，验证了共享子嵌入表示的可行性和高效性。

Abstract: Training state-of-the-art recommendation models on large-scale industrial datasets can be a challenging task due to the high number of users and items which are typically represented through ID embeddings. Such embeddings typically require a large amount of memory resources, which are not always available. This problem is further exacerbated in multimodal recommendation, in which multimodal item features generally improve recommendation performance, but require more resources to encode. In this paper, we introduce URecJPQ, a Joint Product Quantization method specifically designed for large-scale and multimodal top-k recommendation tasks, in which the vast number of users and items, combined with the available modalities, further increases the memory demands for the computation. The core idea is to represent each user/item not as a fully learned, unique embedding, but rather as a concatenation of shared learned sub-embeddings, thereby significantly reducing the total number of trainable parameters. Our experiments on three widely-used datasets across different domains (movies, baby and sports products) show that URecJPQ can be effectively applied to multimodal recommendation settings.
