In large scale scenarios, we observe a substantial reduction in checkpoint sizes and the number of trainable parameters (ranging from 86% to 98%, and 98% to 99%, respectively), with only a marginal decrease in accuracy (8.5% on recall and 16% on NDCG, on average), and, in some cases, even performance improvements (up to 85%), as in the baby products domain. Our codebase is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/large_mmrecjpq-839B/README.md.

</details>


### [987] [Analysis of Autonomic Regulation in Cancer Survivors During Daily Physical Activity: A Real-World Wearable ECG Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23461)
*Sajad Farrokhiørcidicon,Lerick Sequeira,Shanna L. Burke,Waltenegus Dargie,Christian Poellabauer*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本研究利用可穿戴ECG设备在真实环境中收集数据，结合加速度计和陀螺仪进行活动强度分割，并采用鲁棒的ECG处理流程（含R波检测和无注释信号质量评估），发现乳腺癌幸存者在轻度和中度活动中持续表现出心率升高和心率变异性降低（如中度活动下RMSSD从39.7ms降至22.1ms，SDNN从42.6ms降至25.1ms），且提出的信号质量评估框架实现了接近完美的有效RR比率（0.99），无需手动标注。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究乳腺癌幸存者在真实世界环境中使用可穿戴设备采集的心率和心率变异性数据，探究其自主神经调节功能是否受损，并解决运动伪影和信号退化带来的分析挑战。

Method: 结合加速度计和陀螺仪数据进行活动强度分割（轻、中、剧烈），采用含R波检测和无注释信号质量评估的ECG处理流程，使用30秒、1分钟和2分钟窗口计算HR和HRV指标，比较乳腺癌幸存者与健康对照组。

Result: 乳腺癌幸存者在各活动水平下心率升高、HRV降低；轻度活动时HR从95.7bpm升至103.4bpm；中度活动时RMSSD从39.7ms降至22.1ms，SDNN从42.6ms降至25.1ms；信号质量评估框架的有效RR比率达0.99。

Conclusion: 乳腺癌幸存者存在受损且活动依赖的自主神经调节，运动感知的活动分割和鲁棒的ECG质量控制对真实世界可穿戴生理监测至关重要。

Abstract: This study investigates heart rate (HR) and heart rate variability (HRV) responses to physical activity in breast cancer survivors using wearable electrocardiogram (ECG) data collected in real-world settings. Reliable HRV analysis in such environments is challenging due to motion artifacts and activity-related signal degradation. To address this, we use an approach that combines accelerometer and gyroscope data for activity intensity segmentation (light, moderate, vigorous) with a robust ECG processing pipeline incorporating R-peak detection and annotation-free signal quality assessment. Because vigorous activity produced unreliable HRV estimates, analyses focused on light and moderate activity levels. Using 30~s, 1~min, and 2~min windows, HR and HRV metrics were computed and compared between breast cancer survivors and healthy controls. Cancer survivors consistently exhibited elevated HR and reduced HRV across activity levels. During light activity, HR increased from 95.7~bpm in controls to 103.4~bpm in cancer survivors. Differences became more pronounced during moderate activity, where RMSSD decreased from 39.7~ms to 22.1~ms and SDNN from 42.6~ms to 25.1~ms. Statistical analyses showed significant group differences with strong and consistent effects across observations. In addition, the proposed ECG quality assessment framework reliably identified high-quality signal segments, achieving near-perfect valid RR ratios (0.99) without manual annotations. Overall, these findings demonstrate impaired and activity-dependent autonomic regulation in cancer survivors and highlight the importance of motion-aware activity segmentation and robust ECG quality control for accurate physiological monitoring in real-world wearable settings.

</details>


### [988] [Improving Long-Context Retrieval with Multi-Prefix Embedding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23642)
*Zhenglin Yu,Xueguang Ma,Shengyao Zhuang,Zhichao Xu,Luyu Gao,Crystina Zhang,Jimmy Lin*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出Multi-Prefix Embedding（MPE）方法，通过在文档中嵌入EOS标记进行分块，在单次前向传播中提取每个分块边界的嵌入向量，兼顾了细粒度检索与存储效率，在多个长上下文基准上表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长上下文检索中，单向量嵌入丢失细节，而token级多向量方法存储成本过高，现有方法在效率与性能间存在矛盾。

Method: MPE将文档用EOS标记划分为多个块，通过单次因果前向传播编码整个序列，在每个块边界提取一个嵌入向量，支持跨块上下文保留、块级MaxSim匹配，并仅使用文档级相关性标签训练。

Result: 在MLDR-en、BrowseComp-Plus和LongEmbed基准上，MPE在性能上达到或超过单向量、独立分块和多向量基线方法。

Conclusion: MPE不仅检索性能优越，还提供自然的来源归因机制，可用于定位证据块。

Abstract: Long-context retrieval exposes a tension: single-vector embeddings lose fine-grained detail, while token-level multi-vector methods incur prohibitive storage. We propose Multi-Prefix Embedding (MPE), which partitions a document into chunks separated by EOS tokens, encodes the full sequence in a single causal forward pass, and extracts one embedding at each prefix boundary. MPE retains cross-chunk context, enables chunk-level MaxSim matching, and trains with only document-level relevance labels. Experiments on MLDR-en, BrowseComp-Plus, and LongEmbed show that MPE is competitive with or outperforms single-vector, independent-chunk, and multi-vector baselines, while providing a natural source attribution mechanism for locating evidence chunks.

</details>


<div id='cs.GT'></div>

# cs.GT [[Back]](#toc)

### [989] [Equilibrium with Internal Transfers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20960)
*Mingyang Liu,Gabriele Farina,Asuman Ozdaglar*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文提出通过预算平衡的内部转移支付（SETE和M-SETE）来改善纳什均衡的社会福利，证明在社会最优策略可被维持为均衡，并设计了多项式时间算法和去中心化学习动态。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 纳什均衡的社会福利可能远低于最优，且计算NE通常是难解的。作者希望设计一种机制，在不破坏玩家独立决策的前提下，通过内部转移支付来激励合作，提升社会福利。

Method: 提出两种增强博弈模型：SETE（玩家间承诺非负转移支付，仅在接收方不偏离时支付）；M-SETE（引入中介，强制支付计划和策略绑定）。对多矩阵博弈证明社会最优策略可被维持，并给出多项式算法和去中心化学习动态。

Result: 在多项式矩阵博弈中，社会福利函数的每个驻点（包括社会最优）都可被维持为SETE；M-SETE可支持任何有限博弈中的社会最优策略，且保持预算平衡。SETE对应增强博弈的agent normal form的NE，M-SETE则是增强博弈本身的NE。

Conclusion: 内部转移支付可以在保持均衡路径上独立决策的前提下改善社会福利和计算效率；如果需要完全的序贯博弈稳定性，则需中介的绑定机制。

Abstract: Nash equilibrium (NE) arises from selfish utility maximization, yet its social welfare can be arbitrarily far from optimal. Moreover, computing an NE is intractable in general. We study augmented game models in which players use budget-balanced internal transfers to improve incentives before play. We first introduce \emph{Self-Enforcing Transfer Equilibrium} (SETE), where players commit to nonnegative peer-to-peer transfers that are paid only if the recipient does not deviate from a prescribed strategy. For polymatrix games, we show that every stationary point of the social welfare function, in particular any socially optimal strategy profile, can be sustained as a SETE. This induces a Nash equilibrium in the agent normal form of the corresponding augmented game. We further propose a polynomial-time algorithm and a decentralized learning dynamic to compute such product-form equilibria. We then introduce \emph{Mediated Self-Enforcing Transfer Equilibrium} (M-SETE), where a mediator makes both the payment schedule and the prescribed strategies binding offers. This additional enforcement resolves the agent-normal-form limitation: an M-SETE is a Nash equilibrium of the augmented game itself, not merely of its agent normal form, and any socially optimal strategy profile can be supported as an M-SETE in any finite game while preserving budget balance. Thus, internal transfers improve welfare and computation while preserving independent play on the equilibrium path. When full sequential-game stability is required, binding mediation provides the corresponding implementation.

</details>


### [990] [Do Large Language Model Voters Strategize? An Oracle-Based Benchmark for Manipulation under Voting Rules](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21001)
*Seyed Pouyan Mousavi Davoudi,Alireza Amiri-Margavi,Amin Gholami Davodi,Hamidreza Hasani Balyani,Arshia Gharagozlou*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个基于预言机的基准测试，用于评估大语言模型（LLM）在集体选择投票中能否发现并执行策略性投票（即操纵投票），覆盖多种投票规则和提示条件，为后续研究提供精确的校准基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 策略性投票是集体选择的经典问题，现有研究缺乏针对LLM能否发现并执行投票操纵的系统性评估，且缺乏无需人工标注的基准测试。

Method: 构建一个精确预言机，枚举LLM投票者的所有可行报告，计算真实结果，识别所有有利可图的操纵报告，并记录最佳可达结果。覆盖plurality、Borda、approval、instant-runoff和Copeland-style投票规则；设置真诚、策略、公民和专家四种提示条件。使用600个平衡选举实例，4种模型配置×4种提示条件，共产生9600个响应。

Result: 提供了精确的预言机校准基线，包含操纵发现率、最优操纵率、虚假操纵率、接近命中率和无效选票率等指标，为后续模型结果提供边界和上下文。

Conclusion: 该基准将策略性投票行为转化为精确的反事实评估，将"LLM投票者是否真诚或策略性投票"这一研究问题转变为可复现的社会选择实验。

Abstract: Strategic voting is a canonical failure mode for collective choice: a voter may obtain a more preferred outcome by reporting a ballot that differs from its true preferences. This paper introduces an oracle-based benchmark for testing whether large language model (LLM) voters can discover and execute such manipulations. Each instance gives an LLM voter a true preference ranking, the other voters' ballots, a deterministic voting rule, and a prompt condition. An exact oracle enumerates every feasible report by the LLM voter, computes the sincere outcome, identifies all profitable reports, and records the best achievable outcome. The benchmark therefore supplies ground truth for strategic success without human labels or subjective grading of explanations. The benchmark covers plurality, Borda, approval, instant-runoff voting, and Copeland-style pairwise majority voting; prompt conditions separate sincere, strategic, civic, and expert framings. To keep the primary study defensible while preserving the main comparisons, the registered core design fixes a single electorate size, uses 600 balanced election instances, and produces 9,600 model--prompt responses when run with four model configurations and four prompt conditions. Because existing peer-reviewed work does not report manipulation discovery, optimal manipulation, false manipulation, near-miss, or invalid-ballot rates for this exact task, we do not impute LLM performance from unrelated studies. Instead, we report exact oracle-calibration baselines that bound and contextualize subsequent model results. By reducing strategic-voting behavior to exact counterfactual evaluation, the benchmark turns the question ``Do LLM voters vote sincerely or strategically?'' into a reproducible social-choice experiment.

</details>


### [991] [OPC UA Shared-Memory: Conceptual Elaboration and Prototypical Implementation Using Iceoryx2](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21328)
*Thomas Barth,Tatjana Legler,Achim Wagner,Martin Ruskowski*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文针对虚拟化自动化软件中异构应用共存于边缘设备的问题，提出将OPC UA通信模型扩展至微服务架构，并采用共享内存（Iceoryx2）作为传输机制以优化主机内通信延迟。原型评估显示共享内存方案在用户级函数调用延迟上显著优于传统TCP方案，但仍存在优化空间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着自动化软件虚拟化发展，传统OT软件与IT驱动的现代微服务应用共存于同一主机，对通信基础设施的延迟和确定性提出严格要求，而现有中间件缺乏对标准化语义信息模型与现代通信需求的融合支持。

Method: 基于先前工作，扩展OPC UA通信模型以适配微服务应用，采用Iceoryx2共享内存作为主机内通信传输机制，并通过修改OPC UA库实现原型系统。

Result: 共享内存方案在用户级函数调用延迟上始终低于传统TCP OPC UA实现，但当前实现约束下仍存在进一步优化空间。

Conclusion: 共享内存作为OPC UA在微服务架构中主机内通信的传输机制是可行且有效的，能显著降低延迟，未来可进一步优化实现以发挥全部潜力。

Abstract: The increasing virtualization of automation software leads to a growing co-location of heterogeneous applications on shared edge devices and fosters modern microservice architectures. As a result, traditional OT software and modern IT-driven higher-level automation applications are increasingly executed on the same host system, enabling improved synergy and more efficient interaction between these domains. This development imposes strict requirements on the underlying communication infrastructure, particularly regarding latency and determinism. At the same time, there is a lack of middleware solutions that address these requirements while incorporating modern concepts such as standardized semantic information models. Building on prior work, this paper further develops a previously proposed concept of extending the OPC UA communication model for microservice-based applications and suggests the use of shared-memory as a transport mechanism for optimized intra-host communication. In addition, a first prototypical implementation based on a modified OPC UA library using Iceoryx2 is presented and evaluated in a proof-of-concept study by measuring function call latencies on the user level and comparing them to the original TCP-based OPC UA implementation. The results show consistently lower latencies for the shared-memory approach, while also indicating remaining optimization potential due to current implementation constraints.

</details>


### [992] [Simultaneously Efficient Allocation of Indivisible Items Across Multiple Dimensions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21346)
*Yasushi Kawase,Bodhayan Roy,Mohammad Azharuddin Sanpui*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文提出多维有效分配（MDEA）模型，研究不可分物品在多个属性维度上的同时效率保证，揭示了在功利主义社会福利（USW）和平均主义社会福利（ESW）下效率保障的尖锐最坏情况边界，包括近似比与维度数量ℓ的本质依赖关系以及相关帕累托概念的计算复杂性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实中的分配问题通常涉及多个评判维度，单一目标的优化可能掩盖其他维度的严重损失，因此需要研究如何在多个维度上同时保证分配效率。

Method: 引入多维有效分配（MDEA）模型，每个智能体在每个维度上具有可加性估值；从精确效率和近似效率两个角度，分析USW和ESW下的同时效率保证边界；并引入三种多维帕累托最优概念，刻画其关系与计算复杂性。

Result: 对于精确效率：USW下最大化达到最优的维度数可实现c/ℓ近似（c为常数），且依赖关系本质不可改进；ESW下即使判断两个维度能否同时最优也是NP难的（二值估值）。对于近似同时效率：每个维度的保证阈值为1/ℓ量级，且任何渐近更好的依赖关系都不可能。同时刻画了三种多维帕累托概念的关系与复杂度。

Conclusion: 多维分配中同时效率保障存在本质的维度诅咒，即效率保证与维度数量ℓ成反比，且这一边界在信息论意义下是紧的。

Abstract: Many allocation problems are intrinsically multidimensional, since an item may contribute differently to several criteria, and optimizing a single aggregate objective can hide severe losses in other dimensions. We study how much efficiency can be guaranteed simultaneously when indivisible items have multiple attributes. To this end, we introduce the \emph{multidimensional efficient allocation} (MDEA) model, where each agent has an additive valuation in each dimension, and investigate simultaneous efficiency under utilitarian social welfare (USW) and egalitarian social welfare (ESW). Our results reveal a sharp worst-case frontier. For exact efficiency, maximizing the number of dimensions attaining the USW optimum admits a $c/\ell$-approximation for every fixed constant $c$, and this dependence on the number $\ell$ of dimensions is essentially unavoidable; for ESW, even deciding whether two dimensions can be optimized simultaneously is NP-hard with binary valuations. For approximate simultaneous efficiency in every dimension, we identify a tight threshold of order $1/\ell$, showing that such guarantees always exist for both USW and ESW, while any asymptotically better dependence on $\ell$ is impossible, even for binary valuations. Finally, we introduce three natural multidimensional Pareto notions and characterize both their relationships and their computational complexity.

</details>


### [993] [Prophet Inequalities under Local Differential Privacy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21524)
*Achraf Azize,Mathieu Molina,Hugo Richard,Vianney Perchet*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究了在本地差分隐私（LDP）约束下的最优停止问题和先知不等式。每个到达的独立值仅通过ε-LDP机制的报告被观察到，决策者需设计LDP机制并选择不可逆的停止时间来最大化期望的真实值。文章刻画了最优LDP停止规则，证明了简单的二元机制（随机响应+动态规划阈值）即可实现最优。相对于最优非私有在线策略，紧竞争比为e^ε/(n-1+e^ε)；相对于LDP先知，紧竞争比为(1+e^{-ε})/2。增加隐私会缩小LDP先知的优势，缩小速度快于在线性能的下降，从而缩小性能差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在线决策平台（如招聘市场、拍卖）面临效率与隐私保护之间的张力。参与者的个人信息（如考试成绩、估价）敏感，担心数据转售或声誉损害而不愿分享。此外，平台可能不可信甚至有意转售数据，因此需要不依赖可信中央聚合器的本地隐私保证。本文首次在本地差分隐私框架下研究最优停止问题和先知不等式。

Method: 本文形式化了LDP下的最优停止问题：每个独立到达的值通过ε-LDP机制生成报告，决策者需同时设计LDP机制和选择停止规则。通过理论分析，刻画了最优LDP停止规则，证明随机响应式报告（简单二元机制）结合动态规划阈值规则可以实现最优。并分别针对最优非私有在线策略和LDP先知两个基准，推导了紧竞争比。

Result: 对于最优非私有在线策略，紧竞争比为e^ε/(n-1+e^ε)，在完全隐私（ε→0）时为1/n，无隐私（ε→∞）时为1。对于LDP先知（观察完整私有化序列后再决策），紧竞争比为(1+e^{-ε})/2，完全隐私时为1，无隐私时为经典的1/2。增加隐私时，LDP先知的优势缩小速度快于在线性能下降，从而缩小了两者之间的性能差距。

Conclusion: 本文首次将本地差分隐私引入最优停止与先知不等式研究，证明了简单二元LDP机制（随机响应）足以实现最优，并给出了与隐私预算ε相关的紧竞争比。核心发现是：隐私保护对在线决策性能的影响是平滑的，且增加隐私会更快地削弱先知信息优势，使得在线策略与先知策略的性能差距缩小。

Abstract: Many online decision platforms, from hiring marketplaces to auctions, face a tension between efficient decision-making and the protection of participants' privacy. Personal information, such as a candidate's test score or a bidder's valuation linked to protected data, is sensitive, and fear of data resale or reputational harm can make participants reluctant to share it. Furthermore, platforms can be untrusted or even incentivized to resell data, making local privacy guarantees that do not rely on a trusted centralized curator preferable. We initiate the study of optimal stopping and prophet inequalities under local differential privacy (LDP). Each of $n$ independent arriving values is observed only through reports generated by an $\varepsilon$-LDP mechanism. The decision maker must design the $\varepsilon$-LDP mechanisms, and choose an irrevocable stopping time to maximise the expected selected true value. We characterize the optimal online stopping rule under LDP and show that simple binary mechanisms suffice: an optimal LDP stopping rule can be implemented via a randomized-response-type report and a dynamic-programming threshold rule. We then quantify performance via tight competitive ratios against two benchmarks. Relative to the optimal non-private online policy, we prove a tight worst-case competitive ratio of $e^{\varepsilon}/(n - 1 + e^{\varepsilon})$, interpolating between $1/n$ (full privacy) and $1$ (no privacy). Relative to an LDP prophet, who designs $\varepsilon$-LDP mechanisms but observes the full privatized sequence before deciding what to select, we prove a tight competitive ratio of $(1 + e^{-\varepsilon})/2$, interpolating between $1$ (full privacy) and the classical $1/2$ bound (no privacy). Notably, increasing privacy shrinks the LDP prophet's advantage faster than it degrades online performance, closing the performance gap.

</details>


### [994] [Quantifying Theoretical AI Alignment Guarantees: Receiver-Utility Bounds in Bayesian Persuasion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22226)
*Eric Yachbes,Eva Tardos*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究当AI代理与人类用户目标不一致时，AI通过信息操纵（隐藏或扭曲证据）对决策的影响。作者利用贝叶斯说服模型，证明在AI最大化自身目标（让人类猜1）的情况下，人类能获得的最优效用与仅使用先验的效用之比不超过3/2，并给出了边界紧致性分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实中AI系统可能存在目标错位（misalignment），导致AI代理策略性地操纵传递给人类用户的信息。该研究希望量化这种信息操纵对人类决策效用的影响上限。

Method: 采用贝叶斯说服（Bayesian persuasion）框架，将世界状态建模为比特串。AI发送者观察到真实状态，人类接收者仅知先验分布。AI希望让接收者猜测尽可能多的比特为1，而人类希望正确猜出每个比特。通过数学推导，求解在发送者最优信号方案下接收者效用的上界。

Result: 1) 对任意先验分布μ，R_max(μ)/R_0(μ) ≤ 3/2；2) 对接近独立乘积先验的分布（μ(x) ≥ (1-η)π_μ(x)），有R_max(μ) ≤ R_0(μ) + ηn；3) 存在一个六比特先验分布，使得比值为39/31 > 5/4，证明5/4的通用上界不成立。

Conclusion: 在目标错位的情况下，AI的信息操纵对人类的效用损害存在理论上界（3/2），且该上界在特定条件下可进一步改进。研究同时证明了某些简单上界（如5/4）并不普遍成立，揭示了问题结构的复杂性。

Abstract: Misalignment can change how information moves from an AI agent to a human user. We model this as an information advantage: the AI agent observes the world state, while the human receiver only knows a prior and must act after seeing the agent's signal. A strategic AI sender may withhold evidence or garble information in order to steer the human's decision. We ask how much useful information can still reach the human when the AI optimizes a misaligned objective. We study a Bayesian persuasion model in which the world state is a bit string, the human receiver wants to guess the bits correctly, and a single AI sender wants the receiver to guess as many bits as possible as $1$. For a prior $μ$, let $R_0(μ)$ be the receiver's utility from using only the prior, and let $R_{\max}(μ)$ be the largest receiver utility among signaling schemes that are optimal for the sender. We prove $R_{\max}(μ)/R_0(μ)\leq 3/2$. This bound improves for priors close to the independent product prior with the same marginals: if $μ(x)\geq (1-η)π_μ(x)$ for every state $x$, then $R_{\max}(μ)\leq R_0(μ)+ηn$. We also give a six-bit prior for which $R_{\max}(μ)/R_0(μ)=39/31>5/4$, so no universal $5/4$ bound is possible.

</details>


### [995] [Mitigating Polycentric Conflict-Trap Risk in Mali via Intergenerational Volterra Mean-Field-Type Games](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22512)
*Hamidou Tembine*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文构建了一个跨代Volterra均值场博弈框架，揭示马里及萨赫勒地区冲突是一个自再生的系统，由代际怨愤、气候冲击、资源掠夺和战争经济共同驱动，并提出了切断暴力反馈循环的最优政策设计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 马里及周边国家的持续性不稳定并非临时安全危机，而是一个自我再生的冲突系统，现有研究缺乏能同时捕捉代际记忆、历史不信任、复仇激励和制度演变的统一分析框架。

Method: 提出了一个创新的跨代Volterra均值场博弈框架（intergenerational Volterra mean-field-type game framework），将历史记忆、继承性不信任、复仇激励和制度响应共同纳入动态分析。

Result: 揭示了战争企业家通过全球金融网络循环利用非法资源收入的机制，以及粗放的监管干预可能意外加速武装团体招募的现象；设计了能改变系统长期几何结构、切断暴力财务与心理反馈循环的最优政策。

Conclusion: 该框架为萨赫勒及更广泛地区的持久和平、平民保护和多代结构性稳定提供了可预测、可操作的行动架构。

Abstract: Persistent instability in Mali and neighboring countries is not a temporary security crisis but a self-reproducing conflict system sustained by intergenerational grievances, climatic shocks, predatory resource extraction, and decentralized war economies. We develop a novel intergenerational Volterra mean-field-type game framework in which historical memory, inherited distrust, revenge incentives, and evolving institutional responses jointly shape future conflict dynamics. The analysis reveals how war entrepreneurs recycle illicit resource revenues through global financial networks, while blunt regulatory interventions can inadvertently accelerate recruitment into armed groups. We design optimal policies that alter the system's long-run geometry, severing the financial and psychological feedback loops of violence. The resulting framework provides a predictive and actionable architecture for durable peace, civilian protection, and multi-generational structural stabilization in the Sahel and beyond.

</details>


### [996] [A Note on Learnable Nash Equilibrium](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22701)
*Songzi Du*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 论文定义了一种称为“可学习”的纳什均衡概念，即在近视调整动态下渐进稳定的均衡。对于一般的对称双人博弈，证明了纳什均衡是可学习的当且仅当其指数为+1。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 作者希望从动态调整的视角理解纳什均衡的稳定性，提出一种基于近视调整动态的“可学习性”概念，并找出可学习均衡的判定条件。

Method: 定义了纳什均衡的“可学习性”为存在某种近视调整动态使其渐进稳定。然后针对一般对称双人博弈，通过数学推导证明可学习性与均衡指数为+1等价。

Result: 在一般对称双人博弈中，纳什均衡是可学习的当且仅当其指数为+1。

Conclusion: 该结果为纳什均衡的稳定性提供了新的动态视角，指数+1成为判断均衡是否在近视调整下可学习的关键指标。

Abstract: A Nash equilibrium is learnable if there exists a myopic adjustment dynamic for which it is asymptotically stable. In generic symmetric two-player games, a Nash equilibrium is learnable if and only if it has index +1.

</details>


### [997] [Neural Parameter Calibration for Finite-State Mean Field Games](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23155)
*Anna C. M. Thöni,Grégoire Lambrecht,Gökçe Dayanıklı,Yonathan Efroni,Tal Kachman,Mathieu Laurière*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于神经网络的学习框架，用于从观测到的群体动态中学习参数化、有限状态的均值场博弈，通过隐式微分反向传播博弈均衡梯度，无需观测个体动作或奖励，并在四个系统中验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 均值场博弈的参数（如偏好、约束、交互关系）往往是隐藏的，难以理论推导或直接观测，限制了其在真实场景中的应用。本文旨在解决这一参数校准问题。

Method: 将参数校准建模为逆问题，利用隐式微分通过博弈均衡进行反向传播，构建全可微的神经网络框架，支持灵活的参数路径估计（包含状态和时间依赖）。

Result: 在四个复杂度递增的系统（从合成线性二次基准到真实城市交通数据集）上验证了框架的有效性，并提供了离散时间公式中梯度计算的精确性证明。

Conclusion: 该方法无需个体动作或奖励观测即可学习MFG参数，为均值场博弈在实际部署中的参数估计提供了可行的逆问题求解方案。

Abstract: Mean field games efficiently approximate a very large population of strategic agents. While these games can aid the understanding of complex systems, their deployment in real-world settings is challenged by the specification of their parameters: mean field games (MFGs) often involve hidden preferences, constraints, and interactions that can rarely be theoretically derived or directly observed. To address this gap, we present a neural network-based framework for learning parametric, finite-state MFGs from observed population dynamics. To do so, we formulate the parameter calibration as an inverse problem and use implicit differentiation to backpropagate through the games' equilibrium. The resulting approach is fully differentiable and enables us to estimate flexible trajectory-wise parameter paths, including state- and time-dependent specifications without requiring observations of the individual agents' actions or rewards. We provide a proof for the exactness of the gradient computation in a discrete-time formulation. We validate our framework through numerical experiments across four systems of increasing complexity, ranging from synthetic linear-quadratic benchmarks to real-world urban mobility datasets.

</details>


### [998] [Mixed Voting Rules for Participatory Budgeting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23320)
*Anton Baychkov,Markus Brill,Markus Utke*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种混合投票规则框架，用于参与式预算选举，通过组合多个规则（如Greedy和MES）分别使用部分预算，在功利主义福利和比例代表性之间取得更优权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有PB投票规则往往只优化单一目标（如Greedy最大化功利福利，MES追求比例代表），但实际中同时实现多个目标更为理想。受议会选举混合成员制启发，作者希望设计能兼顾多目标的混合投票规则。

Method: 提出混合投票规则框架：多个规则按序使用部分预算依次添加项目。重点研究MES如何修正前期规则造成的代表失衡，提出多种调整选民预算的方法。理论分析满足EJR+等比例公理的程度，并在真实PB选举数据上进行实证分析。

Result: 理论证明其中一种调整方法能改进天然的比例基线，并将此正向结果扩展到一般加性满意度函数。实验表明混合规则能在功利福利与比例性间取得更优权衡，识别出进一步改进的细化方案，并将框架推广到Greedy和MES之外的规则。

Conclusion: 混合投票规则是平衡PB选举中多个目标的有效框架，特别是在比例性和功利福利之间；MES通过合理的预算调整可有效弥补前期规则的不足。

Abstract: Designing and analyzing voting rules for Participatory Budgeting (PB) elections is an active research area in computational social choice. Many PB voting rules aim to optimize a specific objective. For instance, the ubiquitous Greedy rule attempts to maximize utilitarian welfare, while the Method of Equal Shares (MES) aims to achieve proportional representation. However, it is often desirable to achieve good outcomes on multiple objectives rather than a close-to-perfect outcome for one. Inspired by mixed-member systems for parliamentary elections, we introduce mixed voting rules for PB. These are composed of a sequence of two or more rules that can each spend some fraction of the overall budget in order to add projects to the set selected by earlier rules. We develop a theoretical framework for formulating and analyzing mixed PB voting rules, and explore how existing rules can be adapted to this framework. We particularly focus on MES and its potential to address imbalances in representation created by earlier rules. We propose different ways to adjust MES voter budgets based on how satisfied voters are with previously chosen projects, and examine how well the resulting rules approximate well-known proportionality axioms such as EJR+. In particular, we show that one of these methods improves upon a natural proportionality baseline. We also extend our main positive result to general additive satisfaction functions. We complement our theoretical results with an extensive empirical analysis of real-world PB elections. Our experiments show that mixed rules can achieve favorable trade-offs between utilitarian welfare and proportionality. We identify several refinements that further improve their performance, and apply our framework to PB rules beyond Greedy and MES.

</details>
